תְּהִלִּים

Psalm 1

1
Happy is the one who has not followed the counsel of the wicked,or taken the path of sinners,or joined the company of the insolent;
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הָאִישׁ haish אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo הָלַךְ halakh בַּעֲצַת baatzat רְשָׁעִים reshaim וּבְדֶרֶךְ uvderekh חַטָּאִים chataim לֹא lo עָמָד amad וּבְמוֹשַׁב uvmoshav לֵצִים letzim לֹא lo יָשָׁב yashav
2
rather, this one delights in GOD’s teaching,and studies that teaching day and night.
כִּי ki אִם im בְּתוֹרַת betorat יְהֹוָה Adonai חֶפְצוֹ cheftzo וּבְתוֹרָתוֹ uvtorato יֶהְגֶּה yehgeh יוֹמָם yomam וָלָיְלָה valaylah
3
Such a one is like a tree planted beside streams of water,which yields its fruit in season,whose foliage never fades,and whatever it produces thrives.
וְהָיָה vehayah כְּעֵץ keetz שָׁתוּל shatul עַל al פַּלְגֵי palgey מָיִם mayim אֲשֶׁר asher פִּרְיוֹ piryo יִתֵּן yiten בְּעִתּוֹ beito וְעָלֵהוּ vealehu לֹא lo יִבּוֹל yibol וְכֹל vekhol אֲשֶׁר asher יַעֲשֶׂה yaaseh יַצְלִיחַ yatzliach
4
Not so the wicked;rather, they are like chaff that wind blows away.
לֹא lo כֵן khen הָרְשָׁעִים harshaim כִּי ki אִם im כַּמֹּץ kamotz אֲשֶׁר asher תִּדְּפֶנּוּ tidfenu רוּחַ ruach
5
Therefore the wicked will not survive judgment,nor will sinners, in the assembly of the righteous.
עַל al כֵּן ken לֹא lo יָקֻמוּ yakumu רְשָׁעִים reshaim בַּמִּשְׁפָּט bamishpat וְחַטָּאִים vechataim בַּעֲדַת baadat צַדִּיקִים tzadikim
6
For GOD cherishes the way of the righteous,but the way of the wicked is doomed.
כִּי ki יוֹדֵעַ yodea יְהֹוָה Adonai דֶּרֶךְ derekh צַדִּיקִים tzadikim וְדֶרֶךְ vederekh רְשָׁעִים reshaim תֹּאבֵד toved

Psalm 2

1
Why do nations assemble,and peoples plot vain things;
לָמָּה lamah רָגְשׁוּ ragshu גוֹיִם goyim וּלְאֻמִּים ulumim יֶהְגּוּ yehgu רִיק rik
2
kings of the earth take their stand,and regents intrigue togetheragainst the one anointed by GOD?
יִתְיַצְּבוּ yityatzvu מַלְכֵי malkhey אֶרֶץ eretz וְרוֹזְנִים veroznim נוֹסְדוּ nosdu יָחַד yachad עַל al יְהֹוָה Adonai וְעַל veal מְשִׁיחוֹ meshicho
3
“Let us break the cords of their yoke,shake off their ropes from us!”
נְנַתְּקָה nenatkah אֶת et מוֹסְרוֹתֵימוֹ mosroteymo וְנַשְׁלִיכָה venashlikhah מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu עֲבֹתֵימוֹ avoteymo
4
The One who is enthroned in heaven laughs;my Sovereign mocks at them.
יוֹשֵׁב yoshev בַּשָּׁמַיִם bashamayim יִשְׂחָק yischak אֲדֹנָי Adonai יִלְעַג yilag לָמוֹ lamo
5
Then [God] speaks to them in anger,terrifying them with divine rage,
אָז az יְדַבֵּר yedaber אֵלֵימוֹ eleymo בְאַפּוֹ veapo וּבַחֲרוֹנוֹ uvacharono יְבַהֲלֵמוֹ yevahalemo
6
“But I have installed My kingon Zion, My holy mountain!”
וַאֲנִי vaani נָסַכְתִּי nasakhti מַלְכִּי malki עַל al צִיּוֹן tzion הַר har קדְשִׁי kdshi
7
Let me tell of the decree: GOD said to me,“You are My son,I have fathered you this day.
אֲסַפְּרָה asaprah אֶל El חֹק chok יְהֹוָה Adonai אָמַר amar אֵלַי elay בְּנִי beni אַתָּה atah אֲנִי ani הַיּוֹם hayom יְלִדְתִּיךָ yelidtikha
8
Ask it of Me,and I will make the nations your domain;your estate, the limits of the earth.
שְׁאַל sheal מִמֶּנִּי mimeni וְאֶתְּנָה veetnah גוֹיִם goyim נַחֲלָתֶךָ nachalatekha וַאֲחֻזָּתְךָ vaachuzatkha אַפְסֵי afsey אָרֶץ aretz
9
You can smash them with an iron mace,shatter them like potter’s ware.”
תְּרֹעֵם teroem בְּשֵׁבֶט beshevet בַּרְזֶל barzel כִּכְלִי kikhli יוֹצֵר yotzer תְּנַפְּצֵם tenaptzem
10
So now, O kings, be prudent;accept discipline, you rulers of the earth!
וְעַתָּה veatah מְלָכִים melakhim הַשְׂכִּילוּ haskilu הִוָּסְרוּ hiuasru שֹׁפְטֵי shoftey אָרֶץ aretz
11
Serve GOD in awe;tremble with fright,
עִבְדוּ ivdu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּיִרְאָה beyirah וְגִילוּ vegilu בִּרְעָדָה biradah
12
pay homage in good faith, lest [God] be angered, and your way be doomedin the mere flash of divine anger.Happy are all who take refuge in [God].
נַשְּׁקוּ nashku בַר var פֶּן pen יֶאֱנַף yeenaf וְתֹאבְדוּ vetovdu דֶרֶךְ derekh כִּי ki יִבְעַר yivar כִּמְעַט kimat אַפּוֹ apo אַשְׁרֵי ashrey כּל kl חוֹסֵי chosey בוֹ vo

Psalm 3

1
A psalm of David when he fled from his son Absalom.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid בְּברְחוֹ bevrcho מִפְּנֵי mipney אַבְשָׁלוֹם avshalom בְּנוֹ beno
2
O ETERNAL One, my foes are so many!Many are those who attack me;
יְהֹוָה Adonai מָה mah רַבּוּ rabu צָרָי tzaray רַבִּים rabim קָמִים kamim עָלָי alay
3
many say of me,“There is no deliverance for him through God.” Selah.
רַבִּים rabim אֹמְרִים omrim לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi אֵין eyn יְשׁוּעָתָה yeshuatah לּוֹ lo בֵאלֹהִים velohim סֶלָה selah
4
But You, O ETERNAL One, are a shield about me,my glory, who holds my head high.
וְאַתָּה veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai מָגֵן magen בַּעֲדִי baadi כְּבוֹדִי kevodi וּמֵרִים umerim רֹאשִׁי roshi
5
I cry aloud to GOD,who answers me from the holy mountain. Selah.
קוֹלִי koli אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶקְרָא ekra וַיַּעֲנֵנִי vayaaneni מֵהַר mehar קדְשׁוֹ kdsho סֶלָה selah
6
I lie down and sleep and wake again,for GOD sustains me.
אֲנִי ani שָׁכַבְתִּי shakhavti וָאִישָׁנָה vaishanah הֱקִיצוֹתִי hekitzoti כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai יִסְמְכֵנִי yismkheni
7
I have no fear of the myriad forcesarrayed against me on every side.
לֹא lo אִירָא ira מֵרִבְבוֹת merivevot עָם am אֲשֶׁר asher סָבִיב saviv שָׁתוּ shatu עָלָי alay
8
Rise, O ETERNAL One!Deliver me, O my God!For You slap all my enemies in the face; You break the teeth of the wicked.
קוּמָה kumah יְהֹוָה Adonai הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni אֱלֹהַי elohay כִּי ki הִכִּיתָ hikita אֶת et כּל kl אֹיְבַי oyvay לֶחִי lechi שִׁנֵּי shiney רְשָׁעִים reshaim שִׁבַּרְתָּ shibarta
9
Deliverance is GOD’s;Your blessing be upon Your people! Selah.
לַיהֹוָה layhovah הַיְשׁוּעָה hayshuah עַל al עַמְּךָ amkha בִרְכָתֶךָ virkhatekha סֶּלָה selah

Psalm 4

1
For the leader; with instrumental music. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach בִּנְגִינוֹת binginot מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Answer me when I call,O God, my vindicator!You freed me from distress;have mercy on me and hear my prayer.
בְּקרְאִי bekri עֲנֵנִי aneni אֱלֹהֵי elohey צִדְקִי tzidki בַּצָּר batzar הִרְחַבְתָּ hirchavta לִּי li חנֵּנִי chneni וּשְׁמַע ushma תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati
3
You who side against me, how long will my glory be mocked,will you love illusions,have recourse to frauds? Selah.
בְּנֵי beney אִישׁ ish עַד ad מֶה meh כְבוֹדִי khevodi לִכְלִמָּה likhlimah תֶּאֱהָבוּן teehavun רִיק rik תְּבַקְשׁוּ tevakshu כָזָב khazav סֶלָה selah
4
Know that GOD keeps the faithful close; GOD hears when I call out.
וּדְעוּ udu כִּי ki הִפְלָה hiflah יְהֹוָה Adonai חָסִיד chasid לוֹ lo יְהֹוָה Adonai יִשְׁמַע yishma בְּקרְאִי bekri אֵלָיו elayv
5
So tremble, and sin no more;ponder it on your bed, and sigh. Selah.
רִגְזוּ rigzu וְאַל veal תֶּחֱטָאוּ techetau אִמְרוּ imru בִלְבַבְכֶם vilvavkhem עַל al מִשְׁכַּבְכֶם mishkavkhem וְדֹמּוּ vedomu סֶלָה selah
6
Offer sacrifices in righteousnessand trust in GOD.
זִבְחוּ zivchu זִבְחֵי zivchey צֶדֶק tzedek וּבִטְחוּ uvitchu אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai
7
Many say, “O for good days!”Bestow Your favor on us, O ETERNAL One.
רַבִּים rabim אֹמְרִים omrim מִי mi יַרְאֵנוּ yarenu טוֹב tov נְסָה nesah עָלֵינוּ aleynu אוֹר or פָּנֶיךָ paneykha יְהֹוָה Adonai
8
You put joy into my heartwhen their grain and wine show increase.
נָתַתָּה natatah שִׂמְחָה simchah בְלִבִּי velibi מֵעֵת meet דְּגָנָם deganam וְתִירוֹשָׁם vetirosham רָבּוּ rabu
9
Safe and sound, I lie down and sleep,for You alone, O ETERNAL One, keep me secure.
בְּשָׁלוֹם beshalom יַחְדָּו yachdav אֶשְׁכְּבָה eshkvah וְאִישָׁן veishan כִּי ki אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai לְבָדָד levadad לָבֶטַח lavetach תּוֹשִׁיבֵנִי toshiveni

Psalm 5

1
For the leader; on neḥiloth. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach אֶל El הַנְּחִילוֹת hanchilot מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Give ear to my speech, O ETERNAL One;consider my utterance.
אֲמָרַי amaray הַאֲזִינָהיְהֹוָה haazinahyhovah בִּינָה binah הֲגִיגִי hagigi
3
Heed the sound of my cry,my Sovereign and God,for I pray to You.
הַקְשִׁיבָה hakshivah לְקוֹל lekol שַׁוְעִי shavi מַלְכִּי malki וֵאלֹהָי velohay כִּי ki אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֶתְפַּלָּל etpalal
4
Hear my voice, O ETERNAL One, at daybreak;at daybreak I plead before You, and wait.
יְהֹוָה Adonai בֹּקֶר boker תִּשְׁמַע tishma קוֹלִי koli בֹּקֶר boker אֶעֱרךְ eerkh לְךָ lekha וַאֲצַפֶּה vaatzapeh
5
For You are not a God who desires wickedness;evil cannot abide with You;
כִּי ki לֹא lo אֵל El חָפֵץ chafetz רֶשַׁעאָתָּה reshaatah לֹא lo יְגֻרְךָ yegurkha רָע ra
6
the wanton cannot endure in Your sight.You detest all evildoers;
לֹא lo יִתְיַצְּבוּ yityatzvu הוֹלְלִים holelim לְנֶגֶד leneged עֵינֶיךָ eyneykha שָׂנֵאתָ saneta כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven
7
You doom those who speak lies;deceitful murderers GOD abhors.
תְּאַבֵּד teabed דֹּבְרֵי dovrey כָזָב khazav אִישׁ ish דָּמִים damim וּמִרְמָה umirmah יְתָעֵביְהֹוָה yetaevyhovah
8
But I, through Your abundant love, enter Your house;I bow down in awe at Your holy temple.
וַאֲנִי vaani בְּרֹב berov חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha אָבוֹא avo בֵיתֶךָ veytekha אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶה eshtachaveh אֶל El הֵיכַל heykhal קדְשְׁךָ kdshkha בְּיִרְאָתֶךָ beyiratekha
9
O ETERNAL One, lead me along Your righteous [path] because of my watchful foes;make Your way straight before me.
יְהֹוָה Adonai נְחֵנִי necheni בְצִדְקָתֶךָ vetzidkatekha לְמַעַן lemaan שׁוֹרְרָי shoreray (הושר) hvshr [הַיְשַׁר] hayshar לְפָנַי lefanay דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha
10
For there is no sincerity on their lips; their heart is [filled with] malice;their throat is an open grave;their tongue slippery.
כִּי ki אֵין eyn בְּפִיהוּ befihu נְכוֹנָה nekhonah קִרְבָּם kirbam הַוּוֹת hauot קֶבֶר kever פָּתוּחַ patuach גְּרֹנָם geronam לְשׁוֹנָם leshonam יַחֲלִיקוּן yachalikun
11
Condemn them, O God;let them fall by their own devices;cast them out for their many crimes,for they defy You.
הַאֲשִׁימֵם haashimem אֱלֹהִים Elohim יִפְּלוּ yiplu מִמֹּעֲצוֹתֵיהֶם mimoatzoteyhem בְּרֹב berov פִּשְׁעֵיהֶם pisheyhem הַדִּיחֵמוֹ hadichemo כִּי ki מָרוּ maru בָךְ vakh
12
But let all who take refuge in You rejoice,ever jubilant as You shelter them;and let those who love Your name exult in You.
וְיִשְׂמְחוּ veyismchu כל khl חוֹסֵי chosey בָךְ vakh לְעוֹלָם leolam יְרַנֵּנוּ yeranenu וְתָסֵךְ vetasekh עָלֵימוֹ aleymo וְיַעְלְצוּ veyaltzu בְךָ vekha אֹהֲבֵי ohavey שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
13
For You surely bless the righteous, O ETERNAL One,encompassing them with favor like a shield.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah תְּבָרֵךְ tevarekh צַדִּיק tzadik יְהֹוָה Adonai כַּצִּנָּה katzinah רָצוֹן ratzon תַּעְטְרֶנּוּ tatrenu

Psalm 6

1
For the leader; with instrumental music on the sheminith. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach בִּנְגִינוֹת binginot עַל al הַשְּׁמִינִית hashminit מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
O ETERNAL One, do not punish me in anger,do not chastise me in fury.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El בְּאַפְּךָ beapkha תוֹכִיחֵנִי tokhicheni וְאַל veal בַּחֲמָתְךָ bachamatkha תְיַסְּרֵנִי teyasreni
3
Have mercy on me, O ETERNAL One, for I languish;heal me, O ETERNAL One, for my bones shake with terror.
חנֵּנִי chneni יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki אֻמְלַל umlal אָנִי ani רְפָאֵנִי refaeni יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki נִבְהֲלוּ nivhalu עֲצָמָי atzamay
4
My whole being is stricken with terror,while You, ETERNAL One—O, how long!
וְנַפְשִׁי venafshi נִבְהֲלָה nivhalah מְאֹד meod (ואת) vt [וְאַתָּה] veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai עַד ad מָתָי matay
5
O ETERNAL One, turn! Rescue me!Deliver me as befits Your faithfulness.
שׁוּבָה shuvah יְהֹוָה Adonai חַלְּצָה chaltzah נַפְשִׁי nafshi הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni לְמַעַן lemaan חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha
6
For there is no praise of You among the dead;in Sheol, who can acclaim You?
כִּי ki אֵין eyn בַּמָּוֶת bamavet זִכְרֶךָ zikhrekha בִּשְׁאוֹל bishol מִי mi יוֹדֶה yodeh לָּךְ lakh
7
I am weary with groaning;every night I drench my bed,I melt my couch in tears.
יָגַעְתִּי yagati בְּאַנְחָתִי beanchati אַשְׂחֶה ascheh בְכל vekhl לַיְלָה laylah מִטָּתִי mitati בְּדִמְעָתִי bedimati עַרְשִׂי arsi אַמְסֶה amseh
8
My eyes are wasted by vexation,worn out because of all my foes.
עָשְׁשָׁה asheshah מִכַּעַס mikaas עֵינִי eyni עָתְקָה atkah בְּכל bekhl צוֹרְרָי tzoreray
9
Away from me, all you evildoers,for GOD heeds the sound of my weeping.
סוּרוּ suru מִמֶּנִּי mimeni כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven כִּי ki שָׁמַע shama יְהֹוָה Adonai קוֹל kol בִּכְיִי bikhyi
10
GOD heeds my plea, GOD accepts my prayer.
שָׁמַע shama יְהֹוָה Adonai תְּחִנָּתִי techinati יְהֹוָה Adonai תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati יִקָּח yikach
11
All my enemies will be frustrated and stricken with terror;they will turn back in an instant, frustrated.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיִבָּהֲלוּ veyibahalu מְאֹד meod כּל kl אֹיְבָי oyvay יָשֻׁבוּ yashuvu יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu רָגַע raga

Psalm 7

1
Shiggaion of David, of David Meaning of Heb. uncertain. which he sang to GOD, concerning Cush, a Benjaminite.
שִׁגָּיוֹן shigayon לְדָוִד ledavid אֲשֶׁר asher שָׁר shar לַיהֹוָה layhovah עַל al דִּבְרֵי divrey כוּשׁ khush בֶּן ben יְמִינִי yemini
2
O my ETERNAL God, in You I seek refuge;deliver me from all my pursuers and save me,
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay בְּךָ bekha חָסִיתִי chasiti הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni מִכּל mikl רֹדְפַי rodfay וְהַצִּילֵנִי vehatzileni
3
lest, like a lion, they tear me apart,rending in pieces, and no one save me.
פֶּן pen יִטְרֹף yitrof כְּאַרְיֵה kearyeh נַפְשִׁי nafshi פֹּרֵק porek וְאֵין veeyn מַצִּיל matzil
4
O my ETERNAL God, if I have done such things,if my hands bear the guilt of wrongdoing,
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay אִם im עָשִׂיתִי asiti זֹאת zot אִם im יֶשׁ yesh עָוֶל avel בְּכַפָּי bekhapay
5
if I have dealt evil to my ally—I who rescued my foe without reward—
אִם im גָּמַלְתִּי gamalti שׁוֹלְמִי sholmi רָע ra וָאֲחַלְּצָה vaachaltzah צוֹרְרִי tzoreri רֵיקָם reykam
6
then let the enemy pursue and overtake me;let my life be trampled to the ground,and my body dwell in the dust. Selah.
יִרַדֹּף yiradof אוֹיֵב oyev נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְיַשֵּׂג veyaseg וְיִרְמֹס veyirmos לָאָרֶץ laaretz חַיָּי chayay וּכְבוֹדִי ukhvodi לֶעָפָר leafar יַשְׁכֵּן yashken סֶלָה selah
7
Rise, O ETERNAL One, in Your anger;assert Yourself against the fury of my foes; bestir Yourself in my behalf;You have ordained judgment.
קוּמָה kumah יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּאַפֶּךָ beapekha הִנָּשֵׂא hinase בְּעַבְרוֹת beavrot צוֹרְרָי tzoreray וְעוּרָה veurah אֵלַי elay מִשְׁפָּט mishpat צִוִּיתָ tziuita
8
Let the assembly of peoples gather about You,with You enthroned above, on high.
וַעֲדַת vaadat לְאֻמִּים leumim תְּסוֹבְבֶךָּ tesoveveka וְעָלֶיהָ vealeyha לַמָּרוֹם lamarom שׁוּבָה shuvah
9
GOD judges the peoples;vindicate me, O ETERNAL One,for the righteousness and blamelessness that are mine.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יָדִין yadin עַמִּים amim שׁפְטֵנִי shfteni יְהֹוָה Adonai כְּצִדְקִי ketzidki וּכְתֻמִּי ukhtumi עָלָי alay
10
Let the evil of the wicked come to an end,but establish the righteous;the One who probes the mind and conscience is God the Righteous.
יִגְמר yigmr נָא na רַע ra רְשָׁעִים reshaim וּתְכוֹנֵן utkhonen צַדִּיק tzadik וּבֹחֵן uvochen לִבּוֹת libot וּכְלָיוֹת ukhlayot אֱלֹהִים Elohim צַדִּיק tzadik
11
I look to God to shield me; the deliverer of the upright.
מָגִנִּי magini עַל al אֱלֹהִים Elohim מוֹשִׁיעַ moshia יִשְׁרֵי yishrey לֵב lev
12
God vindicates the righteous;God pronounces doom each day.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim שׁוֹפֵט shofet צַדִּיק tzadik וְאֵל veel זֹעֵם zoem בְּכל bekhl יוֹם yom
13
If someone [wicked] does not turn back, but whets his sword,bends his bow and aims it,
אִם im לֹא lo יָשׁוּב yashuv חַרְבּוֹ charbo יִלְטוֹשׁ yiltosh קַשְׁתּוֹ kashto דָרַךְ darakh וַיְכוֹנְנֶהָ vaykhoneneha
14
then against himself he readies deadly weapons,and makes his arrows sharp.
וְלוֹ velo הֵכִין hekhin כְּלֵי keley מָוֶת mavet חִצָּיו chitzayv לְדֹלְקִים ledolkim יִפְעָל yifal
15
See, he hatches evil, conceives mischief,and gives birth to fraud.
הִנֵּה hineh יְחַבֶּל yechabel אָוֶן aven וְהָרָה veharah עָמָל amal וְיָלַד veyalad שָׁקֶר shaker
16
He has dug a pit and deepened it,and will fall into the trap he made.
בּוֹר bor כָּרָה karah וַיַּחְפְּרֵהוּ vayachprehu וַיִּפֹּל vayipol בְּשַׁחַת beshachat יִפְעָל yifal
17
His mischief will recoil upon his own head;his lawlessness will come down upon his skull.
יָשׁוּב yashuv עֲמָלוֹ amalo בְרֹאשׁוֹ verosho וְעַל veal קדְקֳדוֹ kdkodo חֲמָסוֹ chamaso יֵרֵד yered
18
I will praise GOD for being righteous,and sing a hymn to the name of GOD Most High.
אוֹדֶה odeh יְהֹוָה Adonai כְּצִדְקוֹ ketzidko וַאֲזַמְּרָה vaazamrah שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai עֶלְיוֹן elyon

Psalm 8

1
For the leader; on the gittith. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al הַגִּתִּית hagitit מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
O ETERNAL One, our Sovereign,how majestic is Your name throughout the earth—You who have covered the heavens with Your splendor!
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲדֹנֵינוּ adoneynu מָה mah אַדִּיר adir שִׁמְךָ shimkha בְּכל bekhl הָאָרֶץ haaretz אֲשֶׁר asher תְּנָה tenah הוֹדְךָ hodkha עַל al הַשָּׁמָיִם hashamayim
3
From the mouths of infants and sucklingsYou have founded strength on account of Your foes,to put an end to enemy and avenger.
מִפִּי mipi עוֹלְלִים olelim וְיֹנְקִים veyonkim יִסַּדְתָּ yisadta עֹז oz לְמַעַן lemaan צוֹרְרֶיךָ tzorereykha לְהַשְׁבִּית lehashbit אוֹיֵב oyev וּמִתְנַקֵּם umitnakem
4
When I behold Your heavens, the work of Your fingers,the moon and stars that You set in place,
כִּי ki אֶרְאֶה ereh שָׁמֶיךָ shameykha מַעֲשֵׂה maaseh אֶצְבְּעֹתֶיךָ etzboteykha יָרֵחַ yareach וְכוֹכָבִים vekhokhavim אֲשֶׁר asher כּוֹנָנְתָּה konantah
5
what are human beings that You have been mindful of them,mortals that You have taken note of them,
מָה mah אֱנוֹשׁ enosh כִּי ki תִזְכְּרֶנּוּ tizkrenu וּבֶן uven אָדָם adam כִּי ki תִפְקְדֶנּוּ tifkdenu
6
that You have made them little less than divine, and adorned them with glory and majesty?
וַתְּחַסְּרֵהוּ vatchasrehu מְּעַט meat מֵאֱלֹהִים meelohim וְכָבוֹד vekhavod וְהָדָר vehadar תְּעַטְּרֵהוּ teatrehu
7
You have made them master over Your handiwork,laying the world at their feet—
תַּמְשִׁילֵהוּ tamshilehu בְּמַעֲשֵׂי bemaasey יָדֶיךָ yadeykha כֹּל kol שַׁתָּה shatah תַחַת tachat רַגְלָיו raglayv
8
sheep and oxen, all of them,and wild beasts, too;
צֹנֶה tzoneh וַאֲלָפִים vaalafim כֻּלָּם kulam וְגַם vegam בַּהֲמוֹת bahamot שָׂדָי saday
9
the birds of the heavens, the fish of the sea,whatever travels the paths of the seas.
צִפּוֹר tzipor שָׁמַיִם shamayim וּדְגֵי udgey הַיָּם hayam עֹבֵר over ארְחוֹת rchot יַמִּים yamim
10
O ETERNAL One, our Sovereign, how majestic is Your name throughout the earth!
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲדֹנֵינוּ adoneynu מָה mah אַדִּיר adir שִׁמְךָ shimkha בְּכל bekhl הָאָרֶץ haaretz

Psalm 9

1
For the leader; ʻalmuth labben. Meaning of Heb. uncertain; some mss. and ancient versions, ʻal muth labben, as though “over the death of the son.” A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al מוּת mut לַבֵּן laben מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
I will praise You, ETERNAL One, with all my heart;I will tell all Your wonders.
אוֹדֶה odeh יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּכל bekhl לִבִּי libi אֲסַפְּרָה asaprah כּל kl נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ nifloteykha
3
I will rejoice and exult in You,singing a hymn to Your name, O Most High.
אֶשְׂמְחָה esmchah וְאֶעֶלְצָה veeeltzah בָךְ vakh אֲזַמְּרָה azamrah שִׁמְךָ shimkha עֶלְיוֹן elyon
4
When my enemies retreat,they stumble to their doom at Your presence.
בְּשׁוּב beshuv אוֹיְבַי oyvay אָחוֹר achor יִכָּשְׁלוּ yikashlu וְיֹאבְדוּ veyovdu מִפָּנֶיךָ mipaneykha
5
For You uphold my right and claim,enthroned as righteous judge.
כִּי ki עָשִׂיתָ asita מִשְׁפָּטִי mishpati וְדִינִי vedini יָשַׁבְתָּ yashavta לְכִסֵּא lekhise שׁוֹפֵט shofet צֶדֶק tzedek
6
You blast the nations;You destroy the wicked;You blot out their name forever.
גָּעַרְתָּ gaarta גוֹיִם goyim אִבַּדְתָּ ibadta רָשָׁע rasha שְׁמָם shemam מָחִיתָ machita לְעוֹלָם leolam וָעֶד vaed
7
The enemy is no more—ruins everlasting;You have torn down their cities;their very names are lost.
הָאוֹיֵב haoyev תַּמּוּ tamu חֳרָבוֹת choravot לָנֶצַח lanetzach וְעָרִים vearim נָתַשְׁתָּ natashta אָבַד avad זִכְרָם zikhram הֵמָּה hemah
8
But GOD, whose throne is set up for judgment, abides forever;
וַיהֹוָה vayhovah לְעוֹלָם leolam יֵשֵׁב yeshev כּוֹנֵן konen לַמִּשְׁפָּט lamishpat כִּסְאוֹ kiso
9
it is [God] who judges the world with righteousness,rules the peoples with equity.
וְהוּא vehu יִשְׁפֹּט yishpot תֵּבֵל tevel בְּצֶדֶק betzedek יָדִין yadin לְאֻמִּים leumim בְּמֵישָׁרִים bemeysharim
10
GOD is a haven for the oppressed,a haven in times of trouble.
וִיהִי vihi יְהֹוָה Adonai מִשְׂגָּב misgav לַדָּךְ ladakh מִשְׂגָּב misgav לְעִתּוֹת leitot בַּצָּרָה batzarah
11
Those who know Your name trust You,for You do not abandon those who turn to You, O ETERNAL One.
וְיִבְטְחוּ veyivtchu בְךָ vekha יוֹדְעֵי yodey שְׁמֶךָ shemekha כִּי ki לֹא lo עָזַבְתָּ azavta דֹרְשֶׁיךָ dorsheykha יְהֹוָה Adonai
12
Sing a hymn to the ETERNAL, who reigns in Zion; declare God’s deeds among the peoples.
זַמְּרוּ zamru לַיהֹוָה layhovah יֹשֵׁב yoshev צִיּוֹן tzion הַגִּידוּ hagidu בָעַמִּים vaamim עֲלִילוֹתָיו alilotayv
13
For [God] does not ignore the cry of the afflicted;the One who requites bloodshed is mindful of them.
כִּי ki דֹרֵשׁ doresh דָּמִים damim אוֹתָם otam זָכָר zakhar לֹא lo שָׁכַח shakhach צַעֲקַת tzaakat (עניים) nyym [עֲנָוִים] anavim
14
Have mercy on me, O ETERNAL One;see my affliction at the hands of my foes,You who lift me from the gates of death,
חָנְנֵנִי chaneneni יְהֹוָה Adonai רְאֵה reeh ענְיִי nyi מִשֹּׂנְאָי misonay מְרוֹמְמִי meromemi מִשַּׁעֲרֵי mishaarey מָוֶת mavet
15
so that in the gates of Fair Zion I might tell all Your praise,I might exult in Your deliverance.
לְמַעַן lemaan אֲסַפְּרָה asaprah כּל kl תְּהִלָּתֶיךָ tehilateykha בְּשַׁעֲרֵי beshaarey בַת vat צִיּוֹן tzion אָגִילָה agilah בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ bishuatekha
16
The nations sink in the pit they have made;their own foot is caught in the net they have hidden.
טָבְעוּ tavu גוֹיִם goyim בְּשַׁחַת beshachat עָשׂוּ asu בְּרֶשֶׁת bereshet זוּ zu טָמָנוּ tamanu נִלְכְּדָה nilkdah רַגְלָם raglam
17
GOD is known,having worked judgment;the wicked are snared by their own devices. Higgaion. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Selah.
נוֹדַע noda יְהֹוָה Adonai מִשְׁפָּט mishpat עָשָׂה asah בְּפֹעַל befoal כַּפָּיו kapayv נוֹקֵשׁ nokesh רָשָׁע rasha הִגָּיוֹן higayon סֶלָה selah
18
Let the wicked be in Sheol,all the nations who ignore God!
יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu רְשָׁעִים reshaim לִשְׁאוֹלָה lisholah כּל kl גּוֹיִם goyim שְׁכֵחֵי shekhechey אֱלֹהִים Elohim
19
Not always shall the needy be ignored,nor the hope of the afflicted forever lost.
כִּי ki לֹא lo לָנֶצַח lanetzach יִשָּׁכַח yishakhach אֶבְיוֹן evyon תִּקְוַת tikvat (ענוים) nvym [עֲנִיִּים] aniim תֹּאבַד tovad לָעַד laad
20
Rise, O ETERNAL One!Let not mortals have power;let the nations be judged in Your presence.
קוּמָה kumah יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El יָעֹז yaoz אֱנוֹשׁ enosh יִשָּׁפְטוּ yishaftu גוֹיִם goyim עַל al פָּנֶיךָ paneykha
21
Strike fear into them, O ETERNAL One;let the nations know they are only mortals. Selah.
שִׁיתָה shitah יְהֹוָה Adonai מוֹרָה morah לָהֶם lahem יֵדְעוּ yedu גוֹיִם goyim אֱנוֹשׁ enosh הֵמָּה hemah סֶּלָה selah

Psalm 10

1
Why, O ETERNAL One, do You stand aloof,heedless in times of trouble?
לָמָה lamah יְהֹוָה Adonai תַּעֲמֹד taamod בְּרָחוֹק berachok תַּעְלִים talim לְעִתּוֹת leitot בַּצָּרָה batzarah
2
The wicked in their arrogance hound the lowly—may they be caught in the schemes they devise!
בְּגַאֲוַת begaavat רָשָׁע rasha יִדְלַק yidlak עָנִי ani יִתָּפְשׂוּ yitafsu בִּמְזִמּוֹת bimzimot זוּ zu חָשָׁבוּ chashavu
3
The wicked crow about their unbridled lusts;the grasping revile and scorn GOD.
כִּי ki הִלֵּל hilel רָשָׁע rasha עַל al תַּאֲוַת taavat נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho וּבֹצֵעַ uvotzea בֵּרֵךְ berekh נִאֵץיְהֹוָה nietzyhovah
4
The wicked, arrogant as they are,in all their scheming [think], “God does not care and does not call to account.”
רָשָׁע rasha כְּגֹבַהּ kegovah אַפּוֹ apo בַּל bal יִדְרֹשׁ yidrosh אֵין eyn אֱלֹהִים Elohim כּל kl מְזִמּוֹתָיו mezimotayv
5
Their ways prosper at all times;Your judgments are far beyond them;they snort at all their foes.
יָחִילוּ yachilu דְרָכָו derakhav בְּכל bekhl עֵת et מָרוֹם marom מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha מִנֶּגְדּוֹ minegdo כּל kl צוֹרְרָיו tzorerayv יָפִיחַ yafiach בָּהֶם bahem
6
Such people think, “I shall not be shaken,through all time never be in trouble.”
אָמַר amar בְּלִבּוֹ belibo בַּל bal אֶמּוֹט emot לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo בְרָע vera
7
Their mouth is full of oaths, deceit, and fraud;mischief and evil are under their tongue.
אָלָה alah פִּיהוּ pihu מָלֵא male וּמִרְמוֹת umirmot וָתֹךְ vatokh תַּחַת tachat לְשׁוֹנוֹ leshono עָמָל amal וָאָוֶן vaaven
8
They lurk in outlying places;from a covert they slay the innocent;their eyes spy out the hapless.
יֵשֵׁב yeshev בְּמַאְרַב bemarav חֲצֵרִים chatzerim בַּמִּסְתָּרִים bamistarim יַהֲרֹג yaharog נָקִי naki עֵינָיו eynayv לְחֵלְכָה lechelkhah יִצְפֹּנוּ yitzponu
9
They wait in a covert like a lion in a lair;wait to seize the lowly;they seize the lowly as they pull their net shut;
יֶאֱרֹב yeerov בַּמִּסְתָּר bamistar כְּאַרְיֵה kearyeh בְסֻכֹּה vesukoh יֶאֱרֹב yeerov לַחֲטוֹף lachatof עָנִי ani יַחְטֹף yachtof עָנִי ani בְּמשְׁכוֹ bemshkho בְרִשְׁתּוֹ verishto
10
they stoop, they crouch,and the hapless fall prey to their might.
(ודכה) vdkhh [יִדְכֶּה] yidkeh יָשֹׁחַ yashoach וְנָפַל venafal בַּעֲצוּמָיו baatzumayv (חלכאים) chlkhym [חֵל chel כָּאִים] kaim
11
They think, “God is not mindful,the divine face is hidden and never looks.”
אָמַר amar בְּלִבּוֹ belibo שָׁכַח shakhach אֵל El הִסְתִּיר histir פָּנָיו panayv בַּל bal רָאָה raah לָנֶצַח lanetzach
12
Rise, O ETERNAL One!Strike at them, O God!Do not forget the lowly.
קוּמָה kumah יְהֹוָה Adonai אֵל El נְשָׂא nesa יָדֶךָ yadekha אַל El תִּשְׁכַּח tishkach (עניים) nyym [עֲנָוִים] anavim
13
Why should the wicked scorn God,thinking You do not call to account?
עַל al מֶה meh נִאֵץ nietz רָשָׁעאֱלֹהִים rashaelohim אָמַר amar בְּלִבּוֹ belibo לֹא lo תִדְרֹשׁ tidrosh
14
You do look!You take note of mischief and vexation!To requite is in Your power. To You the hapless can entrust themselves;You have ever been the orphans’ help.
רָאִתָה raitah כִּי ki אַתָּה atah עָמָל amal וָכַעַס vakhaas תַּבִּיט tabit לָתֵת latet בְּיָדֶךָ beyadekha עָלֶיךָ aleykha יַעֲזֹב yaazov חֵלֵכָה chelekhah יָתוֹם yatom אַתָּה atah הָיִיתָ hayita עוֹזֵר ozer
15
O break the power of the wicked and evildoers,so that when You look for, which in vv. 4 and 13 means “to call to account.” their wickednessYou will find it no more.
שְׁבֹר shevor זְרוֹעַ zeroa רָשָׁע rasha וָרָע vara תִּדְרוֹשׁ tidrosh רִשְׁעוֹ risho בַל val תִּמְצָא timtza
16
GOD is sovereign for ever and ever;the nations will perish from this land.
יְהֹוָה Adonai מֶלֶךְ melekh עוֹלָם olam וָעֶד vaed אָבְדוּ avdu גוֹיִם goyim מֵאַרְצוֹ meartzo
17
You will listen to the entreaty of the lowly, O ETERNAL One,You will make their hearts firm;You will incline Your ear
תַּאֲוַת taavat עֲנָוִים anavim שָׁמַעְתָּ shamata יְהֹוָה Adonai תָּכִין takhin לִבָּם libam תַּקְשִׁיב takshiv אזְנֶךָ znekha
18
to champion the orphan and the downtrodden,that mere earthly mortals tyrannize no more.
לִשְׁפֹּט lishpot יָתוֹם yatom וָדָךְ vadakh בַּל bal יוֹסִיף yosif עוֹד od לַעֲרֹץ laarotz אֱנוֹשׁ enosh מִן min הָאָרֶץ haaretz

Psalm 11

1
For the leader. Of David.In GOD I take refuge;how can you say to me,“Take to the hills like a bird!
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah חָסִיתִי chasiti אֵיךְ eykh תֹּאמְרוּ tomru לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi (נודו) nvdv [נוּדִי] nudi הַרְכֶם harkhem צִפּוֹר tzipor
2
For see, the wicked bend the bow,they set their arrow on the stringto shoot from the shadows at the upright.
כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh הָרְשָׁעִים harshaim יִדְרְכוּן yidrkhun קֶשֶׁת keshet כּוֹנְנוּ konenu חִצָּם chitzam עַל al יֶתֶר yeter לִירוֹת lirot בְּמוֹ bemo אֹפֶל ofel לְיִשְׁרֵי leyishrey לֵב lev
3
When the foundations are destroyed,what can the righteous do?”
כִּי ki הַשָּׁתוֹת hashatot יֵהָרֵסוּן yeharesun צַדִּיק tzadik מַה mah פָּעָל paal
4
GOD is in the divine holy palace; GOD—whose throne is in heaven,whose eyes behold, whose gaze searches humankind.
יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּהֵיכַל beheykhal קדְשׁוֹ kdsho יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּשָּׁמַיִם bashamayim כִּסְאוֹ kiso עֵינָיו eynayv יֶחֱזוּ yechezu עַפְעַפָּיו afapayv יִבְחֲנוּ yivchanu בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam
5
GOD seeks out someone righteous,but loathes the wicked one who loves injustice.
יְהֹוָה Adonai צַדִּיק tzadik יִבְחָן yivchan וְרָשָׁע verasha וְאֹהֵב veohev חָמָס chamas שָׂנְאָה sanah נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho
6
[God] will rain down upon the wicked blazing coals and sulfur;a scorching wind shall be their lot.
יַמְטֵר yamter עַל al רְשָׁעִים reshaim פַּחִים pachim אֵשׁ esh וְגפְרִית vegfrit וְרוּחַ veruach זִלְעָפוֹת zilafot מְנָת menat כּוֹסָם kosam
7
For GOD is righteous,and loves righteous deeds;the upright shall behold God’s face.
כִּי ki צַדִּיק tzadik יְהֹוָה Adonai צְדָקוֹת tzedakot אָהֵב ahev יָשָׁר yashar יֶחֱזוּ yechezu פָנֵימוֹ faneymo

Psalm 12

1
For the leader; on the sheminith. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al הַשְּׁמִינִית hashminit מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Help, O ETERNAL One!For the faithful are no more;the loyal have vanished from among mortals.
הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki גָמַר gamar חָסִיד chasid כִּי ki פַסּוּ fasu אֱמוּנִים emunim מִבְּנֵי mibney אָדָם adam
3
People speak lies to one another;their speech is smooth;they talk with duplicity.
שָׁוְא shav יְדַבְּרוּ yedabru אִישׁ ish אֶת et רֵעֵהוּ reehu שְׂפַת sefat חֲלָקוֹת chalakot בְּלֵב belev וָלֵב valev יְדַבֵּרוּ yedaberu
4
May GOD cut off all flattering lips,every tongue that speaks arrogance.
יַכְרֵת yakhret יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl שִׂפְתֵי siftey חֲלָקוֹת chalakot לָשׁוֹן lashon מְדַבֶּרֶת medaberet גְּדֹלוֹת gedolot
5
They say, “By our tongues we shall prevail;with lips such as ours, who can be our master?”
אֲשֶׁר asher אָמְרוּ amru לִלְשֹׁנֵנוּ lilshonenu נַגְבִּיר nagbir שְׂפָתֵינוּ sefateynu אִתָּנוּ itanu מִי mi אָדוֹן adon לָנוּ lanu
6
“Because of the groans of the plundered poor and needy,I will now act,” says GOD.“I will give help,” [God] affirms to them.
מִשֹּׁד mishod עֲנִיִּים aniim מֵאֶנְקַת meenkat אֶבְיוֹנִים evyonim עַתָּה atah אָקוּם akum יֹאמַר yomar יְהֹוָה Adonai אָשִׁית ashit בְּיֵשַׁע beyesha יָפִיחַ yafiach לוֹ lo
7
GOD’s words are pure words,silver purged in an earthen crucible,refined sevenfold.
אִמְרוֹת imrot יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲמָרוֹת amarot טְהֹרוֹת tehorot כֶּסֶף kesef צָרוּף tzaruf בַּעֲלִיל baalil לָאָרֶץ laaretz מְזֻקָּק mezukak שִׁבְעָתָיִם shivatayim
8
You, O ETERNAL One, will keep them,guarding each from this age evermore.
אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai תִּשְׁמְרֵם tishmrem תִּצְּרֶנּוּ titzrenu מִן min הַדּוֹר hador זוּ zu לְעוֹלָם leolam
9
On every side the wicked roamwhen baseness is exalted among mortals.
סָבִיב saviv רְשָׁעִים reshaim יִתְהַלָּכוּן yithalakhun כְּרֻם kerum זֻלּוּת zulut לִבְנֵי livney אָדָם adam

Psalm 13

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
How long, O ETERNAL One; will You ignore me forever?How long will You hide Your face from me?
עַד ad אָנָה anah יְהֹוָה Adonai תִּשְׁכָּחֵנִי tishkacheni נֶצַח netzach עַד ad אָנָה anah תַּסְתִּיר tastir אֶת et פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
3
How long will I have cares on my mind,grief in my heart all day?How long will my enemy have the upper hand?
עַד ad אָנָה anah אָשִׁית ashit עֵצוֹת etzot בְּנַפְשִׁי benafshi יָגוֹן yagon בִּלְבָבִי bilvavi יוֹמָם yomam עַד ad אָנָה anah יָרוּם yarum אֹיְבִי oyvi עָלָי alay
4
Look at me, answer me, O my ETERNAL God!Restore the luster to my eyes,lest I sleep the sleep of death;
הַבִּיטָה habitah עֲנֵנִי aneni יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהָי elohay הָאִירָה hairah עֵינַי eynay פֶּן pen אִישַׁן ishan הַמָּוֶת hamavet
5
lest my enemy say, “I have overcome him,”my foes exult when I totter.
פֶּן pen יֹאמַר yomar אֹיְבִי oyvi יְכלְתִּיו yekhltiv צָרַי tzaray יָגִילוּ yagilu כִּי ki אֶמּוֹט emot
6
But I trust in Your faithfulness,my heart will exult in Your deliverance.I will sing to GOD,who has been good to me.
וַאֲנִי vaani בְּחַסְדְּךָ bechasdkha בָטַחְתִּי vatachti יָגֵל yagel לִבִּי libi בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ bishuatekha אָשִׁירָה ashirah לַיהֹוָה layhovah כִּי ki גָמַל gamal עָלָי alay

Psalm 14

1
For the leader. Of David.The scoundrel thinks,“God does not care.” Human deeds are corrupt and loathsome;no one does good.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid אָמַר amar נָבָל naval בְּלִבּוֹ belibo אֵין eyn אֱלֹהִים Elohim הִשְׁחִיתוּ hishchitu הִתְעִיבוּ hitivu עֲלִילָה alilah אֵין eyn עֹשֵׂה oseh טוֹב tov
2
GOD looks down from heaven on humankindto find someone with understanding,someone mindful of God.
יְהֹוָה Adonai מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim הִשְׁקִיף hishkif עַל al בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam לִרְאוֹת lirot הֲיֵשׁ hayesh מַשְׂכִּיל maskil דֹּרֵשׁ doresh אֶת et אֱלֹהִים Elohim
3
All have turned bad,altogether foul;there is no one who does good,not even one.
הַכֹּל hakol סָר sar יַחְדָּו yachdav נֶאֱלָחוּ neelachu אֵין eyn עֹשֵׂה oseh טוֹב tov אֵין eyn גַּם gam אֶחָד echad
4
Are they so witless, all those evildoers,who devour my people as they devour food,and do not invoke GOD?
הֲלֹא halo יָדְעוּ yadu כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven אֹכְלֵי okhley עַמִּי ami אָכְלוּ akhlu לֶחֶם lechem יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo קָרָאוּ karau
5
There they will be seized with fright,for God is present in the circle of the righteous.
שָׁם sham פָּחֲדוּ pachadu פָחַד fachad כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּדוֹר bedor צַדִּיק tzadik
6
You may set at naught the counsel of the lowly,but GOD is their refuge.
עֲצַת atzat עָנִי ani תָבִישׁוּ tavishu כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai מַחְסֵהוּ machsehu
7
O that the deliverance of Israel might come from Zion!When GOD restores the fortunes of this covenanted people,Jacob will exult, Israel will rejoice.
מִי mi יִתֵּן yiten מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion יְשׁוּעַת yeshuat יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael בְּשׁוּב beshuv יְהֹוָה Adonai שְׁבוּת shevut עַמּוֹ amo יָגֵל yagel יַעֲקֹב yaakov יִשְׂמַח yismach יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael

Psalm 15

1
A psalm of David. GOD, who may sojourn in Your tent,who may dwell on Your holy mountain?
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid יְהֹוָה Adonai מִי mi יָגוּר yagur בְּאהֳלֶךָ beholekha מִי mi יִשְׁכֹּן yishkon בְּהַר behar קדְשֶׁךָ kdshekha
2
Anyone who lives without blame,who does what is right,and in their heart acknowledges the truth;
הוֹלֵךְ holekh תָּמִים tamim וּפֹעֵל ufoel צֶדֶק tzedek וְדֹבֵר vedover אֱמֶת emet בִּלְבָבוֹ bilvavo
3
whose tongue is not given to evil; who has never done harm to a compatriot,or borne reproach for [acts toward] a neighbor;
לֹא lo רָגַל ragal עַל al לְשֹׁנוֹ leshono לֹא lo עָשָׂה asah לְרֵעֵהוּ lereehu רָעָה raah וְחֶרְפָּה vecherpah לֹא lo נָשָׂא nasa עַל al קְרֹבוֹ kerovo
4
for whom someone contemptible is abhorrent,but who honors those who fear GOD;who keeps an oath even when it hurts;
נִבְזֶה nivzeh בְּעֵינָיו beeynayv נִמְאָס nimas וְאֶת veet יִרְאֵי yirey יְהֹוָה Adonai יְכַבֵּד yekhabed נִשְׁבַּע nishba לְהָרַע lehara וְלֹא velo יָמִר yamir
5
who has never lent money at interest,or accepted a bribe against the innocent.One who acts thus shall never be shaken.
כַּסְפּוֹ kaspo לֹא lo נָתַן natan בְּנֶשֶׁךְ beneshekh וְשֹׁחַד veshochad עַל al נָקִי naki לֹא lo לָקָח lakach עֹשֵׂה oseh אֵלֶּה eleh לֹא lo יִמּוֹט yimot לְעוֹלָם leolam

Psalm 16

1
A michtam Meaning of Heb. uncertain. of David.Protect me, O God, for I seek refuge in You.
מִכְתָּם mikhtam לְדָוִד ledavid שׁמְרֵנִי shmreni אֵל El כִּי ki חָסִיתִי chasiti בָךְ vakh
2
I say to GOD,“You are my Sovereign, my benefactor;there is none above You.”
אָמַרְתְּ amart לַיהֹוָה layhovah אֲדֹנָי Adonai אָתָּה atah טוֹבָתִי tovati בַּל bal עָלֶיךָ aleykha
3
As to the holy and mighty ones that are in the land,my whole desire concerning them is that
לִקְדוֹשִׁים likdoshim אֲשֶׁר asher בָּאָרֶץ baaretz הֵמָּה hemah וְאַדִּירֵי veadirey כּל kl חֶפְצִי cheftzi בָם vam
4
those who espouse another [god]may have many sorrows! in Ps. 89.6, 8, and ʼaddirim in 1 Sam. 4.8. I will have no part of their bloody libations;their names will not pass my lips.
יִרְבּוּ yirbu עַצְּבוֹתָם atzvotam אַחֵר acher מָהָרוּ maharu בַּל bal אַסִּיךְ asikh נִסְכֵּיהֶם niskeyhem מִדָּם midam וּבַל uval אֶשָּׂא esa אֶת et שְׁמוֹתָם shemotam עַל al שְׂפָתָי sefatay
5
GOD is my allotted share and portion; You control my fate.
יְהֹוָה Adonai מְנָת menat חֶלְקִי chelki וְכוֹסִי vekhosi אַתָּה atah תּוֹמִיךְ tomikh גּוֹרָלִי gorali
6
Delightful country has fallen to my lot;lovely indeed is my estate.
חֲבָלִים chavalim נָפְלוּ naflu לִי li בַּנְּעִמִים banimim אַף af נַחֲלָת nachalat שָׁפְרָה shafrah עָלָי alay
7
I bless GOD who has guided me;my conscience admonishes me at night.
אֲבָרֵךְ avarekh אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲשֶׁר asher יְעָצָנִי yeatzani אַף af לֵילוֹת leylot יִסְּרוּנִי yisruni כִלְיוֹתָי khilyotay
8
I am ever mindful of GOD’s presence—who is at my right hand; I shall never be shaken.
שִׁוִּיתִי shiuiti יְהֹוָה Adonai לְנֶגְדִּי lenegdi תָמִיד tamid כִּי ki מִימִינִי mimini בַּל bal אֶמּוֹט emot
9
So my heart rejoices,my whole being exults,and my body rests secure.
לָכֵן lakhen שָׂמַח samach לִבִּי libi וַיָּגֶל vayagel כְּבוֹדִי kevodi אַף af בְּשָׂרִי besari יִשְׁכֹּן yishkon לָבֶטַח lavetach
10
For You will not abandon me to Sheol,or let Your faithful one see the Pit.
כִּי ki לֹא lo תַעֲזֹב taazov נַפְשִׁי nafshi לִשְׁאוֹל lishol לֹא lo תִתֵּן titen חֲסִידְךָ chasidkha לִרְאוֹת lirot שָׁחַת shachat
11
You will teach me the path of life.In Your presence is perfect joy;delights are ever in Your right hand.
תּוֹדִיעֵנִי todieni אֹרַח orach חַיִּים chayim שֹׂבַע sova שְׂמָחוֹת semachot אֶת et פָּנֶיךָ paneykha נְעִמוֹת neimot בִּימִינְךָ biminkha נֶצַח netzach

Psalm 17

1
A prayer of David.Hear, O ETERNAL One, what is just;heed my cry, give ear to my prayer,uttered without guile.
תְּפִלָּה tefilah לְדָוִד ledavid שִׁמְעָה shimah יְהֹוָה Adonai צֶדֶק tzedek הַקְשִׁיבָה hakshivah רִנָּתִי rinati הַאֲזִינָה haazinah תְפִלָּתִי tefilati בְּלֹא belo שִׂפְתֵי siftey מִרְמָה mirmah
2
My vindication will come from You;Your eyes will behold what is right.
מִלְּפָנֶיךָ milfaneykha מִשְׁפָּטִי mishpati יֵצֵא yetze עֵינֶיךָ eyneykha תֶּחֱזֶינָה techezeynah מֵישָׁרִים meysharim
3
You have visited me at night, probed my mind,You have tested me and found nothing amiss;I determined that my mouth should not transgress.
בָּחַנְתָּ bachanta לִבִּי libi פָּקַדְתָּ pakadta לַּיְלָה laylah צְרַפְתַּנִי tzeraftani בַל val תִּמְצָא timtza זַמֹּתִי zamoti בַּל bal יַעֲבר yaavr פִּי pi
4
As for mortals’ dealings,in accord with the command of Your lips, I have kept in view the fate of the lawless.
לִפְעֻלּוֹת lifulot אָדָם adam בִּדְבַר bidvar שְׂפָתֶיךָ sefateykha אֲנִי ani שָׁמַרְתִּי shamarti ארְחוֹת rchot פָּרִיץ paritz
5
My feet have held to Your paths;my legs have not given way.
תָּמֹךְ tamokh אֲשֻׁרַי ashuray בְּמַעְגְּלוֹתֶיךָ bemagloteykha בַּל bal נָמוֹטּוּ namotu פְעָמָי feamay
6
I call on You;You will answer me, God;turn Your ear to me,hear what I say.
אֲנִי ani קְרָאתִיךָ keratikha כִי khi תַעֲנֵנִי taaneni אֵל El הַט hat אזְנְךָ znkha לִי li שְׁמַע shema אִמְרָתִי imrati
7
Display Your faithfulness in wondrous deeds,You who deliver with Your right handthose who seek refuge from assailants.
הַפְלֵה hafleh חֲסָדֶיךָ chasadeykha מוֹשִׁיעַ moshia חוֹסִים chosim מִמִּתְקוֹמְמִים mimitkomemim בִּימִינֶךָ biminekha
8
Guard me like the apple of Your eye;hide me in the shadow of Your wings
שׁמְרֵנִי shmreni כְּאִישׁוֹן keishon בַּת bat עָיִן ayin בְּצֵל betzel כְּנָפֶיךָ kenafeykha תַּסְתִּירֵנִי tastireni
9
from the wicked who despoil me,my mortal enemies who encircle me.
מִפְּנֵי mipney רְשָׁעִים reshaim זוּ zu שַׁדּוּנִי shaduni אֹיְבַי oyvay בְּנֶפֶשׁ benefesh יַקִּיפוּ yakifu עָלָי alay
10
Their hearts are closed to pity; they mouth arrogance;
חֶלְבָּמוֹ chelbamo סָּגְרוּ sagru פִּימוֹ pimo דִּבְּרוּ dibru בְגֵאוּת vegeut
11
now they hem in our feet on every side;they set their eyes roaming over the land.
אַשֻּׁרֵינוּ ashureynu עַתָּה atah (סבבוני) svvvny [סְבָבוּנוּ] sevavunu עֵינֵיהֶם eyneyhem יָשִׁיתוּ yashitu לִנְטוֹת lintot בָּאָרֶץ baaretz
12
They are like a lion eager for prey,a king of beasts lying in wait.
דִּמְיֹנוֹ dimyono כְּאַרְיֵה kearyeh יִכְסוֹף yikhsof לִטְרֹף litrof וְכִכְפִיר vekhikhfir יֹשֵׁב yoshev בְּמִסְתָּרִים bemistarim
13
Rise, O ETERNAL One! Go forth to meet my enemies. Bring them down;rescue me from the wicked with Your sword,
קוּמָה kumah יְהֹוָה Adonai קַדְּמָה kadmah פָנָיו fanayv הַכְרִיעֵהוּ hakhriehu פַּלְּטָה paltah נַפְשִׁי nafshi מֵרָשָׁע merasha חַרְבֶּךָ charbekha
14
from mortals, O ETERNAL One, with Your hand,from mortals whose share in life is fleeting.But as to Your treasured ones,fill their bellies. Their children too shall be satisfied,and have something to leave over for their young.
מִמְתִים mimtim יָדְךָ yadkha יְהֹוָה Adonai מִמְתִים mimtim מֵחֶלֶד mecheled חֶלְקָם chelkam בַּחַיִּים bachayim (וצפינך) vtzfynkh [וּצְפוּנְךָ] utzfunkha תְּמַלֵּא temale בִטְנָם vitnam יִשְׂבְּעוּ yisbu בָנִים vanim וְהִנִּיחוּ vehinichu יִתְרָם yitram לְעוֹלְלֵיהֶם leoleleyhem
15
Then I, justified, will behold Your face;awake, I am filled with the vision of You.
אֲנִי ani בְּצֶדֶק betzedek אֶחֱזֶה echezeh פָנֶיךָ faneykha אֶשְׂבְּעָה esbah בְהָקִיץ vehakitz תְּמוּנָתֶךָ temunatekha

Psalm 18

1
For the leader. Of David, the servant of GOD, who addressed the words of this song to GOD after GOD had saved him from the hands of all his enemies and from the clutches of Saul.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְעֶבֶד leeved יְהֹוָה Adonai לְדָוִד ledavid אֲשֶׁר asher דִּבֶּר diber לַיהֹוָה layhovah אֶת et דִּבְרֵי divrey הַשִּׁירָה hashirah הַזֹּאת hazot בְּיוֹם beyom הִצִּיל hitzil יְהֹוָה Adonai אוֹתוֹ oto מִכַּף mikaf כּל kl אֹיְבָיו oyvayv וּמִיַּד umiad שָׁאוּל shaul
2
He said:I adore you, O ETERNAL One, my strength,
וַיֹּאמַר vayomar אֶרְחמְךָ erchmkha יְהֹוָה Adonai חִזְקִי chizki
3
O ETERNAL One, my crag, my fortress, my deliverer,my God, my rock in which I take shelter,my shield, my mighty champion, my haven.
יְהֹוָה Adonai סַלְעִי sali וּמְצוּדָתִי umtzudati וּמְפַלְטִי umfalti אֵלִי eli צוּרִי tzuri אֶחֱסֶה echeseh בּוֹ bo מָגִנִּי magini וְקֶרֶן vekeren יִשְׁעִי yishi מִשְׂגַּבִּי misgabi
4
All praise! I called on GOD and was delivered from my enemies.
מְהֻלָּל mehulal אֶקְרָא ekra יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמִן umin אֹיְבַי oyvay אִוָּשֵׁעַ iuashea
5
Ropes of Death encompassed me;torrents of Belial terrified me;
אֲפָפוּנִי afafuni חֶבְלֵי chevley מָוֶת mavet וְנַחֲלֵי venachaley בְלִיַּעַל veliaal יְבַעֲתוּנִי yevaatuni
6
ropes of Sheol encircled me;snares of Death confronted me.
חֶבְלֵי chevley שְׁאוֹל sheol סְבָבוּנִי sevavuni קִדְּמוּנִי kidmuni מוֹקְשֵׁי mokshey מָוֶת mavet
7
In my anguish I called on the ETERNAL,cried out to my God,who from a heavenly abode heard my voice,whose ears received my cry.
בַּצַּר batzar לִי li אֶקְרָא ekra יְהֹוָה Adonai וְאֶל veel אֱלֹהַי elohay אֲשַׁוֵּעַ ashauea יִשְׁמַע yishma מֵהֵיכָלוֹ meheykhalo קוֹלִי koli וְשַׁוְעָתִי veshavati לְפָנָיו lefanayv תָּבוֹא tavo בְאזְנָיו veznayv
8
Then the earth rocked and quaked;the foundations of the mountains shook—rocked by divine indignation;
וַתִּגְעַשׁ vatigash וַתִּרְעַשׁ vatirash הָאָרֶץ haaretz וּמוֹסְדֵי umosdey הָרִים harim יִרְגָּזוּ yirgazu וַיִּתְגָּעֲשׁוּ vayitgaashu כִּי ki חָרָה charah לוֹ lo
9
smoke went up from God’s nostrils,devouring fire from God’s mouth—live coals blazing forth.
עָלָה alah עָשָׁן ashan בְּאַפּוֹ beapo וְאֵשׁ veesh מִפִּיו mipiv תֹּאכֵל tokhel גֶּחָלִים gechalim בָּעֲרוּ baaru מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu
10
[God] bent the sky and came down,thick cloud beneath divine feet.
וַיֵּט vayet שָׁמַיִם shamayim וַיֵּרַד vayerad וַעֲרָפֶל vaarafel תַּחַת tachat רַגְלָיו raglayv
11
[God] mounted a cherub and flew,gliding on the wings of the wind.
וַיִּרְכַּב vayirkav עַל al כְּרוּב keruv וַיָּעֹף vayaof וַיֵּדֶא vayede עַל al כַּנְפֵי kanfey רוּחַ ruach
12
[God] made darkness a screen—pavilions of dark thunderheads,dense clouds of the sky all around.
יָשֶׁת yashet חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh סִתְרוֹ sitro סְבִיבוֹתָיו sevivotayv סֻכָּתוֹ sukato חֶשְׁכַת cheshkhat מַיִם mayim עָבֵי avey שְׁחָקִים shechakim
13
In the divine brilliance,hail and fiery coals pierced those clouds.
מִנֹּגַהּ minogah נֶגְדּוֹ negdo עָבָיו avayv עָבְרוּ avru בָּרָד barad וְגַחֲלֵי vegachaley אֵשׁ esh
14
Then GOD thundered from heaven,the Most High gave forth voice—hail and fiery coals—
וַיַּרְעֵם vayarem בַּשָּׁמַיִם bashamayim יְהֹוָה Adonai וְעֶלְיוֹן veelyon יִתֵּן yiten קֹלוֹ kolo בָּרָד barad וְגַחֲלֵי vegachaley אֵשׁ esh
15
letting shafts fly, and scattering them;discharging lightning, and routing them.
וַיִּשְׁלַח vayishlach חִצָּיו chitzayv וַיְפִיצֵם vayfitzem וּבְרָקִים uvrakim רָב rav וַיְהֻמֵּם vayhumem
16
The ocean bed was exposed;the foundations of the world were laid bareby Your mighty roaring, O ETERNAL One,at the blast of Your breath.
וַיֵּרָאוּ vayerau אֲפִיקֵי afikey מַיִם mayim וַיִּגָּלוּ vayigalu מוֹסְדוֹת mosdot תֵּבֵל tevel מִגַּעֲרָתְךָ migaaratkha יְהֹוָה Adonai מִנִּשְׁמַת minishmat רוּחַ ruach אַפֶּךָ apekha
17
Reaching down from on high, [God] took me,drawing me out of the mighty waters—
יִשְׁלַח yishlach מִמָּרוֹם mimarom יִקָּחֵנִי yikacheni יַמְשֵׁנִי yamsheni מִמַּיִם mimayim רַבִּים rabim
18
rescuing me from my fierce enemy,from foes too strong for me.
יַצִּילֵנִי yatzileni מֵאֹיְבִי meoyvi עָז az וּמִשֹּׂנְאַי umisonay כִּי ki אָמְצוּ amtzu מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
19
They confronted me on the day of my calamity,but GOD was my support—
יְקַדְּמוּנִי yekadmuni בְיוֹם veyom אֵידִי eydi וַיְהִי vayhi יְהֹוָה Adonai לְמִשְׁעָן lemishan לִי li
20
bringing me out to freedom,pleased with me enough to rescue me.
וַיּוֹצִיאֵנִי vayotzieni לַמֶּרְחָב lamerchav יְחַלְּצֵנִי yechaltzeni כִּי ki חָפֵץ chafetz בִּי bi
21
GOD rewarded me according to my merit—requiting the cleanness of my hands—
יִגְמְלֵנִי yigmleni יְהֹוָה Adonai כְּצִדְקִי ketzidki כְּבֹר kevor יָדַי yaday יָשִׁיב yashiv לִי li
22
for I have kept to the ways of GOD and have not been guilty before my God;
כִּי ki שָׁמַרְתִּי shamarti דַּרְכֵי darkhey יְהֹוָה Adonai וְלֹא velo רָשַׁעְתִּי rashati מֵאֱלֹהָי meelohay
23
for I am mindful of all God’s rulesand have not disregarded God’s laws.
כִּי ki כל khl מִשְׁפָּטָיו mishpatayv לְנֶגְדִּי lenegdi וְחֻקֹּתָיו vechukotayv לֹא lo אָסִיר asir מֶנִּי meni
24
I have been blameless toward [God],and have guarded myself against sinning;
וָאֱהִי vaehi תָמִים tamim עִמּוֹ imo וָאֶשְׁתַּמֵּר vaeshtamer מֵעֲוֺנִי meavoni
25
and GOD has requited my merit,according to the evident cleanness of my hands.
וַיָּשֶׁב vayashev יְהֹוָה Adonai לִי li כְצִדְקִי khetzidki כְּבֹר kevor יָדַי yaday לְנֶגֶד leneged עֵינָיו eynayv
26
With the loyal, You deal loyally;with the blameless, blamelessly.
עִם im חָסִיד chasid תִּתְחַסָּד titchasad עִם im גְּבַר gevar תָּמִים tamim תִּתַּמָּם titamam
27
With the pure, You act purely,and with the perverse, You are wily.
עִם im נָבָר navar תִּתְבָּרָר titbarar וְעִם veim עִקֵּשׁ ikesh תִּתְפַּתָּל titpatal
28
It is You who deliver lowly folk,but haughty eyes You humble.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah עַם am עָנִי ani תוֹשִׁיעַ toshia וְעֵינַיִם veeynayim רָמוֹת ramot תַּשְׁפִּיל tashpil
29
It is You who light my lamp;my ETERNAL God lights up my darkness.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah תָּאִיר tair נֵרִי neri יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay יַגִּיהַּ yagiha חשְׁכִּי chshki
30
With You, I can rush a barrier; with my God, I can scale a wall.
כִּי ki בְךָ vekha אָרֻץ arutz גְּדוּד gedud וּבֵאלֹהַי uvelohay אֲדַלֶּג adaleg שׁוּר shur
31
The way of God is perfect;the word of the ETERNAL is pure.[God] shields all who seek refuge.
הָאֵל hael תָּמִים tamim דַּרְכּוֹ darko אִמְרַת imrat יְהֹוָה Adonai צְרוּפָה tzerufah מָגֵן magen הוּא hu לְכֹל lekhol הַחֹסִים hachosim בּוֹ bo
32
Truly, who is a god except the ETERNAL,who is a rock but our God?—
כִּי ki מִי mi אֱלוֹהַּ eloha מִבַּלְעֲדֵי mibaladey יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמִי umi צוּר tzur זוּלָתִי zulati אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu
33
the God who girded me with might,who made my way secure;
הָאֵל hael הַמְאַזְּרֵנִי hamazreni חָיִל chayil וַיִּתֵּן vayiten תָּמִים tamim דַּרְכִּי darki
34
who made my legs like a deer’s,and set me firmly on the as a poetic form of bamoth; cf. Hab. 3.19; in contrast to others “my.” heights;
מְשַׁוֶּה meshaueh רַגְלַי raglay כָּאַיָּלוֹת kaayalot וְעַל veal בָּמֹתַי bamotay יַעֲמִידֵנִי yaamideni
35
who trained my hands for battle—my arms can bend a bow of bronze!
מְלַמֵּד melamed יָדַי yaday לַמִּלְחָמָה lamilchamah וְנִחֲתָה venichatah קֶשֶׁת keshet נְחוּשָׁה nechushah זְרוֹעֹתָי zerootay
36
You have granted me the shield of Your protection;Your right hand has sustained me,Your care has made me great.
וַתִּתֶּן vatiten לִי li מָגֵן magen יִשְׁעֶךָ yishekha וִימִינְךָ viminkha תִסְעָדֵנִי tisadeni וְעַנְוַתְךָ veanvatkha תַרְבֵּנִי tarbeni
37
You have let me stride on freely;my feet have not slipped.
תַּרְחִיב tarchiv צַעֲדִי tzaadi תַחְתָּי tachtay וְלֹא velo מָעֲדוּ maadu קַרְסֻלָּי karsulay
38
I pursued my enemies and overtook them;I did not turn back till I destroyed them.
אֶרְדּוֹף erdof אוֹיְבַי oyvay וְאַשִּׂיגֵם veasigem וְלֹא velo אָשׁוּב ashuv עַד ad כַּלּוֹתָם kalotam
39
I struck them down,and they could rise no more;they lay at my feet.
אֶמְחָצֵם emchatzem וְלֹא velo יֻכְלוּ yukhlu קוּם kum יִפְּלוּ yiplu תַּחַת tachat רַגְלָי raglay
40
You have girded me with strength for battle,brought low my adversaries before me,
וַתְּאַזְּרֵנִי vatazreni חַיִל chayil לַמִּלְחָמָה lamilchamah תַּכְרִיעַ takhria קָמַי kamay תַּחְתָּי tachtay
41
made my enemies turn tail before me;I wiped out my foes.
וְאֹיְבַי veoyvay נָתַתָּה natatah לִּי li עֹרֶף oref וּמְשַׂנְאַי umsanay אַצְמִיתֵם atzmitem
42
They cried out, but there was none to deliver;to GOD, who did not answer them.
יְשַׁוְּעוּ yeshauu וְאֵין veeyn מוֹשִׁיעַ moshia עַל al יְהֹוָה Adonai וְלֹא velo עָנָם anam
43
I ground them fine as windswept dust;I trod them flat like dirt of the streets.
וְאֶשְׁחָקֵם veeshchakem כְּעָפָר keafar עַל al פְּנֵי peney רוּחַ ruach כְּטִיט ketit חוּצוֹת chutzot אֲרִיקֵם arikem
44
You have rescued me from the strife of people;You have set me at the head of nations;peoples I knew not must serve me.
תְּפַלְּטֵנִי tefalteni מֵרִיבֵי merivey עָם am תְּשִׂימֵנִי tesimeni לְרֹאשׁ lerosh גּוֹיִם goyim עַם am לֹא lo יָדַעְתִּי yadati יַעַבְדוּנִי yaavduni
45
At the mere report of me they are submissive;foreign peoples cower before me.
לְשֵׁמַע leshema אֹזֶן ozen יִשָּׁמְעוּ yishamu לִי li בְּנֵי beney נֵכָר nekhar יְכַחֲשׁוּ yekhachashu לִי li
46
Foreign peoples lose courage,and come trembling out of their strongholds.
בְּנֵי beney נֵכָר nekhar יִבֹּלוּ yibolu וְיַחְרְגוּ veyachrgu מִמִּסְגְּרוֹתֵיהֶם mimisgroteyhem
47
GOD lives! Blessed is my rock!Exalted be God, my deliverer,
חַי chay יְהֹוָה Adonai וּבָרוּךְ uvarukh צוּרִי tzuri וְיָרוּם veyarum אֱלוֹהֵי elohey יִשְׁעִי yishi
48
the God who has vindicated meand made peoples subject to me,
הָאֵל hael הַנּוֹתֵן hanoten נְקָמוֹת nekamot לִי li וַיַּדְבֵּר vayadber עַמִּים amim תַּחְתָּי tachtay
49
who rescued me from my enemies,who raised me clear of my adversaries,saved me from the lawless opposition!
מְפַלְּטִי mefalti מֵאֹיְבָי meoyvay אַף af מִן min קָמַי kamay תְּרוֹמְמֵנִי teromemeni מֵאִישׁ meish חָמָס chamas תַּצִּילֵנִי tatzileni
50
For this I sing Your praise among the nations, ETERNAL One,and hymn Your name:
עַל al כֵּן ken אוֹדְךָ odkha בַגּוֹיִםיְהֹוָה vagoyimyhovah וּלְשִׁמְךָ ulshimkha אֲזַמֵּרָה azamerah
51
According great victories to Your king,keeping faith with Your anointed,with David and his offspring evermore.
מַגְדִּל magdil יְשׁוּעוֹת yeshuot מַלְכּוֹ malko וְעֹשֶׂה veoseh חֶסֶד chesed לִמְשִׁיחוֹ limshicho לְדָוִד ledavid וּלְזַרְעוֹ ulzaro עַד ad עוֹלָם olam

Psalm 19

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
The heavens declare the glory of God,the sky proclaims God’s handiwork.
הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim מְסַפְּרִים mesaprim כְּבוֹד kevod אֵל El וּמַעֲשֵׂה umaaseh יָדָיו yadayv מַגִּיד magid הָרָקִיעַ harakia
3
Day to day makes utterance,night to night speaks out.
יוֹם yom לְיוֹם leyom יַבִּיעַ yabia אֹמֶר omer וְלַיְלָה velaylah לְּלַיְלָה lelaylah יְחַוֶּה yechaueh דָּעַת daat
4
There is no utterance,there are no words,whose sound goes unheard.
אֵין eyn אֹמֶר omer וְאֵין veeyn דְּבָרִים devarim בְּלִי beli נִשְׁמָע nishma קוֹלָם kolam
5
Their voice, “to shout.” carries throughout the earth,their words to the end of the world.[God] placed in them a tent for the sun,
בְּכל bekhl הָאָרֶץ haaretz יָצָא yatza קַוָּם kauam וּבִקְצֵה uviktzeh תֵבֵל tevel מִלֵּיהֶם mileyhem לַשֶּׁמֶשׁ lashemesh שָׂם sam אֹהֶל ohel בָּהֶם bahem
6
who is like a groom coming forth from the chamber,like a hero, eager to run his course.
וְהוּא vehu כְּחָתָן kechatan יֹצֵא yotze מֵחֻפָּתוֹ mechupato יָשִׂישׂ yasis כְּגִבּוֹר kegibor לָרוּץ larutz אֹרַח orach
7
His rising-place is at one end of heaven,and his circuit reaches the other;nothing escapes his heat.
מִקְצֵה miktzeh הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim מוֹצָאוֹ motzao וּתְקוּפָתוֹ utkufato עַל al קְצוֹתָם ketzotam וְאֵין veeyn נִסְתָּר nistar מֵחַמָּתוֹ mechamato
8
The teaching of GOD is perfect,renewing life;the decrees of GOD are enduring,making the simple wise,
תּוֹרַת torat יְהֹוָה Adonai תְּמִימָה temimah מְשִׁיבַת meshivat נָפֶשׁ nafesh עֵדוּת edut יְהֹוָה Adonai נֶאֱמָנָה neemanah מַחְכִּימַת machkimat פֶּתִי peti
9
The precepts of GOD are just,rejoicing the heart;the instruction of GOD is lucid,making the eyes light up.
פִּקּוּדֵי pikudey יְהֹוָה Adonai יְשָׁרִים yesharim מְשַׂמְּחֵי mesamchey לֵב lev מִצְוַת mitzvat יְהֹוָה Adonai בָּרָה barah מְאִירַת meirat עֵינָיִם eynayim
10
The fear of GOD is pure,abiding forever;the judgments of GOD are true,righteous altogether,
יִרְאַת yirat יְהֹוָה Adonai טְהוֹרָה tehorah עוֹמֶדֶת omedet לָעַד laad מִשְׁפְּטֵי mishptey יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱמֶת emet צָדְקוּ tzadku יַחְדָּו yachdav
11
more desirable than gold,than much fine gold;sweeter than honey,than drippings of the comb.
הַנֶּחֱמָדִים hanechemadim מִזָּהָב mizahav וּמִפַּז umipaz רָב rav וּמְתוּקִים umtukim מִדְּבַשׁ midvash וְנֹפֶת venofet צוּפִים tzufim
12
Your servant pays them heed;in obeying them there is much reward.
גַּם gam עַבְדְּךָ avdkha נִזְהָר nizhar בָּהֶם bahem בְּשׁמְרָם beshmram עֵקֶב ekev רָב rav
13
Who can be aware of errors?Clear me of unperceived guilt,
שְׁגִיאוֹת shegiot מִי mi יָבִין yavin מִנִּסְתָּרוֹת ministarot נַקֵּנִי nakeni
14
and from willful sins keep Your servant;let them not dominate me;then shall I be blamelessand clear of grave offense.
גַּם gam מִזֵּדִים mizedim חֲשֹׂךְ chasokh עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha אַל El יִמְשְׁלוּ yimshlu בִי vi אָז az אֵיתָם eytam וְנִקֵּיתִי venikeyti מִפֶּשַׁע mipesha רָב rav
15
May the words of my mouthand the prayer of my heart as a source of speech, see note to Eccl. 5.1. be acceptable to You,O ETERNAL One, my rock and my redeemer.
יִהְיוּ yihyu לְרָצוֹן leratzon אִמְרֵי imrey פִי fi וְהֶגְיוֹן vehegyon לִבִּי libi לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha יְהֹוָה Adonai צוּרִי tzuri וְגֹאֲלִי vegoali

Psalm 20

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
May GOD answer you in time of trouble,the name of Jacob’s God keep you safe—
יַעַנְךָ yaankha יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּיוֹם beyom צָרָה tzarah יְשַׂגֶּבְךָ yesagevkha שֵׁם shem אֱלֹהֵי elohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov
3
sending you help from the sanctuary,and sustaining you from Zion.
יִשְׁלַח yishlach עֶזְרְךָ ezrkha מִקֹּדֶשׁ mikodesh וּמִצִּיּוֹן umitzion יִסְעָדֶךָּ yisadeka
4
May [God] receive the tokens, “token portion” of grain offering; Lev. 2.2, 9, 16, etc. of all your grain offerings,and approve your burnt offerings. Selah.
יִזְכֹּר yizkor כּל kl מִנְחֹתֶךָ minchotekha וְעוֹלָתְךָ veolatkha יְדַשְּׁנֶה yedashneh סֶלָה selah
5
May your desire be granted,your every plan fulfilled.
יִתֶּן yiten לְךָ lekha כִלְבָבֶךָ khilvavekha וְכל vekhl עֲצָתְךָ atzatkha יְמַלֵּא yemale
6
May we shout for joy in your victory,arrayed by standards in the name of our God.May GOD fulfill your every wish.
נְרַנְּנָה neranenah בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ bishuatekha וּבְשֵׁם uvshem אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu נִדְגֹּל nidgol יְמַלֵּא yemale יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl מִשְׁאֲלוֹתֶיךָ mishaloteykha
7
Now I know that GOD will give victory to our anointed one,will answer him from the heavenly sanctuarywith the mighty victories of God’s right arm.
עַתָּה atah יָדַעְתִּי yadati כִּי ki הוֹשִׁיעַיְהֹוָה hoshiayhovah מְשִׁיחוֹ meshicho יַעֲנֵהוּ yaanehu מִשְּׁמֵי mishmey קדְשׁוֹ kdsho בִּגְבֻרוֹת bigvurot יֵשַׁע yesha יְמִינוֹ yemino
8
They [call] on chariots, they [call] on horses,but we call on the name of the ETERNAL our God.
אֵלֶּה eleh בָרֶכֶב varekhev וְאֵלֶּה veeleh בַסּוּסִים vasusim וַאֲנַחְנוּ vaanachnu בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu נַזְכִּיר nazkir
9
They collapse and lie fallen,but we rally and gather strength.
הֵמָּה hemah כָּרְעוּ karu וְנָפָלוּ venafalu וַאֲנַחְנוּ vaanachnu קַּמְנוּ kamnu וַנִּתְעוֹדָד vanitodad
10
O ETERNAL One, grant victory to the king;may [God] answer us when we call.
יְהֹוָה Adonai הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah הַמֶּלֶךְ hamelekh יַעֲנֵנוּ yaanenu בְיוֹם veyom קרְאֵנוּ krenu

Psalm 21

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
O ETERNAL One, the king rejoices in Your strength;how greatly he exults in Your victory!
יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּעזְּךָ bezkha יִשְׂמַח yismach מֶלֶךְ melekh וּבִישׁוּעָתְךָ uvishuatkha מַה mah [יָּגֶל] yagel (יגיל) ygyl מְאֹד meod
3
You have granted him the desire of his heart,have not denied the request of his lips. Selah.
תַּאֲוַת taavat לִבּוֹ libo נָתַתָּה natatah לּוֹ lo וַאֲרֶשֶׁת vaareshet שְׂפָתָיו sefatayv בַּל bal מָנַעְתָּ manata סֶּלָה selah
4
You have proffered him blessings of good things,have set upon his head a crown of fine gold.
כִּי ki תְקַדְּמֶנּוּ tekadmenu בִּרְכוֹת birkhot טוֹב tov תָּשִׁית tashit לְרֹאשׁוֹ lerosho עֲטֶרֶת ateret פָּז paz
5
He asked You for life; You granted it;a long life, everlasting.
חַיִּים chayim שָׁאַל shaal מִמְּךָ mimkha נָתַתָּה natatah לּוֹ lo אֹרֶךְ orekh יָמִים yamim עוֹלָם olam וָעֶד vaed
6
Great is his glory through Your victory;You have endowed him with splendor and majesty.
גָּדוֹל gadol כְּבוֹדוֹ kevodo בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ bishuatekha הוֹד hod וְהָדָר vehadar תְּשַׁוֶּה teshaueh עָלָיו alayv
7
You have made him blessed forever,gladdened him with the joy of Your presence.
כִּי ki תְשִׁיתֵהוּ teshitehu בְרָכוֹת verakhot לָעַד laad תְּחַדֵּהוּ techadehu בְשִׂמְחָה vesimchah אֶת et פָּנֶיךָ paneykha
8
For the king trusts in GOD;through the faithfulness of the Most Highhe will not be shaken.
כִּי ki הַמֶּלֶךְ hamelekh בֹּטֵחַ boteach בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah וּבְחֶסֶד uvchesed עֶלְיוֹן elyon בַּל bal יִמּוֹט yimot
9
Your hand is equal to all Your enemies;Your right hand overpowers Your foes.
תִּמְצָא timtza יָדְךָ yadkha לְכל lekhl אֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha יְמִינְךָ yeminkha תִּמְצָא timtza שֹׂנְאֶיךָ soneykha
10
You set them ablaze like a furnacewhen You show Your presence. GOD in anger destroys them;fire consumes them.
תְּשִׁיתֵמוֹ teshitemo כְּתַנּוּר ketanur אֵשׁ esh לְעֵת leet פָּנֶיךָ paneykha יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּאַפּוֹ beapo יְבַלְּעֵם yevalem וְתֹאכְלֵם vetokhlem אֵשׁ esh
11
You wipe their offspring from the earth,their issue from among humankind.
פִּרְיָמוֹ piryamo מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz תְּאַבֵּד teabed וְזַרְעָם vezaram מִבְּנֵי mibney אָדָם adam
12
For they schemed against You;they laid plans,but could not succeed.
כִּי ki נָטוּ natu עָלֶיךָ aleykha רָעָה raah חָשְׁבוּ chashvu מְזִמָּה mezimah בַּל bal יוּכָלוּ yukhalu
13
For You make them turn back by Your bows aimed at their face.
כִּי ki תְּשִׁיתֵמוֹ teshitemo שֶׁכֶם shekhem בְּמֵיתָרֶיךָ bemeytareykha תְּכוֹנֵן tekhonen עַל al פְּנֵיהֶם peneyhem
14
Be exalted, O ETERNAL One, through Your strength;we will sing and chant the praises of Your mighty deeds.
רוּמָה rumah יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּעֻזֶּךָ beuzekha נָשִׁירָה nashirah וּנְזַמְּרָה unzamrah גְּבוּרָתֶךָ gevuratekha

Psalm 22

1
For the leader; on ayyeleth ha-shaḥar. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al אַיֶּלֶת ayelet הַשַּׁחַר hashachar מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
My God, my God,why have You abandoned me;why so far from delivering meand from my anguished roaring?
אֵלִי eli אֵלִי eli לָמָה lamah עֲזַבְתָּנִי azavtani רָחוֹק rachok מִישׁוּעָתִי mishuati דִּבְרֵי divrey שַׁאֲגָתִי shaagati
3
My God,I cry by day—You answer not;by night, and have no respite.
אֱלֹהַי elohay אֶקְרָא ekra יוֹמָם yomam וְלֹא velo תַעֲנֶה taaneh וְלַיְלָה velaylah וְלֹא velo דֻמִיָּה dumiah לִי li
4
But You are the Holy One,enthroned,the Praise of Israel.
וְאַתָּה veatah קָדוֹשׁ kadosh יוֹשֵׁב yoshev תְּהִלּוֹת tehilot יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
5
In You our ancestors trusted;they trusted, and You rescued them.
בְּךָ bekha בָּטְחוּ batchu אֲבֹתֵינוּ avoteynu בָּטְחוּ batchu וַתְּפַלְּטֵמוֹ vatfaltemo
6
To You they cried outand they escaped;in You they trustedand were not disappointed.
אֵלֶיךָ eleykha זָעֲקוּ zaaku וְנִמְלָטוּ venimlatu בְּךָ bekha בָטְחוּ vatchu וְלֹא velo בוֹשׁוּ voshu
7
But I am a worm, less than human; scorned by everyone, despised by people.
וְאָנֹכִי veanokhi תוֹלַעַת tolaat וְלֹא velo אִישׁ ish חֶרְפַּת cherpat אָדָם adam וּבְזוּי uvzuy עָם am
8
All who see me mock me;they curl their lips, they shake their heads.
כּל kl רֹאַי roay יַלְעִגוּ yaligu לִי li יַפְטִירוּ yaftiru בְשָׂפָה vesafah יָנִיעוּ yaniu רֹאשׁ rosh
9
“Let him commit himself to GOD;let [God] rescue him,let [God] save him,for [God] is pleased with him.”
גֹּל gol אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai יְפַלְּטֵהוּ yefaltehu יַצִּילֵהוּ yatzilehu כִּי ki חָפֵץ chafetz בּוֹ bo
10
You drew me from the womb,made me secure at my mother’s breast.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah גֹחִי gochi מִבָּטֶן mibaten מַבְטִיחִי mavtichi עַל al שְׁדֵי shedey אִמִּי imi
11
I became Your charge at birth;from my mother’s womb You have been my God.
עָלֶיךָ aleykha השְׁלַכְתִּי hshlakhti מֵרָחֶם merachem מִבֶּטֶן mibeten אִמִּי imi אֵלִי eli אָתָּה atah
12
Do not be far from me,for trouble is near,and there is none to help.
אַל El תִּרְחַק tirchak מִמֶּנִּי mimeni כִּי ki צָרָה tzarah קְרוֹבָה kerovah כִּי ki אֵין eyn עוֹזֵר ozer
13
Many bulls surround me,mighty ones of Bashan encircle me.
סְבָבוּנִי sevavuni פָּרִים parim רַבִּים rabim אַבִּירֵי abirey בָשָׁן vashan כִּתְּרוּנִי kitruni
14
They open their mouths at melike tearing, roaring lions.
פָּצוּ patzu עָלַי alay פִּיהֶם pihem אַרְיֵה aryeh טֹרֵף toref וְשֹׁאֵג veshoeg
15
My life ebbs away: all my bones are disjointed;my heart is like wax,melting within me;
כַּמַּיִם kamayim נִשְׁפַּכְתִּי nishpakhti וְהִתְפָּרְדוּ vehitpardu כּל kl עַצְמוֹתָי atzmotay הָיָה hayah לִבִּי libi כַּדּוֹנָג kadonag נָמֵס names בְּתוֹךְ betokh מֵעָי meay
16
my vigor dries up like a shard;my tongue cleaves to my palate;You commit me to the dust of death.
יָבֵשׁ yavesh כַּחֶרֶשׂ kacheres כֹּחִי kochi וּלְשׁוֹנִי ulshoni מֻדְבָּק mudbak מַלְקוֹחָי malkochay וְלַעֲפַר velaafar מָוֶת mavet תִּשְׁפְּתֵנִי tishpteni
17
Dogs surround me;a pack of evil ones closes in on me,like lions [they maul] my hands and feet.
כִּי ki סְבָבוּנִי sevavuni כְּלָבִים kelavim עֲדַת adat מְרֵעִים mereim הִקִּיפוּנִי hikifuni כָּאֲרִי kaari יָדַי yaday וְרַגְלָי veraglay
18
I take the count of all my boneswhile they look on and gloat.
אֲסַפֵּר asaper כּל kl עַצְמוֹתָי atzmotay הֵמָּה hemah יַבִּיטוּ yabitu יִרְאוּ yiru בִי vi
19
They divide my clothes among themselves,casting lots for my garments.
יְחַלְּקוּ yechalku בְגָדַי vegaday לָהֶם lahem וְעַל veal לְבוּשִׁי levushi יַפִּילוּ yapilu גוֹרָל goral
20
But You, O ETERNAL One, be not far off;my strength, hasten to my aid.
וְאַתָּה veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El תִּרְחָק tirchak אֱיָלוּתִי eyaluti לְעֶזְרָתִי leezrati חוּשָׁה chushah
21
Save my life from the sword,my precious life from the clutches of a dog.
הַצִּילָה hatzilah מֵחֶרֶב mecherev נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִיַּד miad כֶּלֶב kelev יְחִידָתִי yechidati
22
Deliver me from a lion’s mouth;from the horns of wild oxen rescue me.
הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni מִפִּי mipi אַרְיֵה aryeh וּמִקַּרְנֵי umikarney רֵמִים remim עֲנִיתָנִי anitani
23
Then will I proclaim Your fame to my kin,praise You in the congregation.
אֲסַפְּרָה asaprah שִׁמְךָ shimkha לְאֶחָי leechay בְּתוֹךְ betokh קָהָל kahal אֲהַלְלֶךָּ ahaleleka
24
You who fear GOD, give praise!All you offspring of Jacob, show honor!Be in dread, all you offspring of Israel!
יִרְאֵי yirey יְהֹוָה Adonai הַלְלוּהוּ haleluhu כּל kl זֶרַע zera יַעֲקֹב yaakov כַּבְּדוּהוּ kabduhu וְגוּרוּ veguru מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu כּל kl זֶרַע zera יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
25
For [God] did not scorn, and did not spurn,the plea of anyone lowly;[God] did not turn away from them;when they cried out, [God] listened.
כִּי ki לֹא lo בָזָה vazah וְלֹא velo שִׁקַּץ shikatz עֱנוּת enut עָנִי ani וְלֹא velo הִסְתִּיר histir פָּנָיו panayv מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu וּבְשַׁוְּעוֹ uvshauo אֵלָיו elayv שָׁמֵעַ shamea
26
Because of You I offer praise in the great congregation;I pay my vows in the presence of God’s worshipers.
מֵאִתְּךָ meitkha תְּהִלָּתִי tehilati בְּקָהָל bekahal רָב rav נְדָרַי nedaray אֲשַׁלֵּם ashalem נֶגֶד neged יְרֵאָיו yereayv
27
Let the lowly eat and be satisfied;let all who seek GOD give praise.Always be of good cheer!
יֹאכְלוּ yokhlu עֲנָוִים anavim וְיִשְׂבָּעוּ veyisbau יְהַלְלוּ yehalelu יְהֹוָה Adonai דֹּרְשָׁיו dorshayv יְחִי yechi לְבַבְכֶם levavkhem לָעַד laad
28
Let all the ends of the earth pay heed and turn to GOD,and the peoples of all nations prostrate themselves before You;
יִזְכְּרוּ yizkru וְיָשֻׁבוּ veyashuvu אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl אַפְסֵי afsey אָרֶץ aretz וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ veyishtachavu לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha כּל kl מִשְׁפְּחוֹת mishpchot גּוֹיִם goyim
29
for sovereignty is GOD’s,who rules the nations.
כִּי ki לַיהֹוָה layhovah הַמְּלוּכָה hamlukhah וּמֹשֵׁל umoshel בַּגּוֹיִם bagoyim
30
All those in full vigor shall eat and prostrate themselves;all those at death’s door, whose spirits flag,shall bend the knee in submission.
אָכְלוּ akhlu וַיִּשְׁתַּחֲווּ vayishtachavu כּל kl דִּשְׁנֵי dishney אֶרֶץ eretz לְפָנָיו lefanayv יִכְרְעוּ yikhru כּל kl יוֹרְדֵי yordey עָפָר afar וְנַפְשׁוֹ venafsho לֹא lo חִיָּה chiah
31
Offspring shall serve [God];the Sovereign’s fame shall be proclaimed to the generation
זֶרַע zera יַעַבְדֶנּוּ yaavdenu יְסֻפַּר yesupar לַאדֹנָי ladonay לַדּוֹר lador
32
to come;they shall tell of the beneficence to people yet to be born,for [God] has acted.
יָבֹאוּ yavou וְיַגִּידוּ veyagidu צִדְקָתוֹ tzidkato לְעַם leam נוֹלָד nolad כִּי ki עָשָׂה asah

Psalm 23

1
A psalm of David. GOD is my shepherd;I lack nothing.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid יְהֹוָה Adonai רֹעִי roi לֹא lo אֶחְסָר echsar
2
[God] makes me lie down in green pastures,and leads me to water in places of repose—
בִּנְאוֹת binot דֶּשֶׁא deshe יַרְבִּיצֵנִי yarbitzeni עַל al מֵי mey מְנֻחוֹת menuchot יְנַהֲלֵנִי yenahaleni
3
renewing my life,guiding me in the right pathsas befits the divine name.
נַפְשִׁי nafshi יְשׁוֹבֵב yeshovev יַנְחֵנִי yancheni בְמַעְגְּלֵי vemagley צֶדֶק tzedek לְמַעַן lemaan שְׁמוֹ shemo
4
Though I walk through a valley of deepest darkness, I fear no harm, for You are with me;Your rod and Your staff—they comfort me.
גַּם gam כִּי ki אֵלֵךְ elekh בְּגֵיא begey צַלְמָוֶת tzalmavet לֹא lo אִירָא ira רָע ra כִּי ki אַתָּה atah עִמָּדִי imadi שִׁבְטְךָ shivtkha וּמִשְׁעַנְתֶּךָ umishantekha הֵמָּה hemah יְנַחֲמֻנִי yenachamuni
5
You spread a table for me in full view of my enemies;You anoint my head with oil;my drink is abundant.
תַּעֲרֹךְ taarokh לְפָנַי lefanay שֻׁלְחָן shulchan נֶגֶד neged צֹרְרָי tzoreray דִּשַּׁנְתָּ dishanta בַשֶּׁמֶן vashemen רֹאשִׁי roshi כּוֹסִי kosi רְוָיָה revayah
6
Only goodness and steadfast love shall pursue meall the days of my life,and I shall dwell in GOD’s housefor many long years.
אַךְ akh טוֹב tov וָחֶסֶד vachesed יִרְדְּפוּנִי yirdfuni כּל kl יְמֵי yemey חַיָּי chayay וְשַׁבְתִּי veshavti בְּבֵית beveyt יְהֹוָה Adonai לְאֹרֶךְ leorekh יָמִים yamim

Psalm 24

1
Of David. A psalm.The earth is GOD’s and all that it holds,the world and its inhabitants.
לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor לַיהֹוָה layhovah הָאָרֶץ haaretz וּמְלוֹאָהּ umloah תֵּבֵל tevel וְיֹשְׁבֵי veyoshvey בָהּ vah
2
For [God] founded it upon the ocean,set it on the nether-streams.
כִּי ki הוּא hu עַל al יַמִּים yamim יְסָדָהּ yesadah וְעַל veal נְהָרוֹת neharot יְכוֹנְנֶהָ yekhoneneha
3
Who may ascend GOD’s mountain?Who may stand in that holy place?—
מִי mi יַעֲלֶה yaaleh בְהַר vehar יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמִי umi יָקוּם yakum בִּמְקוֹם bimkom קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
4
Anyone who has clean hands and a pure heart,who has not taken a false oath by My lifeor sworn deceitfully.
נְקִי neki כַפַּיִם khapayim וּבַר uvar לֵבָב levav אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo נָשָׂא nasa לַשָּׁוְא lashav נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְלֹא velo נִשְׁבַּע nishba לְמִרְמָה lemirmah
5
They shall carry away a blessing from GOD,a just reward from God, their deliverer.
יִשָּׂא yisa בְרָכָה verakhah מֵאֵת meet יְהֹוָה Adonai וּצְדָקָה utzdakah מֵאֱלֹהֵי meelohey יִשְׁעוֹ yisho
6
Such is the circle of those who turn to You, Jacob, who seek Your presence. Selah.
זֶה zeh דּוֹר dor דֹּרְשָׁו dorshav מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey פָנֶיךָ faneykha יַעֲקֹב yaakov סֶלָה selah
7
O gates, lift up your heads!Up high, you everlasting doors,so the King of glory may come in!
שְׂאוּ seu שְׁעָרִים shearim רָאשֵׁיכֶם rasheykhem וְהִנָּשְׂאוּ vehinasu פִּתְחֵי pitchey עוֹלָם olam וְיָבוֹא veyavo מֶלֶךְ melekh הַכָּבוֹד hakavod
8
Who is the King of glory?—GOD, mighty and valiant, GOD, valiant in battle.
מִי mi זֶה zeh מֶלֶךְ melekh הַכָּבוֹד hakavod יְהֹוָה Adonai עִזּוּז izuz וְגִבּוֹר vegibor יְהֹוָה Adonai גִּבּוֹר gibor מִלְחָמָה milchamah
9
O gates, lift up your heads!Lift them up, you everlasting doors,so the King of glory may come in!
שְׂאוּ seu שְׁעָרִים shearim רָאשֵׁיכֶם rasheykhem וּשְׂאוּ usu פִּתְחֵי pitchey עוֹלָם olam וְיָבֹא veyavo מֶלֶךְ melekh הַכָּבוֹד hakavod
10
Who is the King of glory?—GOD of Hostsis truly the King of glory! Selah.
מִי mi הוּא hu זֶה zeh מֶלֶךְ melekh הַכָּבוֹד hakavod יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot הוּא hu מֶלֶךְ melekh הַכָּבוֹד hakavod סֶלָה selah

Psalm 25

1
Of David. א O ETERNAL One, I set my hope on You;
לְדָוִד ledavid אֵלֶיךָ eleykha יְהֹוָה Adonai נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶשָּׂא esa
2
ב my God, in You I trust;may I not be disappointed,may my enemies not exult over me.
אֱלֹהַי elohay בְּךָ bekha בָטַחְתִּי vatachti אַל El אֵבוֹשָׁה evoshah אַל El יַעַלְצוּ yaaltzu אוֹיְבַי oyvay לִי li
3
ג O let no one who looks to You be disappointed;let the faithless be disappointed, empty-handed.
גַּם gam כּל kl קֹוֶיךָ koveykha לֹא lo יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu הַבּוֹגְדִים habogdim רֵיקָם reykam
4
ד Let me know Your paths, O ETERNAL One;teach me Your ways;
דְּרָכֶיךָ derakheykha יְהֹוָה Adonai הוֹדִיעֵנִי hodieni אֹרְחוֹתֶיךָ orchoteykha לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni
5
ה ו guide me in Your true way and teach me,for You are God, my deliverer;it is You I look to at all times.
הַדְרִיכֵנִי hadrikheni בַאֲמִתֶּךָ vaamitekha וְלַמְּדֵנִי velamdeni כִּי ki אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׁעִי yishi אוֹתְךָ otkha קִוִּיתִי kiuiti כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom
6
ז O ETERNAL One, be mindful of Your compassionand Your faithfulness;they are old as time.
זְכֹר zekhor רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha יְהֹוָה Adonai וַחֲסָדֶיךָ vachasadeykha כִּי ki מֵעוֹלָם meolam הֵמָּה hemah
7
ח Be not mindful of my youthful sins and transgressions;in keeping with Your faithfulness consider what is in my favor,as befits Your goodness, O ETERNAL One.
חַטֹּאות chatovt נְעוּרַי neuray וּפְשָׁעַי ufshaay אַל El תִּזְכֹּר tizkor כְּחַסְדְּךָ kechasdkha זְכר zekhr לִי li אַתָּה atah לְמַעַן lemaan טוּבְךָ tuvkha יְהֹוָה Adonai
8
ט Good and upright is GOD,who shows sinners the way.
טוֹב tov וְיָשָׁר veyashar יְהֹוָה Adonai עַל al כֵּן ken יוֹרֶה yoreh חַטָּאִים chataim בַּדָּרֶךְ badarekh
9
י [God] guides the lowly in the right path,and teaches the lowly the godly way.
יַדְרֵךְ yadrekh עֲנָוִים anavim בַּמִּשְׁפָּט bamishpat וִילַמֵּד vilamed עֲנָוִים anavim דַּרְכּוֹ darko
10
כ All GOD’s paths are steadfast lovefor those who keep the decrees of the covenant.
כּל kl ארְחוֹת rchot יְהֹוָה Adonai חֶסֶד chesed וֶאֱמֶת veemet לְנֹצְרֵי lenotzrey בְרִיתוֹ verito וְעֵדֹתָיו veedotayv
11
ל As befits Your name, O ETERNAL One,pardon my iniquity though it be great.
לְמַעַן lemaan שִׁמְךָ shimkha יְהֹוָה Adonai וְסָלַחְתָּ vesalachta לַעֲוֺנִי laavoni כִּי ki רַב rav הוּא hu
12
מ Whoever fears GOD will be shown what path to choose.
מִי mi זֶה zeh הָאִישׁ haish יְרֵא yere יְהֹוָה Adonai יוֹרֶנּוּ yorenu בְּדֶרֶךְ bederekh יִבְחָר yivchar
13
נ They shall live a happy life,and their children shall inherit the land.
נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho בְּטוֹב betov תָּלִין talin וְזַרְעוֹ vezaro יִירַשׁ yirash אָרֶץ aretz
14
ס GOD’s counsel is for those who show reverence;to them the covenant is made known.
סוֹד sod יְהֹוָה Adonai לִירֵאָיו lireayv וּבְרִיתוֹ uvrito לְהוֹדִיעָם lehodiam
15
ע My eyes are ever toward GOD,who will loose my feet from the net.
עֵינַי eynay תָּמִיד tamid אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki הוּא hu יוֹצִיא yotzi מֵרֶשֶׁת mereshet רַגְלָי raglay
16
פ Turn to me, have mercy on me,for I am alone and afflicted.
פְּנֵה peneh אֵלַי elay וְחנֵּנִי vechneni כִּי ki יָחִיד yachid וְעָנִי veani אָנִי ani
17
צ My deep distress increases;deliver me from my straits.
צָרוֹת tzarot לְבָבִי levavi הִרְחִיבוּ hirchivu מִמְּצוּקוֹתַי mimtzukotay הוֹצִיאֵנִי hotzieni
18
ר Look at my affliction and suffering,and forgive all my sins.
רְאֵה reeh ענְיִי nyi וַעֲמָלִי vaamali וְשָׂא vesa לְכל lekhl חַטֹּאותָי chatovtay
19
See how numerous my enemies are,and how unjustly they hate me!
רְאֵה reeh אֹיְבַי oyvay כִּי ki רָבּוּ rabu וְשִׂנְאַת vesinat חָמָס chamas שְׂנֵאוּנִי seneuni
20
ש Protect me and save me;let me not be disappointed,for I have sought refuge in You.
שׁמְרָה shmrah נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְהַצִּילֵנִי vehatzileni אַל El אֵבוֹשׁ evosh כִּי ki חָסִיתִי chasiti בָךְ vakh
21
ת May integrity and uprightness watch over me,for I look to You.
תֹּם tom וָיֹשֶׁר vayosher יִצְּרוּנִי yitzruni כִּי ki קִוִּיתִיךָ kiuitikha
22
O God, redeem Israelfrom all its distress.
פְּדֵה pedeh אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֶת et יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מִכֹּל mikol צָרוֹתָיו tzarotayv

Psalm 26

1
Of David.Vindicate me, O ETERNAL One,for I have walked without blame;I have trusted in GOD;I have not faltered.
לְדָוִד ledavid שׁפְטֵנִי shfteni יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki אֲנִי ani בְּתֻמִּי betumi הָלַכְתִּי halakhti וּבַיהֹוָה uvayhovah בָּטַחְתִּי batachti לֹא lo אֶמְעָד emad
2
Probe me, O ETERNAL One, and try me,test my heart and mind;
בְּחָנֵנִי bechaneni יְהֹוָה Adonai וְנַסֵּנִי venaseni (צרופה) tzrvfh [צרְפָה] tzrfah כִלְיוֹתַי khilyotay וְלִבִּי velibi
3
for my eyes are on Your steadfast love;I have set my course by it.
כִּי ki חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha לְנֶגֶד leneged עֵינָי eynay וְהִתְהַלַּכְתִּי vehithalakhti בַּאֲמִתֶּךָ baamitekha
4
I do not consort with scoundrels,or mix with hypocrites;
לֹא lo יָשַׁבְתִּי yashavti עִם im מְתֵי metey שָׁוְא shav וְעִם veim נַעֲלָמִים naalamim לֹא lo אָבוֹא avo
5
I detest the company of evildoers,and do not consort with the wicked;
שָׂנֵאתִי saneti קְהַל kehal מְרֵעִים mereim וְעִם veim רְשָׁעִים reshaim לֹא lo אֵשֵׁב eshev
6
I wash my hands in innocence,and walk around Your altar, O ETERNAL One,
אֶרְחַץ erchatz בְּנִקָּיוֹן benikayon כַּפָּי kapay וַאֲסֹבְבָה vaasovevah אֶת et מִזְבַּחֲךָ mizbachakha יְהֹוָה Adonai
7
raising my voice in thanksgiving,and telling all Your wonders.
לַשְׁמִעַ lashmia בְּקוֹל bekol תּוֹדָה todah וּלְסַפֵּר ulsaper כּל kl נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ nifloteykha
8
O ETERNAL One, I love Your temple abode,the dwelling-place of Your glory.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אָהַבְתִּי ahavti מְעוֹן meon בֵּיתֶךָ beytekha וּמְקוֹם umkom מִשְׁכַּן mishkan כְּבוֹדֶךָ kevodekha
9
Do not sweep me away with sinners,or [snuff out] my life with murderers,
אַל El תֶּאֱסֹף teesof עִם im חַטָּאִים chataim נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְעִם veim אַנְשֵׁי anshey דָמִים damim חַיָּי chayay
10
who have schemes at their fingertips,and hands full of bribes.
אֲשֶׁר asher בִּידֵיהֶם bideyhem זִמָּה zimah וִימִינָם viminam מָלְאָה malah שֹּׁחַד shochad
11
But I walk without blame;redeem me, have mercy on me!
וַאֲנִי vaani בְּתֻמִּי betumi אֵלֵךְ elekh פְּדֵנִי pedeni וְחנֵּנִי vechneni
12
My feet are on level ground.In assemblies I will bless GOD.
רַגְלִי ragli עָמְדָה amdah בְמִישׁוֹר vemishor בְּמַקְהֵלִים bemakhelim אֲבָרֵךְ avarekh יְהֹוָה Adonai

Psalm 27

1
Of David. GOD is my light and my help;whom should I fear? GOD is the stronghold of my life,whom should I dread?
לְדָוִד ledavid יְהֹוָה Adonai אוֹרִי ori וְיִשְׁעִי veyishi מִמִּי mimi אִירָא ira יְהֹוָה Adonai מָעוֹז maoz חַיַּי chayay מִמִּי mimi אֶפְחָד efchad
2
When evildoers assail meto devour my flesh—it is they, my foes and my enemies,who stumble and fall.
בִּקְרֹב bikrov עָלַי alay מְרֵעִים mereim לֶאֱכֹל leekhol אֶת et בְּשָׂרִי besari צָרַי tzaray וְאֹיְבַי veoyvay לִי li הֵמָּה hemah כָשְׁלוּ khashlu וְנָפָלוּ venafalu
3
Should an army besiege me,my heart would have no fear;should war beset me,still would I be confident.
אִם im תַּחֲנֶה tachaneh עָלַי alay מַחֲנֶה machaneh לֹא lo יִירָא yira לִבִּי libi אִם im תָּקוּם takum עָלַי alay מִלְחָמָה milchamah בְּזֹאת bezot אֲנִי ani בוֹטֵחַ voteach
4
One thing I ask of GOD,only that do I seek:to live in GOD’s houseall the days of my life,to gaze upon GOD’s beauty,to frequent the temple.
אַחַת achat שָׁאַלְתִּי shaalti מֵאֵת meet יְהֹוָה Adonai אוֹתָהּ otah אֲבַקֵּשׁ avakesh שִׁבְתִּי shivti בְּבֵית beveyt יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl יְמֵי yemey חַיַּי chayay לַחֲזוֹת lachazot בְּנֹעַם benoam יְהֹוָה Adonai וּלְבַקֵּר ulvaker בְּהֵיכָלוֹ beheykhalo
5
I will be sheltered in God’s pavilionon an evil day,granted the protection of God’s tent,and raised up high upon a rock.
כִּי ki יִצְפְּנֵנִי yitzpneni בְּסֻכֹּה besukoh בְּיוֹם beyom רָעָה raah יַסְתִּרֵנִי yastireni בְּסֵתֶר beseter אהֳלוֹ holo בְּצוּר betzur יְרוֹמְמֵנִי yeromemeni
6
Now is my head highover my enemies round about;I sacrifice in that tent with shouts of joy,singing and chanting a hymn to GOD.
וְעַתָּה veatah יָרוּם yarum רֹאשִׁי roshi עַל al אֹיְבַי oyvay סְבִיבוֹתַי sevivotay וְאֶזְבְּחָה veezbchah בְאהֳלוֹ veholo זִבְחֵי zivchey תְרוּעָה teruah אָשִׁירָה ashirah וַאֲזַמְּרָה vaazamrah לַיהֹוָה layhovah
7
Hear, O ETERNAL One, when I cry aloud;have mercy on me, answer me.
שְׁמַע shema יְהֹוָה Adonai קוֹלִי koli אֶקְרָא ekra וְחנֵּנִי vechneni וַעֲנֵנִי vaaneni
8
In Your behalf my heart says:“Seek My face!”O ETERNAL One, I seek Your face.
לְךָ lekha אָמַר amar לִבִּי libi בַּקְּשׁוּ bakshu פָנָי fanay אֶת et פָּנֶיךָ paneykha יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲבַקֵּשׁ avakesh
9
Do not hide Your face from me;do not thrust aside Your servant in anger;You have ever been my help.Do not forsake me, do not abandon me,O God, my deliverer.
אַל El תַּסְתֵּר taster פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מִמֶּנִּי mimeni אַל El תַּט tat בְּאַף beaf עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha עֶזְרָתִי ezrati הָיִיתָ hayita אַל El תִּטְּשֵׁנִי titsheni וְאַל veal תַּעַזְבֵנִי taazveni אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׁעִי yishi
10
Though my father and mother abandon me, GOD will take me in.
כִּי ki אָבִי avi וְאִמִּי veimi עֲזָבוּנִי azavuni וַיהֹוָה vayhovah יַאַסְפֵנִי yaasfeni
11
Show me Your way, O ETERNAL One,and lead me on a level pathbecause of my watchful foes.
הוֹרֵנִי horeni יְהֹוָה Adonai דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha וּנְחֵנִי uncheni בְּאֹרַח beorach מִישׁוֹר mishor לְמַעַן lemaan שׁוֹרְרָי shoreray
12
Do not subject me to the will of my foes,for false witnesses and unjust accusershave appeared against me.
אַל El תִּתְּנֵנִי titneni בְּנֶפֶשׁ benefesh צָרָי tzaray כִּי ki קָמוּ kamu בִי vi עֵדֵי edey שֶׁקֶר sheker וִיפֵחַ vifeach חָמָס chamas
13
Had I not the assurancethat I would enjoy GOD’s goodnessin the land of the living…
לוּלֵא lule הֶאֱמַנְתִּי heemanti לִרְאוֹת lirot בְּטוּב betuv יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz חַיִּים chayim
14
Look to GOD;be strong and of good courage!O look to GOD!
קַוֵּה kaueh אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai חֲזַק chazak וְיַאֲמֵץ veyaametz לִבֶּךָ libekha וְקַוֵּה vekaueh אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai

Psalm 28

1
