Of David.O ETERNAL One, I call to You;my rock, do not disregard me,for if You hold aloof from me,I shall be like those gone down into the Pit.
לְדָוִד ledavid אֵלֶיךָ eleykha יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶקְרָא ekra צוּרִי tzuri אַל El תֶּחֱרַשׁ techerash מִמֶּנִּי mimeni פֶּן pen תֶּחֱשֶׁה techesheh מִמֶּנִּי mimeni וְנִמְשַׁלְתִּי venimshalti עִם im יוֹרְדֵי yordey בוֹר vor
2
Listen to my plea for mercywhen I cry out to You,when I lift my handstoward Your inner sanctuary.
שְׁמַע shema קוֹל kol תַּחֲנוּנַי tachanunay בְּשַׁוְּעִי beshaui אֵלֶיךָ eleykha בְּנשְׂאִי bensi יָדַי yaday אֶל El דְּבִיר devir קדְשֶׁךָ kdshekha
3
Do not count me with the wicked and evildoerswho profess goodwill toward their fellowswhile malice is in their heart.
אַל El תִּמְשְׁכֵנִי timshkheni עִם im רְשָׁעִים reshaim וְעִם veim פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven דֹּבְרֵי dovrey שָׁלוֹם shalom עִם im רֵעֵיהֶם reeyhem וְרָעָה veraah בִּלְבָבָם bilvavam
4
Pay them according to their deeds,their malicious acts;according to their handiwork pay them,give them their deserts.
תֶּן ten לָהֶם lahem כְּפעֳלָם kefolam וּכְרֹעַ ukhroa מַעַלְלֵיהֶם maaleleyhem כְּמַעֲשֵׂה kemaaseh יְדֵיהֶם yedeyhem תֵּן ten לָהֶם lahem הָשֵׁב hashev גְּמוּלָם gemulam לָהֶם lahem
5
For they do not consider GOD’s deeds,the work of divine hands.May [God] tear them down,never to rebuild them!
כִּי ki לֹא lo יָבִינוּ yavinu אֶל El פְּעֻלֹּת peulot יְהֹוָה Adonai וְאֶל veel מַעֲשֵׂה maaseh יָדָיו yadayv יֶהֶרְסֵם yehersem וְלֹא velo יִבְנֵם yivnem
6
Blessed is GOD,who listens to my plea for mercy.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki שָׁמַע shama קוֹל kol תַּחֲנוּנָי tachanunay
7
GOD is my strength and my shield,the One in whom my heart trusts.I was helped, and my heart exulted,so I will give glory with my song.
יְהֹוָה Adonai עֻזִּי uzi וּמָגִנִּי umagini בּוֹ bo בָטַח vatach לִבִּי libi וְנֶעֱזָרְתִּי veneezarti וַיַּעֲלֹז vayaaloz לִבִּי libi וּמִשִּׁירִי umishiri אֲהוֹדֶנּוּ ahodenu
8
GOD is their strength;, “the strength of God’s people.” and a stronghold for the deliverance of our anointed ruler.
יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹז oz לָמוֹ lamo וּמָעוֹז umaoz יְשׁוּעוֹת yeshuot מְשִׁיחוֹ meshicho הוּא hu
9
Deliver and bless Your very own people;tend them and sustain them forever.
הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah אֶת et עַמֶּךָ amekha וּבָרֵךְ uvarekh אֶת et נַחֲלָתֶךָ nachalatekha וּרְעֵם urem וְנַשְּׂאֵם venasem עַד ad הָעוֹלָם haolam

Psalm 29

1
A psalm of David.Ascribe to GOD, O divine beings,ascribe to GOD glory and strength.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid הָבוּ havu לַיהֹוָה layhovah בְּנֵי beney אֵלִים elim הָבוּ havu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כָּבוֹד kavod וָעֹז vaoz
2
Ascribe to GOD the glory of that name;bow down to GOD, majestic in holiness.
הָבוּ havu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כְּבוֹד kevod שְׁמוֹ shemo הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ hishtachavu לַיהֹוָה layhovah בְּהַדְרַת behadrat קֹדֶשׁ kodesh
3
GOD’s voice is over the waters;the God of glory thunders, GOD, over the mighty waters.
קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai עַל al הַמָּיִם hamayim אֵל El הַכָּבוֹד hakavod הִרְעִים hirim יְהֹוָה Adonai עַל al מַיִם mayim רַבִּים rabim
4
The voice of GOD is power; GOD’s voice is majesty;
קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּכֹּחַ bakoach קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai בֶּהָדָר behadar
5
GOD’s voice breaks cedars; GOD shatters the cedars of Lebanon—
קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai שֹׁבֵר shover אֲרָזִים arazim וַיְשַׁבֵּר vayshaber יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶת et אַרְזֵי arzey הַלְּבָנוֹן halvanon
6
making Lebanon skip like a calf, Sirion, like a young wild ox.
וַיַּרְקִידֵם vayarkidem כְּמוֹ kemo עֵגֶל egel לְבָנוֹן levanon וְשִׂרְיֹן vesiryon כְּמוֹ kemo בֶן ven רְאֵמִים reemim
7
GOD’s voice kindles flames of fire;
קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai חֹצֵב chotzev לַהֲבוֹת lahavot אֵשׁ esh
8
GOD’s voice convulses the wilderness; GOD convulses the wilderness of Kadesh;
קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai יָחִיל yachil מִדְבָּר midbar יָחִיל yachil יְהֹוָה Adonai מִדְבַּר midbar קָדֵשׁ kadesh
9
GOD’s voice causes hinds to calve,and strips forests bare; while in the divine temple all say “Glory!”
קוֹל kol יְהֹוָה Adonai יְחוֹלֵל yecholel אַיָּלוֹת ayalot וַיֶּחֱשֹׂף vayechesof יְעָרוֹת yearot וּבְהֵיכָלוֹ uvheykhalo כֻּלּוֹ kulo אֹמֵר omer כָּבוֹד kavod
10
GOD sat enthroned at the Flood; GOD sits enthroned, ruler forever.
יְהֹוָה Adonai לַמַּבּוּל lamabul יָשָׁב yashav וַיֵּשֶׁב vayeshev יְהֹוָה Adonai מֶלֶךְ melekh לְעוֹלָם leolam
11
May strength be granted to GOD’s people;may GOD bless this people with well-being.
יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹז oz לְעַמּוֹ leamo יִתֵּן yiten יְהֹוָה Adonai יְבָרֵךְ yevarekh אֶת et עַמּוֹ amo בַשָּׁלוֹם vashalom

Psalm 30

1
A psalm of David. A song for the dedication of the House.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor שִׁיר shir חֲנֻכַּת chanukat הַבַּיִת habayit לְדָוִד ledavid
2
I extol You, O ETERNAL One,for You have lifted me up,and not let my enemies rejoice over me.
אֲרוֹמִמְךָ aromimkha יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki דִלִּיתָנִי dilitani וְלֹא velo שִׂמַּחְתָּ simachta אֹיְבַי oyvay לִי li
3
O my ETERNAL God,I cried out to You,and You healed me.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהָי elohay שִׁוַּעְתִּי shiuati אֵלֶיךָ eleykha וַתִּרְפָּאֵנִי vatirpaeni
4
O ETERNAL One, You brought me up from Sheol,preserved me from going down into the Pit.
יְהֹוָה Adonai הֶעֱלִיתָ heelita מִן min שְׁאוֹל sheol נַפְשִׁי nafshi חִיִּיתַנִי chiitani (מיורדי) myvrdy [מִיּרְדִי mirdi ]בוֹר vor
5
O you faithful of GOD, sing out,and praise that holy name.
זַמְּרוּ zamru לַיהֹוָה layhovah חֲסִידָיו chasidayv וְהוֹדוּ vehodu לְזֵכֶר lezekher קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
6
For [God] is angry but a moment,and when pleased, there is life.One may lie down weeping at nightfall; but at dawn there are shouts of joy.
כִּי ki רֶגַע rega בְּאַפּוֹ beapo חַיִּים chayim בִּרְצוֹנוֹ birtzono בָּעֶרֶב baerev יָלִין yalin בֶּכִי bekhi וְלַבֹּקֶר velaboker רִנָּה rinah
7
When I was untroubled,I thought, “I shall never be shaken,”
וַאֲנִי vaani אָמַרְתִּי amarti בְשַׁלְוִי veshalvi בַּל bal אֶמּוֹט emot לְעוֹלָם leolam
8
for You, O ETERNAL One, when You were pleased,made [me] firm as a mighty mountain.When You hid Your face,I was terrified.
יְהֹוָה Adonai בִּרְצוֹנְךָ birtzonkha הֶעֱמַדְתָּה heemadtah לְהַרְרִי lehareri עֹז oz הִסְתַּרְתָּ histarta פָנֶיךָ faneykha הָיִיתִי hayiti נִבְהָל nivhal
9
I called to You, O ETERNAL One;to my Sovereign I made appeal,
אֵלֶיךָ eleykha יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶקְרָא ekra וְאֶל veel אֲדֹנָי Adonai אֶתְחַנָּן etchanan
10
“What is to be gained from my death, from my descent into the Pit?Can dust praise You?Can it declare Your faithfulness?
מַה mah בֶּצַע betza בְּדָמִי bedami בְּרִדְתִּי beridti אֶל El שָׁחַת shachat הֲיוֹדְךָ hayodkha עָפָר afar הֲיַגִּיד hayagid אֲמִתֶּךָ amitekha
11
Hear, O ETERNAL One, and have mercy on me;O ETERNAL One, be my help!”
שְׁמַע shema יְהֹוָה Adonai וְחנֵּנִי vechneni יְהֹוָה Adonai הֱיֵה heyeh עֹזֵר ozer לִי li
12
You turned my lament into dancing,you undid my sackcloth and girded me with joy,
הָפַכְתָּ hafakhta מִסְפְּדִי mispdi לְמָחוֹל lemachol לִי li פִּתַּחְתָּ pitachta שַׂקִּי saki וַתְּאַזְּרֵנִי vatazreni שִׂמְחָה simchah
13
that [my] whole being might sing hymns to You endlessly;O my ETERNAL God, I will praise You forever.
לְמַעַן lemaan יְזַמֶּרְךָ yezamerkha כָבוֹד khavod וְלֹא velo יִדֹּם yidom יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay לְעוֹלָם leolam אוֹדֶךָּ odeka

Psalm 31

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
I seek refuge in You, O ETERNAL One;may I never be disappointed;as You are righteous, rescue me.
בְּךָ bekha יְהֹוָה Adonai חָסִיתִי chasiti אַל El אֵבוֹשָׁה evoshah לְעוֹלָם leolam בְּצִדְקָתְךָ betzidkatkha פַלְּטֵנִי falteni
3
Incline Your ear to me;be quick to save me;be a rock, a stronghold for me,a citadel, for my deliverance.
הַטֵּה hateh אֵלַי elay אזְנְךָ znkha מְהֵרָה meherah הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni הֱיֵה heyeh לִי li לְצוּר letzur מָעוֹז maoz לְבֵית leveyt מְצוּדוֹת metzudot לְהוֹשִׁיעֵנִי lehoshieni
4
For You are my rock and my fortress;You lead me and guide me as befits Your name.
כִּי ki סַלְעִי sali וּמְצוּדָתִי umtzudati אָתָּה atah וּלְמַעַן ulmaan שִׁמְךָ shimkha תַּנְחֵנִי tancheni וּתְנַהֲלֵנִי utnahaleni
5
You free me from the net laid for me,for You are my stronghold.
תּוֹצִיאֵנִי totzieni מֵרֶשֶׁת mereshet זוּ zu טָמְנוּ tamnu לִי li כִּי ki אַתָּה atah מָעוּזִּי mauzi
6
Into Your hand I entrust my spirit;You redeem me, O ETERNAL One, faithful God.
בְּיָדְךָ beyadkha אַפְקִיד afkid רוּחִי ruchi פָּדִיתָ padita אוֹתִי oti יְהֹוָה Adonai אֵל El אֱמֶת emet
7
I detest those who rely on empty folly,but I trust in GOD.
שָׂנֵאתִי saneti הַשֹּׁמְרִים hashomrim הַבְלֵי havley שָׁוְא shav וַאֲנִי vaani אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai בָּטָחְתִּי batachti
8
Let me exult and rejoice in Your faithfulnesswhen You notice my affliction,are mindful of my deep distress,
אָגִילָה agilah וְאֶשְׂמְחָה veesmchah בְּחַסְדֶּךָ bechasdekha אֲשֶׁר asher רָאִיתָ raita אֶת et ענְיִי nyi יָדַעְתָּ yadata בְּצָרוֹת betzarot נַפְשִׁי nafshi
9
and do not hand me over to my enemy,but grant me relief.
וְלֹא velo הִסְגַּרְתַּנִי hisgartani בְּיַד beyad אוֹיֵב oyev הֶעֱמַדְתָּ heemadta בַמֶּרְחָב vamerchav רַגְלָי raglay
10
Have mercy on me, O ETERNAL One,for I am in distress;my eyes are wasted by vexation,my substance and body too.
חנֵּנִי chneni יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki צַר tzar לִי li עָשְׁשָׁה asheshah בְכַעַס vekhaas עֵינִי eyni נַפְשִׁי nafshi וּבִטְנִי uvitni
11
My life is spent in sorrow,my years in groaning;my strength fails because of my iniquity,my limbs waste away.
כִּי ki כָלוּ khalu בְיָגוֹן veyagon חַיַּי chayay וּשְׁנוֹתַי ushnotay בַּאֲנָחָה baanachah כָּשַׁל kashal בַּעֲוֺנִי baavoni כֹחִי khochi וַעֲצָמַי vaatzamay עָשֵׁשׁוּ asheshu
12
Because of all my foesI am the particular butt of my neighbors,a horror to my friends;those who see me on the street avoid me.
מִכּל mikl צֹרְרַי tzoreray הָיִיתִי hayiti חֶרְפָּה cherpah וְלִשְׁכֵנַי velishkhenay מְאֹד meod וּפַחַד ufachad לִמְיֻדָּעָי limyudaay רֹאַי roay בַּחוּץ bachutz נָדְדוּ nadedu מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
13
I am put out of mind like the dead;I am like an object given up for lost.
נִשְׁכַּחְתִּי nishkachti כְּמֵת kemet מִלֵּב milev הָיִיתִי hayiti כִּכְלִי kikhli אֹבֵד oved
14
I hear the whisperings of many,intrigue on every side,as they scheme together against me,plotting to take my life.
כִּי ki שָׁמַעְתִּי shamati דִּבַּת dibat רַבִּים rabim מָגוֹר magor מִסָּבִיב misaviv בְּהִוָּסְדָם behiuasdam יַחַד yachad עָלַי alay לָקַחַת lakachat נַפְשִׁי nafshi זָמָמוּ zamamu
15
But I trust in You, O ETERNAL One;I say, “You are my God!”
וַאֲנִי vaani עָלֶיךָ aleykha בָטַחְתִּי vatachti יְהֹוָה Adonai אָמַרְתִּי amarti אֱלֹהַי elohay אָתָּה atah
16
My fate is in Your hand;save me from the hand of my enemies and pursuers.
בְּיָדְךָ beyadkha עִתֹּתָי itotay הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni מִיַּד miad אוֹיְבַי oyvay וּמֵרֹדְפָי umerodfay
17
Show favor to Your servant;as You are faithful, deliver me.
הָאִירָה hairah פָנֶיךָ faneykha עַל al עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni בְחַסְדֶּךָ vechasdekha
18
O ETERNAL One, let me not be disappointed when I call You;let the wicked be disappointed;let them be silenced in Sheol;
יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El אֵבוֹשָׁה evoshah כִּי ki קְרָאתִיךָ keratikha יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu רְשָׁעִים reshaim יִדְּמוּ yidmu לִשְׁאוֹל lishol
19
let lying lips be stilledthat speak haughtily against the righteouswith arrogance and contempt.
תֵּאָלַמְנָה tealamnah שִׂפְתֵי siftey שָׁקֶר shaker הַדֹּבְרוֹת hadovrot עַל al צַדִּיק tzadik עָתָק atak בְּגַאֲוָה begaavah וָבוּז vavuz
20
How abundant is the goodthat You have in store for those who fear You,that You do in full viewfor those who take refuge in You.
מָה mah רַב rav טוּבְךָ tuvkha אֲשֶׁר asher צָפַנְתָּ tzafanta לִּירֵאֶיךָ lireeykha פָּעַלְתָּ paalta לַחֹסִים lachosim בָּךְ bakh נֶגֶד neged בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam
21
You grant them the protection of Your presenceagainst the opposition’s schemes; You shelter them in Your pavilionfrom contentious tongues.
תַּסְתִּירֵם tastirem בְּסֵתֶר beseter פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מֵרֻכְסֵי merukhsey אִישׁ ish תִּצְפְּנֵם titzpnem בְּסֻכָּה besukah מֵרִיב meriv לְשֹׁנוֹת leshonot
22
Blessed is GOD,who has been wondrously faithful to me,a veritable bastion.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki הִפְלִיא hifli חַסְדּוֹ chasdo לִי li בְּעִיר beir מָצוֹר matzor
23
Alarmed, I had thought,“I am thrust out of Your sight”;yet You listened to my plea for mercywhen I cried out to You.
וַאֲנִי vaani אָמַרְתִּי amarti בְחפְזִי vechfzi נִגְרַזְתִּי nigrazti מִנֶּגֶד mineged עֵינֶיךָ eyneykha אָכֵן akhen שָׁמַעְתָּ shamata קוֹל kol תַּחֲנוּנַי tachanunay בְּשַׁוְּעִי beshaui אֵלֶיךָ eleykha
24
So love GOD, all you faithful; GOD guards the loyal,and more than requitesthe one who acts arrogantly.
אֶהֱבוּ ehevu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl חֲסִידָיו chasidayv אֱמוּנִים emunim נֹצֵר notzer יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמְשַׁלֵּם umshalem עַל al יֶתֶר yeter עֹשֵׂה oseh גַאֲוָה gaavah
25
Be strong and of good courage,all you who wait for GOD.
חִזְקוּ chizku וְיַאֲמֵץ veyaametz לְבַבְכֶם levavkhem כּל kl הַמְיַחֲלִים hamyachalim לַיהֹוָה layhovah

Psalm 32

1
Of David. A maskil. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Happy is the one whose transgression is forgiven,whose sin is covered over.
לְדָוִד ledavid מַשְׂכִּיל maskil אַשְׁרֵי ashrey נְשׂוּי nesuy פֶּשַׁע pesha כְּסוּי kesuy חֲטָאָה chataah
2
Happy the person whom GOD does not hold guilty,and in whose spirit there is no deceit.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey אָדָם adam לֹא lo יַחְשֹׁב yachshov יְהֹוָה Adonai לוֹ lo עָוֺן avon וְאֵין veeyn בְּרוּחוֹ berucho רְמִיָּה remiah
3
As long as I said nothing,my limbs wasted awayfrom my anguished roaring all day long.
כִּי ki הֶחֱרַשְׁתִּי hecherashti בָּלוּ balu עֲצָמָי atzamay בְּשַׁאֲגָתִי beshaagati כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom
4
For night and dayYour hand lay heavy on me;my vigor wanedas in the summer drought. Selah.
כִּי ki יוֹמָם yomam וָלַיְלָה valaylah תִּכְבַּד tikhbad עָלַי alay יָדֶךָ yadekha נֶהְפַּךְ nehpakh לְשַׁדִּי leshadi בְּחַרְבֹנֵי becharvoney קַיִץ kayitz סֶלָה selah
5
Then I acknowledged my sin to You;I did not cover up my guilt;I resolved, “I will confess my transgressions to GOD,”and You forgave the guilt of my sin. Selah.
חַטָּאתִי chatati אוֹדִיעֲךָ odiakha וַעֲוֺנִי vaavoni לֹא lo כִסִּיתִי khisiti אָמַרְתִּי amarti אוֹדֶה odeh עֲלֵי aley פְשָׁעַי feshaay לַיהֹוָה layhovah וְאַתָּה veatah נָשָׂאתָ nasata עֲוֺן avon חַטָּאתִי chatati סֶלָה selah
6
Therefore let all the faithful pray to Youupon discovering [their sin], that the rushing mighty watersnot overtake them.
עַל al זֹאת zot יִתְפַּלֵּל yitpalel כּל kl חָסִיד chasid אֵלֶיךָ eleykha לְעֵת leet מְצֹא metzo רַק rak לְשֵׁטֶף leshetef מַיִם mayim רַבִּים rabim אֵלָיו elayv לֹא lo יַגִּיעוּ yagiu
7
You are my shelter;You preserve me from distress;You surround me with the joyous shouts of deliverance. Selah.
אַתָּה atah סֵתֶר seter לִי li מִצַּר mitzar תִּצְּרֵנִי titzreni רנֵּי rney פַלֵּט falet תְּסוֹבְבֵנִי tesoveveni סֶלָה selah
8
Let me enlighten youand show you which way to go;let me offer counsel; my eye is on you.
אַשְׂכִּילְךָ askilkha וְאוֹרְךָ veorkha בְּדֶרֶךְ bederekh זוּ zu תֵלֵךְ telekh אִיעֲצָה iatzah עָלֶיךָ aleykha עֵינִי eyni
9
Be not like a senseless horse or mulewhose movement must be curbed by bit and bridle; far be it from you!
אַל El תִּהְיוּ tihyu כְּסוּס kesus כְּפֶרֶד kefered אֵין eyn הָבִין havin בְּמֶתֶג bemeteg וָרֶסֶן varesen עֶדְיוֹ edyo לִבְלוֹם livlom בַּל bal קְרֹב kerov אֵלֶיךָ eleykha
10
Many are the torments of the wicked,but those who trust in GOD shall be surrounded with favor.
רַבִּים rabim מַכְאוֹבִים makhovim לָרָשָׁע larasha וְהַבּוֹטֵחַ vehaboteach בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah חֶסֶד chesed יְסוֹבְבֶנּוּ yesovevenu
11
Rejoice in GOD and exult, O you righteous;shout for joy, all the upright!
שִׂמְחוּ simchu בַיהֹוָה vayhovah וְגִילוּ vegilu צַדִּיקִים tzadikim וְהַרְנִינוּ veharninu כּל kl יִשְׁרֵי yishrey לֵב lev

Psalm 33

1
Sing forth, O you righteous, to GOD;it is fitting that the upright offer praise.
רַנְּנוּ ranenu צַדִּיקִים tzadikim בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah לַיְשָׁרִים laysharim נָאוָה navah תְהִלָּה tehilah
2
Praise GOD with the lyre;with the ten-stringed harp sing out;
הוֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah בְּכִנּוֹר bekhinor בְּנֵבֶל benevel עָשׂוֹר asor זַמְּרוּ zamru לוֹ lo
3
sing [God] a new song;play sweetly with shouts of joy.
שִׁירוּ shiru לוֹ lo שִׁיר shir חָדָשׁ chadash הֵיטִיבוּ heytivu נַגֵּן nagen בִּתְרוּעָה bitruah
4
For the word of GOD is right,and God’s every deed is faithful.
כִּי ki יָשָׁר yashar דְּבַר devar יְהֹוָה Adonai וְכל vekhl מַעֲשֵׂהוּ maasehu בֶּאֱמוּנָה beemunah
5
[God] loves what is right and just;the earth is full of GOD’s faithful care.
אֹהֵב ohev צְדָקָה tzedakah וּמִשְׁפָּט umishpat חֶסֶד chesed יְהֹוָה Adonai מָלְאָה malah הָאָרֶץ haaretz
6
By the word of GOD the heavens were made,by the breath of God’s mouth, all their host.
בִּדְבַר bidvar יְהֹוָה Adonai שָׁמַיִם shamayim נַעֲשׂוּ naasu וּבְרוּחַ uvruach פִּיו piv כּל kl צְבָאָם tzevaam
7
[God] heaps up the ocean waters like a mound,stores the deep in vaults.
כֹּנֵס kones כַּנֵּד kaned מֵי mey הַיָּם hayam נֹתֵן noten בְּאוֹצָרוֹת beotzarot תְּהוֹמוֹת tehomot
8
Let all the earth fear GOD;let all the inhabitants of the world feel dread.
יִירְאוּ yiru מֵיְהֹוָה meyhovah כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu יָגוּרוּ yaguru כּל kl יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey תֵבֵל tevel
9
For [God] spoke, and it was;issued the command, and it endured.
כִּי ki הוּא hu אָמַר amar וַיֶּהִי vayehi הוּא hu צִוָּה tziuah וַיַּעֲמֹד vayaamod
10
GOD frustrates the plans of nations,brings to naught the designs of peoples.
יְהֹוָה Adonai הֵפִיר hefir עֲצַת atzat גּוֹיִם goyim הֵנִיא heni מַחְשְׁבוֹת machshvot עַמִּים amim
11
What GOD plans endures forever,what [God] designs, for ages on end.
עֲצַת atzat יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעוֹלָם leolam תַּעֲמֹד taamod מַחְשְׁבוֹת machshvot לִבּוֹ libo לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador
12
Happy the nation whose God is the ETERNAL,the people who are chosen as a permanent possession.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הַגּוֹי hagoy אֲשֶׁר asher יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהָיו elohayv הָעָם haam בָּחַר bachar לְנַחֲלָה lenachalah לוֹ lo
13
GOD looks down from heavenand sees all humankind.
מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim הִבִּיט hibit יְהֹוָה Adonai רָאָה raah אֶת et כּל kl בְּנֵי beney הָאָדָם haadam
14
From God’s dwelling-place the divine gaze toucheson all the inhabitants of the earth—
מִמְּכוֹן mimkhon שִׁבְתּוֹ shivto הִשְׁגִּיחַ hishgiach אֶל El כּל kl יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey הָאָרֶץ haaretz
15
the One who fashions the hearts of them all,who discerns all their doings.
הַיֹּצֵר hayotzer יַחַד yachad לִבָּם libam הַמֵּבִין hamevin אֶל El כּל kl מַעֲשֵׂיהֶם maaseyhem
16
Kings are not delivered by a large force;warriors are not saved by great strength;
אֵין eyn הַמֶּלֶךְ hamelekh נוֹשָׁע nosha בְּרב berv חָיִל chayil גִּבּוֹר gibor לֹא lo יִנָּצֵל yinatzel בְּרב berv כֹּחַ koach
17
horses are a false hope for deliverance;for all their great power they provide no escape.
שֶׁקֶר sheker הַסּוּס hasus לִתְשׁוּעָה litshuah וּבְרֹב uvrov חֵילוֹ cheylo לֹא lo יְמַלֵּט yemalet
18
Truly GOD’s eye is on those who show reverence,who wait for God’s faithful care
הִנֵּה hineh עֵין eyn יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶל El יְרֵאָיו yereayv לַמְיַחֲלִים lamyachalim לְחַסְדּוֹ lechasdo
19
to save them from death,to sustain them in famine.
לְהַצִּיל lehatzil מִמָּוֶת mimavet נַפְשָׁם nafsham וּלְחַיּוֹתָם ulchayotam בָּרָעָב baraav
20
We set our hope on GOD,who is our help and shield;
נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu חִכְּתָה chiktah לַיהֹוָה layhovah עֶזְרֵנוּ ezrenu וּמָגִנֵּנוּ umaginenu הוּא hu
21
in whom our hearts rejoice,in whose holy name we trust.
כִּי ki בוֹ vo יִשְׂמַח yismach לִבֵּנוּ libenu כִּי ki בְשֵׁם veshem קדְשׁוֹ kdsho בָטָחְנוּ vatachnu
22
May we enjoy, O ETERNAL One, Your faithful care,as we have put our hope in You.
יְהִי yehi חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha יְהֹוָה Adonai עָלֵינוּ aleynu כַּאֲשֶׁר kaasher יִחַלְנוּ yichalnu לָךְ lakh

Psalm 34

1
Of David, when he feigned madness in the presence of Abimelech, who turned him out, and he left.
לְדָוִד ledavid בְּשַׁנּוֹתוֹ beshanoto אֶת et טַעְמוֹ tamo לִפְנֵי lifney אֲבִימֶלֶךְ avimelekh וַיְגָרְשֵׁהוּ vaygarshehu וַיֵּלַךְ vayelakh
2
א I bless GOD at all times;praise is ever in my mouth.
אֲבָרְכָה avarkhah אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּכל bekhl עֵת et תָּמִיד tamid תְּהִלָּתוֹ tehilato בְּפִי befi
3
ב I glory in GOD;let the lowly hear it and rejoice.
בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah תִּתְהַלֵּל tithalel נַפְשִׁי nafshi יִשְׁמְעוּ yishmu עֲנָוִים anavim וְיִשְׂמָחוּ veyismachu
4
ג Exalt GOD with me;let us extol the divine name together.
גַּדְּלוּ gadlu לַיהֹוָה layhovah אִתִּי iti וּנְרוֹמְמָה unromemah שְׁמוֹ shemo יַחְדָּו yachdav
5
ד I turned to GOD, and I was answered;I was saved from all my terrors.
דָּרַשְׁתִּי darashti אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai וְעָנָנִי veanani וּמִכּל umikl מְגוּרוֹתַי megurotay הִצִּילָנִי hitzilani
6
ה People look to [God] and are radiant;ו let their faces not be downcast.
הִבִּיטוּ hibitu אֵלָיו elayv וְנָהָרוּ venaharu וּפְנֵיהֶם ufneyhem אַל El יֶחְפָּרוּ yechparu
7
ז Here was a lowly man who called—GOD listened,and delivered him from all his troubles.
זֶה zeh עָנִי ani קָרָא kara וַיהֹוָה vayhovah שָׁמֵעַ shamea וּמִכּל umikl צָרוֹתָיו tzarotayv הוֹשִׁיעוֹ hoshio
8
ח The angel of GOD camps around those who show awe,and rescues them.
חֹנֶה choneh מַלְאַךְ malakh יְהֹוָה Adonai סָבִיב saviv לִירֵאָיו lireayv וַיְחַלְּצֵם vaychaltzem
9
ט Taste and see how good GOD is;happy the one who takes refuge in the divine!
טַעֲמוּ taamu וּרְאוּ uru כִּי ki טוֹב tov יְהֹוָה Adonai אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הַגֶּבֶר hagever יֶחֱסֶה yecheseh בּוֹ bo
10
י Fear the ETERNAL, you consecrated ones,for those who fear [God] lack nothing.
יְראוּ yeru אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai קְדֹשָׁיו kedoshayv כִּי ki אֵין eyn מַחְסוֹר machsor לִירֵאָיו lireayv
11
כ Lions have been reduced to starvation,but those who turn to GOD shall not lack any good.
כְּפִירִים kefirim רָשׁוּ rashu וְרָעֵבוּ veraevu וְדֹרְשֵׁי vedorshey יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo יַחְסְרוּ yachsru כל khl טוֹב tov
12
ל Come, my children, listen to me;I will teach you what it is to fear GOD.
לְכוּ lekhu בָנִים vanim שִׁמְעוּ shimu לִי li יִרְאַת yirat יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲלַמֶּדְכֶם alamedkhem
13
מ Which of you are eager for lifeand desire years of good fortune?
מִי mi הָאִישׁ haish הֶחָפֵץ hechafetz חַיִּים chayim אֹהֵב ohev יָמִים yamim לִרְאוֹת lirot טוֹב tov
14
נ Guard your tongue from evil,your lips from deceitful speech.
נְצֹר netzor לְשׁוֹנְךָ leshonkha מֵרָע mera וּשְׂפָתֶיךָ usfateykha מִדַּבֵּר midaber מִרְמָה mirmah
15
ס Shun evil and do good,seek amity and pursue it.
סוּר sur מֵרָע mera וַעֲשֵׂה vaaseh טוֹב tov בַּקֵּשׁ bakesh שָׁלוֹם shalom וְרדְפֵהוּ verdfehu
16
ע GOD’s eyes are on the righteous,the ears, attentive to their cry.
עֵינֵי eyney יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶל El צַדִּיקִים tzadikim וְאזְנָיו veznayv אֶל El שַׁוְעָתָם shavatam
17
פ GOD’s face is set against evildoers,to erase their names from the earth.
פְּנֵי peney יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּעֹשֵׂי beosey רָע ra לְהַכְרִית lehakhrit מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz זִכְרָם zikhram
18
צ They cry out, and GOD hears,and saves them from all their troubles.
צָעֲקוּ tzaaku וַיהֹוָה vayhovah שָׁמֵעַ shamea וּמִכּל umikl צָרוֹתָם tzarotam הִצִּילָם hitzilam
19
ק GOD is close to the brokenhearted;those crushed in spirit are delivered.
קָרוֹב karov יְהֹוָה Adonai לְנִשְׁבְּרֵי lenishbrey לֵב lev וְאֶת veet דַּכְּאֵי dakey רוּחַ ruach יוֹשִׁיעַ yoshia
20
ר Though their misfortunes be many, GOD will save the righteous from them all,
רַבּוֹת rabot רָעוֹת raot צַדִּיק tzadik וּמִכֻּלָּם umikulam יַצִּילֶנּוּ yatzilenu יְהֹוָה Adonai
21
ש Keeping all his bones intact,not one of them being broken.
שֹׁמֵר shomer כּל kl עַצְמוֹתָיו atzmotayv אַחַת achat מֵהֵנָּה mehenah לֹא lo נִשְׁבָּרָה nishbarah
22
ת One misfortune is the deathblow of the wicked;the foes of the righteous shall be ruined.
תְּמוֹתֵת temotet רָשָׁע rasha רָעָה raah וְשֹׂנְאֵי vesoney צַדִּיק tzadik יֶאְשָׁמוּ yeshamu
23
GOD redeems the life of those who render service;no one who takes refuge in [God] shall be ruined.
פֹּדֶה podeh יְהֹוָה Adonai נֶפֶשׁ nefesh עֲבָדָיו avadayv וְלֹא velo יֶאְשְׁמוּ yeshmu כּל kl הַחֹסִים hachosim בּוֹ bo

Psalm 35

1
Of David.O ETERNAL One, strive with my adversaries,give battle to my foes,
לְדָוִד ledavid רִיבָה rivah יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶת et יְרִיבַי yerivay לְחַם lecham אֶת et לֹחֲמָי lochamay
2
take up shield and buckler,and come to my defense;
הַחֲזֵק hachazek מָגֵן magen וְצִנָּה vetzinah וְקוּמָה vekumah בְּעֶזְרָתִי beezrati
3
ready the spear and javelinagainst my pursuers;tell me, “I am your deliverance.”
וְהָרֵק veharek חֲנִית chanit וּסְגֹר usgor לִקְרַאת likrat רֹדְפָי rodfay אֱמֹר emor לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi יְשֻׁעָתֵךְ yeshuatekh אָנִי ani
4
Let those who seek my lifebe frustrated and put to shame;let those who plan to harm mefall back in disgrace.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיִכָּלְמוּ veyikalmu מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey נַפְשִׁי nafshi יִסֹּגוּ yisogu אָחוֹר achor וְיַחְפְּרוּ veyachpru חֹשְׁבֵי choshvey רָעָתִי raati
5
Let them be as chaff in the wind, GOD’s angel driving them on.
יִהְיוּ yihyu כְּמֹץ kemotz לִפְנֵי lifney רוּחַ ruach וּמַלְאַךְ umalakh יְהֹוָה Adonai דּוֹחֶה docheh
6
Let their path be dark and slippery,with GOD’s angel in pursuit.
יְהִי yehi דַרְכָּם darkam חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh וַחֲלַקְלַקֹּת vachalaklakot וּמַלְאַךְ umalakh יְהֹוָה Adonai רֹדְפָם rodfam
7
For without cause they hid a net to trap me;without cause they dug a pit for me.
כִּי ki חִנָּם chinam טָמְנוּ tamnu לִי li שַׁחַת shachat רִשְׁתָּם rishtam חִנָּם chinam חָפְרוּ chafru לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi
8
Let disaster overtake them unawares;let the net they hid catch them;let them fall into it when disaster [strikes].
תְּבוֹאֵהוּ tevoehu שׁוֹאָה shoah לֹא lo יֵדָע yeda וְרִשְׁתּוֹ verishto אֲשֶׁר asher טָמַן taman תִּלְכְּדוֹ tilkdo בְּשׁוֹאָה beshoah יִפּל yipl בָּהּ bah
9
Then shall I exult in GOD,rejoice in having been delivered.
וְנַפְשִׁי venafshi תָּגִיל tagil בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah תָּשִׂישׂ tasis בִּישׁוּעָתוֹ bishuato
10
All my bones shall say,“ETERNAL One, who is like You?You save a pauper from someone stronger,a needy pauper from a despoiler.”
כּל kl עַצְמוֹתַי atzmotay תֹּאמַרְנָה tomarnah יְהֹוָה Adonai מִי mi כָמוֹךָ khamokha מַצִּיל matzil עָנִי ani מֵחָזָק mechazak מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu וְעָנִי veani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon מִגֹּזְלוֹ migozlo
11
Malicious witnesses appearwho question me about things I do not know.
יְקוּמוּן yekumun עֵדֵי edey חָמָס chamas אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo יָדַעְתִּי yadati יִשְׁאָלוּנִי yishaluni
12
They repay me evil for good,[seeking] my bereavement.
יְשַׁלְּמוּנִי yeshalmuni רָעָה raah תַּחַת tachat טוֹבָה tovah שְׁכוֹל shekhol לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi
13
Yet, when they were ill,my dress was sackcloth,I kept a fast—may what I prayed for happen to me!
וַאֲנִי vaani בַּחֲלוֹתָם bachalotam לְבוּשִׁי levushi שָׂק sak עִנֵּיתִי ineyti בַצּוֹם vatzom נַפְשִׁי nafshi וּתְפִלָּתִי utfilati עַל al חֵיקִי cheyki תָשׁוּב tashuv
14
I walked about as though it were my friend or my kin;I was bowed with gloom, like one mourning for a mother.
כְּרֵעַ kerea כְּאָח keach לִי li הִתְהַלָּכְתִּי hithalakhti כַּאֲבֶל kaavel אֵם em קֹדֵר koder שַׁחוֹתִי shachoti
15
But when I stumble, they gleefully gather;wretches gather against me,I know not why;they tear at me without end.
וּבְצַלְעִי uvtzali שָׂמְחוּ samchu וְנֶאֱסָפוּ veneesafu נֶאֶסְפוּ neesfu עָלַי alay נֵכִים nekhim וְלֹא velo יָדַעְתִּי yadati קָרְעוּ karu וְלֹא velo דָמּוּ damu
16
With impious, mocking grimace they gnash their teeth at me.
בְּחַנְפֵי bechanfey לַעֲגֵי laagey מָעוֹג maog חָרֹק charok עָלַי alay שִׁנֵּימוֹ shineymo
17
O my Sovereign, how long will You look on?Rescue me from their attacks, my precious life, from the lions,
אֲדֹנָי Adonai כַּמָּה kamah תִרְאֶה tireh הָשִׁיבָה hashivah נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִשֹּׁאֵיהֶם mishoeyhem מִכְּפִירִים mikfirim יְחִידָתִי yechidati
18
that I may praise You in a great congregation,acclaim You in a mighty throng.
אוֹדְךָ odkha בְּקָהָל bekahal רָב rav בְּעַם beam עָצוּם atzum אֲהַלְלֶךָּ ahaleleka
19
Let not my treacherous enemies rejoice over me,or those who hate me without reason wink their eyes.
אַל El יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu לִי li אֹיְבַי oyvay שֶׁקֶר sheker שֹׂנְאַי sonay חִנָּם chinam יִקְרְצוּ yikrtzu עָיִן ayin
20
For they do not offer amity,but devise fraudulent schemes against harmless folk.
כִּי ki לֹא lo שָׁלוֹם shalom יְדַבֵּרוּ yedaberu וְעַל veal רִגְעֵי rigey אֶרֶץ eretz דִּבְרֵי divrey מִרְמוֹת mirmot יַחֲשֹׁבוּן yachashovun
21
They open wide their mouths at me,saying, “Aha, aha, we have seen it!”
וַיַּרְחִיבוּ vayarchivu עָלַי alay פִּיהֶם pihem אָמְרוּ amru הֶאָחהֶאָח heachheach רָאֲתָה raatah עֵינֵנוּ eynenu
22
You have seen it, O ETERNAL One;do not hold aloof!O my Sovereign, be not far from me!
רָאִיתָה raitah יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El תֶּחֱרַשׁ techerash אֲדֹנָי Adonai אַל El תִּרְחַק tirchak מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
23
Wake, rouse Yourself for my cause,for my claim, O my God and my Sovereign!
הָעִירָה hairah וְהָקִיצָה vehakitzah לְמִשְׁפָּטִי lemishpati אֱלֹהַי elohay וַאדֹנָי vadonay לְרִיבִי lerivi
24
Take up my cause, O my ETERNAL God, as You are beneficent,and let them not rejoice over me.
שׁפְטֵנִי shfteni כְצִדְקְךָ khetzidkkha יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהָי elohay וְאַל veal יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu לִי li
25
Let them not think,“Aha, just what we wished!”Let them not say,“We have destroyed him!”
אַל El יֹאמְרוּ yomru בְלִבָּם velibam הֶאָח heach נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu אַל El יֹאמְרוּ yomru בִּלַּעֲנוּהוּ bilaanuhu
26
May those who rejoice at my misfortunebe frustrated and utterly disgraced;may those who vaunt themselves over mebe clad in frustration and shame.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיַחְפְּרוּ veyachpru יַחְדָּו yachdav שְׂמֵחֵי semechey רָעָתִי raati יִלְבְּשׁוּ yilbshu בֹשֶׁת voshet וּכְלִמָּה ukhlimah הַמַּגְדִּילִים hamagdilim עָלָי alay
27
May those who desire my vindicationsing forth joyously;may they always say,“Extolled be GOD who desires the well-being of one who renders service,”
יָרֹנּוּ yaronu וְיִשְׂמְחוּ veyismchu חֲפֵצֵי chafetzey צִדְקִי tzidki וְיֹאמְרוּ veyomru תָמִיד tamid יִגְדַּל yigdal יְהֹוָה Adonai הֶחָפֵץ hechafetz שְׁלוֹם shelom עַבְדּוֹ avdo
28
while my tongue shall recite Your beneficent acts,Your praises all day long.
וּלְשׁוֹנִי ulshoni תֶּהְגֶּה tehgeh צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom תְּהִלָּתֶךָ tehilatekha

Psalm 36

1
For the leader. Of the servant of GOD, of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַלְעֶבֶד lamnatzechaleved יְהֹוָה Adonai לְדָוִד ledavid
2
I know what Transgression says to the wicked;they have no sense of the dread of God,
נְאֻם neum פֶּשַׁע pesha לָרָשָׁע larasha בְּקֶרֶב bekerev לִבִּי libi אֵין eyn פַּחַד pachad אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְנֶגֶד leneged עֵינָיו eynayv
3
because its speech is seductive to themtill their iniquity be found out and they be hated.
כִּי ki הֶחֱלִיק hechelik אֵלָיו elayv בְּעֵינָיו beeynayv לִמְצֹא limtzo עֲוֺנוֹ avono לִשְׂנֹא lisno
4
Their words are evil and deceitful;they will not consider doing good.
דִּבְרֵי divrey פִיו fiv אָוֶן aven וּמִרְמָה umirmah חָדַל chadal לְהַשְׂכִּיל lehaskil לְהֵיטִיב leheytiv
5
In bed they plot mischief;they are set on a path of no good,they do not reject evil.
אָוֶן aven יַחְשֹׁב yachshov עַל al מִשְׁכָּבוֹ mishkavo יִתְיַצֵּב yityatzev עַל al דֶּרֶךְ derekh לֹא lo טוֹב tov רָע ra לֹא lo יִמְאָס yimas
6
O ETERNAL One, Your faithfulness reaches to heaven;Your steadfastness to the sky;
יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּהַשָּׁמַיִם behashamayim חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha אֱמוּנָתְךָ emunatkha עַד ad שְׁחָקִים shechakim
7
Your beneficence is like the high mountains;Your justice like the great deep;human and animal You deliver, O ETERNAL One.
צִדְקָתְךָ tzidkatkha כְּהַרְרֵי keharerey אֵל El מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha תְּהוֹם tehom רַבָּה rabah אָדָם adam וּבְהֵמָה uvhemah תוֹשִׁיעַ toshia יְהֹוָה Adonai
8
How precious is Your faithful care, O God!Humankind shelters in the shadow of Your wings.
מַה mah יָּקָר yakar חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha אֱלֹהִים Elohim וּבְנֵי uvney אָדָם adam בְּצֵל betzel כְּנָפֶיךָ kenafeykha יֶחֱסָיוּן yechesayun
9
They feast on the rich fare of Your house;You let them drink at Your refreshing stream.
יִרְוְיֻן yirvyun מִדֶּשֶׁן mideshen בֵּיתֶךָ beytekha וְנַחַל venachal עֲדָנֶיךָ adaneykha תַשְׁקֵם tashkem
10
With You is the fountain of life;by Your light do we see light.
כִּי ki עִמְּךָ imkha מְקוֹר mekor חַיִּים chayim בְּאוֹרְךָ beorkha נִרְאֶה nireh אוֹר or
11
Bestow Your faithful care on those devoted to You,and Your beneficence on the upright.
מְשֹׁךְ meshokh חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha לְיֹדְעֶיךָ leyodeykha וְצִדְקָתְךָ vetzidkatkha לְיִשְׁרֵי leyishrey לֵב lev
12
Let not the foot of the arrogant tread on me,or the hand of the wicked drive me away.
אַל El תְּבוֹאֵנִי tevoeni רֶגֶל regel גַּאֲוָה gaavah וְיַד veyad רְשָׁעִים reshaim אַל El תְּנִדֵנִי tenideni
13
There lie the evildoers, fallen,thrust down, unable to rise.
שָׁם sham נָפְלוּ naflu פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven דֹּחוּ dochu וְלֹא velo יָכְלוּ yakhlu קוּם kum

Psalm 37

1
Of David. א Do not be vexed by evildoers;do not be incensed by wrongdoers;
לְדָוִד ledavid אַל El תִּתְחַר titchar בַּמְּרֵעִים bamreim אַל El תְּקַנֵּא tekane בְּעֹשֵׂי beosey עַוְלָה avlah
2
for they soon wither like grass,like verdure fade away.
כִּי ki כֶחָצִיר khechatzir מְהֵרָה meherah יִמָּלוּ yimalu וּכְיֶרֶק ukhyerek דֶּשֶׁא deshe יִבּוֹלוּן yibolun
3
ב Trust in GOD and do good,abide in the land and remain loyal.
בְּטַח betach בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah וַעֲשֵׂה vaaseh טוֹב tov שְׁכן shekhn אֶרֶץ eretz וּרְעֵה ureh אֱמוּנָה emunah
4
Seek GOD’s favor,and you will be granted the desires of your heart.
וְהִתְעַנַּג vehitanag עַל al יְהֹוָה Adonai וְיִתֶּן veyiten לְךָ lekha מִשְׁאֲלֹת mishalot לִבֶּךָ libekha
5
ג Leave all to GOD;be trusting; [God] will do it—
גּוֹל gol עַל al יְהֹוָה Adonai דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha וּבְטַח uvtach עָלָיו alayv וְהוּא vehu יַעֲשֶׂה yaaseh
6
causing your vindication to shine forth like the light,the justice of your case, like the noonday sun.
וְהוֹצִיא vehotzi כָאוֹר khaor צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha וּמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ umishpatekha כַּצּהֳרָיִם katzhorayim
7
ד Be patient and wait for GOD,do not be vexed by the one who is prospering—the opponent who carries out schemes.
דּוֹם dom לַיהֹוָה layhovah וְהִתְחוֹלֵל vehitcholel לוֹ lo אַל El תִּתְחַר titchar בְּמַצְלִיחַ bematzliach דַּרְכּוֹ darko בְּאִישׁ beish עֹשֶׂה oseh מְזִמּוֹת mezimot
8
ה Give up anger, abandon fury,do not be vexed;it can only do harm.
הֶרֶף heref מֵאַף meaf וַעֲזֹב vaazov חֵמָה chemah אַל El תִּתְחַר titchar אַךְ akh לְהָרֵעַ leharea
9
For evildoers will be cut off,but those who look to GOD—they shall inherit the land.
כִּי ki מְרֵעִים mereim יִכָּרֵתוּן yikaretun וְקֹוֵי vekovey יְהֹוָה Adonai הֵמָּה hemah יִירְשׁוּ yirshu אָרֶץ aretz
10
ו A little longer and there will be no wicked;you will look at where they were—they will be gone.
וְעוֹד veod מְעַט meat וְאֵין veeyn רָשָׁע rasha וְהִתְבּוֹנַנְתָּ vehitbonanta עַל al מְקוֹמוֹ mekomo וְאֵינֶנּוּ veeynenu
11
But the lowly shall inherit the land,and delight in abundant well-being.
וַעֲנָוִים vaanavim יִירְשׁוּ yirshu אָרֶץ aretz וְהִתְעַנְּגוּ vehitangu עַל al רֹב rov שָׁלוֹם shalom
12
ז The wicked scheme against the righteous,and gnash their teeth at them.
זֹמֵם zomem רָשָׁע rasha לַצַּדִּיק latzadik וְחֹרֵק vechorek עָלָיו alayv שִׁנָּיו shinayv
13
My Sovereign laughs at them,knowing that their day will come.
אֲדֹנָי Adonai יִשְׂחַק yischak לוֹ lo כִּי ki רָאָה raah כִּי ki יָבֹא yavo יוֹמוֹ yomo
14
ח The wicked draw their swords, bend their bows,to bring down the lowly and needy,to slaughter the upright.
חֶרֶב cherev פָּתְחוּ patchu רְשָׁעִים reshaim וְדָרְכוּ vedarkhu קַשְׁתָּם kashtam לְהַפִּיל lehapil עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon לִטְבוֹחַ litvoach יִשְׁרֵי yishrey דָרֶךְ darekh
15
Their swords shall pierce their own hearts,and their bows shall be broken.
חַרְבָּם charbam תָּבוֹא tavo בְלִבָּם velibam וְקַשְּׁתוֹתָם vekashtotam תִּשָּׁבַרְנָה tishavarnah
16
ט Better the little that a righteous person hasthan the great abundance of the wicked.
טוֹב tov מְעַט meat לַצַּדִּיק latzadik מֵהֲמוֹן mehamon רְשָׁעִים reshaim רַבִּים rabim
17
For the arms of the wicked shall be broken,but GOD is the support of the righteous.
כִּי ki זְרוֹעוֹת zeroot רְשָׁעִים reshaim תִּשָּׁבַרְנָה tishavarnah וְסוֹמֵךְ vesomekh צַדִּיקִים tzadikim יְהֹוָה Adonai
18
י GOD is concerned for the needs of the blameless;their portion lasts forever;
יוֹדֵעַ yodea יְהֹוָה Adonai יְמֵי yemey תְמִימִם temimim וְנַחֲלָתָם venachalatam לְעוֹלָם leolam תִּהְיֶה tihyeh
19
they shall not come to grief in bad times;in famine, they shall eat their fill.
לֹא lo יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu בְּעֵת beet רָעָה raah וּבִימֵי uvimey רְעָבוֹן reavon יִשְׂבָּעוּ yisbau
20
כ But the wicked shall perish,and GOD’s enemies shall be consumed,like meadow grass consumed in smoke.
כִּי ki רְשָׁעִים reshaim יֹאבֵדוּ yovedu וְאֹיְבֵי veoyvey יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּיקַר kikar כָּרִים karim כָּלוּ kalu בֶעָשָׁן veashan כָּלוּ kalu
21
ל The wicked borrow and do not repay;the righteous are generous and keep giving.
לֹוֶה loveh רָשָׁע rasha וְלֹא velo יְשַׁלֵּם yeshalem וְצַדִּיק vetzadik חוֹנֵן chonen וְנוֹתֵן venoten
22
Those blessed by [God] shall inherit the land,but those who are cursed shall be cut off.
כִּי ki מְבֹרָכָיו mevorakhayv יִירְשׁוּ yirshu אָרֶץ aretz וּמְקֻלָּלָיו umkulalayv יִכָּרֵתוּ yikaretu
23
מ People’s steps are made firm by GOD,when their way is a delight to [God].
מֵיְהֹוָה meyhovah מִצְעֲדֵי mitzadey גֶבֶר gever כּוֹנָנוּ konanu וְדַרְכּוֹ vedarko יֶחְפָּץ yechpatz
24
Though they stumble, they do not fall down,for GOD gives them support.
כִּי ki יִפֹּל yipol לֹא lo יוּטָל yutal כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai סוֹמֵךְ somekh יָדוֹ yado
25
נ I have been young and am now old,but I have never seen someone righteous abandoned,or their children seeking bread.
נַעַר naar הָיִיתִי hayiti גַּם gam זָקַנְתִּי zakanti וְלֹא velo רָאִיתִי raiti צַדִּיק tzadik נֶעֱזָב neezav וְזַרְעוֹ vezaro מְבַקֶּשׁ mevakesh לָחֶם lachem
26
They are always generous, and lend,and their children are held blessed.
כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom חוֹנֵן chonen וּמַלְוֶה umalveh וְזַרְעוֹ vezaro לִבְרָכָה livrakhah
27
ס Shun evil and do good,and you shall abide forever.
סוּר sur מֵרָע mera וַעֲשֵׂה vaaseh טוֹב tov וּשְׁכֹן ushkhon לְעוֹלָם leolam
28
For GOD loves what is right,and does not abandon those who are faithful.They are preserved forever,while the children of the wicked will be cut off.
כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai אֹהֵב ohev מִשְׁפָּט mishpat וְלֹא velo יַעֲזֹב yaazov אֶת et חֲסִידָיו chasidayv לְעוֹלָם leolam נִשְׁמָרוּ nishmaru וְזֶרַע vezera רְשָׁעִים reshaim נִכְרָת nikhrat
29
The righteous shall inherit the land,and abide forever in it.
צַדִּיקִים tzadikim יִירְשׁוּ yirshu אָרֶץ aretz וְיִשְׁכְּנוּ veyishknu לָעַד laad עָלֶיהָ aleyha
30
פ The mouth of the righteous utters wisdom,and their tongue speaks what is right.
פִּי pi צַדִּיק tzadik יֶהְגֶּה yehgeh חכְמָה chkhmah וּלְשׁוֹנוֹ ulshono תְּדַבֵּר tedaber מִשְׁפָּט mishpat
31
The teaching of their God is in their heart;their feet do not slip.
תּוֹרַת torat אֱלֹהָיו elohayv בְּלִבּוֹ belibo לֹא lo תִמְעַד timad אֲשֻׁרָיו ashurayv
32
צ The wicked watch for the righteous,seeking to put them to death;
צוֹפֶה tzofeh רָשָׁע rasha לַצַּדִּיק latzadik וּמְבַקֵּשׁ umvakesh לַהֲמִיתוֹ lahamito
33
GOD will not abandon them to their power,and will not let them be condemned in judgment.
יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo יַעַזְבֶנּוּ yaazvenu בְיָדוֹ veyado וְלֹא velo יַרְשִׁיעֶנּוּ yarshienu בְּהִשָּׁפְטוֹ behishafto
34
ק Look to GOD and keep to the godly way,and you will be raised high that you may inherit the land;when the wicked are cut off, you shall see it.
קַוֵּה kaueh אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai וּשְׁמֹר ushmor דַּרְכּוֹ darko וִירוֹמִמְךָ viromimkha לָרֶשֶׁת lareshet אָרֶץ aretz בְּהִכָּרֵת behikaret רְשָׁעִים reshaim תִּרְאֶה tireh
35
ר I saw the wicked, powerful,well-rooted like a robust native tree.
רָאִיתִי raiti רָשָׁע rasha עָרִיץ aritz וּמִתְעָרֶה umitareh כְּאֶזְרָח keezrach רַעֲנָן raanan
36
Suddenly they vanished and were gone;I sought them, but they were not to be found.
וַיַּעֲבֹר vayaavor וְהִנֵּה vehineh אֵינֶנּוּ eynenu וָאֲבַקְשֵׁהוּ vaavakshehu וְלֹא velo נִמְצָא nimtza
37
ש Mark the blameless, note the upright,for there is a future for the person of integrity.
שְׁמר shemr תָּם tam וּרְאֵה ureh יָשָׁר yashar כִּי ki אַחֲרִית acharit לְאִישׁ leish שָׁלוֹם shalom
38
But transgressors shall be utterly destroyed,the future of the wicked shall be cut off.
וּפֹשְׁעִים ufoshim נִשְׁמְדוּ nishmdu יַחְדָּו yachdav אַחֲרִית acharit רְשָׁעִים reshaim נִכְרָתָה nikhratah
39
ת The deliverance of the righteous comes from GOD,their stronghold in time of trouble.
וּתְשׁוּעַת utshuat צַדִּיקִים tzadikim מֵיְהֹוָה meyhovah מָעוּזָּם mauzam בְּעֵת beet צָרָה tzarah
40
GOD helps them and rescues them,rescues them from the wicked and delivers them,for in [God] they seek refuge.
וַיַּעְזְרֵם vayazrem יְהֹוָה Adonai וַיְפַלְּטֵם vayfaltem יְפַלְּטֵם yefaltem מֵרְשָׁעִים mershaim וְיוֹשִׁיעֵם veyoshiem כִּי ki חָסוּ chasu בוֹ vo

Psalm 38

1
A psalm of David. Lehazkir. Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid לְהַזְכִּיר lehazkir
2
O ETERNAL One, do not punish me in wrath;do not chastise me in fury.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El בְּקֶצְפְּךָ beketzpkha תוֹכִיחֵנִי tokhicheni וּבַחֲמָתְךָ uvachamatkha תְיַסְּרֵנִי teyasreni
3
For Your arrows have struck me;Your blows have fallen upon me.
כִּי ki חִצֶּיךָ chitzeykha נִחֲתוּ nichatu בִי vi וַתִּנְחַת vatinchat עָלַי alay יָדֶךָ yadekha
4
There is no soundness in my flesh because of Your rage,no wholeness in my bones because of my sin.
אֵין eyn מְתֹם metom בִּבְשָׂרִי bivsari מִפְּנֵי mipney זַעְמֶךָ zamekha אֵין eyn שָׁלוֹם shalom בַּעֲצָמַי baatzamay מִפְּנֵי mipney חַטָּאתִי chatati
5
For my iniquities have overwhelmed me; they are like a heavy burden, more than I can bear.
כִּי ki עֲוֺנֹתַי avonotay עָבְרוּ avru רֹאשִׁי roshi כְּמַשָּׂא kemasa כָבֵד khaved יִכְבְּדוּ yikhbdu מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
6
My wounds stink and festerbecause of my folly.
הִבְאִישׁוּ hivishu נָמַקּוּ namaku חַבּוּרֹתָי chaburotay מִפְּנֵי mipney אִוַּלְתִּי iualti
7
I am all bent and bowed;I walk about in gloom all day long.
נַעֲוֵיתִי naaveyti שַׁחֹתִי shachoti עַד ad מְאֹד meod כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom קֹדֵר koder הִלָּכְתִּי hilakhti
8
For my sinews are full of fever;there is no soundness in my flesh.
כִּי ki כְסָלַי khesalay מָלְאוּ malu נִקְלֶה nikleh וְאֵין veeyn מְתֹם metom בִּבְשָׂרִי bivsari
9
I am all benumbed and crushed;I roar because of the turmoil in my mind.
נְפוּגוֹתִי nefugoti וְנִדְכֵּיתִי venidkeyti עַד ad מְאֹד meod שָׁאַגְתִּי shaagti מִנַּהֲמַת minahamat לִבִּי libi
10
O my Sovereign, You are aware of all my entreaties;my groaning is not hidden from You.
אֲדֹנָי Adonai נֶגְדְּךָ negdkha כל khl תַּאֲוָתִי taavati וְאַנְחָתִי veanchati מִמְּךָ mimkha לֹא lo נִסְתָּרָה nistarah
11
My mind reels;my strength fails me;my eyes too have lost their luster.
לִבִּי libi סְחַרְחַר secharchar עֲזָבַנִי azavani כֹחִי khochi וְאוֹר veor עֵינַי eynay גַּם gam הֵם hem אֵין eyn אִתִּי iti
12
My friends and companions stand back from my affliction;my kin stand far off.
אֹהֲבַי ohavay וְרֵעַי vereay מִנֶּגֶד mineged נִגְעִי nigi יַעֲמֹדוּ yaamodu וּקְרוֹבַי ukrovay מֵרָחֹק merachok עָמָדוּ amadu
13
Those who seek my life lay traps;those who wish me harm speak malice;they utter deceit all the time.
וַיְנַקְשׁוּ vaynakshu מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְדֹרְשֵׁי vedorshey רָעָתִי raati דִּבְּרוּ dibru הַוּוֹת hauot וּמִרְמוֹת umirmot כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom יֶהְגּוּ yehgu
14
But I am like the deaf, unhearing,like the mute who cannot speak up;
וַאֲנִי vaani כְחֵרֵשׁ khecheresh לֹא lo אֶשְׁמָע eshma וּכְאִלֵּם ukhilem לֹא lo יִפְתַּח yiftach פִּיו piv
15
I am like one who does not hear,whose mouth has no retort.
וָאֱהִי vaehi כְּאִישׁ keish אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo שֹׁמֵעַ shomea וְאֵין veeyn בְּפִיו befiv תּוֹכָחוֹת tokhachot
16
But I wait for You, O ETERNAL One;You will answer, O my Sovereign, my God.
כִּי ki לְךָ lekha יְהֹוָה Adonai הוֹחָלְתִּי hochalti אַתָּה atah תַעֲנֶה taaneh אֲדֹנָי Adonai אֱלֹהָי elohay
17
For I fear they will rejoice over me;when my foot gives way they will vaunt themselves against me.
כִּי ki אָמַרְתִּי amarti פֶּן pen יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu לִי li בְּמוֹט bemot רַגְלִי ragli עָלַי alay הִגְדִּילוּ higdilu
18
For I am on the verge of collapse;my pain is always with me.
כִּי ki אֲנִי ani לְצֶלַע letzela נָכוֹן nakhon וּמַכְאוֹבִי umakhovi נֶגְדִּי negdi תָמִיד tamid
19
I acknowledge my iniquity;I am fearful over my sin;
כִּי ki עֲוֺנִי avoni אַגִּיד agid אֶדְאַג edag מֵחַטָּאתִי mechatati
20
for my mortal enemies are numerous;my treacherous foes are many.
וְאֹיְבַי veoyvay חַיִּים chayim עָצֵמוּ atzemu וְרַבּוּ verabu שֹׂנְאַי sonay שָׁקֶר shaker
21
Those who repay evil for goodharass me for pursuing good.
וּמְשַׁלְּמֵי umshalmey רָעָה raah תַּחַת tachat טוֹבָה tovah יִשְׂטְנוּנִי yistnuni תַּחַת tachat (רדופי) rdvfy [רדְפִי rdfi ]טוֹב tov
22
Do not abandon me, O ETERNAL One;my God, be not far from me;
אַל El תַּעַזְבֵנִי taazveni יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay אַל El תִּרְחַק tirchak מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
23
hasten to my aid,O my Sovereign, my deliverance.
חוּשָׁה chushah לְעֶזְרָתִי leezrati אֲדֹנָי Adonai תְּשׁוּעָתִי teshuati

Psalm 39

1
For the leader; for Jeduthun. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach (לידיתון) lydytvn [לִידוּתוּן] lidutun מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
I resolved I would watch my steplest I offend by my speech;I would keep my mouth muzzledwhile the villain was in my presence.
אָמַרְתִּי amarti אֶשְׁמְרָה eshmrah דְרָכַי derakhay מֵחֲטוֹא mechato בִלְשׁוֹנִי vilshoni אֶשְׁמְרָה eshmrah לְפִי lefi מַחְסוֹם machsom בְּעֹד beod רָשָׁע rasha לְנֶגְדִּי lenegdi
3
I was dumb, silent;I was very in Hos. 10.1; Jonah 4.4. stillwhile my pain was intense.
נֶאֱלַמְתִּי neelamti דוּמִיָּה dumiah הֶחֱשֵׁיתִי hechesheyti מִטּוֹב mitov וּכְאֵבִי ukhevi נֶעְכָּר nekar
4
My mind was in a rage,my thoughts were all aflame;I spoke out:
חַם cham לִבִּי libi בְּקִרְבִּי bekirbi בַּהֲגִיגִי bahagigi תִבְעַר tivar אֵשׁ esh דִּבַּרְתִּי dibarti בִּלְשׁוֹנִי bilshoni
5
Tell me, O ETERNAL One, what my term is,what is the measure of my days;I would know how fleeting my life is.
הוֹדִיעֵנִי hodieni יְהֹוָה Adonai קִצִּי kitzi וּמִדַּת umidat יָמַי yamay מַה mah הִיא hi אֵדְעָה edah מֶה meh חָדֵל chadel אָנִי ani
6
You have made my life just handbreadths long;its span is as nothing in Your sight;no human endures any longer than a breath. Selah.
הִנֵּה hineh טְפָחוֹת tefachot נָתַתָּה natatah יָמַי yamay וְחֶלְדִּי vecheldi כְאַיִן kheayin נֶגְדֶּךָ negdekha אַךְ akh כּל kl הֶבֶל hevel כּל kl אָדָם adam נִצָּב nitzav סֶלָה selah
7
Everyone walks about as a mere shadow;mere futility is their hustle and bustle,amassing and not knowing who will gather in.
אַךְ akh בְּצֶלֶם betzelem יִתְהַלֶּךְ yithalekh אִישׁ ish אַךְ akh הֶבֶל hevel יֶהֱמָיוּן yehemayun יִצְבֹּר yitzbor וְלֹא velo יֵדַע yeda מִי mi אֹסְפָם osfam
8
What, then, can I count on, O my Sovereign?In You my hope lies.
וְעַתָּה veatah מַה mah קִּוִּיתִי kiuiti אֲדֹנָי Adonai תּוֹחַלְתִּי tochalti לְךָ lekha הִיא hi
9
Deliver me from all my transgressions;make me not the butt of the benighted.
מִכּל mikl פְּשָׁעַי peshaay הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni חֶרְפַּת cherpat נָבָל naval אַל El תְּשִׂימֵנִי tesimeni
10
I am dumb, I do not speak up,for it is Your doing.
נֶאֱלַמְתִּי neelamti לֹא lo אֶפְתַּח eftach פִּי pi כִּי ki אַתָּה atah עָשִׂיתָ asita
11
Take away Your plague from me;I perish from Your blows.
הָסֵר haser מֵעָלַי mealay נִגְעֶךָ nigekha מִתִּגְרַת mitigrat יָדְךָ yadkha אֲנִי ani כָלִיתִי khaliti
12
You chastise everyone in punishment for sin,consuming like a moth what they treasure.No human is more than a breath. Selah.
בְּתוֹכָחוֹת betokhachot עַל al עָוֺן avon יִסַּרְתָּ yisarta אִישׁ ish וַתֶּמֶס vatemes כָּעָשׁ kaash חֲמוּדוֹ chamudo אַךְ akh הֶבֶל hevel כּל kl אָדָם adam סֶלָה selah
13
Hear my prayer, O ETERNAL One;give ear to my cry;do not disregard my tears;for like all my forebearsI am an alien, resident with You.
שִׁמְעָה shimah תְפִלָּתִי tefilati יְהֹוָה Adonai וְשַׁוְעָתִי veshavati הַאֲזִינָה haazinah אֶל El דִּמְעָתִי dimati אַל El תֶּחֱרַשׁ techerash כִּי ki גֵר ger אָנֹכִי anokhi עִמָּךְ imakh תּוֹשָׁב toshav כְּכל kekhl אֲבוֹתָי avotay
14
Look away from me, that I may recover, before I pass away and am gone.
הָשַׁע hasha מִמֶּנִּי mimeni וְאַבְלִיגָה veavligah בְּטֶרֶם beterem אֵלֵךְ elekh וְאֵינֶנִּי veeyneni

Psalm 40

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
I put my hope in GOD,who inclined toward me,and heeded my cry.
קַוֺּה kauoh קִוִּיתִי kiuiti יְהֹוָה Adonai וַיֵּט vayet אֵלַי elay וַיִּשְׁמַע vayishma שַׁוְעָתִי shavati
3
I was lifted out of the miry pit,the slimy clay,and my feet were set on a rock,my legs steadied.
וַיַּעֲלֵנִי vayaaleni מִבּוֹר mibor שָׁאוֹן shaon מִטִּיט mitit הַיָּוֵן hayaven וַיָּקֶם vayakem עַל al סֶלַע sela רַגְלַי raglay כּוֹנֵן konen אֲשֻׁרָי ashuray
4
A new song was placed into my mouth,a hymn to our God.May many see it and stand in awe,and trust in GOD.
וַיִּתֵּן vayiten בְּפִי befi שִׁיר shir חָדָשׁ chadash תְּהִלָּה tehilah לֵאלֹהֵינוּ leloheynu יִרְאוּ yiru רַבִּים rabim וְיִירָאוּ veyirau וְיִבְטְחוּ veyivtchu בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah
5
Happy is the one who trusts in GOD,who turns not to the arrogant or to followers of falsehood.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הַגֶּבֶר hagever אֲשֶׁר asher שָׂם sam יְהֹוָה Adonai מִבְטַחוֹ mivtacho וְלֹא velo פָנָה fanah אֶל El רְהָבִים rehavim וְשָׂטֵי vesatey כָזָב khazav
6
You, O my ETERNAL God, have done many things;the wonders You have devised for uscannot be set out before You; I would rehearse the tale of them,but they are more than can be told.
רַבּוֹת rabot עָשִׂיתָ asita אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay נִפְלְאֹתֶיךָ nifloteykha וּמַחְשְׁבֹתֶיךָ umachshvoteykha אֵלֵינוּ eleynu אֵין eyn עֲרֹךְ arokh אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אַגִּידָה agidah וַאֲדַבֵּרָה vaadaberah עָצְמוּ atzmu מִסַּפֵּר misaper
7
You gave me to understand that You do not desire sacrifice and grain offering;You do not ask for burnt offering and purgation offering.
זֶבַח zevach וּמִנְחָה uminchah לֹא lo חָפַצְתָּ chafatzta אזְנַיִם znayim כָּרִיתָ karita לִּי li עוֹלָה olah וַחֲטָאָה vachataah לֹא lo שָׁאָלְתָּ shaalta
8
Then I said,“See, I will bring a scroll recounting what befell me.”
אָז az אָמַרְתִּי amarti הִנֵּה hineh בָאתִי vati בִּמְגִלַּת bimgilat סֵפֶר sefer כָּתוּב katuv עָלָי alay
9
To do what pleases You, my God, is my desire;Your teaching is in my inmost parts.
לַעֲשׂוֹת laasot רְצוֹנְךָ retzonkha אֱלֹהַי elohay חָפָצְתִּי chafatzti וְתוֹרָתְךָ vetoratkha בְּתוֹךְ betokh מֵעָי meay
10
I proclaimed [Your] righteousness in a great congregation;see, I did not withhold my words;O ETERNAL One, You must know it.
בִּשַּׂרְתִּי bisarti צֶדֶק tzedek בְּקָהָל bekahal רָב rav הִנֵּה hineh שְׂפָתַי sefatay לֹא lo אֶכְלָא ekhla יְהֹוָה Adonai אַתָּה atah יָדָעְתָּ yadata
11
I did not keep Your beneficence to myself;I declared Your faithful deliverance;I did not fail to speak of Your steadfast love in a great congregation.
צִדְקָתְךָ tzidkatkha לֹא lo כִסִּיתִי khisiti בְּתוֹךְ betokh לִבִּי libi אֱמוּנָתְךָ emunatkha וּתְשׁוּעָתְךָ utshuatkha אָמָרְתִּי amarti לֹא lo כִחַדְתִּי khichadti חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha וַאֲמִתְּךָ vaamitkha לְקָהָל lekahal רָב rav
12
O ETERNAL One, You will not withhold from me Your compassion;Your steadfast love will protect me always.
אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo תִכְלָא tikhla רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha מִמֶּנִּי mimeni חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha וַאֲמִתְּךָ vaamitkha תָּמִיד tamid יִצְּרוּנִי yitzruni
13
For misfortunes without number envelop me;my iniquities have caught up with me;I cannot see;they are more than the hairs of my head;I am at my wits’ end.
כִּי ki אָפְפוּ afefu עָלַי alay רָעוֹת raot עַד ad אֵין eyn מִסְפָּר mispar הִשִּׂיגוּנִי hisiguni עֲוֺנֹתַי avonotay וְלֹא velo יָכֹלְתִּי yakholti לִרְאוֹת lirot עָצְמוּ atzmu מִשַּׂעֲרוֹת misaarot רֹאשִׁי roshi וְלִבִּי velibi עֲזָבָנִי azavani
14
O favor me, ETERNAL One, and save me;O ETERNAL One, hasten to my aid.
רְצֵה retzeh יְהֹוָה Adonai לְהַצִּילֵנִי lehatzileni יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעֶזְרָתִי leezrati חוּשָׁה chushah
15
Let those who seek to destroy my lifebe frustrated and disgraced;let those who wish me harmfall back in shame.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיַחְפְּרוּ veyachpru יַחַד yachad מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey נַפְשִׁי nafshi לִסְפּוֹתָהּ lispotah יִסֹּגוּ yisogu אָחוֹר achor וְיִכָּלְמוּ veyikalmu חֲפֵצֵי chafetzey רָעָתִי raati
16
Let those who say “Aha! Aha!” over mebe desolate because of their frustration.
יָשֹׁמּוּ yashomu עַל al עֵקֶב ekev בּשְׁתָּם bshtam הָאֹמְרִים haomrim לִי li הֶאָחהֶאָח heachheach
17
But let all who seek You be glad and rejoice in You;let those who are eager for Your deliverance always say,“Extolled be GOD!”
יָשִׂישׂוּ yasisu וְיִשְׂמְחוּ veyismchu בְּךָ bekha כּל kl מְבַקְשֶׁיךָ mevaksheykha יֹאמְרוּ yomru תָמִיד tamid יִגְדַּל yigdal יְהֹוָה Adonai אֹהֲבֵי ohavey תְּשׁוּעָתֶךָ teshuatekha
18
But I am poor and needy;may my Sovereign devise [deliverance] for me.You are my help and my rescuer;my God, do not delay.
וַאֲנִי vaani עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon אֲדֹנָי Adonai יַחֲשׁב yachashv לִי li עֶזְרָתִי ezrati וּמְפַלְטִי umfalti אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהַי elohay אַל El תְּאַחַר teachar

Psalm 41

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Happy is someone who is thoughtful of the wretched;in bad times may GOD keep them from harm.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey מַשְׂכִּיל maskil אֶל El דָּל dal בְּיוֹם beyom רָעָה raah יְמַלְּטֵהוּ yemaltehu יְהֹוָה Adonai
3
May GOD guard them and preserve them;and may they be thought happy in the land.Do not subject them to the will of their enemies.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יִשְׁמְרֵהוּ yishmrehu וִיחַיֵּהוּ vichayehu (יאשר) yshr [וְאֻשַּׁר] veushar בָּאָרֶץ baaretz וְאַל veal תִּתְּנֵהוּ titnehu בְּנֶפֶשׁ benefesh אֹיְבָיו oyvayv
4
GOD will sustain them on their sickbed;You shall wholly transform their bed of suffering.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יִסְעָדֶנּוּ yisadenu עַל al עֶרֶשׂ eres דְּוָי devay כּל kl מִשְׁכָּבוֹ mishkavo הָפַכְתָּ hafakhta בְחלְיוֹ vechlyo
5
I said, “O ETERNAL One, have mercy on me,heal me, for I have sinned against You.”
אֲנִי ani אָמַרְתִּי amarti יְהֹוָה Adonai חנֵּנִי chneni רְפָאָה refaah נַפְשִׁי nafshi כִּי ki חָטָאתִי chatati לָךְ lakh
6
My enemies speak evilly of me,“When will he die and his name perish?”
אוֹיְבַי oyvay יֹאמְרוּ yomru רַע ra לִי li מָתַי matay יָמוּת yamut וְאָבַד veavad שְׁמוֹ shemo
7
Each of them who comes to visit speaks falsely,storing up evil thoughts—speaking them once outside.
וְאִם veim בָּא ba לִרְאוֹת lirot שָׁוְא shav יְדַבֵּר yedaber לִבּוֹ libo יִקְבּץ yikbtz אָוֶן aven לוֹ lo יֵצֵא yetze לַחוּץ lachutz יְדַבֵּר yedaber
8
All my enemies whisper together against me,imagining the worst for me.
יַחַד yachad עָלַי alay יִתְלַחֲשׁוּ yitlachashu כּל kl שֹׂנְאָי sonay עָלַי alay יַחְשְׁבוּ yachshvu רָעָה raah לִי li
9
“Something baneful has settled in him;he’ll not rise from his bed again.”
דְּבַר devar בְּלִיַּעַל beliaal יָצוּק yatzuk בּוֹ bo וַאֲשֶׁר vaasher שָׁכַב shakhav לֹא lo יוֹסִיף yosif לָקוּם lakum
10
My ally in whom I trusted,even someone who shares my bread,has been utterly false to me.
גַּם gam אִישׁ ish שְׁלוֹמִי shelomi אֲשֶׁר asher בָּטַחְתִּי batachti בוֹ vo אוֹכֵל okhel לַחְמִי lachmi הִגְדִּיל higdil עָלַי alay עָקֵב akev
11
But You, O ETERNAL One, have mercy on me;let me rise again and repay them.
וְאַתָּה veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai חנֵּנִי chneni וַהֲקִימֵנִי vahakimeni וַאֲשַׁלְּמָה vaashalmah לָהֶם lahem
12
Then shall I know that You are pleased with me:when my enemy cannot shout in triumph over me.
בְּזֹאת bezot יָדַעְתִּי yadati כִּי ki חָפַצְתָּ chafatzta בִּי bi כִּי ki לֹא lo יָרִיעַ yaria אֹיְבִי oyvi עָלָי alay
13
You will support me because of my integrity,and let me abide in Your presence forever.
וַאֲנִי vaani בְּתֻמִּי betumi תָּמַכְתָּ tamakhta בִּי bi וַתַּצִּיבֵנִי vatatziveni לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha לְעוֹלָם leolam
14
Blessed is the ETERNAL, God of Israel,from eternity to eternity.Amen and Amen.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מֵהָעוֹלָם mehaolam וְעַד vead הָעוֹלָם haolam אָמֵןוְאָמֵן amenvamen

Psalm 42

1
For the leader. A maskil of the Korahites.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach
2
Like a hind crying for water, my soul cries for You, O God;
כְּאַיָּל keayal תַּעֲרֹג taarog עַל al אֲפִיקֵי afikey מָיִם mayim כֵּן ken נַפְשִׁי nafshi תַעֲרֹג taarog אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֱלֹהִים Elohim
3
my soul thirsts for God, the living God;O when will I come to appear before God!
צָמְאָה tzamah נַפְשִׁי nafshi לֵאלֹהִים lelohim לְאֵל leel חָי chay מָתַי matay אָבוֹא avo וְאֵרָאֶה veeraeh פְּנֵי peney אֱלֹהִים Elohim
4
My tears have been my food day and night;I am ever taunted with, “Where is your God?”
הָיְתָה haytah לִּי li דִמְעָתִי dimati לֶחֶם lechem יוֹמָם yomam וָלָיְלָה valaylah בֶּאֱמֹר beemor אֵלַי elay כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom אַיֵּה ayeh אֱלֹהֶיךָ eloheykha
5
When I think of this, I pour out my soul:how I walked with the crowd, moved with them, the festive throng, to the House of Godwith joyous shouts of praise.
אֵלֶּה eleh אֶזְכְּרָה ezkrah וְאֶשְׁפְּכָה veeshpkhah עָלַי alay נַפְשִׁי nafshi כִּי ki אֶעֱבֹר eevor בַּסָּךְ basakh אֶדַּדֵּם edadem עַד ad בֵּית beyt אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּקוֹל bekol רִנָּה rinah וְתוֹדָה vetodah הָמוֹן hamon חוֹגֵג chogeg
6
Why so downcast, my soul,why disquieted within me?Have hope in God;I will yet give praisefor God’s saving presence., “my ever-present help, my God,” as in v. 12 and 43.5.
מַה mah תִּשְׁתּוֹחֲחִי tishtochachi נַפְשִׁי nafshi וַתֶּהֱמִי vatehemi עָלָי alay הוֹחִלִי hochili לֵאלֹהִים lelohim כִּי ki עוֹד od אוֹדֶנּוּ odenu יְשׁוּעוֹת yeshuot פָּנָיו panayv
7
O my God, my soul is downcast;therefore I think of Youin this land of Jordan and Hermon,in Mount Mizar,
אֱלֹהַי elohay עָלַי alay נַפְשִׁי nafshi תִשְׁתּוֹחָח tishtochach עַל al כֵּן ken אֶזְכּרְךָ ezkrkha מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz יַרְדֵּן yarden וְחֶרְמוֹנִים vechermonim מֵהַר mehar מִצְעָר mitzar
8
where deep calls to deepin the roar of Your cataracts; all Your breakers and billows have swept over me.
תְּהוֹם tehom אֶל El תְּהוֹם tehom קוֹרֵא kore לְקוֹל lekol צִנּוֹרֶיךָ tzinoreykha כּל kl מִשְׁבָּרֶיךָ mishbareykha וְגַלֶּיךָ vegaleykha עָלַי alay עָבָרוּ avaru
9
By day may GOD devote faithful care,so that at night a song may be with me:a prayer to the God of my life.
יוֹמָם yomam יְצַוֶּה yetzaueh יְהֹוָה Adonai חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וּבַלַּיְלָה uvalaylah שִׁירֹה shiroh עִמִּי imi תְּפִלָּה tefilah לְאֵל leel חַיָּי chayay
10
I say to God, my rock,“Why have You forgotten me,why must I walk in gloom,oppressed by my enemy?”
אוֹמְרָה omrah לְאֵל leel סַלְעִי sali לָמָה lamah שְׁכַחְתָּנִי shekhachtani לָמָּה lamah קֹדֵר koder אֵלֵךְ elekh בְּלַחַץ belachatz אוֹיֵב oyev
11
Crushing my bones, my foes revile me,taunting me always with, “Where is your God?”
בְּרֶצַח beretzach בְּעַצְמוֹתַי beatzmotay חֵרְפוּנִי cherfuni צוֹרְרָי tzoreray בְּאמְרָם bemram אֵלַי elay כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom אַיֵּה ayeh אֱלֹהֶיךָ eloheykha
12
Why so downcast, my soul,why disquieted within me?Have hope in God;I will yet give praise,my ever-present help, my God.
מַה mah תִּשְׁתּוֹחֲחִי tishtochachi נַפְשִׁי nafshi וּמַה umah תֶּהֱמִי tehemi עָלָי alay הוֹחִילִי hochili לֵאלֹהִים lelohim כִּי ki עוֹד od אוֹדֶנּוּ odenu יְשׁוּעֹת yeshuot פָּנַי panay וֵאלֹהָי velohay

Psalm 43

1
Vindicate me, O God,champion my causeagainst faithless people;rescue me from treacherous, dishonest opponents.
שׁפְטֵנִי shfteni אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְרִיבָה verivah רִיבִי rivi מִגּוֹי migoy לֹא lo חָסִיד chasid מֵאִישׁ meish מִרְמָה mirmah וְעַוְלָה veavlah תְפַלְּטֵנִי tefalteni
2
For You are my God, my stronghold;why have You rejected me?Why must I walk in gloom,oppressed by the enemy?
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהֵי elohey מָעוּזִּי mauzi לָמָה lamah זְנַחְתָּנִי zenachtani לָמָּה lamah קֹדֵר koder אֶתְהַלֵּךְ ethalekh בְּלַחַץ belachatz אוֹיֵב oyev
3
Send forth Your light and Your truth;they will lead me;they will bring me to Your holy mountain,to Your dwelling-place,
שְׁלַח shelach אוֹרְךָ orkha וַאֲמִתְּךָ vaamitkha הֵמָּה hemah יַנְחוּנִי yanchuni יְבִיאוּנִי yeviuni אֶל El הַר har קדְשְׁךָ kdshkha וְאֶל veel מִשְׁכְּנוֹתֶיךָ mishknoteykha
4
that I may come to the altar of God,God, my delight, my joy;that I may praise You with the lyre,O God, my God.
וְאָבוֹאָה veavoah אֶל El מִזְבַּח mizbach אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֶל El אֵל El שִׂמְחַת simchat גִּילִי gili וְאוֹדְךָ veodkha בְכִנּוֹר vekhinor אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהָי elohay
5
Why so downcast, my soul,why disquieted within me?Have hope in God;I will yet give praise,my ever-present help, my God.
מַה mah תִּשְׁתּוֹחֲחִי tishtochachi נַפְשִׁי nafshi וּמַה umah תֶּהֱמִי tehemi עָלָי alay הוֹחִילִי hochili לֵאלֹהִים lelohim כִּי ki עוֹד od אוֹדֶנּוּ odenu יְשׁוּעֹת yeshuot פָּנַי panay וֵאלֹהָי velohay

Psalm 44

1
For the leader. Of the Korahites. A maskil.
לַמְנַצֵּחַלִבְנֵי lamnatzechalivney קֹרַח korach מַשְׂכִּיל maskil
2
We have heard, O God,our ancestors have told usthe deeds You performed in their time,in days of old.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּאזְנֵינוּ bezneynu שָׁמַעְנוּ shamanu אֲבוֹתֵינוּ avoteynu סִפְּרוּ sipru לָנוּ lanu פֹּעַל poal פָּעַלְתָּ paalta בִימֵיהֶם vimeyhem בִּימֵי bimey קֶדֶם kedem
3
With Your hand You planted them,displacing nations;You brought misfortune on peoples,and drove them out.
אַתָּה atah יָדְךָ yadkha גּוֹיִם goyim הוֹרַשְׁתָּ horashta וַתִּטָּעֵם vatitaem תָּרַע tara לְאֻמִּים leumim וַתְּשַׁלְּחֵם vatshalchem
4
It was not by their sword that they took the land,their arm did not give them victory,but Your right hand, Your arm, and Your goodwill,for You favored them.
כִּי ki לֹא lo בְחַרְבָּם vecharbam יָרְשׁוּ yarshu אָרֶץ aretz וּזְרוֹעָם uzroam לֹא lo הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah לָּמוֹ lamo כִּי ki יְמִינְךָ yeminkha וּזְרוֹעֲךָ uzroakha וְאוֹר veor פָּנֶיךָ paneykha כִּי ki רְצִיתָם retzitam
5
You are my king, O God;decree victories for Jacob!
אַתָּה atah הוּא hu מַלְכִּי malki אֱלֹהִים Elohim צַוֵּה tzaueh יְשׁוּעוֹת yeshuot יַעֲקֹב yaakov
6
Through You we gore our foes;by Your name we trample our adversaries;
בְּךָ bekha צָרֵינוּ tzareynu נְנַגֵּחַ nenageach בְּשִׁמְךָ beshimkha נָבוּס navus קָמֵינוּ kameynu
7
I do not trust in my bow;it is not my sword that gives me victory;
כִּי ki לֹא lo בְקַשְׁתִּי vekashti אֶבְטָח evtach וְחַרְבִּי vecharbi לֹא lo תוֹשִׁיעֵנִי toshieni
8
You give us victory over our foes;You thwart those who hate us.
כִּי ki הוֹשַׁעְתָּנוּ hoshatanu מִצָּרֵינוּ mitzareynu וּמְשַׂנְאֵינוּ umsaneynu הֱבִישׁוֹתָ hevishota
9
In God we glory at all times,and praise Your name unceasingly. Selah.
בֵּאלֹהִים belohim הִלַּלְנוּ hilalnu כל khl הַיּוֹם hayom וְשִׁמְךָ veshimkha לְעוֹלָם leolam נוֹדֶה nodeh סֶלָה selah
10
Yet You have rejected and disgraced us;You do not go with our armies.
אַף af זָנַחְתָּ zanachta וַתַּכְלִימֵנוּ vatakhlimenu וְלֹא velo תֵצֵא tetze בְּצִבְאוֹתֵינוּ betzivoteynu
11
You make us retreat before our foe;our enemies plunder us at will.
תְּשִׁיבֵנוּ teshivenu אָחוֹר achor מִנִּי mini צָר tzar וּמְשַׂנְאֵינוּ umsaneynu שָׁסוּ shasu לָמוֹ lamo
12
You let them devour us like sheep;You disperse us among the nations.
תִּתְּנֵנוּ titnenu כְּצֹאן ketzon מַאֲכָל maakhal וּבַגּוֹיִם uvagoyim זֵרִיתָנוּ zeritanu
13
You sell Your people for no fortune,You set no high price on them.
תִּמְכֹּר timkor עַמְּךָ amkha בְלֹא velo הוֹן hon וְלֹא velo רִבִּיתָ ribita בִּמְחִירֵיהֶם bimchireyhem
14
You make us the butt of our neighbors,the scorn and derision of those around us.
תְּשִׂימֵנוּ tesimenu חֶרְפָּה cherpah לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ lishkheneynu לַעַג laag וָקֶלֶס vakeles לִסְבִיבוֹתֵינוּ lisvivoteynu
15
You make us a byword among the nations,a laughingstock among the peoples.
תְּשִׂימֵנוּ tesimenu מָשָׁל mashal בַּגּוֹיִם bagoyim מְנוֹד menod רֹאשׁ rosh בַּלְאֻמִּים balumim
16
I am always aware of my disgrace;I am wholly covered with shame
כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom כְּלִמָּתִי kelimati נֶגְדִּי negdi וּבֹשֶׁת uvoshet פָּנַי panay כִּסָּתְנִי kisatni
17
at the sound of taunting revilers,in the presence of the vengeful foe.
מִקּוֹל mikol מְחָרֵף mecharef וּמְגַדֵּף umgadef מִפְּנֵי mipney אוֹיֵב oyev וּמִתְנַקֵּם umitnakem
18
All this has come upon us,yet we have not forgotten You,or been false to Your covenant.
כּל kl זֹאת zot בָּאַתְנוּ baatnu וְלֹא velo שְׁכַחֲנוּךָ shekhachanukha וְלֹא velo שִׁקַּרְנוּ shikarnu בִּבְרִיתֶךָ bivritekha
19
Our hearts have not gone astray,nor have our feet swerved from Your path,
לֹא lo נָסוֹג nasog אָחוֹר achor לִבֵּנוּ libenu וַתֵּט vatet אֲשֻׁרֵינוּ ashureynu מִנִּי mini ארְחֶךָ rchekha
20
though You cast us, crushed, to where the sea monster = tannin, as in Ezek. 29.3; 32.2. is,and covered us over with deepest darkness.
כִּי ki דִכִּיתָנוּ dikitanu בִּמְקוֹם bimkom תַּנִּים tanim וַתְּכַס vatkhas עָלֵינוּ aleynu בְצַלְמָוֶת vetzalmavet
21
If we forgot the name of our Godand spread forth our hands to a foreign god,
אִם im שָׁכַחְנוּ shakhachnu שֵׁם shem אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu וַנִּפְרֹשׂ vanifros כַּפֵּינוּ kapeynu לְאֵל leel זָר zar
22
God would surely search it out,as the One who knows the secrets of the heart.
הֲלֹא halo אֱלֹהִים Elohim יַחֲקר yachakr זֹאת zot כִּי ki הוּא hu יֹדֵעַ yodea תַּעֲלֻמוֹת taalumot לֵב lev
23
It is for Your sake that we are slain all day long,that we are regarded as sheep to be slaughtered.
כִּי ki עָלֶיךָ aleykha הֹרַגְנוּ horagnu כל khl הַיּוֹם hayom נֶחְשַׁבְנוּ nechshavnu כְּצֹאן ketzon טִבְחָה tivchah
24
Rouse Yourself; why do You sleep, O my Sovereign?Awaken, do not reject us forever!
עוּרָה urah לָמָּה lamah תִישַׁןאֲדֹנָי tishanadonay הָקִיצָה hakitzah אַל El תִּזְנַח tiznach לָנֶצַח lanetzach
25
Why do You hide Your face,ignoring our affliction and distress?
לָמָּה lamah פָנֶיךָ faneykha תַסְתִּיר tastir תִּשְׁכַּח tishkach ענְיֵנוּ nyenu וְלַחֲצֵנוּ velachatzenu
26
We lie prostrate in the dust;our body clings to the ground.
כִּי ki שָׁחָה shachah לֶעָפָר leafar נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu דָּבְקָה davkah לָאָרֶץ laaretz בִּטְנֵנוּ bitnenu
27
Arise and help us,redeem us, as befits Your faithfulness.
קוּמָה kumah עֶזְרָתָה ezratah לָּנוּ lanu וּפְדֵנוּ ufdenu לְמַעַן lemaan חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha

Psalm 45

1
For the leader; on shoshannim. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Of the Korahites. A maskil. A love song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al שֹׁשַׁנִּים shoshanim לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach מַשְׂכִּיל maskil שִׁיר shir יְדִידֹת yedidot
2
My heart is astir with gracious words;I speak my poem to a king;my tongue is the pen of an expert scribe.
רָחַשׁ rachash לִבִּי libi דָּבָר davar טוֹב tov אֹמֵר omer אָנִי ani מַעֲשַׂי maasay לְמֶלֶךְ lemelekh לְשׁוֹנִי leshoni עֵט et סוֹפֵר sofer מָהִיר mahir
3
You are fairer than all mortals;your speech is endowed with grace;rightly has God given you an eternal blessing.
יפְיָפִיתָ yfyafita מִבְּנֵי mibney אָדָם adam הוּצַק hutzak חֵן chen בְּשִׂפְתוֹתֶיךָ besiftoteykha עַל al כֵּן ken בֵּרַכְךָ berakhkha אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְעוֹלָם leolam
4
Gird your sword upon your thigh, O hero,in your splendor and glory;
חֲגוֹר chagor חַרְבְּךָ charbkha עַל al יָרֵךְ yarekh גִּבּוֹר gibor הוֹדְךָ hodkha וַהֲדָרֶךָ vahadarekha
5
in your glory, win success;ride on in the cause of truth and meekness and right;and let your right hand lead you to awesome deeds.
וַהֲדָרְךָ vahadarkha צְלַח tzelach רְכַב rekhav עַל al דְּבַר devar אֱמֶת emet וְעַנְוָה veanvah צֶדֶק tzedek וְתוֹרְךָ vetorkha נוֹרָאוֹת noraot יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
6
Your arrows, sharpened,[pierce] the breast of the king’s enemies;peoples fall at your feet.
חִצֶּיךָ chitzeykha שְׁנוּנִים shenunim עַמִּים amim תַּחְתֶּיךָ tachteykha יִפְּלוּ yiplu בְּלֵב belev אוֹיְבֵי oyvey הַמֶּלֶךְ hamelekh
7
Your divine throne is everlasting;your royal scepter is a scepter of equity.
כִּסְאֲךָ kisakha אֱלֹהִים Elohim עוֹלָם olam וָעֶד vaed שֵׁבֶט shevet מִישֹׁר mishor שֵׁבֶט shevet מַלְכוּתֶךָ malkhutekha
8
You love righteousness and hate wickedness;rightly has God, your God, chosen to anoint youwith oil of gladness over all your peers.
אָהַבְתָּ ahavta צֶּדֶק tzedek וַתִּשְׂנָא vatisna רֶשַׁע resha עַל al כֵּן ken מְשָׁחֲךָ meshachakha אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֶיךָ eloheykha שֶׁמֶן shemen שָׂשׂוֹן sason מֵחֲבֵרֶךָ mechaverekha
9
All your robes [are fragrant] withmyrrh and aloes and cassia;from ivoried palaceslutes entertain you.
מֹר mor וַאֲהָלוֹת vaahalot קְצִיעוֹת ketziot כּל kl בִּגְדֹתֶיךָ bigdoteykha מִן min הֵיכְלֵי heykhley שֵׁן shen מִנִּי mini שִׂמְּחוּךָ simchukha
10
Royal princesses are your favorites;the consort stands at your right hand,decked in gold of Ophir.
בְּנוֹת benot מְלָכִים melakhim בְּיִקְּרוֹתֶיךָ beyikroteykha נִצְּבָה nitzvah שֵׁגַל shegal לִימִינְךָ liminkha בְּכֶתֶם bekhetem אוֹפִיר ofir
11
Take heed, lass, and note,incline your ear:forget your people and your father’s house,
שִׁמְעִי shimi בַת vat וּרְאִי uri וְהַטִּי vehati אזְנֵךְ znekh וְשִׁכְחִי veshikhchi עַמֵּךְ amekh וּבֵית uveyt אָבִיךְ avikh
12
and let the king be aroused by your beauty;since he is your lord, bow to him.
וְיִתְאָו veyitav הַמֶּלֶךְ hamelekh יפְיֵךְ yfyekh כִּי ki הוּא hu אֲדֹנַיִךְ adonayikh וְהִשְׁתַּחֲוִי vehishtachavi לוֹ lo
13
O Tyrian lass,the wealthiest people will court your favor with gifts,
וּבַת uvat צֹר tzor בְּמִנְחָה beminchah פָּנַיִךְ panayikh יְחַלּוּ yechalu עֲשִׁירֵי ashirey עָם am
14
goods of all sorts.The royal princess,her dress embroidered with golden mountings,
כּל kl כְּבוּדָּה kevudah בַת vat מֶלֶךְ melekh פְּנִימָה penimah מִמִּשְׁבְּצוֹת mimishbtzot זָהָב zahav לְבוּשָׁהּ levushah
15
is led inside to the king; maidens in her train, her companions,are presented to you.
לִרְקָמוֹת lirkamot תּוּבַל tuval לַמֶּלֶךְ lamelekh בְּתוּלוֹת betulot אַחֲרֶיהָ achareyha רֵעוֹתֶיהָ reoteyha מוּבָאוֹת muvaot לָךְ lakh
16
They are led in with joy and gladness;they enter the palace of the king.
תּוּבַלְנָה tuvalnah בִּשְׂמָחֹת bismachot וָגִיל vagil תְּבֹאֶינָה tevoeynah בְּהֵיכַל beheykhal מֶלֶךְ melekh
17
Your sons will succeed your fathers;you will appoint them princes throughout the land.
תַּחַת tachat אֲבֹתֶיךָ avoteykha יִהְיוּ yihyu בָנֶיךָ vaneykha תְּשִׁיתֵמוֹ teshitemo לְשָׂרִים lesarim בְּכל bekhl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
18
I commemorate your fame for all generations,so peoples will praise you forever and ever.
אַזְכִּירָה azkirah שִׁמְךָ shimkha בְּכל bekhl דֹּר dor וָדֹר vador עַל al כֵּן ken עַמִּים amim יְהוֹדוּךָ yehodukha לְעֹלָם leolam וָעֶד vaed

Psalm 46

1
For the leader. Of the Korahites; alamoth. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach עַל al עֲלָמוֹת alamot שִׁיר shir
2
God is our refuge and stronghold,a help in trouble, very near.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim לָנוּ lanu מַחֲסֶה machaseh וָעֹז vaoz עֶזְרָה ezrah בְצָרוֹת vetzarot נִמְצָא nimtza מְאֹד meod
3
Therefore we are not afraidthough the earth reels,though mountains topple into the sea—
עַל al כֵּן ken לֹא lo נִירָא nira בְּהָמִיר behamir אָרֶץ aretz וּבְמוֹט uvmot הָרִים harim בְּלֵב belev יַמִּים yamim
4
its waters rage and foam;in its swell mountains quake. Selah.
יֶהֱמוּ yehemu יֶחְמְרוּ yechmru מֵימָיו meymayv יִרְעֲשׁוּ yirashu הָרִים harim בְּגַאֲוָתוֹ begaavato סֶלָה selah
5
There is a river whose streams gladden God’s city,the holy dwelling-place of the Most High.
נָהָר nahar פְּלָגָיו pelagayv יְשַׂמְּחוּ yesamchu עִיר ir אֱלֹהִים Elohim קְדֹשׁ kedosh מִשְׁכְּנֵי mishkney עֶלְיוֹן elyon
6
God is in its midst, it will not be toppled;by daybreak God will come to its aid.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּקִרְבָּהּ bekirbah בַּל bal תִּמּוֹט timot יַעְזְרֶהָ yazreha אֱלֹהִים Elohim לִפְנוֹת lifnot בֹּקֶר boker
7
Nations rage, kingdoms topple;at the sound of God’s thunder the earth dissolves.
הָמוּ hamu גוֹיִם goyim מָטוּ matu מַמְלָכוֹת mamlakhot נָתַן natan בְּקוֹלוֹ bekolo תָּמוּג tamug אָרֶץ aretz
8
GOD of hosts is with us;the God of Jacob is our haven. Selah.
יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot עִמָּנוּ imanu מִשְׂגָּב misgav לָנוּ lanu אֱלֹהֵי elohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov סֶלָה selah
9
Come and see what GOD has done,how devastation has been wrought on the earth.
לְכוּ lekhu חֲזוּ chazu מִפְעֲלוֹת mifalot יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲשֶׁר asher שָׂם sam שַׁמּוֹת shamot בָּאָרֶץ baaretz
10
[God] puts a stop to wars throughout the earth,breaking the bow, snapping the spear,consigning wagons to the flames.
מַשְׁבִּית mashbit מִלְחָמוֹת milchamot עַד ad קְצֵה ketzeh הָאָרֶץ haaretz קֶשֶׁת keshet יְשַׁבֵּר yeshaber וְקִצֵּץ vekitzetz חֲנִית chanit עֲגָלוֹת agalot יִשְׂרֹף yisrof בָּאֵשׁ baesh
11
“Desist! Realize that I am God!I dominate the nations;I dominate the earth.”
הַרְפּוּ harpu וּדְעוּ udu כִּי ki אָנֹכִי anokhi אֱלֹהִים Elohim אָרוּם arum בַּגּוֹיִם bagoyim אָרוּם arum בָּאָרֶץ baaretz
12
GOD of hosts is with us;the God of Jacob is our haven. Selah.
יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot עִמָּנוּ imanu מִשְׂגָּב misgav לָנוּ lanu אֱלֹהֵי elohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov סֶלָה selah

Psalm 47

1
For the leader. Of the Korahites. A psalm.
לַמְנַצֵּחַלִבְנֵי lamnatzechalivney קֹרַח korach מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
All you peoples, clap your hands,raise a joyous shout for God.
כּל kl הָעַמִּים haamim תִּקְעוּ tiku כָף khaf הָרִיעוּ hariu לֵאלֹהִים lelohim בְּקוֹל bekol רִנָּה rinah
3
For GOD Most High is awesome,great ruler over all the earth,
כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai עֶלְיוֹן elyon נוֹרָא nora מֶלֶךְ melekh גָּדוֹל gadol עַל al כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
4
who subjects peoples to us,sets nations at our feet.
יַדְבֵּר yadber עַמִּים amim תַּחְתֵּינוּ tachteynu וּלְאֻמִּים ulumim תַּחַת tachat רַגְלֵינוּ ragleynu
5
[God] chose our heritage for us,the pride of Jacob the beloved. Selah.
יִבְחַר yivchar לָנוּ lanu אֶת et נַחֲלָתֵנוּ nachalatenu אֶת et גְּאוֹן geon יַעֲקֹב yaakov אֲשֶׁר asher אָהֵב ahev סֶלָה selah
6
God ascends midst acclamation; the ETERNAL, to the blasts of the horn.
עָלָה alah אֱלֹהִים Elohim בִּתְרוּעָה bitruah יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּקוֹל bekol שׁוֹפָר shofar
7
Sing, O sing to God;sing, O sing to our sovereign;
זַמְּרוּ zamru אֱלֹהִים Elohim זַמֵּרוּ zameru זַמְּרוּ zamru לְמַלְכֵּנוּ lemalkenu זַמֵּרוּ zameru
8
for God is ruler over all the earth;sing a hymn., a musical term of uncertain meaning.
כִּי ki מֶלֶךְ melekh כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz אֱלֹהִים Elohim זַמְּרוּ zamru מַשְׂכִּיל maskil
9
God reigns over the nations;God is seated on the holy throne.
מָלַךְ malakh אֱלֹהִים Elohim עַל al גּוֹיִם goyim אֱלֹהִים Elohim יָשַׁב yashav עַל al כִּסֵּא kise קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
10
The great of the peoples are gathered together,the retinue of Abraham’s God;for the guardians of the earth belong to God,who is greatly exalted.
נְדִיבֵי nedivey עַמִּים amim נֶאֱסָפוּ neesafu עַם am אֱלֹהֵי elohey אַבְרָהָם avraham כִּי ki לֵאלֹהִים lelohim מָגִנֵּי maginey אֶרֶץ eretz מְאֹד meod נַעֲלָה naalah

Psalm 48

1
A song. A psalm of the Korahites.
שִׁיר shir מִזְמוֹר mizmor לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach
2
GOD is great and much acclaimedin the city of our God,the holy mountain—
גָּדוֹל gadol יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמְהֻלָּל umhulal מְאֹד meod בְּעִיר beir אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu הַר har קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
3
fair-crested, joy of all the earth,Mount Zion, summit of Zaphon, city of the great ruler.
יְפֵה yefeh נוֹף nof מְשׂוֹשׂ mesos כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz הַר har צִיּוֹן tzion יַרְכְּתֵי yarktey צָפוֹן tzafon קִרְיַת kiryat מֶלֶךְ melekh רָב rav
4
Through its citadels, God has become known as a haven.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּאַרְמְנוֹתֶיהָ bearmnoteyha נוֹדַע noda לְמִשְׂגָּב lemisgav
5
See, the kings joined forces;they advanced together.
כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh הַמְּלָכִים hamlakhim נוֹעֲדוּ noadu עָבְרוּ avru יַחְדָּו yachdav
6
At the mere sight of it they were stunned,they were terrified, they panicked;
הֵמָּה hemah רָאוּ rau כֵּן ken תָּמָהוּ tamahu נִבְהֲלוּ nivhalu נֶחְפָּזוּ nechpazu
7
they were seized there with a trembling,like a woman in the throes of labor,
רְעָדָה readah אֲחָזָתַם achazatam שָׁם sham חִיל chil כַּיּוֹלֵדָה kayoledah
8
as the Tarshish fleet was wreckedin an easterly gale.
בְּרוּחַ beruach קָדִים kadim תְּשַׁבֵּר teshaber אֳנִיּוֹת oniot תַּרְשִׁישׁ tarshish
9
The likes of what we heard we have now witnessedin the city of GOD of hosts,in the city of our God—may God preserve it forever! Selah.
כַּאֲשֶׁר kaasher שָׁמַעְנוּ shamanu כֵּן ken רָאִינוּ rainu בְּעִיר beir יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot בְּעִיר beir אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu אֱלֹהִים Elohim יְכוֹנְנֶהָ yekhoneneha עַד ad עוֹלָם olam סֶלָה selah
10
In Your temple, God,we meditate upon Your faithful care.
דִּמִּינוּ diminu אֱלֹהִים Elohim חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha בְּקֶרֶב bekerev הֵיכָלֶךָ heykhalekha
11
The praise of You, God, like Your name,reaches to the ends of the earth;Your right hand is filled with beneficence.
כְּשִׁמְךָ keshimkha אֱלֹהִים Elohim כֵּן ken תְּהִלָּתְךָ tehilatkha עַל al קַצְוֵי katzvey אֶרֶץ eretz צֶדֶק tzedek מָלְאָה malah יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
12
Let Mount Zion rejoice!Let the towns of Judah exult,because of Your judgments.
יִשְׂמַח yismach הַר har צִיּוֹן tzion תָּגֵלְנָה tagelnah בְּנוֹת benot יְהוּדָה yehudah לְמַעַן lemaan מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha
13
Walk around Zion,circle it;count its towers,
סֹבּוּ sobu צִיּוֹן tzion וְהַקִּיפוּהָ vehakifuha סִפְרוּ sifru מִגְדָּלֶיהָ migdaleyha
14
take note of its ramparts;go through its citadels,that you may recount it to a future age.
שִׁיתוּ shitu לִבְּכֶם libkhem לְחֵילָה lecheylah פַּסְּגוּ pasgu אַרְמְנוֹתֶיהָ armnoteyha לְמַעַן lemaan תְּסַפְּרוּ tesapru לְדוֹר ledor אַחֲרוֹן acharon
15
For God truly is our God forever,who will lead us evermore.
כִּי ki זֶה zeh אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu עוֹלָם olam וָעֶד vaed הוּא hu יְנַהֲגֵנוּ yenahagenu עַל al מוּת mut

Psalm 49

1
For the leader. Of the Korahites. A psalm.
לַמְנַצֵּחַלִבְנֵי lamnatzechalivney קֹרַח korach מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
Hear this, all you peoples;give ear, all inhabitants of the world,
שִׁמְעוּ shimu זֹאת zot כּל kl הָעַמִּים haamim הַאֲזִינוּ haazinu כּל kl יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey חָלֶד chaled
3
both low and high,rich and poor alike.
גַּם gam בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam גַּם gam בְּנֵי beney אִישׁ ish יַחַד yachad עָשִׁיר ashir וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon
4
My mouth utters wisdom,my speech, cf. 19.15. is full of insight.
פִּי pi יְדַבֵּר yedaber חכְמוֹת chkhmot וְהָגוּת vehagut לִבִּי libi תְבוּנוֹת tevunot
5
I will turn my attention to a theme,set forth my lesson to the music of a lyre.
אַטֶּה ateh לְמָשָׁל lemashal אזְנִי zni אֶפְתַּח eftach בְּכִנּוֹר bekhinor חִידָתִי chidati
6
In time of trouble, why should I fearthe encompassing evil of those who would supplant me—
לָמָּה lamah אִירָא ira בִּימֵי bimey רָע ra עֲוֺן avon עֲקֵבַי akevay יְסוּבֵּנִי yesubeni
7
those who trust in their riches,who glory in their great wealth?
הַבֹּטְחִים habotchim עַל al חֵילָם cheylam וּבְרֹב uvrov עשְׁרָם shram יִתְהַלָּלוּ yithalalu
8
Ah, it cannot redeem anyone,or pay one’s ransom to God;
אָח ach לֹא lo פָדֹה fadoh יִפְדֶּה yifdeh אִישׁ ish לֹא lo יִתֵּן yiten לֵאלֹהִים lelohim כּפְרוֹ kfro
9
the price of life is too high;and so one ceases to be, forever.
וְיֵקַר veyekar פִּדְיוֹן pidyon נַפְשָׁם nafsham וְחָדַל vechadal לְעוֹלָם leolam
10
Shall anyone live eternally,and never see the grave?
וִיחִי vichi עוֹד od לָנֶצַח lanetzach לֹא lo יִרְאֶה yireh הַשָּׁחַת hashachat
11
For one sees that the wise die,that the foolish and ignorant both perish,leaving their wealth to others.
כִּי ki יִרְאֶה yireh חֲכָמִים chakhamim יָמוּתוּ yamutu יַחַד yachad כְּסִיל kesil וָבַעַר vavaar יֹאבֵדוּ yovedu וְעָזְבוּ veazvu לַאֲחֵרִים laacherim חֵילָם cheylam
12
Their grave, taken with ancient versions and medieval commentators as the equivalent of qibram. is their eternal home,the dwelling-place for all generationsof those once famous on earth.
קִרְבָּם kirbam בָּתֵּימוֹ bateymo לְעוֹלָם leolam מִשְׁכְּנֹתָם mishknotam לְדוֹר ledor וָדֹר vador קָרְאוּ karu בִשְׁמוֹתָם vishmotam עֲלֵי aley אֲדָמוֹת adamot
13
Mortals do not abide in honor;they are like the beasts that perish.
וְאָדָם veadam בִּיקָר bikar בַּל bal יָלִין yalin נִמְשַׁל nimshal כַּבְּהֵמוֹת kabhemot נִדְמוּ nidmu
14
Such is the fate of those who are self-confident,the end of those pleased with their own talk. Selah.
זֶה zeh דַרְכָּם darkam כֵּסֶל kesel לָמוֹ lamo וְאַחֲרֵיהֶם veachareyhem בְּפִיהֶם befihem יִרְצוּ yirtzu סֶלָה selah
15
