Sheeplike they head for Sheol,with Death as their shepherd.The upright shall rule over them at daybreak,and their form shall waste away in Sheoltill its nobility be gone.
כַּצֹּאן katzon לִשְׁאוֹל lishol שַׁתּוּ shatu מָוֶת mavet יִרְעֵם yirem וַיִּרְדּוּ vayirdu בָם vam יְשָׁרִים yesharim לַבֹּקֶר laboker (וצירם) vtzyrm [וְצוּרָם] vetzuram לְבַלּוֹת levalot שְׁאוֹל sheol מִזְּבֻל mizvul לוֹ lo
16
But God will redeem my life from the clutches of Sheol,by taking me. Selah.
אַךְ akh אֱלֹהִים Elohim יִפְדֶּה yifdeh נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִיַּד miad שְׁאוֹל sheol כִּי ki יִקָּחֵנִי yikacheni סֶלָה selah
17
Do not be afraid when someone else becomes rich,when their household goods increase;
אַל El תִּירָא tira כִּי ki יַעֲשִׁר yaashir אִישׁ ish כִּי ki יִרְבֶּה yirbeh כְּבוֹד kevod בֵּיתוֹ beyto
18
for when they die they can take none of it along;their goods cannot follow them down.
כִּי ki לֹא lo בְמוֹתוֹ vemoto יִקַּח yikach הַכֹּל hakol לֹא lo יֵרֵד yered אַחֲרָיו acharayv כְּבוֹדוֹ kevodo
19
Though they congratulate themselves in their lifetime—“All must admit that you did well by yourself”—
כִּי ki נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho בְּחַיָּיו bechayayv יְבָרֵךְ yevarekh וְיוֹדֻךָ veyodukha כִּי ki תֵיטִיב teytiv לָךְ lakh
20
yet they must join the company of their ancestors,who will never see daylight again.
תָּבוֹא tavo עַד ad דּוֹר dor אֲבוֹתָיו avotayv עַד ad נֵצַח netzach לֹא lo יִרְאוּ yiru אוֹר or
21
Mortals do not understand honor;they are like the beasts that perish.
אָדָם adam בִּיקָר bikar וְלֹא velo יָבִין yavin נִמְשַׁל nimshal כַּבְּהֵמוֹת kabhemot נִדְמוּ nidmu

Psalm 50

1
A psalm of Asaph.God, the ETERNAL God,. spokeand summoned the world from east to west.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf אֵל El אֱלֹהִים Elohim יְהֹוָה Adonai דִּבֶּר diber וַיִּקְרָא vayikra אָרֶץ aretz מִמִּזְרַח mimizrach שֶׁמֶשׁ shemesh עַד ad מְבֹאוֹ mevoo
2
From Zion, perfect in beauty,God appeared
מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion מִכְלַל mikhlal יֹפִי yofi אֱלֹהִים Elohim הוֹפִיעַ hofia
3
—let our God come and not fail to act![God] was preceded by devouring fire,with a fierce storm all around.
יָבֹא yavo אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu וְאַל veal יֶחֱרַשׁ yecherash אֵשׁ esh לְפָנָיו lefanayv תֹּאכֵל tokhel וּסְבִיבָיו usvivayv נִשְׂעֲרָה nisarah מְאֹד meod
4
The heavens above were summoned,and the earth, for the trial of God’s people.
יִקְרָא yikra אֶל El הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim מֵעָל meal וְאֶל veel הָאָרֶץ haaretz לָדִין ladin עַמּוֹ amo
5
“Bring in My devotees,who made a covenant with Me over sacrifice!”
אִסְפוּ isfu לִי li חֲסִידָי chasiday כֹּרְתֵי kortey בְרִיתִי veriti עֲלֵי aley זָבַח zavach
6
Then the heavens proclaimed God’s righteousness,for this is a God who judges. Selah.
וַיַּגִּידוּ vayagidu שָׁמַיִם shamayim צִדְקוֹ tzidko כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim שֹׁפֵט shofet הוּא hu סֶלָה selah
7
“Pay heed, My people, and I will speak,O Israel, and I will arraign you.I am God, your God.
שִׁמְעָה shimah עַמִּי ami וַאֲדַבֵּרָה vaadaberah יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael וְאָעִידָה veaidah בָּךְ bakh אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֶיךָ eloheykha אָנֹכִי anokhi
8
I censure you not for your sacrifices,and your burnt offerings, made to Me daily;
לֹא lo עַל al זְבָחֶיךָ zevacheykha אוֹכִיחֶךָ okhichekha וְעוֹלֹתֶיךָ veoloteykha לְנֶגְדִּי lenegdi תָמִיד tamid
9
I claim no bull from your estate,no he-goats from your pens.
לֹא lo אֶקַּח ekach מִבֵּיתְךָ mibeytkha פָר far מִמִּכְלְאֹתֶיךָ mimikhloteykha עַתּוּדִים atudim
10
For Mine is every animal of the forest,the beasts on a thousand mountains.
כִּי ki לִי li כל khl חַיְתוֹ chayto יָעַר yaar בְּהֵמוֹת behemot בְּהַרְרֵי beharerey אָלֶף alef
11
I know every bird of the mountains,the creatures of the field are subject to Me.
יָדַעְתִּי yadati כּל kl עוֹף of הָרִים harim וְזִיז veziz שָׂדַי saday עִמָּדִי imadi
12
Were I hungry, I would not tell you,for Mine is the world and all it holds.
אִם im אֶרְעַב erav לֹא lo אֹמַר omar לָךְ lakh כִּי ki לִי li תֵבֵל tevel וּמְלֹאָהּ umloah
13
Do I eat the flesh of bulls,or drink the blood of he-goats?
הַאוֹכַל haokhal בְּשַׂר besar אַבִּירִים abirim וְדַם vedam עַתּוּדִים atudim אֶשְׁתֶּה eshteh
14
Sacrifice a thank offering to God,and pay your vows to the Most High.
זְבַח zevach לֵאלֹהִים lelohim תּוֹדָה todah וְשַׁלֵּם veshalem לְעֶלְיוֹן leelyon נְדָרֶיךָ nedareykha
15
Call upon Me in time of trouble;I will rescue you, and you shall honor Me.”
וּקְרָאֵנִי ukraeni בְּיוֹם beyom צָרָה tzarah אֲחַלֶּצְךָ achaletzkha וּתְכַבְּדֵנִי utkhabdeni
16
And to the wicked, God said:“Who are you to recite My laws,and mouth the terms of My covenant,
וְלָרָשָׁע velarasha אָמַר amar אֱלֹהִים Elohim מַה mah לְּךָ lekha לְסַפֵּר lesaper חֻקָּי chukay וַתִּשָּׂא vatisa בְרִיתִי veriti עֲלֵי aley פִיךָ fikha
17
seeing that you spurn My discipline,and brush My words aside?
וְאַתָּה veatah שָׂנֵאתָ saneta מוּסָר musar וַתַּשְׁלֵךְ vatashlekh דְּבָרַי devaray אַחֲרֶיךָ achareykha
18
You fall in with a thief when you see one,and throw in your lot with adulterers;
אִם im רָאִיתָ raita גַנָּב ganav וַתִּרֶץ vatiretz עִמּוֹ imo וְעִם veim מְנָאֲפִים menaafim חֶלְקֶךָ chelkekha
19
you devote your mouth to evil,and yoke your tongue to deceit;
פִּיךָ pikha שָׁלַחְתָּ shalachta בְרָעָה veraah וּלְשׁוֹנְךָ ulshonkha תַּצְמִיד tatzmid מִרְמָה mirmah
20
you are busy maligning your kin,defaming the child of your mother.
תֵּשֵׁב teshev בְּאָחִיךָ beachikha תְדַבֵּר tedaber בְּבֶן beven אִמְּךָ imkha תִּתֶּן titen דֹּפִי dofi
21
If I failed to act when you did these things,you would fancy that I was like you;so I censure you and confront you with charges.
אֵלֶּה eleh עָשִׂיתָ asita וְהֶחֱרַשְׁתִּי vehecherashti דִּמִּיתָ dimita הֱיוֹת heyot אֶהְיֶה ehyeh כָמוֹךָ khamokha אוֹכִיחֲךָ okhichakha וְאֶעֶרְכָה veeerkhah לְעֵינֶיךָ leeyneykha
22
Mark this, you who are unmindful of God,lest I tear you apart and no one save you.
בִּינוּ binu נָא na זֹאת zot שֹׁכְחֵי shokhchey אֱלוֹהַּ eloha פֶּן pen אֶטְרֹף etrof וְאֵין veeyn מַצִּיל matzil
23
Whoever sacrifices a thank offering honors Me,and to one who sets out on the proper way I will show the salvation of God.”
זֹבֵחַ zoveach תּוֹדָה todah יְכַבְּדָנְנִי yekhabdaneni וְשָׂם vesam דֶּרֶךְ derekh אַרְאֶנּוּ arenu בְּיֵשַׁע beyesha אֱלֹהִים Elohim

Psalm 51

1
For the leader. A psalm of David,
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
when Nathan the prophet came to him after he had come to Bathsheba.
בְּבוֹא bevo אֵלָיו elayv נָתָן natan הַנָּבִיא hanavi כַּאֲשֶׁר kaasher בָּא ba אֶל El בַּת bat שָׁבַע shava
3
Have mercy upon me, O God,as befits Your faithfulness;in keeping with Your abundant compassion,blot out my transgressions.
חנֵּנִי chneni אֱלֹהִים Elohim כְּחַסְדֶּךָ kechasdekha כְּרֹב kerov רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha מְחֵה mecheh פְשָׁעָי feshaay
4
Wash me thoroughly of my iniquity,and purify me of my sin;
(הרבה) hrvh [הֶרֶב] herev כַּבְּסֵנִי kabseni מֵעֲוֺנִי meavoni וּמֵחַטָּאתִי umechatati טַהֲרֵנִי tahareni
5
for I recognize my transgressions,and am ever conscious of my sin.
כִּי ki פְשָׁעַי feshaay אֲנִי ani אֵדָע eda וְחַטָּאתִי vechatati נֶגְדִּי negdi תָמִיד tamid
6
Against You alone have I sinned,and done what is evil in Your sight;so You are just in Your sentence,and right in Your judgment.
לְךָ lekha לְבַדְּךָ levadkha חָטָאתִי chatati וְהָרַע vehara בְּעֵינֶיךָ beeyneykha עָשִׂיתִי asiti לְמַעַן lemaan תִּצְדַּק titzdak בְּדבְרֶךָ bedvrekha תִּזְכֶּה tizkeh בְשׁפְטֶךָ veshftekha
7
Indeed I was born with iniquity;with sin my mother conceived me.
הֵן hen בְּעָווֹן beavon חוֹלָלְתִּי cholalti וּבְחֵטְא uvchet יֶחֱמַתְנִי yechematni אִמִּי imi
8
Indeed You desire truth about that which is hidden;teach me wisdom about secret things.
הֵן hen אֱמֶת emet חָפַצְתָּ chafatzta בַטֻּחוֹת vatuchot וּבְסָתֻם uvsatum חכְמָה chkhmah תוֹדִיעֵנִי todieni
9
Purge me with hyssop till I am pure;wash me till I am whiter than snow.
תְּחַטְּאֵנִי techateni בְאֵזוֹב veezov וְאֶטְהָר veethar תְּכַבְּסֵנִי tekhabseni וּמִשֶּׁלֶג umisheleg אַלְבִּין albin
10
Let me hear tidings of joy and gladness;let the bones You have crushed exult.
תַּשְׁמִיעֵנִי tashmieni שָׂשׂוֹן sason וְשִׂמְחָה vesimchah תָּגֵלְנָה tagelnah עֲצָמוֹת atzamot דִּכִּיתָ dikita
11
Hide Your face from my sins;blot out all my iniquities.
הַסְתֵּר haster פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מֵחֲטָאָי mechataay וְכל vekhl עֲוֺנֹתַי avonotay מְחֵה mecheh
12
Fashion a pure heart for me, O God;create in me a steadfast spirit.
לֵב lev טָהוֹר tahor בְּרָא bera לִי li אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְרוּחַ veruach נָכוֹן nakhon חַדֵּשׁ chadesh בְּקִרְבִּי bekirbi
13
Do not cast me out of Your presence,or take Your holy spirit away from me.
אַל El תַּשְׁלִיכֵנִי tashlikheni מִלְּפָנֶיךָ milfaneykha וְרוּחַ veruach קדְשְׁךָ kdshkha אַל El תִּקַּח tikach מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
14
Let me again rejoice in Your help;let a vigorous spirit sustain me.
הָשִׁיבָה hashivah לִּי li שְׂשׂוֹן seson יִשְׁעֶךָ yishekha וְרוּחַ veruach נְדִיבָה nedivah תִסְמְכֵנִי tismkheni
15
I will teach transgressors Your ways,that sinners may return to You.
אֲלַמְּדָה alamdah פֹשְׁעִים foshim דְּרָכֶיךָ derakheykha וְחַטָּאִים vechataim אֵלֶיךָ eleykha יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu
16
Save me from bloodguilt,O God, God, my deliverer,that I may sing forth Your beneficence.
הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni מִדָּמִים midamim אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֵי elohey תְשׁוּעָתִי teshuati תְּרַנֵּן teranen לְשׁוֹנִי leshoni צִדְקָתֶךָ tzidkatekha
17
O my Sovereign, open my lips,and let my mouth declare Your praise.
אֲדֹנָי Adonai שְׂפָתַי sefatay תִּפְתָּח tiftach וּפִי ufi יַגִּיד yagid תְּהִלָּתֶךָ tehilatekha
18
You do not want me to bring sacrifices;You do not desire burnt offerings;
כִּי ki לֹא lo תַחְפֹּץ tachpotz זֶבַח zevach וְאֶתֵּנָה veetenah עוֹלָה olah לֹא lo תִרְצֶה tirtzeh
19
True sacrifice to God is a contrite spirit;God, You will not despisea contrite and crushed heart.
זִבְחֵי zivchey אֱלֹהִים Elohim רוּחַ ruach נִשְׁבָּרָה nishbarah לֵב lev נִשְׁבָּר nishbar וְנִדְכֶּה venidkeh אֱלֹהִים Elohim לֹא lo תִבְזֶה tivzeh
20
May it please You to make Zion prosper;rebuild the walls of Jerusalem.
הֵיטִיבָה heytivah בִרְצוֹנְךָ virtzonkha אֶת et צִיּוֹן tzion תִּבְנֶה tivneh חוֹמוֹת chomot יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim
21
Then You will want sacrifices offered in righteousness,burnt and whole offerings;then bulls will be offered on Your altar.
אָז az תַּחְפֹּץ tachpotz זִבְחֵי zivchey צֶדֶק tzedek עוֹלָה olah וְכָלִיל vekhalil אָז az יַעֲלוּ yaalu עַל al מִזְבַּחֲךָ mizbachakha פָרִים farim

Psalm 52

1
For the leader. A maskil of David,
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְדָוִד ledavid
2
when Doeg the Edomite came and informed Saul, telling him, “David came to Ahimelech’s house.”
בְּבוֹא bevo דּוֹאֵג doeg הָאֲדֹמִי haadomi וַיַּגֵּד vayaged לְשָׁאוּל leshaul וַיֹּאמֶר vayomer לוֹ lo בָּא ba דָוִד david אֶל El בֵּית beyt אֲחִימֶלֶךְ achimelekh
3
Why do you boast of your evil, brave fellow?God’s faithfulness never ceases.
מַה mah תִּתְהַלֵּל tithalel בְּרָעָה beraah הַגִּבּוֹר hagibor חֶסֶד chesed אֵל El כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom
4
Your tongue devises mischief,like a sharpened razor that works treacherously.
הַוּוֹת hauot תַּחְשֹׁב tachshov לְשׁוֹנֶךָ leshonekha כְּתַעַר ketaar מְלֻטָּשׁ melutash עֹשֵׂה oseh רְמִיָּה remiah
5
You prefer evil to good,the lie, to speaking truthfully. Selah.
אָהַבְתָּ ahavta רָּע ra מִטּוֹב mitov שֶׁקֶר sheker מִדַּבֵּר midaber צֶדֶק tzedek סֶלָה selah
6
You love all pernicious words,treacherous speech.
אָהַבְתָּ ahavta כל khl דִּבְרֵי divrey בָלַע vala לְשׁוֹן leshon מִרְמָה mirmah
7
So God will tear you down for good,will break you and pluck you from your tent,and root you out of the land of the living. Selah.
גַּם gam אֵל El יִתּצְךָ yittzkha לָנֶצַח lanetzach יַחְתְּךָ yachtkha וְיִסָּחֲךָ veyisachakha מֵאֹהֶל meohel וְשֵׁרֶשְׁךָ veshereshkha מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz חַיִּים chayim סֶלָה selah
8
The righteous, seeing it, will be awestruck;they will jibe at you, saying,
וְיִרְאוּ veyiru צַדִּיקִים tzadikim וְיִירָאוּ veyirau וְעָלָיו vealayv יִשְׂחָקוּ yischaku
9
“Here was a fellow who did not make God his refuge,but trusted in his great wealth,relied upon his mischief.”
הִנֵּה hineh הַגֶּבֶר hagever לֹא lo יָשִׂים yasim אֱלֹהִים Elohim מָעוּזּוֹ mauzo וַיִּבְטַח vayivtach בְּרֹב berov עשְׁרוֹ shro יָעֹז yaoz בְּהַוָּתוֹ behauato
10
But I am like a thriving olive tree in God’s house;I trust in the faithfulness of God forever and ever.
וַאֲנִי vaani כְּזַיִת kezayit רַעֲנָן raanan בְּבֵית beveyt אֱלֹהִים Elohim בָּטַחְתִּי batachti בְחֶסֶד vechesed אֱלֹהִים Elohim עוֹלָם olam וָעֶד vaed
11
I praise You forever, for You have acted;I declare that Your name is good in the presence of Your faithful ones.
אוֹדְךָ odkha לְעוֹלָם leolam כִּי ki עָשִׂיתָ asita וַאֲקַוֶּה vaakaueh שִׁמְךָ shimkha כִי khi טוֹב tov נֶגֶד neged חֲסִידֶיךָ chasideykha

Psalm 53

1
For the leader; on mahalath. Meaning of Heb. unknown. A maskil of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al מָחֲלַת machalat מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְדָוִד ledavid
2
The scoundrel thinks,“God does not care.” Mortals’ wrongdoing is corrupt and loathsome;no one does good.
אָמַר amar נָבָל naval בְּלִבּוֹ belibo אֵין eyn אֱלֹהִים Elohim הִשְׁחִיתוּ hishchitu וְהִתְעִיבוּ vehitivu עָוֶל avel אֵין eyn עֹשֵׂה oseh טוֹב tov
3
God looks down from heaven on humankindto find someone with understanding,someone mindful of God.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim הִשְׁקִיף hishkif עַל al בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam לִרְאוֹת lirot הֲיֵשׁ hayesh מַשְׂכִּיל maskil דֹּרֵשׁ doresh אֶת et אֱלֹהִים Elohim
4
Everyone is dross,altogether foul;there is no one who does good,not even one.
כֻּלּוֹ kulo סָג sag יַחְדָּו yachdav נֶאֱלָחוּ neelachu אֵין eyn עֹשֵׂה oseh טוֹב tov אֵין eyn גַּם gam אֶחָד echad
5
Are they so witless, those evildoers,who devour my people as they devour food,and do not invoke God?
הֲלֹא halo יָדְעוּ yadu פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven אֹכְלֵי okhley עַמִּי ami אָכְלוּ akhlu לֶחֶם lechem אֱלֹהִים Elohim לֹא lo קָרָאוּ karau
6
There they will be seized with fright—never was there such a fright—for God has scattered the bones of your besiegers;you have put them to shame, for God has rejected them.
שָׁם sham פָּחֲדוּ pachadu פַחַד fachad לֹא lo הָיָה hayah פָחַד fachad כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim פִּזַּר pizar עַצְמוֹת atzmot חֹנָךְ chonakh הֱבִשֹׁתָה hevishotah כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim מְאָסָם measam
7
O that the deliverance of Israel might come from Zion!When God restores the fortunes of this covenanted people,Jacob will exult, Israel will rejoice.
מִי mi יִתֵּן yiten מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion יְשֻׁעוֹת yeshuot יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael בְּשׁוּב beshuv אֱלֹהִים Elohim שְׁבוּת shevut עַמּוֹ amo יָגֵל yagel יַעֲקֹב yaakov יִשְׂמַח yismach יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael

Psalm 54

1
For the leader; with instrumental music. A maskil of David,
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach בִּנְגִינֹת binginot מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְדָוִד ledavid
2
when the Ziphites came and told Saul, “Know, David is in hiding among us.”
בְּבֹא bevo הַזִּיפִים hazifim וַיֹּאמְרוּ vayomru לְשָׁאוּל leshaul הֲלֹא halo דָוִד david מִסְתַּתֵּר mistater עִמָּנוּ imanu
3
O God, deliver me by Your name;by Your power vindicate me.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּשִׁמְךָ beshimkha הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni וּבִגְבוּרָתְךָ uvigvuratkha תְדִינֵנִי tedineni
4
O God, hear my prayer;give ear to the words of my mouth.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim שְׁמַע shema תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati הַאֲזִינָה haazinah לְאִמְרֵי leimrey פִי fi
5
For strangers have risen against me,and those who are ruthless seek my life;they are unmindful of God. Selah.
כִּי ki זָרִים zarim קָמוּ kamu עָלַי alay וְעָרִיצִים vearitzim בִּקְשׁוּ bikshu נַפְשִׁי nafshi לֹא lo שָׂמוּ samu אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְנֶגְדָּם lenegdam סֶלָה selah
6
See, God is my helper;my Sovereign is my support.
הִנֵּה hineh אֱלֹהִים Elohim עֹזֵר ozer לִי li אֲדֹנָי Adonai בְּסֹמְכֵי besomkhey נַפְשִׁי nafshi
7
[God] will repay the evil of my watchful foes;by Your faithfulness, destroy them!
(ישוב) yshvv [יָשִׁיב] yashiv הָרַע hara לְשֹׁרְרָי leshoreray בַּאֲמִתְּךָ baamitkha הַצְמִיתֵם hatzmitem
8
Then I will offer You a freewill sacrifice;I will praise Your name, ETERNAL One, for it is good,
בִּנְדָבָה bindavah אֶזְבְּחָה ezbchah לָּךְ lakh אוֹדֶה odeh שִּׁמְךָ shimkha יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki טוֹב tov
9
for it has saved me from my foes,and let me gaze triumphant upon my enemies.
כִּי ki מִכּל mikl צָרָה tzarah הִצִּילָנִי hitzilani וּבְאֹיְבַי uvoyvay רָאֲתָה raatah עֵינִי eyni

Psalm 55

1
For the leader; with instrumental music. A maskil of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach בִּנְגִינֹת binginot מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Give ear, O God, to my prayer;do not ignore my plea;
הַאֲזִינָה haazinah אֱלֹהִים Elohim תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati וְאַל veal תִּתְעַלַּם titalam מִתְּחִנָּתִי mitchinati
3
pay heed to me and answer me.I am tossed about, complaining and moaning
הַקְשִׁיבָה hakshivah לִּי li וַעֲנֵנִי vaaneni אָרִיד arid בְּשִׂיחִי besichi וְאָהִימָה veahimah
4
at the clamor of the enemy,because of the oppression of the wicked;for they bring evil upon meand furiously harass me.
מִקּוֹל mikol אוֹיֵב oyev מִפְּנֵי mipney עָקַת akat רָשָׁע rasha כִּי ki יָמִיטוּ yamitu עָלַי alay אָוֶן aven וּבְאַף uvaf יִשְׂטְמוּנִי yistmuni
5
My heart is convulsed within me;terrors of death assail me.
לִבִּי libi יָחִיל yachil בְּקִרְבִּי bekirbi וְאֵימוֹת veeymot מָוֶת mavet נָפְלוּ naflu עָלָי alay
6
Fear and trembling invade me;I am clothed with horror.
יִרְאָה yirah וָרַעַד varaad יָבֹא yavo בִי vi וַתְּכַסֵּנִי vatkhaseni פַּלָּצוּת palatzut
7
I said,“O that I had the wings of a dove!I would fly away and find rest;
וָאֹמַר vaomar מִי mi יִתֶּן yiten לִי li אֵבֶר ever כַּיּוֹנָה kayonah אָעוּפָה aufah וְאֶשְׁכֹּנָה veeshkonah
8
surely, I would flee far off;I would lodge in the wilderness; selah
הִנֵּה hineh אַרְחִיק archik נְדֹד nedod אָלִין alin בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar סֶלָה selah
9
I would soon find me a refugefrom the sweeping wind,from the tempest.”
אָחִישָׁה achishah מִפְלָט miflat לִי li מֵרוּחַ meruach סֹעָה soah מִסָּעַר misaar
10
O my Sovereign, confound their speech, confuse it!For I see lawlessness and strife in the city;
בַּלַּע bala אֲדֹנָי Adonai פַּלַּג palag לְשׁוֹנָם leshonam כִּי ki רָאִיתִי raiti חָמָס chamas וְרִיב veriv בָּעִיר bair
11
day and night they make their rounds on its walls;evil and mischief are inside it.
יוֹמָם yomam וָלַיְלָה valaylah יְסוֹבְבֻהָ yesovevuha עַל al חוֹמֹתֶיהָ chomoteyha וְאָוֶן veaven וְעָמָל veamal בְּקִרְבָּהּ bekirbah
12
Malice is within it;fraud and deceit never leave its square.
הַוּוֹת hauot בְּקִרְבָּהּ bekirbah וְלֹא velo יָמִישׁ yamish מֵרְחֹבָהּ merchovah תֹּךְ tokh וּמִרְמָה umirmah
13
It is not an enemy who reviles me—I could bear that;it is not my foe who boasts against me—for then I could hide;
כִּי ki לֹא lo אוֹיֵב oyev יְחָרְפֵנִי yecharfeni וְאֶשָּׂא veesa לֹא lo מְשַׂנְאִי mesani עָלַי alay הִגְדִּיל higdil וְאֶסָּתֵר veesater מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu
14
but it is you, my equal,my companion, my friend;
וְאַתָּה veatah אֱנוֹשׁ enosh כְּעֶרְכִּי keerki אַלּוּפִי alufi וּמְיֻדָּעִי umyudai
15
sweet was our fellowship;we walked together in God’s house.
אֲשֶׁר asher יַחְדָּו yachdav נַמְתִּיק namtik סוֹד sod בְּבֵית beveyt אֱלֹהִים Elohim נְהַלֵּךְ nehalekh בְּרָגֶשׁ beragesh
16
Let [God] incite death against them;may they go down alive into Sheol!For where they dwell,there evil is.
(ישימות) yshymvt [יַשִּׁי yashi מָוֶת] mavet עָלֵימוֹ aleymo יֵרְדוּ yerdu שְׁאוֹל sheol חַיִּים chayim כִּי ki רָעוֹת raot בִּמְגוּרָם bimguram בְּקִרְבָּם bekirbam
17
As for me, I call to God; GOD will deliver me.
אֲנִי ani אֶל El אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֶקְרָא ekra וַיהֹוָה vayhovah יוֹשִׁיעֵנִי yoshieni
18
Evening, morning, and noon,I complain and moan,and my voice is heard.
עֶרֶב erev וָבֹקֶר vavoker וְצהֳרַיִם vetzhorayim אָשִׂיחָה asichah וְאֶהֱמֶה veehemeh וַיִּשְׁמַע vayishma קוֹלִי koli
19
[God] redeems me unharmedfrom the battle against me;it is as though many are on my side.
פָּדָה padah בְשָׁלוֹם veshalom נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִקְּרב mikrv לִי li כִּי ki בְרַבִּים verabim הָיוּ hayu עִמָּדִי imadi
20
God who has reigned from the first,who will have no successor,hears and humbles those who show no reverence. Selah.
יִשְׁמַע yishma אֵל El וְיַעֲנֵם veyaanem וְיֹשֵׁב veyoshev קֶדֶם kedem סֶלָה selah אֲשֶׁר asher אֵין eyn חֲלִיפוֹת chalifot לָמוֹ lamo וְלֹא velo יָרְאוּ yaru אֱלֹהִים Elohim
21
My companion caused harm to alliesand broke a pact—
שָׁלַח shalach יָדָיו yadayv בִּשְׁלֹמָיו bishlomayv חִלֵּל chilel בְּרִיתוֹ berito
22
with talk smoother than butter,yet with a mind set on war;with words that were softer than oil,yet in fact were drawn swords.
חָלְקוּ chalku מַחְמָאֹת machmaot פִּיו piv וּקְרָב ukrav לִבּוֹ libo רַכּוּ raku דְבָרָיו devarayv מִשֶּׁמֶן mishemen וְהֵמָּה vehemah פְתִחוֹת fetichot
23
Cast your burden on GOD and you will be sustained;the righteous will never be allowed to collapse.
הַשְׁלֵךְ hashlekh עַל al יְהֹוָה Adonai יְהָבְךָ yehavkha וְהוּא vehu יְכַלְכְּלֶךָ yekhalklekha לֹא lo יִתֵּן yiten לְעוֹלָם leolam מוֹט mot לַצַּדִּיק latzadik
24
For You, O God, will bring them down to the nethermost Pit—those treacherous murderers;they shall not live out half their days—but I trust in You.
וְאַתָּה veatah אֱלֹהִים Elohim תּוֹרִדֵםלִבְאֵר toridemliver שַׁחַת shachat אַנְשֵׁי anshey דָמִים damim וּמִרְמָה umirmah לֹא lo יֶחֱצוּ yechetzu יְמֵיהֶם yemeyhem וַאֲנִי vaani אֶבְטַח evtach בָּךְ bakh

Psalm 56

1
For the leader; on yonath elem reḥokim. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Of David. A michtam; when the Philistines seized him in Gath.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al יוֹנַת yonat אֵלֶם elem רְחֹקִים rechokim לְדָוִד ledavid מִכְתָּם mikhtam בֶּאֱחֹז beechoz אוֹתוֹ oto פְלִשְׁתִּים felishtim בְּגַת begat
2
Have mercy on me, O God,for people persecute me;all day long my adversary oppresses me.
חנֵּנִי chneni אֱלֹהִים Elohim כִּי ki שְׁאָפַנִי sheafani אֱנוֹשׁ enosh כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom לֹחֵם lochem יִלְחָצֵנִי yilchatzeni
3
My watchful foes persecute me all day long;many are my adversaries, O Exalted One.
שָׁאֲפוּ shaafu שׁוֹרְרַי shoreray כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom כִּי ki רַבִּים rabim לֹחֲמִים lochamim לִי li מָרוֹם marom
4
When I am afraid, I trust in You,
יוֹם yom אִירָא ira אֲנִי ani אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֶבְטָח evtach
5
in God, whose word I praise,in God I trust;I am not afraid;what can mortals do to me?
בֵּאלֹהִים belohim אֲהַלֵּל ahalel דְּבָרוֹ devaro בֵּאלֹהִים belohim בָּטַחְתִּי batachti לֹא lo אִירָא ira מַה mah יַּעֲשֶׂה yaaseh בָשָׂר vasar לִי li
6
All day long they cause me grief in my affairs, they plan only evil against me.
כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom דְּבָרַי devaray יְעַצֵּבוּ yeatzevu עָלַי alay כּל kl מַחְשְׁבֹתָם machshvotam לָרָע lara
7
They plot, they lie in ambush;they watch my every move, hoping for my death.
יָגוּרוּ yaguru (יצפינו) ytzfynv [יִצְפּוֹנוּ] yitzponu הֵמָּה hemah עֲקֵבַי akevay יִשְׁמֹרוּ yishmoru כַּאֲשֶׁר kaasher קִוּוּ kiuu נַפְשִׁי nafshi
8
Cast them out for their evil;subdue peoples in Your anger, O God.
עַל al אָוֶן aven פַּלֶּט palet לָמוֹ lamo בְּאַף beaf עַמִּים amim הוֹרֵד hored אֱלֹהִים Elohim
9
You keep count of my wanderings;put my tears into Your flask,into Your record.
נֹדִי nodi סָפַרְתָּה safartah אָתָּה atah שִׂימָה simah דִמְעָתִי dimati בְנֹאדֶךָ venodekha הֲלֹא halo בְּסִפְרָתֶךָ besifratekha
10
Then my enemies will retreat when I call on You;this I know, that God is for me.
אָז az יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu אוֹיְבַי oyvay אָחוֹר achor בְּיוֹם beyom אֶקְרָא ekra זֶה zeh יָדַעְתִּי yadati כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim לִי li
11
In God, whose word I praise,in GOD, whose word I praise,
בֵּאלֹהִים belohim אֲהַלֵּל ahalel דָּבָר davar בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah אֲהַלֵּל ahalel דָּבָר davar
12
in God I trust;I am not afraid;what can mere humans do to me?
בֵּאלֹהִים belohim בָּטַחְתִּי batachti לֹּא lo אִירָא ira מַה mah יַּעֲשֶׂה yaaseh אָדָם adam לִי li
13
I must pay my vows to You, O God;I will render thank offerings to You.
עָלַי alay אֱלֹהִים Elohim נְדָרֶיךָ nedareykha אֲשַׁלֵּם ashalem תּוֹדֹת todot לָךְ lakh
14
For You have saved me from death,my foot from stumbling,that I may walk before God in the light of life.
כִּי ki הִצַּלְתָּ hitzalta נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִמָּוֶת mimavet הֲלֹא halo רַגְלַי raglay מִדֶּחִי midechi לְהִתְהַלֵּךְ lehithalekh לִפְנֵי lifney אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּאוֹר beor הַחַיִּים hachayim

Psalm 57

1
For the leader; al tashḥeth. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Of David. A michtam; when he fled from Saul into a cave.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach אַל El תַּשְׁחֵת tashchet לְדָוִד ledavid מִכְתָּם mikhtam בְּברְחוֹ bevrcho מִפְּנֵי mipney שָׁאוּל shaul בַּמְּעָרָה bamarah
2
Have mercy on me, O God, have mercy on me,for I seek refuge in You,I seek refuge in the shadow of Your wings,until danger passes.
חנֵּנִי chneni אֱלֹהִים Elohim חנֵּנִי chneni כִּי ki בְךָ vekha חָסָיָה chasayah נַפְשִׁי nafshi וּבְצֵל uvtzel כְּנָפֶיךָ kenafeykha אֶחְסֶה echseh עַד ad יַעֲבֹר yaavor הַוּוֹת hauot
3
I call to God Most High,to God who is good to me,
אֶקְרָא ekra לֵאלֹהִים lelohim עֶלְיוֹן elyon לָאֵל lael גֹּמֵר gomer עָלָי alay
4
who will reach down from heaven and deliver me—sending down steadfast love;my persecutor reviles. Selah.
יִשְׁלַח yishlach מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim וְיוֹשִׁיעֵנִי veyoshieni חֵרֵף cheref שֹׁאֲפִי shoafi סֶלָה selah יִשְׁלַח yishlach אֱלֹהִים Elohim חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וַאֲמִתּוֹ vaamito
5
As for me, I lie down among lions who devour humans—whose teeth are spears and arrows,whose tongue is a sharp sword.
נַפְשִׁי nafshi בְּתוֹךְ betokh לְבָאִם levaim אֶשְׁכְּבָה eshkvah לֹהֲטִים lohatim בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam שִׁנֵּיהֶם shineyhem חֲנִית chanit וְחִצִּים vechitzim וּלְשׁוֹנָם ulshonam חֶרֶב cherev חַדָּה chadah
6
Exalt Yourself over the heavens, O God,let Your glory be over all the earth!
רוּמָה rumah עַל al הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim אֱלֹהִים Elohim עַל al כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz כְּבוֹדֶךָ kevodekha
7
They prepared a net for my feet to ensnare me;, a wicker basket used in fishing. they dug a pit for me,but they fell into it. Selah.
רֶשֶׁת reshet הֵכִינוּ hekhinu לִפְעָמַי lifamay כָּפַף kafaf נַפְשִׁי nafshi כָּרוּ karu לְפָנַי lefanay שִׁיחָה shichah נָפְלוּ naflu בְתוֹכָהּ vetokhah סֶלָה selah
8
My heart is firm, O God;my heart is firm;I will sing, I will chant a hymn.
נָכוֹן nakhon לִבִּי libi אֱלֹהִים Elohim נָכוֹן nakhon לִבִּי libi אָשִׁירָה ashirah וַאֲזַמֵּרָה vaazamerah
9
Awake, O my soul!Awake, O harp and lyre!I will wake the dawn.
עוּרָה urah כְבוֹדִי khevodi עוּרָה urah הַנֵּבֶל hanevel וְכִנּוֹר vekhinor אָעִירָה airah שָּׁחַר shachar
10
I will praise You among the peoples, O my Sovereign;I will sing a hymn to You among the nations—
אוֹדְךָ odkha בָעַמִּיםאֲדֹנָי vaamimadonay אֲזַמֶּרְךָ azamerkha בַּלְאֻמִּים balumim
11
for Your faithfulness is as high as heaven;Your steadfastness reaches to the sky.
כִּי ki גָדֹל gadol עַד ad שָׁמַיִם shamayim חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha וְעַד vead שְׁחָקִים shechakim אֲמִתֶּךָ amitekha
12
Exalt Yourself over the heavens, O God,let Your glory be over all the earth!
רוּמָה rumah עַל al שָׁמַיִם shamayim אֱלֹהִים Elohim עַל al כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz כְּבוֹדֶךָ kevodekha

Psalm 58

1
For the leader; al tashḥeth. Of David. A michtam.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach אַל El תַּשְׁחֵת tashchet לְדָוִד ledavid מִכְתָּם mikhtam
2
O mighty ones, do you really decree what is just?Do you judge humankind with equity?
הַאֻמְנָם haumnam אֵלֶם elem צֶדֶק tzedek תְּדַבֵּרוּן tedaberun מֵישָׁרִים meysharim תִּשְׁפְּטוּ tishptu בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam
3
In your minds you devise wrongdoing in the land;with your hands you deal out lawlessness.
אַף af בְּלֵב belev עוֹלֹת olot תִּפְעָלוּן tifalun בָּאָרֶץ baaretz חֲמַס chamas יְדֵיכֶם yedeykhem תְּפַלֵּסוּן tefalesun
4
The wicked are defiant from birth;the liars go astray from the womb.
זֹרוּ zoru רְשָׁעִים reshaim מֵרָחֶם merachem תָּעוּ tau מִבֶּטֶן mibeten דֹּבְרֵי dovrey כָזָב khazav
5
Their venom is like that of a snake,a deaf viper that stops its ears
חֲמַת chamat לָמוֹ lamo כִּדְמוּת kidmut חֲמַת chamat נָחָשׁ nachash כְּמוֹ kemo פֶתֶן feten חֵרֵשׁ cheresh יַאְטֵם yatem אזְנוֹ zno
6
so as not to hear the voice of charmersor the expert mutterer of spells.
אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo יִשְׁמַע yishma לְקוֹל lekol מְלַחֲשִׁים melachashim חוֹבֵר chover חֲבָרִים chavarim מְחֻכָּם mechukam
7
O God, smash their teeth in their mouth;shatter the fangs of lions, O ETERNAL One;
אֱלֹהִים Elohim הֲרס hars שִׁנֵּימוֹ shineymo בְּפִימוֹ befimo מַלְתְּעוֹת maltot כְּפִירִים kefirim נְתֹץיְהֹוָה netotzyhovah
8
let them melt, let them vanish like water—aim Your arrows that they be cut down—
יִמָּאֲסוּ yimaasu כְמוֹ khemo מַיִם mayim יִתְהַלְּכוּ yithalkhu לָמוֹ lamo יִדְרֹךְ yidrokh חִצָּו chitzav כְּמוֹ kemo יִתְמֹלָלוּ yitmolalu
9
like a snail that melts away as it moves; like a woman’s stillbirth—may they never see the sun!
כְּמוֹ kemo שַׁבְּלוּל shablul תֶּמֶס temes יַהֲלֹךְ yahalokh נֵפֶל nefel אֵשֶׁת eshet בַּל bal חָזוּ chazu שָׁמֶשׁ shamesh
10
Before the thorns grow into a bramble,whirl them away alive in fury.
בְּטֶרֶם beterem יָבִינוּ yavinu סִּירֹתֵכֶם sirotekhem אָטָד atad כְּמוֹ kemo חַי chay כְּמוֹ kemo חָרוֹן charon יִשְׂעָרֶנּוּ yisarenu
11
The righteous will rejoice when they see revenge;they will bathe their feet in the blood of the wicked.
יִשְׂמַח yismach צַדִּיק tzadik כִּי ki חָזָה chazah נָקָם nakam פְּעָמָיו peamayv יִרְחַץ yirchatz בְּדַם bedam הָרָשָׁע harasha
12
People will say,“There is, then, a reward for the righteous;there is, indeed, divine justice on earth.”
וְיֹאמַר veyomar אָדָם adam אַךְ akh פְּרִי peri לַצַּדִּיק latzadik אַךְ akh יֵשׁ yesh אֱלֹהִים Elohim שֹׁפְטִים shoftim בָּאָרֶץ baaretz

Psalm 59

1
For the leader; al tashḥeth. Of David. A michtam; when Saul sent men to watch his house in order to put him to death.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach אַל El תַּשְׁחֵת tashchet לְדָוִד ledavid מִכְתָּם mikhtam בִּשְׁלֹחַ bishloach שָׁאוּל shaul וַיִּשְׁמְרוּ vayishmru אֶת et הַבַּיִת habayit לַהֲמִיתוֹ lahamito
2
Save me from my enemies, O my God;secure me against my assailants.
הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni מֵאֹיְבַיאֱלֹהָי meoyvayelohay מִמִּתְקוֹמְמַי mimitkomemay תְּשַׂגְּבֵנִי tesagveni
3
Save me from evildoers;deliver me from murderers.
הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni מִפֹּעֲלֵי mipoaley אָוֶן aven וּמֵאַנְשֵׁי umeanshey דָמִים damim הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni
4
For see, they lie in wait for me;fierce people plot against mefor no offense of mine,for no transgression, O ETERNAL One;
כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh אָרְבוּ arvu לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi יָגוּרוּ yaguru עָלַי alay עַזִּים azim לֹא lo פִשְׁעִי fishi וְלֹא velo חַטָּאתִי chatati יְהֹוָה Adonai
5
for no guilt of minedo they rush to array themselves against me.Look, rouse Yourself in my behalf!
בְּלִי beli עָוֺן avon יְרֻצוּן yerutzun וְיִכּוֹנָנוּ veyikonanu עוּרָה urah לִקְרָאתִי likrati וּרְאֵה ureh
6
You, O ETERNAL One, God of hosts,God of Israel,bestir Yourself to bring all nations to account;have no mercy on any treacherous villain. Selah.
וְאַתָּה veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהִיםצְבָאוֹת elohimtzvaot אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael הָקִיצָה hakitzah לִפְקֹד lifkod כּל kl הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim אַל El תָּחֹן tachon כּל kl בֹּגְדֵי bogdey אָוֶן aven סֶלָה selah
7
They come each evening growling like dogs,roaming the city.
יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu לָעֶרֶב laerev יֶהֱמוּ yehemu כַכָּלֶב khakalev וִיסוֹבְבוּ visovevu עִיר ir
8
They rave with their mouths,sharp words are on their lips;[they think,] “Who hears?”
הִנֵּה hineh יַבִּיעוּן yabiun בְּפִיהֶם befihem חֲרָבוֹת charavot בְּשִׂפְתוֹתֵיהֶם besiftoteyhem כִּי ki מִי mi שֹׁמֵעַ shomea
9
But You, O ETERNAL One, laugh at them;You mock all the nations.
וְאַתָּה veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai תִּשְׂחַק tischak לָמוֹ lamo תִּלְעַג tilag לְכל lekhl גּוֹיִם goyim
10
O my strength, I wait for You;for God is my haven.
עֻזּוֹ uzo אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֶשְׁמֹרָה eshmorah כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim מִשְׂגַּבִּי misgabi
11
My faithful God will come to aid me;God will let me gloat over my watchful foes.
אֱלֹהֵי elohey (חסדו) chsdv [חַסְדִּי] chasdi יְקַדְּמֵנִי yekadmeni אֱלֹהִים Elohim יַרְאֵנִי yareni בְשֹׁרְרָי veshoreray
12
Do not kill them lest my people be unmindful;with Your power make wanderers of them;bring them low, O our shield, my Sovereign,
אַל El תַּהַרְגֵם tahargem פֶּן pen יִשְׁכְּחוּ yishkchu עַמִּי ami הֲנִיעֵמוֹ haniemo בְחֵילְךָ vecheylkha וְהוֹרִידֵמוֹ vehoridemo מָגִנֵּנוּ maginenu אֲדֹנָי Adonai
13
because of their sinful mouths,the words on their lips.Let them be trapped by their pride,and by the imprecations and lies they utter.
חַטַּאת chatat פִּימוֹ pimo דְּבַר devar שְׂפָתֵימוֹ sefateymo וְיִלָּכְדוּ veyilakhdu בִגְאוֹנָם vigonam וּמֵאָלָה umealah וּמִכַּחַשׁ umikachash יְסַפֵּרוּ yesaperu
14
In Your fury put an end to them;put an end to them that they be no more;that it may be known to the ends of the earththat God does rule over Jacob. Selah.
כַּלֵּה kaleh בְחֵמָה vechemah כַּלֵּה kaleh וְאֵינֵמוֹ veeynemo וְיֵדְעוּ veyedu כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim מֹשֵׁל moshel בְּיַעֲקֹב beyaakov לְאַפְסֵי leafsey הָאָרֶץ haaretz סֶלָה selah
15
They come each evening growling like dogs,roaming the city.
וְיָשֻׁבוּ veyashuvu לָעֶרֶב laerev יֶהֱמוּ yehemu כַכָּלֶב khakalev וִיסוֹבְבוּ visovevu עִיר ir
16
They wander in search of food;and whine if they are not satisfied.
הֵמָּה hemah (ינועון) ynvvn [יְנִיעוּן] yeniun לֶאֱכֹל leekhol אִם im לֹא lo יִשְׂבְּעוּ yisbu וַיָּלִינוּ vayalinu
17
But I will sing of Your strength,extol each morning Your faithfulness;for You have been my haven,a refuge in time of trouble.
וַאֲנִי vaani אָשִׁיר ashir עֻזֶּךָ uzekha וַאֲרַנֵּן vaaranen לַבֹּקֶר laboker חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha כִּי ki הָיִיתָ hayita מִשְׂגָּב misgav לִי li וּמָנוֹס umanos בְּיוֹם beyom צַר tzar לִי li
18
O my strength, to You I sing hymns;for God is my haven, my faithful God.
עֻזִּי uzi אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֲזַמֵּרָה azamerah כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim מִשְׂגַּבִּי misgabi אֱלֹהֵי elohey חַסְדִּי chasdi

Psalm 60

1
For the leader; on shushan eduth. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A michtam of David (to be taught),
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al שׁוּשַׁן shushan עֵדוּת edut מִכְתָּם mikhtam לְדָוִד ledavid לְלַמֵּד lelamed
2
when he fought with Aram-naharaim and Aram-zobah, and Joab returned and defeated Edom—[an army] of twelve thousand men—in the Valley of Salt.
בְּהַצּוֹתוֹ behatzoto אֶת et אֲרַם aram נַהֲרַיִם naharayim וְאֶת veet אֲרַם aram צוֹבָה tzovah וַיָּשׁב vayashv יוֹאָב yoav וַיַּךְ vayakh אֶת et אֱדוֹם edom בְּגֵיא begey מֶלַח melach שְׁנֵים sheneym עָשָׂר asar אָלֶף alef
3
O God, You have rejected us,You have made a breach in us;You have been angry;restore us!
אֱלֹהִים Elohim זְנַחְתָּנוּ zenachtanu פְרַצְתָּנוּ feratztanu אָנַפְתָּ anafta תְּשׁוֹבֵב teshovev לָנוּ lanu
4
You have made the land quake;You have torn it open.Mend its fissures,for it is collapsing.
הִרְעַשְׁתָּה hirashtah אֶרֶץ eretz פְּצַמְתָּהּ petzamtah רְפָה refah שְׁבָרֶיהָ shevareyha כִי khi מָטָה matah
5
You have made Your people suffer hardship;You have given us wine that makes us reel.
הִרְאִיתָ hirita עַמְּךָ amkha קָשָׁה kashah הִשְׁקִיתָנוּ hishkitanu יַיִן yayin תַּרְעֵלָה tarelah
6
Give those who fear You because of Your trutha banner for rallying. Selah.
נָתַתָּה natatah לִּירֵאֶיךָ lireeykha נֵּס nes לְהִתְנוֹסֵס lehitnoses מִפְּנֵי mipney קֹשֶׁט koshet סֶלָה selah
7
That those whom You love might be rescued,deliver with Your right hand and answer me.
לְמַעַן lemaan יֵחָלְצוּן yechaltzun יְדִידֶיךָ yedideykha הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah יְמִינְךָ yeminkha (ועננו) vnnv [וַעֲנֵנִי] vaaneni
8
God promised in the sanctuary that I would exultingly divide up Shechem,and measure the Valley of Sukkoth;
אֱלֹהִים Elohim דִּבֶּר diber בְּקדְשׁוֹ bekdsho אֶעְלֹזָה elozah אֲחַלְּקָה achalkah שְׁכֶם shekhem וְעֵמֶק veemek סֻכּוֹת sukot אֲמַדֵּד amaded
9
Gilead and Manasseh would be mine,Ephraim my chief stronghold,Judah my scepter;
לִי li גִלְעָד gilad וְלִי veli מְנַשֶּׁה menasheh וְאֶפְרַיִם veefrayim מָעוֹז maoz רֹאשִׁי roshi יְהוּדָה yehudah מְחֹקְקִי mechokeki
10
Moab would be my washbasin;on Edom I would cast my shoe;acclaim me, O Philistia!
מוֹאָב moav סִיר sir רַחְצִי rachtzi עַל al אֱדוֹם edom אַשְׁלִיךְ ashlikh נַעֲלִי naali עָלַי alay פְּלֶשֶׁת peleshet הִתְרוֹעָעִי hitroai
11
Would that I were brought to the bastion!Would that I were led to Edom!
מִי mi יֹבִלֵנִי yovileni עִיר ir מָצוֹר matzor מִי mi נָחַנִי nachani עַד ad אֱדוֹם edom
12
But You have rejected us, O God;God, You do not march with our armies.
הֲלֹא halo אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהִים Elohim זְנַחְתָּנוּ zenachtanu וְלֹא velo תֵצֵא tetze אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּצִבְאוֹתֵינוּ betzivoteynu
13
Grant us Your aid against the foe,for human help is worthless.
הָבָה havah לָּנוּ lanu עֶזְרָת ezrat מִצָּר mitzar וְשָׁוְא veshav תְּשׁוּעַת teshuat אָדָם adam
14
We shall triumph with God,who will trample our foes.
בֵּאלֹהִים belohim נַעֲשֶׂה naaseh חָיִל chayil וְהוּא vehu יָבוּס yavus צָרֵינוּ tzareynu

Psalm 61

1
For the leader; with instrumental music. Of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַעַל lamnatzechaal נְגִינַת neginat לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Hear my cry, O God,heed my prayer.
שִׁמְעָה shimah אֱלֹהִים Elohim רִנָּתִי rinati הַקְשִׁיבָה hakshivah תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati
3
From the end of the earth I call to You;when my heart is faint,You lead me to a rock that is high above me.
מִקְצֵה miktzeh הָאָרֶץ haaretz אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֶקְרָא ekra בַּעֲטֹף baatof לִבִּי libi בְּצוּר betzur יָרוּם yarum מִמֶּנִּי mimeni תַנְחֵנִי tancheni
4
For You have been my refuge,a tower of strength against the enemy.
כִּי ki הָיִיתָ hayita מַחְסֶה machseh לִי li מִגְדַּל migdal עֹז oz מִפְּנֵי mipney אוֹיֵב oyev
5
O that I might dwell in Your tent forever,take refuge under Your protecting wings. Selah.
אָגוּרָה agurah בְאהלְךָ vehlkha עוֹלָמִים olamim אֶחֱסֶה echeseh בְסֵתֶר veseter כְּנָפֶיךָ kenafeykha סֶּלָה selah
6
O God, You have heard my vows;grant the request as an alternate form of ʼrsht; cf. Ps. 21.3. of those who fear Your name.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהִים Elohim שָׁמַעְתָּ shamata לִנְדָרָי lindaray נָתַתָּ natata יְרֻשַּׁת yerushat יִרְאֵי yirey שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
7
Add days to the days of the king;may his years extend through generations;
יָמִים yamim עַל al יְמֵי yemey מֶלֶךְ melekh תּוֹסִיף tosif שְׁנוֹתָיו shenotayv כְּמוֹ kemo דֹר dor וָדֹר vador
8
may he dwell in God’s presence forever;appoint steadfast love to guard him.
יֵשֵׁב yeshev עוֹלָם olam לִפְנֵי lifney אֱלֹהִים Elohim חֶסֶד chesed וֶאֱמֶת veemet מַן man יִנְצְרֻהוּ yintzruhu
9
So I will sing hymns to Your name forever,as I fulfill my vows day after day.
כֵּן ken אֲזַמְּרָה azamrah שִׁמְךָ shimkha לָעַד laad לְשַׁלְּמִי leshalmi נְדָרַי nedaray יוֹםיוֹם yomyom

Psalm 62

1
For the leader; on Jeduthun. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al יְדוּתוּן yedutun מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Truly my soul waits quietly for God,from whom my deliverance comes.
אַךְ akh אֶל El אֱלֹהִים Elohim דּוּמִיָּה dumiah נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu יְשׁוּעָתִי yeshuati
3
Truly [God] is my rock and deliverance,my haven; I shall never be shaken.
אַךְ akh הוּא hu צוּרִי tzuri וִישׁוּעָתִי vishuati מִשְׂגַּבִּי misgabi לֹא lo אֶמּוֹט emot רַבָּה rabah
4
How long will all of you attack someone,to crush them, as though they werea leaning wall, a tottering fence?
עַד ad אָנָה anah תְּהוֹתְתוּ tehotetu עַל al אִישׁ ish תְּרָצְּחוּ teratzchu כֻלְּכֶם khulkhem כְּקִיר kekir נָטוּי natuy גָּדֵר gader הַדְּחוּיָה hadchuyah
5
You lay plans to topple them from their status;you delight in falsehood;you bless with your mouths,while inwardly you curse. Selah.
אַךְ akh מִשְּׂאֵתוֹ miseto יָעֲצוּ yaatzu לְהַדִּיחַ lehadiach יִרְצוּ yirtzu כָזָב khazav בְּפִיו befiv יְבָרֵכוּ yevarekhu וּבְקִרְבָּם uvkirbam יְקַלְלוּ yekalelu סֶלָה selah
6
Truly, wait quietly for God, O my soul,from whom comes my hope.
אַךְ akh לֵאלֹהִים lelohim דּוֹמִּי domi נַפְשִׁי nafshi כִּי ki מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu תִּקְוָתִי tikvati
7
[God] is my rock and deliverance,my haven; I shall not be shaken.
אַךְ akh הוּא hu צוּרִי tzuri וִישׁוּעָתִי vishuati מִשְׂגַּבִּי misgabi לֹא lo אֶמּוֹט emot
8
I rely on God, my deliverance and glory,my rock of strength;in God is my refuge.
עַל al אֱלֹהִים Elohim יִשְׁעִי yishi וּכְבוֹדִי ukhvodi צוּר tzur עֻזִּי uzi מַחְסִי machsi בֵּאלֹהִים belohim
9
Trust in [God] at all times, O people;pour out your hearts before the Holy One;God is our refuge. Selah.
בִּטְחוּ bitchu בוֹ vo בְכל vekhl עֵת et עָם am שִׁפְכוּ shifkhu לְפָנָיו lefanayv לְבַבְכֶם levavkhem אֱלֹהִים Elohim מַחֲסֶה machaseh לָּנוּ lanu סֶלָה selah
10
Humans are mere breath;mortals, an illusion—placed on a scale all together,they weigh even less than a breath.
אַךְ akh הֶבֶל hevel בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam כָּזָב kazav בְּנֵי beney אִישׁ ish בְּמֹאזְנַיִם bemoznayim לַעֲלוֹת laalot הֵמָּה hemah מֵהֶבֶל mehevel יָחַד yachad
11
Do not trust in violence,or put false hopes in robbery;if force bears fruit pay it no mind.
אַל El תִּבְטְחוּ tivtchu בְעֹשֶׁק veoshek וּבְגָזֵל uvgazel אַל El תֶּהְבָּלוּ tehbalu חַיִל chayil כִּי ki יָנוּב yanuv אַל El תָּשִׁיתוּ tashitu לֵב lev
12
One thing God has spoken;two things have I heard:that might belongs to God,
אַחַת achat דִּבֶּר diber אֱלֹהִים Elohim שְׁתַּיִם shetayim זוּ zu שָׁמָעְתִּי shamati כִּי ki עֹז oz לֵאלֹהִים lelohim
13
and faithfulness is Yours, O my Sovereign,to reward everyone according to their deeds.
וּלְךָ ulkha אֲדֹנָי Adonai חָסֶד chased כִּי ki אַתָּה atah תְשַׁלֵּם teshalem לְאִישׁ leish כְּמַעֲשֵׂהוּ kemaasehu

Psalm 63

1
A psalm of David, when he was in the Wilderness of Judah.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid בִּהְיוֹתוֹ bihyoto בְּמִדְבַּר bemidbar יְהוּדָה yehudah
2
God, You are my God;I search for You,my soul thirsts for You,my body yearns for You,as a parched and thirsty land that has no water.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֵלִי eli אַתָּה atah אֲשַׁחֲרֶךָּ ashachareka צָמְאָה tzamah לְךָ lekha נַפְשִׁי nafshi כָּמַהּ kamah לְךָ lekha בְשָׂרִי vesari בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz צִיָּה tziah וְעָיֵף veayef בְּלִי beli מָיִם mayim
3
I shall behold You in the sanctuary,and see Your might and glory,
כֵּן ken בַּקֹּדֶשׁ bakodesh חֲזִיתִךָ chazitikha לִרְאוֹת lirot עֻזְּךָ uzkha וּכְבוֹדֶךָ ukhvodekha
4
Truly Your faithfulness is better than life;my lips declare Your praise.
כִּי ki טוֹב tov חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha מֵחַיִּים mechayim שְׂפָתַי sefatay יְשַׁבְּחוּנְךָ yeshabchunkha
5
I bless You all my life;I lift up my hands, invoking Your name.
כֵּן ken אֲבָרֶכְךָ avarekhkha בְחַיָּי vechayay בְּשִׁמְךָ beshimkha אֶשָּׂא esa כַפָּי khapay
6
I am sated as with a rich feast, I sing praises with joyful lips
כְּמוֹ kemo חֵלֶב chelev וָדֶשֶׁן vadeshen תִּשְׂבַּע tisba נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְשִׂפְתֵי vesiftey רְנָנוֹת renanot יְהַלֶּל yehalel פִּי pi
7
when I call You to mind upon my bed,when I think of You in the watches of the night—
אִם im זְכַרְתִּיךָ zekhartikha עַל al יְצוּעָי yetzuay בְּאַשְׁמֻרוֹת beashmurot אֶהְגֶּה ehgeh בָּךְ bakh
8
for You are my help,and in the shadow of Your wingsI shout for joy.
כִּי ki הָיִיתָ hayita עֶזְרָתָה ezratah לִּי li וּבְצֵל uvtzel כְּנָפֶיךָ kenafeykha אֲרַנֵּן aranen
9
My soul is attached to You;Your right hand supports me.
דָּבְקָה davkah נַפְשִׁי nafshi אַחֲרֶיךָ achareykha בִּי bi תָּמְכָה tamkhah יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
10
May those who seek to destroy my lifeenter the depths of the earth.
וְהֵמָּה vehemah לְשׁוֹאָה leshoah יְבַקְשׁוּ yevakshu נַפְשִׁי nafshi יָבֹאוּ yavou בְּתַחְתִּיּוֹת betachtiot הָאָרֶץ haaretz
11
May they be gutted by the sword;may they be prey to jackals.
יַגִּירֻהוּ yagiruhu עַל al יְדֵי yedey חָרֶב charev מְנָת menat שֻׁעָלִים shualim יִהְיוּ yihyu
12
But the king shall rejoice in God;all who swear by [God] shall exult,when the mouth of liars is stopped.
וְהַמֶּלֶךְ vehamelekh יִשְׂמַח yismach בֵּאלֹהִים belohim יִתְהַלֵּל yithalel כּל kl הַנִּשְׁבָּע hanishba בּוֹ bo כִּי ki יִסָּכֵר yisakher פִּי pi דוֹבְרֵי dovrey שָׁקֶר shaker

Psalm 64

1
For the leader. A psalm of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Hear my voice, O God, when I plead;guard my life from the enemy’s terror.
שְׁמַע shema אֱלֹהִים Elohim קוֹלִי koli בְשִׂיחִי vesichi מִפַּחַד mipachad אוֹיֵב oyev תִּצֹּר titzor חַיָּי chayay
3
Hide me from a band of evildoers,from a crowd of wrongdoers,
תַּסְתִּירֵנִי tastireni מִסּוֹד misod מְרֵעִים mereim מֵרִגְשַׁת merigshat פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven
4
who whet their tongues like swords;they aim their arrows—cruel words—
אֲשֶׁר asher שָׁנְנוּ shanenu כַחֶרֶב khacherev לְשׁוֹנָם leshonam דָּרְכוּ darkhu חִצָּם chitzam דָּבָר davar מָר mar
5
to shoot from hiding at someone blameless,shooting suddenly and without fear.
לִירֹת lirot בַּמִּסְתָּרִים bamistarim תָּם tam פִּתְאֹם pitom יֹרֻהוּ yoruhu וְלֹא velo יִירָאוּ yirau
6
They arm themselves with an evil word;when they speak, it is to conceal traps; they think, “Who will see them?”
יְחַזְּקוּ yechazku לָמוֹ lamo דָּבָר davar רָע ra יְסַפְּרוּ yesapru לִטְמוֹן litmon מוֹקְשִׁים mokshim אָמְרוּ amru מִי mi יִרְאֶה yireh לָּמוֹ lamo
7
Let the wrongdoings they have concealed, with some mss. (cf. Minḥat Shai) and Rashi; most printed editions tamnu, traditionally rendered “they have accomplished.” each one’s inner, secret thoughts,be wholly exposed.
יַחְפְּשׂוּ yachpsu עוֹלֹת olot תַּמְנוּ tamnu חֵפֶשׂ chefes מְחֻפָּשׂ mechupas וְקֶרֶב vekerev אִישׁ ish וְלֵב velev עָמֹק amok
8
God shall shoot them with arrows;they shall be struck down suddenly.
וַיֹּרֵם vayorem אֱלֹהִים Elohim חֵץ chetz פִּתְאוֹם pitom הָיוּ hayu מַכּוֹתָם makotam
9
Their tongue shall be their downfall;all who see them shall recoil in horror;
וַיַּכְשִׁילוּהוּ vayakhshiluhu עָלֵימוֹ aleymo לְשׁוֹנָם leshonam יִתְנֹדְדוּ yitnodedu כּל kl רֹאֵה roeh בָם vam
10
all people shall stand in awe;they shall proclaim the work of Godwhose deed they perceived.
וַיִּירְאוּ vayiru כּל kl אָדָם adam וַיַּגִּידוּ vayagidu פֹּעַל poal אֱלֹהִים Elohim וּמַעֲשֵׂהוּ umaasehu הִשְׂכִּילוּ hiskilu
11
In GOD shall the righteous rejoiceand take refuge;all the upright shall exult.
יִשְׂמַח yismach צַדִּיק tzadik בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah וְחָסָה vechasah בוֹ vo וְיִתְהַלְלוּ veyithalelu כּל kl יִשְׁרֵי yishrey לֵב lev

Psalm 65

1
For the leader. A psalm of David. A song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid שִׁיר shir
2
Praise befits You in Zion, O God;vows are paid to You;
לְךָ lekha דֻמִיָּה dumiah תְהִלָּה tehilah אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּצִיּוֹן betzion וּלְךָ ulkha יְשֻׁלַּם yeshulam נֶדֶר neder
3
all humankind comes to You,You who hear prayer.
שֹׁמֵעַ shomea תְּפִלָּה tefilah עָדֶיךָ adeykha כּל kl בָּשָׂר basar יָבֹאוּ yavou
4
When all manner of sins overwhelm me,it is You who forgive our iniquities.
דִּבְרֵי divrey עֲוֺנֹת avonot גָּבְרוּ gavru מֶנִּי meni פְּשָׁעֵינוּ peshaeynu אַתָּה atah תְכַפְּרֵם tekhaprem
5
Happy is the one You choose and bring nearto dwell in Your courts;may we be sated with the blessings of Your house,Your holy temple.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey תִּבְחַר tivchar וּתְקָרֵב utkarev יִשְׁכֹּן yishkon חֲצֵרֶיךָ chatzereykha נִשְׂבְּעָה nisbah בְּטוּב betuv בֵּיתֶךָ beytekha קְדֹשׁ kedosh הֵיכָלֶךָ heykhalekha
6
Answer us with victory through awesome deeds,O God, our deliverer,in whom all the ends of the earthand the distant seasput their trust;
נוֹרָאוֹת noraot בְּצֶדֶק betzedek תַּעֲנֵנוּ taanenu אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׁעֵנוּ yishenu מִבְטָח mivtach כּל kl קַצְוֵי katzvey אֶרֶץ eretz וְיָם veyam רְחֹקִים rechokim
7
who by divine power fixed the mountains firmly,who is girded with might,
מֵכִין mekhin הָרִים harim בְּכֹחוֹ bekhocho נֶאְזָר nezar בִּגְבוּרָה bigvurah
8
who stills the raging seas,the raging waves,and tumultuous peoples.
מַשְׁבִּיחַ mashbiach שְׁאוֹן sheon יַמִּים yamim שְׁאוֹן sheon גַּלֵּיהֶם galeyhem וַהֲמוֹן vahamon לְאֻמִּים leumim
9
Those who live at the ends of the earth are awed by Your signs;You make the lands of sunrise and sunset shout for joy.
וַיִּירְאוּ vayiru יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey קְצָוֺת ketzavot מֵאוֹתֹתֶיךָ meototeykha מוֹצָאֵי motzaey בֹקֶר voker וָעֶרֶב vaerev תַּרְנִין tarnin
10
You take care of the earth and irrigate it;You enrich it greatly,with the channel of God full of water;You provide grain for all; for so do You prepare it.
פָּקַדְתָּ pakadta הָאָרֶץ haaretz וַתְּשֹׁקְקֶהָ vatshokekeha רַבַּת rabat תַּעְשְׁרֶנָּה tashrenah פֶּלֶג peleg אֱלֹהִים Elohim מָלֵא male מָיִם mayim תָּכִין takhin דְּגָנָם deganam כִּי ki כֵן khen תְּכִינֶהָ tekhineha
11
Saturating its furrows,leveling its ridges,You soften it with showers,You bless its growth.
תְּלָמֶיהָ telameyha רַוֵּה raueh נַחֵת nachet גְּדוּדֶהָ gedudeha בִּרְבִיבִים birvivim תְּמֹגְגֶנָּה temogegenah צִמְחָהּ tzimchah תְּבָרֵךְ tevarekh
12
You crown the year with Your bounty;fatness is distilled in Your paths—
עִטַּרְתָּ itarta שְׁנַת shenat טוֹבָתֶךָ tovatekha וּמַעְגָּלֶיךָ umagaleykha יִרְעֲפוּן yirafun דָּשֶׁן dashen
13
the pasturelands distill it;the hills are girded with joy.
יִרְעֲפוּ yirafu נְאוֹת neot מִדְבָּר midbar וְגִיל vegil גְּבָעוֹת gevaot תַּחְגֹּרְנָה tachgornah
14
The meadows are clothed with flocks,the valleys mantled with grain;they raise a shout, they break into song.
לָבְשׁוּ lavshu כָרִים kharim הַצֹּאן hatzon וַעֲמָקִים vaamakim יַעַטְפוּ yaatfu בָר var יִתְרוֹעֲעוּ yitroau אַף af יָשִׁירוּ yashiru

Psalm 66

1
For the leader. A song. A psalm.Raise a shout for God, all the earth;
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach שִׁיר shir מִזְמוֹר mizmor הָרִיעוּ hariu לֵאלֹהִים lelohim כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
2
sing the glory of God’s name,make glorious God’s praise.
זַמְּרוּ zamru כְבוֹד khevod שְׁמוֹ shemo שִׂימוּ simu כָבוֹד khavod תְּהִלָּתוֹ tehilato
3
Say to God,“How awesome are Your deeds,Your enemies cower before Your great strength;
אִמְרוּ imru לֵאלֹהִים lelohim מַה mah נּוֹרָא nora מַעֲשֶׂיךָ maaseykha בְּרֹב berov עֻזְּךָ uzkha יְכַחֲשׁוּ yekhachashu לְךָ lekha אֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha
4
all the earth bows to You,and sings hymns to You;all sing hymns to Your name.” Selah.
כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz יִשְׁתַּחֲווּ yishtachavu לְךָ lekha וִיזַמְּרוּ vizamru לָךְ lakh יְזַמְּרוּ yezamru שִׁמְךָ shimkha סֶלָה selah
5
Come and see the works of God,who is held in awe by mortals for acts divine,
לְכוּ lekhu וּרְאוּ uru מִפְעֲלוֹת mifalot אֱלֹהִים Elohim נוֹרָא nora עֲלִילָה alilah עַל al בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam
6
and who turned the sea into dry land:Israel crossed the river on foot;we therefore rejoice in [God].
הָפַךְ hafakh יָם yam לְיַבָּשָׁה leyabashah בַּנָּהָר banahar יַעַבְרוּ yaavru בְרָגֶל veragel שָׁם sham נִשְׂמְחָה nismchah בּוֹ bo
7
[God] rules forever with divine might,eyes scanning the nations—not letting the rebellious assert themselves. Selah.
מֹשֵׁל moshel בִּגְבוּרָתוֹ bigvurato עוֹלָם olam עֵינָיו eynayv בַּגּוֹיִם bagoyim תִּצְפֶּינָה titzpeynah הַסּוֹרְרִים hasorerim אַל El [יָרוּמוּ] yarumu (ירימו) yrymv לָמוֹ lamo סֶלָה selah
8
O peoples, bless our God;celebrate with praises
בָּרְכוּ barkhu עַמִּיםאֱלֹהֵינוּ amimeloheynu וְהַשְׁמִיעוּ vehashmiu קוֹל kol תְּהִלָּתוֹ tehilato
9
the One who has granted us life,and has not let our feet slip.
הַשָּׂם hasam נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu בַּחַיִּים bachayim וְלֹא velo נָתַן natan לַמּוֹט lamot רַגְלֵנוּ raglenu
10
You have tried us, O God,refining us, as one refines silver.
כִּי ki בְחַנְתָּנוּ vechantanu אֱלֹהִים Elohim צְרַפְתָּנוּ tzeraftanu כִּצְרף kitzrf כָּסֶף kasef
11
You have caught us in a net,caught us in trammels.
הֲבֵאתָנוּ havetanu בַמְּצוּדָה vamtzudah שַׂמְתָּ samta מוּעָקָה muakah בְמתְנֵינוּ vemtneynu
12
You have let people ride over us;we have endured fire and water,and You have brought us through to prosperity.
הִרְכַּבְתָּ hirkavta אֱנוֹשׁ enosh לְרֹאשֵׁנוּ leroshenu בָּאנוּ banu בָאֵשׁ vaesh וּבַמַּיִם uvamayim וַתּוֹצִיאֵנוּ vatotzienu לָרְוָיָה larvayah
13
I enter Your house with burnt offerings,I pay my vows to You,
אָבוֹא avo בֵיתְךָ veytkha בְעוֹלוֹת veolot אֲשַׁלֵּם ashalem לְךָ lekha נְדָרָי nedaray
14
[vows] that my lips pronounced,that my mouth uttered in my distress.
אֲשֶׁר asher פָּצוּ patzu שְׂפָתָי sefatay וְדִבֶּר vediber פִּי pi בַּצַּר batzar לִי li
15
I offer up fatlings to You,with the odor of burning rams;I sacrifice bulls and he-goats. Selah.
עֹלוֹת olot מֵיחִים meychim אַעֲלֶה aaleh לָּךְ lakh עִם im קְטֹרֶת ketoret אֵילִים eylim אֶעֱשֶׂה eeseh בָקָר vakar עִם im עַתּוּדִים atudim סֶלָה selah
16
Come and hear, all you who fear God,as I tell what was done for me.
לְכוּ lekhu שִׁמְעוּ shimu וַאֲסַפְּרָה vaasaprah כּל kl יִרְאֵי yirey אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֲשֶׁר asher עָשָׂה asah לְנַפְשִׁי lenafshi
17
I called aloud to [God],glorification on my tongue.
אֵלָיו elayv פִּי pi קָרָאתִי karati וְרוֹמַם veromam תַּחַת tachat לְשׁוֹנִי leshoni
18
Had I an evil thought in my mind,my Sovereign would not have listened.
אָוֶן aven אִם im רָאִיתִי raiti בְלִבִּי velibi לֹא lo יִשְׁמַעאֲדֹנָי yishmaadonay
19
But God did listen—paying heed to my prayer.
אָכֵן akhen שָׁמַע shama אֱלֹהִים Elohim הִקְשִׁיב hikshiv בְּקוֹל bekol תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati
20
Blessed is God who has not turned away my prayer,or faithful care, from me.
בָּרוּךְ barukh אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo הֵסִיר hesir תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati וְחַסְדּוֹ vechasdo מֵאִתִּי meiti

Psalm 67

1
For the leader; with instrumental music. A psalm. A song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach בִּנְגִינֹת binginot מִזְמוֹר mizmor שִׁיר shir
2
May God be gracious to us and bless us,showing us favor, selah
אֱלֹהִים Elohim יְחנֵּנוּ yechnenu וִיבָרְכֵנוּ vivarkhenu יָאֵר yaer פָּנָיו panayv אִתָּנוּ itanu סֶלָה selah
3
that Your way be known on earth,Your deliverance among all nations.
לָדַעַת ladaat בָּאָרֶץ baaretz דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha בְּכל bekhl גּוֹיִם goyim יְשׁוּעָתֶךָ yeshuatekha
4
Peoples will praise You, O God;all peoples will praise You.
יוֹדוּךָ yodukha עַמִּיםאֱלֹהִים amimelohim יוֹדוּךָ yodukha עַמִּים amim כֻּלָּם kulam
5
Nations will exult and shout for joy,for You rule the peoples with equity,You guide the nations of the earth. Selah.
יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu וִירַנְּנוּ viranenu לְאֻמִּים leumim כִּי ki תִשְׁפֹּט tishpot עַמִּים amim מִישֹׁר mishor וּלְאֻמִּים ulumim בָּאָרֶץ baaretz תַּנְחֵם tanchem סֶלָה selah
6
The peoples will praise You, O God;all peoples will praise You.
יוֹדוּךָ yodukha עַמִּיםאֱלֹהִים amimelohim יוֹדוּךָ yodukha עַמִּים amim כֻּלָּם kulam
7
May the earth yield its produce;may God, our God, bless us.
אֶרֶץ eretz נָתְנָה natnah יְבוּלָהּ yevulah יְבָרְכֵנוּ yevarkhenu אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu
8
May God bless us,and be revered to the ends of the earth.
יְבָרְכֵנוּ yevarkhenu אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְיִירְאוּ veyiru אוֹתוֹ oto כּל kl אַפְסֵי afsey אָרֶץ aretz

Psalm 68

1
For the leader. Of David. A psalm. A song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor שִׁיר shir
2
God will arise;all opponents shall be scattered,and foes shall flee.
יָקוּם yakum אֱלֹהִים Elohim יָפוּצוּ yafutzu אוֹיְבָיו oyvayv וְיָנוּסוּ veyanusu מְשַׂנְאָיו mesanayv מִפָּנָיו mipanayv
3
Disperse them as smoke is dispersed;as wax melts at fire,so the wicked shall perish before God.
כְּהִנְדֹּף kehindof עָשָׁן ashan תִּנְדֹּף tindof כְּהִמֵּס kehimes דּוֹנַג donag מִפְּנֵי mipney אֵשׁ esh יֹאבְדוּ yovdu רְשָׁעִים reshaim מִפְּנֵי mipney אֱלֹהִים Elohim
4
But the righteous shall rejoice;they shall exult in the presence of God;they shall be exceedingly joyful.
וְצַדִּיקִים vetzadikim יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu יַעַלְצוּ yaaltzu לִפְנֵי lifney אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְיָשִׂישׂוּ veyasisu בְשִׂמְחָה vesimchah
5
Sing to God, chant hymns to the divine name;extol the One who rides the clouds,the One whose name is Yah. Exult in God’s presence—
שִׁירוּ shiru לֵאלֹהִים lelohim זַמְּרוּ zamru שְׁמוֹ shemo סֹלּוּ solu לָרֹכֵב larokhev בָּעֲרָבוֹת baaravot בְּיָהּ beyah שְׁמוֹ shemo וְעִלְזוּ veilzu לְפָנָיו lefanayv
6
the guardian of the fatherless, the champion of widows,God, dwelling in holiness.
אֲבִי avi יְתוֹמִים yetomim וְדַיַּן vedayan אַלְמָנוֹת almanot אֱלֹהִים Elohim בִּמְעוֹן bimon קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
7
God restores the lonely to their homes,sets free the imprisoned, safe and sound,while the rebellious must live in a parched land.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim מוֹשִׁיב moshiv יְחִידִים yechidim בַּיְתָה baytah מוֹצִיא motzi אֲסִירִים asirim בַּכּוֹשָׁרוֹת bakosharot אַךְ akh סוֹרְרִים sorerim שָׁכְנוּ shakhnu צְחִיחָה tzechichah
8
O God, when You went at the head of Your army,when You marched through the desert, selah
אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּצֵאתְךָ betzetkha לִפְנֵי lifney עַמֶּךָ amekha בְּצַעְדְּךָ betzadkha בִישִׁימוֹן vishimon סֶלָה selah
9
the earth trembled, the sky rained because of God,yon Sinai, because of God—the God of Israel.
אֶרֶץ eretz רָעָשָׁה raashah אַף af שָׁמַיִם shamayim נָטְפוּ natfu מִפְּנֵי mipney אֱלֹהִים Elohim זֶה zeh סִינַי sinay מִפְּנֵי mipney אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
10
You released a bountiful rain, O God;when Your own land languished, You sustained it.
גֶּשֶׁם geshem נְדָבוֹת nedavot תָּנִיף tanif אֱלֹהִים Elohim נַחֲלָתְךָ nachalatkha וְנִלְאָה venilah אַתָּה atah כוֹנַנְתָּהּ khonantah
11
Your tribe dwells there;O God, in Your goodness You provide for the needy.
חַיָּתְךָ chayatkha יָשְׁבוּ yashvu בָהּ vah תָּכִין takhin בְּטוֹבָתְךָ betovatkha לֶעָנִי leani אֱלֹהִים Elohim
12
My Sovereign gives a command;the women who bring the news are a great host:
אֲדֹנָי Adonai יִתֶּן yiten אֹמֶר omer הַמְבַשְּׂרוֹת hamvasrot צָבָא tzava רָב rav
13
“The kings and their armies are in headlong flight;the women at home are sharing in the spoils;
מַלְכֵי malkhey צְבָאוֹת tzevaot יִדֹּדוּן yidodun יִדֹּדוּן yidodun וּנְוַת unvat בַּיִת bayit תְּחַלֵּק techalek שָׁלָל shalal
14
even for those of you who lie among the sheepfoldsthere are wings of a dove sheathed in silver,its pinions in fine gold.”
אִם im תִּשְׁכְּבוּן tishkvun בֵּין beyn שְׁפַתָּיִם shefatayim כַּנְפֵי kanfey יוֹנָה yonah נֶחְפָּה nechpah בַכֶּסֶף vakesef וְאֶבְרוֹתֶיהָ veevroteyha בִּירַקְרַק birakrak חָרוּץ charutz
15
When Shaddai scattered the kings,it seemed like a snowstorm in Zalmon.
בְּפָרֵשׂ befares שַׁדַּי shaday מְלָכִים melakhim בָּהּ bah תַּשְׁלֵג tashleg בְּצַלְמוֹן betzalmon
16
O majestic mountain, Mount Bashan;O jagged mountain, Mount Bashan;
הַר har אֱלֹהִים Elohim הַר har בָּשָׁן bashan הַר har גַּבְנֻנִּים gavnunim הַר har בָּשָׁן bashan
17
why so hostile, O jagged mountains,toward the mountain God desired as a dwelling? GOD shall abide there forever.
לָמָּה lamah תְּרַצְּדוּן teratzdun הָרִים harim גַּבְנֻנִּים gavnunim הָהָר hahar חָמַד chamad אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְשִׁבְתּוֹ leshivto אַף af יְהֹוָה Adonai יִשְׁכֹּן yishkon לָנֶצַח lanetzach
18
God’s chariots are myriads upon myriads,thousands upon thousands;my Sovereign is among them as in Sinai in holiness.
רֶכֶב rekhev אֱלֹהִים Elohim רִבֹּתַיִם ribotayim אַלְפֵי alfey שִׁנְאָן shinan אֲדֹנָי Adonai בָם vam סִינַי sinay בַּקֹּדֶשׁ bakodesh
19
You went up to the heights, having taken captives,having received tribute of people,even of those who rebelagainst the abiding there of Yah—who is God.
עָלִיתָ alita לַמָּרוֹם lamarom שָׁבִיתָ shavita שֶּׁבִי shevi לָקַחְתָּ lakachta מַתָּנוֹת matanot בָּאָדָם baadam וְאַף veaf סוֹרְרִים sorerim לִשְׁכֹּן lishkon יָהּ Yah אֱלֹהִים Elohim
20
Blessed is my Sovereign,day by day supporting us—God, our deliverance. Selah.
בָּרוּךְ barukh אֲדֹנָי Adonai יוֹם yom יוֹם yom יַעֲמס yaams לָנוּ lanu הָאֵל hael יְשׁוּעָתֵנוּ yeshuatenu סֶלָה selah
21
God is for us a God of deliverance; GOD my Sovereign provides an escape from death.
הָאֵללָנוּ haellanu אֵל El לְמוֹשָׁעוֹת lemoshaot וְלֵיהֹוִה veleyhovih אֲדֹנָי Adonai לַמָּוֶת lamavet תֹּצָאוֹת totzaot
22
God will smash the heads of all opponents,the hairy crown of the one who walks about in guilt.
אַךְ akh אֱלֹהִים Elohim יִמְחַץ yimchatz רֹאשׁ rosh אֹיְבָיו oyvayv קדְקֹד kdkod שֵׂעָר sear מִתְהַלֵּךְ mithalekh בַּאֲשָׁמָיו baashamayv
23
My Sovereign said, “I will retrieve from Bashan,I will retrieve from the depths of the sea;
אָמַר amar אֲדֹנָי Adonai מִבָּשָׁן mibashan אָשִׁיב ashiv אָשִׁיב ashiv מִמְּצֻלוֹת mimtzulot יָם yam
24
that your feet may wade through blood,that the tongue of your dogs may have its portion of your enemies.”
לְמַעַן lemaan תִּמְחַץ timchatz רַגְלְךָ raglkha בְּדָם bedam לְשׁוֹן leshon כְּלָבֶיךָ kelaveykha מֵאֹיְבִים meoyvim מִנֵּהוּ minehu
25
People see Your processions, O God,the processions of my God, my monarch,into the sanctuary.
רָאוּ rau הֲלִיכוֹתֶיךָ halikhoteykha אֱלֹהִים Elohim הֲלִיכוֹת halikhot אֵלִי eli מַלְכִּי malki בַקֹּדֶשׁ vakodesh
26
First come singers, then musicians,amidst maidens playing hand-drums.
קִדְּמוּ kidmu שָׁרִים sharim אַחַר achar נֹגְנִים nognim בְּתוֹךְ betokh עֲלָמוֹת alamot תּוֹפֵפוֹת tofefot
27
In assemblies bless God, ETERNAL One, O you who are from the fountain of Israel.
בְּמַקְהֵלוֹת bemakhelot בָּרְכוּ barkhu אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֲדֹנָי Adonai מִמְּקוֹר mimkor יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
28
There is little Benjamin who rules them,the princes of Judah who command them,the princes of Zebulun and Naphtali.
שָׁם sham בִּנְיָמִן binyamin צָעִיר tzair רֹדֵם rodem שָׂרֵי sarey יְהוּדָה yehudah רִגְמָתָם rigmatam שָׂרֵי sarey זְבֻלוּן zevulun שָׂרֵי sarey נַפְתָּלִי naftali
29
Your God has ordained strength for you,the strength, O God,that You displayed for us
צִוָּה tziuah אֱלֹהֶיךָ eloheykha עֻזֶּךָ uzekha עוּזָּה uzah אֱלֹהִים Elohim זוּ zu פָּעַלְתָּ paalta לָּנוּ lanu
30
from Your temple above Jerusalem.The kings bring You tribute.
מֵהֵיכָלֶךָ meheykhalekha עַל al יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim לְךָ lekha יוֹבִילוּ yovilu מְלָכִים melakhim שָׁי shay
31
Blast the beast of the marsh,the herd of bulls among the peoples, the calves,till they come cringing with pieces of silver.Scatter the peoples who delight in wars!
גְּעַר gear חַיַּת chayat קָנֶה kaneh עֲדַת adat אַבִּירִים abirim בְּעֶגְלֵי beegley עַמִּים amim מִתְרַפֵּס mitrapes בְּרַצֵּי beratzey כָסֶף khasef בִּזַּר bizar עַמִּים amim קְרָבוֹת keravot יֶחְפָּצוּ yechpatzu
32
Tribute-bearers shall come from Egypt;Cush shall hasten its gifts to God.
יֶאֱתָיוּ yeetayu חַשְׁמַנִּים chashmanim מִנִּי mini מִצְרָיִם mitzrayim כּוּשׁ kush תָּרִיץ taritz יָדָיו yadayv לֵאלֹהִים lelohim
33
O kingdoms of the earth,sing to God;chant hymns to my Sovereign, selah
מַמְלְכוֹת mamlkhot הָאָרֶץ haaretz שִׁירוּ shiru לֵאלֹהִים lelohim זַמְּרוּ zamru אֲדֹנָי Adonai סֶלָה selah
34
to the One who rides the ancient highest heavens,who thunders forth with a mighty voice.
לָרֹכֵב larokhev בִּשְׁמֵי bishmey שְׁמֵי shemey קֶדֶם kedem הֵן hen יִתֵּן yiten בְּקוֹלוֹ bekolo קוֹל kol עֹז oz
35
Ascribe might to God,whose majesty is over Israel,whose might is in the skies.
תְּנוּ tenu עֹז oz לֵאלֹהִים lelohim עַל al יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael גַּאֲוָתוֹ gaavato וְעֻזּוֹ veuzo בַּשְּׁחָקִים bashchakim
36
You are awesome, O God, in Your holy places;it is the God of Israel who gives might and power to the people.Blessed is God.
נוֹרָא nora אֱלֹהִים Elohim מִמִּקְדָּשֶׁיךָ mimikdasheykha אֵל El יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael הוּא hu נֹתֵן noten עֹז oz וְתַעֲצֻמוֹת vetaatzumot לָעָם laam בָּרוּךְ barukh אֱלֹהִים Elohim

Psalm 69

1
For the leader. On shoshannim. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. Of David.
לַמְנַצֵּחַעַל lamnatzechaal שׁוֹשַׁנִּים shoshanim לְדָוִד ledavid
2
Deliver me, O God,for the waters have reached my neck;
הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni אֱלֹהִים Elohim כִּי ki בָאוּ vau מַיִם mayim עַד ad נָפֶשׁ nafesh
3
I am sinking into the slimy deepand find no foothold;I have come into the watery depths;the flood sweeps me away.
טָבַעְתִּי tavati בִּיוֵן biven מְצוּלָה metzulah וְאֵין veeyn מעֳמָד momad בָּאתִי bati בְמַעֲמַקֵּי vemaamakey מַיִם mayim וְשִׁבֹּלֶת veshibolet שְׁטָפָתְנִי shetafatni
4
I am weary with calling;my throat is dry;my eyes failwhile I wait for God.
יָגַעְתִּי yagati בְקרְאִי vekri נִחַר nichar גְּרוֹנִי geroni כָּלוּ kalu עֵינַי eynay מְיַחֵל meyachel לֵאלֹהָי lelohay
5
More numerous than the hairs of my headare those who hate me without reason;many are those who would destroy me,my treacherous enemies.Must I restore what I have not stolen?
רַבּוּ rabu מִשַּׂעֲרוֹת misaarot רֹאשִׁי roshi שֹׂנְאַי sonay חִנָּם chinam עָצְמוּ atzmu מַצְמִיתַי matzmitay אֹיְבַי oyvay שֶׁקֶר sheker אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo גָזַלְתִּי gazalti אָז az אָשִׁיב ashiv
6
God, You know my folly;my guilty deeds are not hidden from You.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim אַתָּה atah יָדַעְתָּ yadata לְאִוַּלְתִּי leiualti וְאַשְׁמוֹתַי veashmotay מִמְּךָ mimkha לֹא lo נִכְחָדוּ nikhchadu
7
Let those who look to You,O my Sovereign, GOD of hosts,not be disappointed on my account;let those who seek You,O God of Israel,not be shamed because of me.
אַל El יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu בִי vi קֹוֶיךָ koveykha אֲדֹנָי Adonai יֱהֹוִה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot אַל El יִכָּלְמוּ yikalmu בִי vi מְבַקְשֶׁיךָ mevaksheykha אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
8
It is for Your sake that I have been reviled,that shame covers my face;
כִּי ki עָלֶיךָ aleykha נָשָׂאתִי nasati חֶרְפָּה cherpah כִּסְּתָה kistah כְלִמָּה khelimah פָנָי fanay
9
I am a stranger to my kin,an alien to my own siblings.
מוּזָר muzar הָיִיתִי hayiti לְאֶחָי leechay וְנכְרִי venkhri לִבְנֵי livney אִמִּי imi
10
My zeal for Your house has been my undoing;the reproaches of those who revile You have fallen upon me.
כִּי ki קִנְאַת kinat בֵּיתְךָ beytkha אֲכָלָתְנִי akhalatni וְחֶרְפּוֹת vecherpot חוֹרְפֶיךָ chorfeykha נָפְלוּ naflu עָלָי alay
11
When I wept and fasted,I was reviled for it.
וָאֶבְכֶּה vaevkeh בַצּוֹם vatzom נַפְשִׁי nafshi וַתְּהִי vathi לַחֲרָפוֹת lacharafot לִי li
12
I made sackcloth my garment;I became a byword among them.
וָאֶתְּנָה vaetnah לְבוּשִׁי levushi שָׂק sak וָאֱהִי vaehi לָהֶם lahem לְמָשָׁל lemashal
13
Those who sit in the gate talk about me;I am the taunt of drunkards.
יָשִׂיחוּ yasichu בִי vi יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey שָׁעַר shaar וּנְגִינוֹת unginot שׁוֹתֵי shotey שֵׁכָר shekhar
14
As for me, may my prayer come to You, O ETERNAL One,at a favorable moment;O God, in Your abundant faithfulness,answer me with Your sure deliverance.
וַאֲנִי vaani תְפִלָּתִי tefilati לְךָ lekha יְהֹוָה Adonai עֵת et רָצוֹן ratzon אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּרב berv חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha עֲנֵנִי aneni בֶּאֱמֶת beemet יִשְׁעֶךָ yishekha
15
Rescue me from the mire;let me not sink;let me be rescued from my enemies,and from the watery depths.
הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni מִטִּיט mitit וְאַל veal אֶטְבָּעָה etbaah אִנָּצְלָה inatzlah מִשֹּׂנְאַי misonay וּמִמַּעֲמַקֵּי umimaamakey מָיִם mayim
16
Let the floodwaters not sweep me away;let the deep not swallow me;let the mouth of the Pit not close over me.
אַל El תִּשְׁטְפֵנִי tishtfeni שִׁבֹּלֶת shibolet מַיִם mayim וְאַל veal תִּבְלָעֵנִי tivlaeni מְצוּלָה metzulah וְאַל veal תֶּאְטַר tetar עָלַי alay בְּאֵר beer פִּיהָ piha
17
Answer me, O ETERNAL One,according to Your great steadfastness;in accordance with Your abundant mercyturn to me;
עֲנֵנִי aneni יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki טוֹב tov חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha כְּרֹב kerov רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha פְּנֵה peneh אֵלָי elay
18
do not hide Your face from Your servant,for I am in distress;answer me quickly.
וְאַל veal תַּסְתֵּר taster פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מֵעַבְדֶּךָ meavdekha כִּי ki צַר tzar לִי li מַהֵר maher עֲנֵנִי aneni
19
Come near to me and redeem me;free me from my enemies.
קרְבָה krvah אֶל El נַפְשִׁי nafshi גְאָלָהּ gealah לְמַעַן lemaan אֹיְבַי oyvay פְּדֵנִי pedeni
20
You know my reproach,my shame, my disgrace;You are aware of all my foes.
אַתָּה atah יָדַעְתָּ yadata חֶרְפָּתִי cherpati וּבשְׁתִּי uvshti וּכְלִמָּתִי ukhlimati נֶגְדְּךָ negdkha כּל kl צוֹרְרָי tzoreray
21
Reproach breaks my heart,I am in despair; I hope for consolation, but there is none,for comforters, but find none.
חֶרְפָּה cherpah שָׁבְרָה shavrah לִבִּי libi וָאָנוּשָׁה vaanushah וָאֲקַוֶּה vaakaueh לָנוּד lanud וָאַיִן vaayin וְלַמְנַחֲמִים velamnachamim וְלֹא velo מָצָאתִי matzati
22
They give me gall for food,vinegar to quench my thirst.
וַיִּתְּנוּ vayitnu בְּבָרוּתִי bevaruti רֹאשׁ rosh וְלִצְמָאִי velitzmai יַשְׁקוּנִי yashkuni חֹמֶץ chometz
23
May their table be a trap for them,a snare for their allies.
יְהִי yehi שֻׁלְחָנָם shulchanam לִפְנֵיהֶם lifneyhem לְפָח lefach וְלִשְׁלוֹמִים velishlomim לְמוֹקֵשׁ lemokesh
24
May their eyes grow dim so that they cannot see;may their loins collapse continually.
תֶּחְשַׁכְנָה techshakhnah עֵינֵיהֶם eyneyhem מֵרְאוֹת merot וּמתְנֵיהֶם umtneyhem תָּמִיד tamid הַמְעַד hamad
25
Pour out Your wrath on them;may Your blazing anger overtake them;
שְׁפךְ shefkh עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem זַעְמֶךָ zamekha וַחֲרוֹן vacharon אַפְּךָ apkha יַשִּׂיגֵם yasigem
26
may their encampments be desolate;may their tents stand empty.
תְּהִי tehi טִירָתָם tiratam נְשַׁמָּה neshamah בְּאהֳלֵיהֶם beholeyhem אַל El יְהִי yehi יֹשֵׁב yoshev
27
For they persecute those You have struck;they talk about the pain of those You have felled.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah אֲשֶׁר asher הִכִּיתָ hikita רָדָפוּ radafu וְאֶל veel מַכְאוֹב makhov חֲלָלֶיךָ chalaleykha יְסַפֵּרוּ yesaperu
28
Add that to their guilt;let them have no share of Your beneficence;
תְּנָה tenah עָוֺן avon עַל al עֲוֺנָם avonam וְאַל veal יָבֹאוּ yavou בְּצִדְקָתֶךָ betzidkatekha
29
may they be erased from the book of life,and not be inscribed with the righteous.
יִמָּחוּ yimachu מִסֵּפֶר misefer חַיִּים chayim וְעִם veim צַדִּיקִים tzadikim אַל El יִכָּתֵבוּ yikatevu
30
But I am lowly and in pain;Your help, O God, keeps me safe.
וַאֲנִי vaani עָנִי ani וְכוֹאֵב vekhoev יְשׁוּעָתְךָ yeshuatkha אֱלֹהִים Elohim תְּשַׂגְּבֵנִי tesagveni
31
I will extol God’s name with song,exultation, and praise.
אֲהַלְלָה ahalelah שֵׁם shem אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּשִׁיר beshir וַאֲגַדְּלֶנּוּ vaagadlenu בְתוֹדָה vetodah
32
That will please GOD more than oxen,than bulls with horns and hoofs.
וְתִיטַב vetitav לַיהֹוָה layhovah מִשּׁוֹר mishor פָּר par מַקְרִן makrin מַפְרִיס mafris
33
The lowly will see and rejoice;you who are mindful of God, take heart!
רָאוּ rau עֲנָוִים anavim יִשְׂמָחוּ yismachu דֹּרְשֵׁי dorshey אֱלֹהִים Elohim וִיחִי vichi לְבַבְכֶם levavkhem
34
For GOD listens to the needy,and does not spurn those held captive.
כִּי ki שֹׁמֵעַ shomea אֶל El אֶבְיוֹנִים evyonim יְהֹוָה Adonai וְאֶת veet אֲסִירָיו asirayv לֹא lo בָזָה vazah
35
Heaven and earth shall sing praise,the seas, and all that moves in them.
יְהַלְלוּהוּ yehaleluhu שָׁמַיִם shamayim וָאָרֶץ vaaretz יַמִּים yamim וְכל vekhl רֹמֵשׂ romes בָּם bam
36
For God will deliver Zionand rebuild the cities of Judah;they shall live there and inherit it;
כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim יוֹשִׁיעַ yoshia צִיּוֹן tzion וְיִבְנֶה veyivneh עָרֵי arey יְהוּדָה yehudah וְיָשְׁבוּ veyashvu שָׁם sham וִירֵשׁוּהָ vireshuha
37
the offspring of God’s servants shall possess it;those who cherish God’s name shall dwell there.
וְזֶרַע vezera עֲבָדָיו avadayv יִנְחָלוּהָ yinchaluha וְאֹהֲבֵי veohavey שְׁמוֹ shemo יִשְׁכְּנוּ yishknu בָהּ vah

Psalm 70

1
For the leader. Of David. Lehazkir. Meaning of Heb. uncertain.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid לְהַזְכִּיר lehazkir
2
Hasten, O God, to save me;O ETERNAL One, to aid me!
אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְהַצִּילֵנִי lehatzileni יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעֶזְרָתִי leezrati חוּשָׁה chushah
3
Let those who seek my lifebe frustrated and disgraced;let those who wish me harm,fall back in shame.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיַחְפְּרוּ veyachpru מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey נַפְשִׁי nafshi יִסֹּגוּ yisogu אָחוֹר achor וְיִכָּלְמוּ veyikalmu חֲפֵצֵי chafetzey רָעָתִי raati
4
Let those who say, “Aha! Aha!”turn back because of their frustration.
יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu עַל al עֵקֶב ekev בּשְׁתָּם bshtam הָאֹמְרִים haomrim הֶאָחהֶאָח heachheach
5
But let all who seek You be glad and rejoice in You;let those who are eager for Your deliverance always say,“Extolled be God!”
יָשִׂישׂוּ yasisu וְיִשְׂמְחוּ veyismchu בְּךָ bekha כּל kl מְבַקְשֶׁיךָ mevaksheykha וְיֹאמְרוּ veyomru תָמִיד tamid יִגְדַּל yigdal אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֹהֲבֵי ohavey יְשׁוּעָתֶךָ yeshuatekha
6
But I am poor and needy;O God, hasten to me!You are my help and my rescuer;O ETERNAL One, do not delay.
וַאֲנִי vaani עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon אֱלֹהִים Elohim חוּשָׁה chushah לִּי li עֶזְרִי ezri וּמְפַלְטִי umfalti אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El תְּאַחַר teachar

Psalm 71

1
I seek refuge in You, O ETERNAL One;may I never be disappointed.
בְּךָ bekha יְהֹוָה Adonai חָסִיתִי chasiti אַל El אֵבוֹשָׁה evoshah לְעוֹלָם leolam
2
As You are beneficent, save me and rescue me;incline Your ear to me and deliver me.
בְּצִדְקָתְךָ betzidkatkha תַּצִּילֵנִי tatzileni וּתְפַלְּטֵנִי utfalteni הַטֵּה hateh אֵלַי elay אזְנְךָ znkha וְהוֹשִׁיעֵנִי vehoshieni
3
Be a sheltering rock for me to which I may always repair;decree my deliverance,for You are my rock and my fortress.
הֱיֵה heyeh לִי li לְצוּר letzur מָעוֹן maon לָבוֹא lavo תָּמִיד tamid צִוִּיתָ tziuita לְהוֹשִׁיעֵנִי lehoshieni כִּי ki סַלְעִי sali וּמְצוּדָתִי umtzudati אָתָּה atah
4
My God, rescue me from the hand of the wicked,from the grasp of the unjust and the lawless.
אֱלֹהַי elohay פַּלְּטֵנִי palteni מִיַּד miad רָשָׁע rasha מִכַּף mikaf מְעַוֵּל meauel וְחוֹמֵץ vechometz
5
For You are my hope,O my Sovereign GOD,my trust from my youth.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah תִקְוָתִי tikvati אֲדֹנָי Adonai יֱהֹוִה Adonai מִבְטַחִי mivtachi מִנְּעוּרָי minuray
6
While yet unborn, I depended on You;in the womb of my mother, You were my support; I sing Your praises always.
עָלֶיךָ aleykha נִסְמַכְתִּי nismakhti מִבֶּטֶן mibeten מִמְּעֵי mimey אִמִּי imi אַתָּה atah גוֹזִי gozi בְּךָ bekha תְהִלָּתִי tehilati תָמִיד tamid
7
I have become an example for many,since You are my mighty refuge.
כְּמוֹפֵת kemofet הָיִיתִי hayiti לְרַבִּים lerabim וְאַתָּה veatah מַחֲסִי machasi עֹז oz
8
My mouth is full of praise to You,glorifying You all day long.
יִמָּלֵא yimale פִי fi תְּהִלָּתֶךָ tehilatekha כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom תִּפְאַרְתֶּךָ tifartekha
9
Do not cast me off in old age;when my strength fails, do not forsake me!
אַל El תַּשְׁלִיכֵנִי tashlikheni לְעֵת leet זִקְנָה ziknah כִּכְלוֹת kikhlot כֹּחִי kochi אַל El תַּעַזְבֵנִי taazveni
10
For my enemies talk against me;those who wait for me are of one mind,
כִּי ki אָמְרוּ amru אוֹיְבַי oyvay לִי li וְשֹׁמְרֵי veshomrey נַפְשִׁי nafshi נוֹעֲצוּ noatzu יַחְדָּו yachdav
11
saying, “God has forsaken him;chase him and catch him,for no one will save him!”
לֵאמֹר lemor אֱלֹהִים Elohim עֲזָבוֹ azavo רִדְפוּ ridfu וְתִפְשׂוּהוּ vetifsuhu כִּי ki אֵין eyn מַצִּיל matzil
12
O God, be not far from me;my God, hasten to my aid!
אֱלֹהִים Elohim אַל El תִּרְחַק tirchak מִמֶּנִּי mimeni אֱלֹהַי elohay לְעֶזְרָתִי leezrati (חישה) chyshh [חוּשָׁה] chushah
13
Let my accusers perish in frustration;let those who seek my ruin be clothed in reproach and disgrace!
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu יִכְלוּ yikhlu שֹׂטְנֵי sotney נַפְשִׁי nafshi יַעֲטוּ yaatu חֶרְפָּה cherpah וּכְלִמָּה ukhlimah מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey רָעָתִי raati
14
As for me, I will hope always,and add to the many praises of You.
וַאֲנִי vaani תָּמִיד tamid אֲיַחֵל ayachel וְהוֹסַפְתִּי vehosafti עַל al כּל kl תְּהִלָּתֶךָ tehilatekha
15
My mouth tells of Your beneficence,of Your deliverance all day long,though I know not how to tell it.
פִּי pi יְסַפֵּר yesaper צִדְקָתֶךָ tzidkatekha כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom תְּשׁוּעָתֶךָ teshuatekha כִּי ki לֹא lo יָדַעְתִּי yadati סְפֹרוֹת seforot
16
I come with praise of Your mighty acts, O my Sovereign GOD;I celebrate Your beneficence, Yours alone.
אָבוֹא avo בִּגְבֻרוֹת bigvurot אֲדֹנָי Adonai יֱהֹוִה Adonai אַזְכִּיר azkir צִדְקָתְךָ tzidkatkha לְבַדֶּךָ levadekha
17
You have let me experience it, God, from my youth;until now I have proclaimed Your wondrous deeds,
אֱלֹהִים Elohim לִמַּדְתַּנִי limadtani מִנְּעוּרָי minuray וְעַד vead הֵנָּה henah אַגִּיד agid נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ nifloteykha
18
and even in hoary old age do not forsake me, God,until I proclaim Your strength to the next generation,Your mighty acts, to all who are to come,
וְגַם vegam עַד ad זִקְנָה ziknah וְשֵׂיבָה veseyvah אֱלֹהִים Elohim אַל El תַּעַזְבֵנִי taazveni עַד ad אַגִּיד agid זְרוֹעֲךָ zeroakha לְדוֹר ledor לְכל lekhl יָבוֹא yavo גְּבוּרָתֶךָ gevuratekha
19
Your beneficence, high as the heavens, O God,You who have done great things;O God, who is Your peer!
וְצִדְקָתְךָ vetzidkatkha אֱלֹהִים Elohim עַד ad מָרוֹם marom אֲשֶׁר asher עָשִׂיתָ asita גְדֹלוֹת gedolot אֱלֹהִים Elohim מִי mi כָמוֹךָ khamokha
20
You who have made me undergo many troubles and misfortuneswill revive me again,and raise me up from the depths of the earth.
אֲשֶׁר asher (הראיתנו) hrytnv [הִרְאִיתַנִי] hiritani צָרוֹת tzarot רַבּוֹת rabot וְרָעוֹת veraot תָּשׁוּב tashuv (תחינו) tchynv [תְּחַיֵּנִי] techayeni וּמִתְּהֹמוֹת umithomot הָאָרֶץ haaretz תָּשׁוּב tashuv תַּעֲלֵנִי taaleni
21
You will grant me much greatness,You will turn and comfort me.
תֶּרֶב terev גְּדֻלָּתִי gedulati וְתִסֹּב vetisov תְּנַחֲמֵנִי tenachameni
22
Then I will acclaim You to the music of the lyrefor Your faithfulness, O my God;I will sing a hymn to You with a harp,O Holy One of Israel.
גַּם gam אֲנִי ani אוֹדְךָ odkha בִכְלִי vikhli נֶבֶל nevel אֲמִתְּךָ amitkha אֱלֹהָי elohay אֲזַמְּרָה azamrah לְךָ lekha בְכִנּוֹר vekhinor קְדוֹשׁ kedosh יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
23
My lips shall be jubilant, as I sing a hymn to You,my whole being, which You have redeemed.
תְּרַנֵּנָּה teranenah שְׂפָתַי sefatay כִּי ki אֲזַמְּרָה azamrah לָּךְ lakh וְנַפְשִׁי venafshi אֲשֶׁר asher פָּדִיתָ padita
24
All day long my tongue shall recite Your beneficent acts,how those who sought my ruin were frustrated and disgraced.
גַּם gam לְשׁוֹנִי leshoni כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom תֶּהְגֶּה tehgeh צִדְקָתֶךָ tzidkatekha כִּי ki בֹשׁוּ voshu כִי khi חָפְרוּ chafru מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey רָעָתִי raati

Psalm 72

1
Of Solomon.O God, endow the king with Your judgments,the king’s son with Your righteousness;
לִשְׁלֹמֹה lishlomoh אֱלֹהִים Elohim מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha לְמֶלֶךְ lemelekh תֵּן ten וְצִדְקָתְךָ vetzidkatkha לְבֶן leven מֶלֶךְ melekh
2
that he may judge Your people rightly,Your lowly ones, justly.
יָדִין yadin עַמְּךָ amkha בְצֶדֶק vetzedek וַעֲנִיֶּיךָ vaanieykha בְמִשְׁפָּט vemishpat
3
Let the mountains produce well-being for the people,the hills, the reward of justice.
יִשְׂאוּ yisu הָרִים harim שָׁלוֹם shalom לָעָם laam וּגְבָעוֹת ugvaot בִּצְדָקָה bitzdakah
4
Let him champion the lowly among the people,deliver the needy folk,and crush those who wrong them.
יִשְׁפֹּט yishpot עֲנִיֵּי aniey עָם am יוֹשִׁיעַ yoshia לִבְנֵי livney אֶבְיוֹן evyon וִידַכֵּא vidake עוֹשֵׁק oshek
5
Let them fear You as long as the sun shines,while the moon lasts, generations on end.
יִירָאוּךָ yiraukha עִם im שָׁמֶשׁ shamesh וְלִפְנֵי velifney יָרֵחַ yareach דּוֹר dor דּוֹרִים dorim
6
Let him be like rain that falls on a mown field,like a downpour of rain on the ground,
יֵרֵד yered כְּמָטָר kematar עַל al גֵּז gez כִּרְבִיבִים kirvivim זַרְזִיף zarzif אָרֶץ aretz
7
that the righteous may flourish in his time,and well-being abound, till the moon is no more.
יִפְרַח yifrach בְּיָמָיו beyamayv צַדִּיק tzadik וְרֹב verov שָׁלוֹם shalom עַד ad בְּלִי beli יָרֵחַ yareach
8
Let him rule from sea to sea,from the river to the ends of the earth.
וְיֵרְדְּ veyerd מִיָּם miam עַד ad יָם yam וּמִנָּהָר uminahar עַד ad אַפְסֵי afsey אָרֶץ aretz
9
Let desert-dwellers kneel before him,and his enemies lick the dust.
לְפָנָיו lefanayv יִכְרְעוּ yikhru צִיִּים tziim וְאֹיְבָיו veoyvayv עָפָר afar יְלַחֵכוּ yelachekhu
10
Let kings of Tarshish and the islands pay tribute,kings of Sheba and Seba offer gifts.
מַלְכֵי malkhey תַרְשִׁישׁ tarshish וְאִיִּים veiim מִנְחָה minchah יָשִׁיבוּ yashivu מַלְכֵי malkhey שְׁבָא sheva וּסְבָא usva אֶשְׁכָּר eshkar יַקְרִיבוּ yakrivu
11
Let all kings bow to him,and all nations serve him.
וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ veyishtachavu לוֹ lo כל khl מְלָכִים melakhim כּל kl גּוֹיִם goyim יַעַבְדוּהוּ yaavduhu
12
For he saves the needy who cry out,the lowly who have no helper.
כִּי ki יַצִּיל yatzil אֶבְיוֹן evyon מְשַׁוֵּעַ meshauea וְעָנִי veani וְאֵין veeyn עֹזֵר ozer לוֹ lo
13
He cares about the poor and the needy;He brings the needy deliverance.
יָחֹס yachos עַל al דַּל dal וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon וְנַפְשׁוֹת venafshot אֶבְיוֹנִים evyonim יוֹשִׁיעַ yoshia
14
He redeems them from fraud and lawlessness;the shedding of their blood weighs heavily upon him.
מִתּוֹךְ mitokh וּמֵחָמָס umechamas יִגְאַל yigal נַפְשָׁם nafsham וְיֵיקַר veyeykar דָּמָם damam בְּעֵינָיו beeynayv
15
So let him live, and receive gold of Sheba;let prayers for him be said always,blessings on him invoked at all times.
וִיחִי vichi וְיִתֶּן veyiten לוֹ lo מִזְּהַב mizhav שְׁבָא sheva וְיִתְפַּלֵּל veyitpalel בַּעֲדוֹ baado תָמִיד tamid כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom יְבָרְכֶנְהוּ yevarkhenhu
16
