Let abundant grain be in the land, to the tops of the mountains;let his crops thrive like the forest of Lebanon;and let the people sprout up in towns like country grass.
יְהִי yehi פִסַּת fisat בַּר bar בָּאָרֶץ baaretz בְּרֹאשׁ berosh הָרִים harim יִרְעַשׁ yirash כַּלְּבָנוֹן kalvanon פִּרְיוֹ piryo וְיָצִיצוּ veyatzitzu מֵעִיר meir כְּעֵשֶׂב keesev הָאָרֶץ haaretz
17
May his name be eternal;while the sun lasts, may his name endure; let peoples invoke his blessedness upon themselves;let all nations count him happy.
יְהִי yehi שְׁמוֹ shemo לְעוֹלָם leolam לִפְנֵי lifney שֶׁמֶשׁ shemesh (ינין) ynyn [יִנּוֹן] yinon שְׁמוֹ shemo וְיִתְבָּרְכוּ veyitbarkhu בוֹ vo כּל kl גּוֹיִם goyim יְאַשְּׁרוּהוּ yeashruhu
18
Blessed is the ETERNAL God, God of Israel,who alone does wondrous things;
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael עֹשֵׂה oseh נִפְלָאוֹת niflaot לְבַדּוֹ levado
19
Blessed is God’s glorious name forever;such glory fills the whole world.Amen and Amen.
וּבָרוּךְ uvarukh שֵׁם shem כְּבוֹדוֹ kevodo לְעוֹלָם leolam וְיִמָּלֵא veyimale כְבוֹדוֹ khevodo אֶת et כֹּל kol הָאָרֶץ haaretz אָמֵןוְאָמֵן amenvamen
20
End of the prayers of David son of Jesse.
כּלּוּ klu תְפִלּוֹת tefilot דָּוִד david בֶּן ben יִשָׁי yishay

Psalm 73

1
A psalm of Asaph.God is truly good to Israel,to those whose heart is pure.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf אַךְ akh טוֹב tov לְיִשְׂרָאֵל leyisrael אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְבָרֵי levarey לֵבָב levav
2
As for me, my feet had almost strayed,my steps were nearly led off course,
וַאֲנִי vaani כִּמְעַט kimat (נטוי) ntvy [נָטָיוּ] natayu רַגְלָי raglay כְּאַיִן keayin (שפכה) shfkhh [שֻׁפְּכוּ] shupkhu אֲשֻׁרָי ashuray
3
for I envied the wanton;I saw the wicked at ease.
כִּי ki קִנֵּאתִי kineti בַּהוֹלְלִים baholelim שְׁלוֹם shelom רְשָׁעִים reshaim אֶרְאֶה ereh
4
Death has no pangs for them;their body is healthy.
כִּי ki אֵין eyn חַרְצֻבּוֹת chartzubot לְמוֹתָם lemotam וּבָרִיא uvari אוּלָם ulam
5
They have no part in human travail;they are not afflicted like the rest of humankind.
בַּעֲמַל baamal אֱנוֹשׁ enosh אֵינֵמוֹ eynemo וְעִם veim אָדָם adam לֹא lo יְנֻגָּעוּ yenugau
6
So pride adorns their necks,lawlessness enwraps them as a mantle.
לָכֵן lakhen עֲנָקַתְמוֹ anakatmo גַאֲוָה gaavah יַעֲטָף yaataf שִׁית shit חָמָס chamas לָמוֹ lamo
7
Fat shuts out their eyes;their fancies are extravagant.
יָצָא yatza מֵחֵלֶב mechelev עֵינֵמוֹ eynemo עָבְרוּ avru מַשְׂכִּיּוֹת maskiot לֵבָב levav
8
They scoff and plan evil;from their eminence they plan wrongdoing.
יָמִיקוּ yamiku וִידַבְּרוּ vidabru בְרָע vera עֹשֶׁק oshek מִמָּרוֹם mimarom יְדַבֵּרוּ yedaberu
9
They set their mouths against heaven,and their tongues range over the earth.
שַׁתּוּ shatu בַשָּׁמַיִם vashamayim פִּיהֶם pihem וּלְשׁוֹנָם ulshonam תִּהֲלַךְ tihalakh בָּאָרֶץ baaretz
10
So they pound this people again and again,until they are drained of their very last tear.
לָכֵן lakhen (ישיב) yshyv [יָשׁוּב] yashuv עַמּוֹ amo הֲלֹם halom וּמֵי umey מָלֵא male יִמָּצוּ yimatzu לָמוֹ lamo
11
Then they say, “How could God know?Is there knowledge with the Most High?”
וְאָמְרוּ veamru אֵיכָה eykhah יָדַע yada אֵל El וְיֵשׁ veyesh דֵּעָה deah בְעֶלְיוֹן veelyon
12
Such are the wicked;ever tranquil, they amass wealth.
הִנֵּה hineh אֵלֶּה eleh רְשָׁעִים reshaim וְשַׁלְוֵי veshalvey עוֹלָם olam הִשְׂגּוּ hisgu חָיִל chayil
13
It was for nothing that I kept my heart pureand washed my hands in innocence,
אַךְ akh רִיק rik זִכִּיתִי zikiti לְבָבִי levavi וָאֶרְחַץ vaerchatz בְּנִקָּיוֹן benikayon כַּפָּי kapay
14
seeing that I have been constantly afflicted,that each morning brings new punishments.
וָאֱהִי vaehi נָגוּעַ nagua כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom וְתוֹכַחְתִּי vetokhachti לַבְּקָרִים labkarim
15
Had I decided to say these things,I should have been false to the circle of Your disciples.
אִם im אָמַרְתִּי amarti אֲסַפְּרָה asaprah כְמוֹ khemo הִנֵּה hineh דוֹר dor בָּנֶיךָ baneykha בָגָדְתִּי vagadti
16
So I applied myself to understand this,but it seemed a hopeless task
וָאֲחַשְּׁבָה vaachashvah לָדַעַת ladaat זֹאת zot עָמָל amal (היא) hy [הוּא] hu בְעֵינָי veeynay
17
till I entered God’s sanctuaryand reflected on their fate.
עַד ad אָבוֹא avo אֶל El מִקְדְּשֵׁי mikdshey אֵל El אָבִינָה avinah לְאַחֲרִיתָם leacharitam
18
You surround them with flattery;You make them fall through blandishments.
אַךְ akh בַּחֲלָקוֹת bachalakot תָּשִׁית tashit לָמוֹ lamo הִפַּלְתָּם hipaltam לְמַשּׁוּאוֹת lemashuot
19
How suddenly are they ruined,wholly swept away by terrors.
אֵיךְ eykh הָיוּ hayu לְשַׁמָּה leshamah כְרָגַע kheraga סָפוּ safu תַמּוּ tamu מִן min בַּלָּהוֹת balahot
20
When You are aroused You despise their image,as one does a dream after waking, O my Sovereign.
כַּחֲלוֹם kachalom מֵהָקִיץ mehakitz אֲדֹנָי Adonai בָּעִיר bair צַלְמָם tzalmam תִּבְזֶה tivzeh
21
My mind was stripped of its reason,my feelings were numbed.
כִּי ki יִתְחַמֵּץ yitchametz לְבָבִי levavi וְכִלְיוֹתַי vekhilyotay אֶשְׁתּוֹנָן eshtonan
22
I was a dolt, without knowledge;I was brutish toward You.
וַאֲנִי vaani בַעַר vaar וְלֹא velo אֵדָע eda בְּהֵמוֹת behemot הָיִיתִי hayiti עִמָּךְ imakh
23
Yet I was always with You,You held my right hand;
וַאֲנִי vaani תָמִיד tamid עִמָּךְ imakh אָחַזְתָּ achazta בְּיַד beyad יְמִינִי yemini
24
You guided me by Your counseland led me toward honor.
בַּעֲצָתְךָ baatzatkha תַנְחֵנִי tancheni וְאַחַר veachar כָּבוֹד kavod תִּקָּחֵנִי tikacheni
25
Whom else have I in heaven?And having You, I want no one on earth.
מִי mi לִי li בַשָּׁמָיִם vashamayim וְעִמְּךָ veimkha לֹא lo חָפַצְתִּי chafatzti בָאָרֶץ vaaretz
26
My body and mind fail;but God is the stay of my mind, my portion forever.
כָּלָה kalah שְׁאֵרִי sheeri וּלְבָבִי ulvavi צוּר tzur לְבָבִי levavi וְחֶלְקִי vechelki אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְעוֹלָם leolam
27
Those who keep far from You perish;You annihilate all who are untrue to You.
כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh רְחֵקֶיךָ rechekeykha יֹאבֵדוּ yovedu הִצְמַתָּה hitzmatah כּל kl זוֹנֶה zoneh מִמֶּךָּ mimeka
28
As for me, nearness to God is good;I have made the Sovereign GOD my refuge,that I may recount all Your works.
וַאֲנִי vaani קִרְבַת kirvat אֱלֹהִים Elohim לִי li טוֹב tov שַׁתִּי shati בַּאדֹנָי badonay יֱהֹוִה Adonai מַחְסִי machsi לְסַפֵּר lesaper כּל kl מַלְאֲכוֹתֶיךָ malakhoteykha

Psalm 74

1
A maskil of Asaph.Why, O God, do You forever reject us,do You fume in anger at the flock that You tend?
מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְאָסָף leasaf לָמָה lamah אֱלֹהִים Elohim זָנַחְתָּ zanachta לָנֶצַח lanetzach יֶעְשַׁן yeshan אַפְּךָ apkha בְּצֹאן betzon מַרְעִיתֶךָ maritekha
2
Remember the community You made Yours long ago,Your very own tribe that You redeemed,Mount Zion, where You dwell.
זְכֹר zekhor עֲדָתְךָ adatkha קָנִיתָ kanita קֶּדֶם kedem גָּאַלְתָּ gaalta שֵׁבֶט shevet נַחֲלָתֶךָ nachalatekha הַר har צִיּוֹן tzion זֶה zeh שָׁכַנְתָּ shakhanta בּוֹ bo
3
Bestir Yourself because of the perpetual tumult, all the outrages of the enemy in the sanctuary.
הָרִימָה harimah פְעָמֶיךָ feameykha לְמַשֻּׁאוֹת lemashuot נֶצַח netzach כּל kl הֵרַע hera אוֹיֵב oyev בַּקֹּדֶשׁ bakodesh
4
Your foes roar inside Your meeting-place;they take their signs for true signs.
שָׁאֲגוּ shaagu צֹרְרֶיךָ tzorereykha בְּקֶרֶב bekerev מוֹעֲדֶךָ moadekha שָׂמוּ samu אוֹתֹתָם ototam אֹתוֹת otot
5
It is like those who wield axesagainst a gnarled tree;
יִוָּדַע yiuada כְּמֵבִיא kemevi לְמָעְלָה lemalah בִּסְבךְ bisvkh עֵץ etz קַרְדֻּמּוֹת kardumot
6
with hatchet and pikethey hacked away at its carved work.
(ועת) vt [וְעַתָּה] veatah פִּתּוּחֶיהָ pitucheyha יָּחַד yachad בְּכַשִּׁיל bekhashil וְכֵילַפּוֹת vekheylapot יַהֲלֹמוּן yahalomun
7
They made Your sanctuary go up in flames;they brought low in dishonor the dwelling-place of Your presence.
שִׁלְחוּ shilchu בָאֵשׁ vaesh מִקְדָּשֶׁךָ mikdashekha לָאָרֶץ laaretz חִלְּלוּ chilelu מִשְׁכַּן mishkan שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
8
They resolved, “Let us destroy them altogether!”They burned all God’s tabernacles in the land.
אָמְרוּ amru בְלִבָּם velibam נִינָם ninam יָחַד yachad שָׂרְפוּ sarfu כל khl מוֹעֲדֵי moadey אֵל El בָּאָרֶץ baaretz
9
No signs appear for us;there is no longer any prophet;no one among us knows for how long.
אוֹתֹתֵינוּ ototeynu לֹא lo רָאִינוּ rainu אֵין eyn עוֹד od נָבִיא navi וְלֹא velo אִתָּנוּ itanu יֹדֵעַ yodea עַד ad מָה mah
10
Till when, O God, will the foe blaspheme,will the enemy forever revile Your name?
עַד ad מָתַי matay אֱלֹהִים Elohim יְחָרֶף yecharef צָר tzar יְנָאֵץ yenaetz אוֹיֵב oyev שִׁמְךָ shimkha לָנֶצַח lanetzach
11
Why do You hold back Your hand, Your right hand?Draw it out of Your bosom!
לָמָּה lamah תָשִׁיב tashiv יָדְךָ yadkha וִימִינֶךָ viminekha מִקֶּרֶב mikerev (חוקך) chvkkh [חֵיקְךָ] cheykkha כַלֵּה khaleh
12
O God, my Sovereign from of old,who brings deliverance throughout the land;
וֵאלֹהִים velohim מַלְכִּי malki מִקֶּדֶם mikedem פֹּעֵל poel יְשׁוּעוֹת yeshuot בְּקֶרֶב bekerev הָאָרֶץ haaretz
13
it was You who drove back the sea with Your might,who smashed the heads of the monsters in the waters;
אַתָּה atah פוֹרַרְתָּ forarta בְעזְּךָ vezkha יָם yam שִׁבַּרְתָּ shibarta רָאשֵׁי rashey תַנִּינִים taninim עַל al הַמָּיִם hamayim
14
it was You who crushed the heads of Leviathan,who left it as food for the denizens of the desert;
אַתָּה atah רִצַּצְתָּ ritzatzta רָאשֵׁי rashey לִוְיָתָן livyatan תִּתְּנֶנּוּ titnenu מַאֲכָל maakhal לְעָם leam לְצִיִּים letziim
15
it was You who released springs and torrents,who made mighty rivers run dry;
אַתָּה atah בָקַעְתָּ vakata מַעְיָן mayan וָנָחַל vanachal אַתָּה atah הוֹבַשְׁתָּ hovashta נַהֲרוֹת naharot אֵיתָן eytan
16
the day is Yours, the night also;it was You who set in place the orb of the sun;
לְךָ lekha יוֹם yom אַף af לְךָ lekha לָיְלָה laylah אַתָּה atah הֲכִינוֹתָ hakhinota מָאוֹר maor וָשָׁמֶשׁ vashamesh
17
You fixed all the boundaries of the earth;summer and winter—You made them.
אַתָּה atah הִצַּבְתָּ hitzavta כּל kl גְּבוּלוֹת gevulot אָרֶץ aretz קַיִץ kayitz וָחֹרֶף vachoref אַתָּה atah יְצַרְתָּם yetzartam
18
Be mindful of how the enemy blasphemes GOD,how base people revile Your name.
זְכר zekhr זֹאת zot אוֹיֵב oyev חֵרֵףיְהֹוָה cherefyhovah וְעַם veam נָבָל naval נִאֲצוּ niatzu שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
19
Do not deliver Your dove to the wild beast;do not ignore forever the band of Your lowly ones.
אַל El תִּתֵּן titen לְחַיַּת lechayat נֶפֶשׁ nefesh תּוֹרֶךָ torekha חַיַּת chayat עֲנִיֶּיךָ anieykha אַל El תִּשְׁכַּח tishkach לָנֶצַח lanetzach
20
Look to the covenant!For the dark places of the land are full of the haunts of lawlessness.
הַבֵּט habet לַבְּרִית labrit כִּי ki מָלְאוּ malu מַחֲשַׁכֵּי machashakey אֶרֶץ eretz נְאוֹת neot חָמָס chamas
21
Let not the downtrodden turn away disappointed;let the poor and needy praise Your name.
אַל El יָשֹׁב yashov דַּךְ dakh נִכְלָם nikhlam עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon יְהַלְלוּ yehalelu שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
22
Rise, O God, champion Your cause;be mindful that You are blasphemed by scoundrels all day long.
קוּמָה kumah אֱלֹהִים Elohim רִיבָה rivah רִיבֶךָ rivekha זְכֹר zekhor חֶרְפָּתְךָ cherpatkha מִנִּי mini נָבָל naval כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom
23
Do not ignore the shouts of Your foes,the din of Your adversaries that ascends all the time.
אַל El תִּשְׁכַּח tishkach קוֹל kol צֹרְרֶיךָ tzorereykha שְׁאוֹן sheon קָמֶיךָ kameykha עֹלֶה oleh תָמִיד tamid

Psalm 75

1
For the leader; al tashḥeth.A psalm of Asaph, a song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach אַל El תַּשְׁחֵת tashchet מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf שִׁיר shir
2
We praise You, O God;we praise You;Your presence is near;people tell of Your wondrous deeds.
הוֹדִינוּ hodinu לְּךָ lekha אֱלֹהִים Elohim הוֹדִינוּ hodinu וְקָרוֹב vekarov שְׁמֶךָ shemekha סִפְּרוּ sipru נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ nifloteykha
3
“At the time I choose,I will give judgment equitably.
כִּי ki אֶקַּח ekach מוֹעֵד moed אֲנִי ani מֵישָׁרִים meysharim אֶשְׁפֹּט eshpot
4
Earth and all its inhabitants dissolve;it is I who keep its pillars firm. Selah.
נְמֹגִים nemogim אֶרֶץ eretz וְכל vekhl יֹשְׁבֶיהָ yoshveyha אָנֹכִי anokhi תִכַּנְתִּי tikanti עַמּוּדֶיהָ amudeyha סֶּלָה selah
5
To the wanton I say, ‘Do not be wanton!’to the wicked, ‘Do not lift up your horns!’”
אָמַרְתִּי amarti לַהוֹלְלִים laholelim אַל El תָּהֹלּוּ taholu וְלָרְשָׁעִים velarshaim אַל El תָּרִימוּ tarimu קָרֶן karen
6
Do not lift your horns up highin vainglorious bluster.
אַל El תָּרִימוּ tarimu לַמָּרוֹם lamarom קַרְנְכֶם karnkhem תְּדַבְּרוּ tedabru בְצַוָּאר vetzauar עָתָק atak
7
For exaltation comes not from the eastor from the west or the wilderness; (with qamaṣ, not pataḥ), as in many mss.
כִּי ki לֹא lo מִמּוֹצָא mimotza וּמִמַּעֲרָב umimaarav וְלֹא velo מִמִּדְבַּר mimidbar הָרִים harim
8
for God it is who gives judgment—bringing down one and lifting up another.
כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim שֹׁפֵט shofet זֶה zeh יַשְׁפִּיל yashpil וְזֶה vezeh יָרִים yarim
9
There is a cup in GOD’s handwith foaming wine fully mixed;from this [God] pours;all the wicked of the earth drink,draining it to the very dregs.
כִּי ki כוֹס khos בְּיַד beyad יְהֹוָה Adonai וְיַיִן veyayin חָמַר chamar מָלֵא male מֶסֶךְ mesekh וַיַּגֵּר vayager מִזֶּה mizeh אַךְ akh שְׁמָרֶיהָ shemareyha יִמְצוּ yimtzu יִשְׁתּוּ yishtu כֹּל kol רִשְׁעֵי rishey אָרֶץ aretz
10
As for me, I will declare forever,I will sing a hymn to the God of Jacob.
וַאֲנִי vaani אַגִּיד agid לְעֹלָם leolam אֲזַמְּרָה azamrah לֵאלֹהֵי lelohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov
11
“All the horns of the wicked I will cut;but the horns of the righteous shall be lifted up.”
וְכל vekhl קַרְנֵי karney רְשָׁעִים reshaim אֲגַדֵּעַ agadea תְּרוֹמַמְנָה teromamnah קַרְנוֹת karnot צַדִּיק tzadik

Psalm 76

1
For the leader; with instrumental music.A psalm of Asaph, a song.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach בִּנְגִינֹת binginot מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf שִׁיר shir
2
God is known in Judah,God’s name is great in Israel;
נוֹדָע noda בִּיהוּדָה bihudah אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל beyisrael גָּדוֹל gadol שְׁמוֹ shemo
3
Salem became an abode;Zion, the divine den.
וַיְהִי vayhi בְשָׁלֵם veshalem סוּכּוֹ suko וּמְעוֹנָתוֹ umonato בְצִיּוֹן vetzion
4
There [God] broke the fiery arrows of the bow,the shield and the sword of war. Selah.
שָׁמָּה shamah שִׁבַּר shibar רִשְׁפֵי rishfey קָשֶׁת kashet מָגֵן magen וְחֶרֶב vecherev וּמִלְחָמָה umilchamah סֶלָה selah
5
You were resplendent,glorious, on the mountains of prey.
נָאוֹר naor אַתָּה atah אַדִּיר adir מֵהַרְרֵי meharerey טָרֶף taref
6
The stout-hearted were despoiled;they were in a stupor;the bravest of soldiers could not lift a hand.
אֶשְׁתּוֹלְלוּ eshtolelu אַבִּירֵי abirey לֵב lev נָמוּ namu שְׁנָתָם shenatam וְלֹא velo מָצְאוּ matzu כל khl אַנְשֵׁי anshey חַיִל chayil יְדֵיהֶם yedeyhem
7
At Your blast, O God of Jacob,horse and chariot lay stunned.
מִגַּעֲרָתְךָ migaaratkha אֱלֹהֵי elohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov נִרְדָּם nirdam וְרֶכֶב verekhev וָסוּס vasus
8
O You! You are awesome!Who can withstand Youwhen You are enraged?
אַתָּה atah נוֹרָא nora אַתָּה atah וּמִי umi יַעֲמֹד yaamod לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha מֵאָז meaz אַפֶּךָ apekha
9
In heaven You pronounced sentence;the earth was numbed with fright
מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim הִשְׁמַעְתָּ hishmata דִּין din אֶרֶץ eretz יָרְאָה yarah וְשָׁקָטָה veshakatah
10
as God rose to execute judgment,to deliver all the lowly of the earth. Selah.
בְּקוּם bekum לַמִּשְׁפָּט lamishpat אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְהוֹשִׁיעַ lehoshia כּל kl עַנְוֵי anvey אֶרֶץ eretz סֶלָה selah
11
Even the fiercest among humans shall acknowledge You,when You gird on the last bit of fury.
כִּי ki חֲמַת chamat אָדָם adam תּוֹדֶךָּ todeka שְׁאֵרִית sheerit חֵמֹת chemot תַּחְגֹּר tachgor
12
Make vows and pay them to the ETERNAL your God;those all around shall bring tribute to the Awesome One—
נִדְרוּ nidru וְשַׁלְּמוּ veshalmu לַיהֹוָה layhovah אֱלֹהֵיכֶם eloheykhem כּל kl סְבִיבָיו sevivayv יֹבִילוּ yovilu שַׁי shay לַמּוֹרָא lamora
13
who curbs the spirit of princes,inspires awe in the kings of the earth.
יִבְצֹר yivtzor רוּחַ ruach נְגִידִים negidim נוֹרָא nora לְמַלְכֵי lemalkhey אָרֶץ aretz

Psalm 77

1
For the leader; on Jeduthun.Of Asaph. A psalm.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al [יְדוּתוּן] yedutun (ידיתון) ydytvn לְאָסָף leasaf מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
I cry aloud to God;I cry to God that I may be heard.
קוֹלִי koli אֶל El אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְאֶצְעָקָה veetzakah קוֹלִי koli אֶל El אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְהַאֲזִין vehaazin אֵלָי elay
3
In my time of distress I turn to my Sovereign,with my hand [uplifted];[my eyes] flow all night without respite; I will not be comforted.
בְּיוֹם beyom צָרָתִי tzarati אֲדֹנָי Adonai דָּרָשְׁתִּי darashti יָדִי yadi לַיְלָה laylah נִגְּרָה nigrah וְלֹא velo תָפוּג tafug מֵאֲנָה meanah הִנָּחֵם hinachem נַפְשִׁי nafshi
4
I call God to mind, I moan,I complain, my spirit fails. Selah.
אֶזְכְּרָה ezkrah אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְאֶהֱמָיָה veehemayah אָשִׂיחָה asichah וְתִתְעַטֵּף vetitatef רוּחִי ruchi סֶלָה selah
5
You have held my eyelids open;I am overwrought, I cannot speak.
אָחַזְתָּ achazta שְׁמֻרוֹת shemurot עֵינָי eynay נִפְעַמְתִּי nifamti וְלֹא velo אֲדַבֵּר adaber
6
My thoughts turn to days of old,to years long past.
חִשַּׁבְתִּי chishavti יָמִים yamim מִקֶּדֶם mikedem שְׁנוֹת shenot עוֹלָמִים olamim
7
I recall at night their jibes at me;I commune with myself;my spirit inquires,
אֶזְכְּרָה ezkrah נְגִינָתִי neginati בַּלָּיְלָה balaylah עִם im לְבָבִי levavi אָשִׂיחָה asichah וַיְחַפֵּשׂ vaychapes רוּחִי ruchi
8
“Will my Sovereign reject foreverand never again show favor?
הַלְעוֹלָמִים halolamim יִזְנַחאֲדֹנָי yiznachadonay וְלֹא velo יֹסִיף yosif לִרְצוֹת lirtzot עוֹד od
9
Has such faithfulness disappeared forever?Will those promises be unfulfilled for all time?
הֶאָפֵס heafes לָנֶצַח lanetzach חַסְדּוֹ chasdo גָּמַר gamar אֹמֶר omer לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador
10
Has God forgotten how to pity?Has God’s compassion been stifled in anger?” Selah.
הֲשָׁכַח hashakhach חַנּוֹת chanot אֵל El אִם im קָפַץ kafatz בְּאַף beaf רַחֲמָיו rachamayv סֶלָה selah
11
And I said, “It is my faultthat the right hand of the Most High has changed.”
וָאֹמַר vaomar חַלּוֹתִי chaloti הִיא hi שְׁנוֹת shenot יְמִין yemin עֶלְיוֹן elyon
12
I recall the deeds of Yah; yes, I recall Your wonders of old;
(אזכיר) zkhyr [אֶזְכּוֹר] ezkor מַעַלְלֵי maaleley יָהּ Yah כִּי ki אֶזְכְּרָה ezkrah מִקֶּדֶם mikedem פִּלְאֶךָ pilekha
13
I recount all Your works;I speak of Your acts.
וְהָגִיתִי vehagiti בְכל vekhl פּעֳלֶךָ polekha וּבַעֲלִילוֹתֶיךָ uvaaliloteykha אָשִׂיחָה asichah
14
O God, Your ways are holiness;what god is as great as God?
אֱלֹהִים Elohim בַּקֹּדֶשׁ bakodesh דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha מִי mi אֵל El גָּדוֹל gadol כֵּאלֹהִים kelohim
15
You are the God who works wonders;You have manifested Your strength among the peoples.
אַתָּה atah הָאֵל hael עֹשֵׂה oseh פֶלֶא fele הוֹדַעְתָּ hodata בָעַמִּים vaamim עֻזֶּךָ uzekha
16
By Your arm You redeemed Your people,the children of Jacob and Joseph. Selah.
גָּאַלְתָּ gaalta בִּזְרוֹעַ bizroa עַמֶּךָ amekha בְּנֵי beney יַעֲקֹב yaakov וְיוֹסֵף veyosef סֶלָה selah
17
The waters saw You, O God,the waters saw You and were convulsed;the very deep quaked as well.
רָאוּךָ raukha מַּיִם mayim אֱלֹהִים Elohim רָאוּךָ raukha מַּיִם mayim יָחִילוּ yachilu אַף af יִרְגְּזוּ yirgzu תְהֹמוֹת tehomot
18
Clouds streamed water;the heavens rumbled;Your arrows flew about;
זֹרְמוּ zormu מַיִם mayim עָבוֹת avot קוֹל kol נָתְנוּ natnu שְׁחָקִים shechakim אַף af חֲצָצֶיךָ chatzatzeykha יִתְהַלָּכוּ yithalakhu
19
Your thunder rumbled like wheels;lightning lit up the world;the earth quaked and trembled.
קוֹל kol רַעַמְךָ raamkha בַּגַּלְגַּל bagalgal הֵאִירוּ heiru בְרָקִים verakim תֵּבֵל tevel רָגְזָה ragzah וַתִּרְעַשׁ vatirash הָאָרֶץ haaretz
20
Your way was through the sea,Your path, through the mighty waters;Your tracks could not be seen.
בַּיָּם bayam דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha (ושביליך) vshvylykh [וּשְׁבִילְךָ] ushvilkha בְּמַיִם bemayim רַבִּים rabim וְעִקְּבוֹתֶיךָ veikvoteykha לֹא lo נֹדָעוּ nodau
21
You led Your people like a flockin the care of Moses and Aaron.
נָחִיתָ nachita כַצֹּאן khatzon עַמֶּךָ amekha בְּיַד beyad מֹשֶׁה mosheh וְאַהֲרֹן veaharon

Psalm 78

1
A maskil of Asaph.Give ear, my people, to my teaching,turn your ear to what I say.
מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְאָסָף leasaf הַאֲזִינָה haazinah עַמִּי ami תּוֹרָתִי torati הַטּוּ hatu אזְנְכֶם znkhem לְאִמְרֵי leimrey פִי fi
2
I will expound a theme,hold forth on the lessons of the past—
אֶפְתְּחָה eftchah בְמָשָׁל vemashal פִּי pi אַבִּיעָה abiah חִידוֹת chidot מִנִּי mini קֶדֶם kedem
3
things we have heard and known,that our ancestors have told us.
אֲשֶׁר asher שָׁמַעְנוּ shamanu וַנֵּדָעֵם vanedaem וַאֲבוֹתֵינוּ vaavoteynu סִפְּרוּ sipru לָנוּ lanu
4
We will not withhold them from their children,telling the coming generationthe praises of GOD and of divine might,and the wonders performed.
לֹא lo נְכַחֵד nekhached מִבְּנֵיהֶם mibneyhem לְדוֹר ledor אַחֲרוֹן acharon מְסַפְּרִים mesaprim תְּהִלּוֹת tehilot יְהֹוָה Adonai וֶעֱזוּזוֹ veezuzo וְנִפְלְאֹתָיו veniflotayv אֲשֶׁר asher עָשָׂה asah
5
[God] established a decree in Jacob,ordained a teaching in Israel,charging our ancestorsto make them known to their children,
וַיָּקֶם vayakem עֵדוּת edut בְּיַעֲקֹב beyaakov וְתוֹרָה vetorah שָׂם sam בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל beyisrael אֲשֶׁר asher צִוָּה tziuah אֶת et אֲבוֹתֵינוּ avoteynu לְהוֹדִיעָם lehodiam לִבְנֵיהֶם livneyhem
6
that a future generation might know—children yet to be born—and in turn tell their children
לְמַעַן lemaan יֵדְעוּ yedu דּוֹר dor אַחֲרוֹן acharon בָּנִים banim יִוָּלֵדוּ yiualedu יָקֻמוּ yakumu וִיסַפְּרוּ visapru לִבְנֵיהֶם livneyhem
7
that they might put their confidence in God,and not forget God’s great deeds,but observe the commandments,
וְיָשִׂימוּ veyasimu בֵאלֹהִים velohim כִּסְלָם kislam וְלֹא velo יִשְׁכְּחוּ yishkchu מַעַלְלֵי maaleley אֵל El וּמִצְוֺתָיו umitzvotayv יִנְצֹרוּ yintzoru
8
and not be like their ancestors,a wayward and defiant generation,a generation whose heart was inconstant,whose spirit was not true to God.
וְלֹא velo יִהְיוּ yihyu כַּאֲבוֹתָם kaavotam דּוֹר dor סוֹרֵר sorer וּמֹרֶה umoreh דּוֹר dor לֹא lo הֵכִין hekhin לִבּוֹ libo וְלֹא velo נֶאֶמְנָה neemnah אֶת et אֵל El רוּחוֹ rucho
9
Like the Ephraimite archerswho played false in the day of battle,
בְּנֵי beney אֶפְרַיִם efrayim נוֹשְׁקֵי noshkey רוֹמֵי romey קָשֶׁת kashet הָפְכוּ hafkhu בְּיוֹם beyom קְרָב kerav
10
they did not keep God’s covenant,they refused to follow divine instruction;
לֹא lo שָׁמְרוּ shamru בְּרִית berit אֱלֹהִים Elohim וּבְתוֹרָתוֹ uvtorato מֵאֲנוּ meanu לָלֶכֶת lalekhet
11
they forgot what was done for themand the wonders they were shown.
וַיִּשְׁכְּחוּ vayishkchu עֲלִילוֹתָיו alilotayv וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו veniflotayv אֲשֶׁר asher הֶרְאָם heram
12
[God] performed marvels in the sight of their ancestors,in the land of Egypt, the plain of Zoan.
נֶגֶד neged אֲבוֹתָם avotam עָשָׂה asah פֶלֶא fele בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz מִצְרַיִם mitzrayim שְׂדֵה sedeh צֹעַן tzoan
13
[God] split the sea and took them through it—making the waters stand like a wall.
בָּקַע baka יָם yam וַיַּעֲבִירֵם vayaavirem וַיַּצֶּב vayatzev מַיִם mayim כְּמוֹ kemo נֵד ned
14
[God] led them with a cloud by day,and throughout the night by the light of fire.
וַיַּנְחֵם vayanchem בֶּעָנָן beanan יוֹמָם yomam וְכל vekhl הַלַּיְלָה halaylah בְּאוֹר beor אֵשׁ esh
15
[God] split rocks in the wildernessand gave them drink as if from the great deep.
יְבַקַּע yevaka צֻרִים tzurim בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar וַיַּשְׁקְ vayashk כִּתְהֹמוֹת kithomot רַבָּה rabah
16
[God] brought forth streams from a rockand made them flow down like a river.
וַיּוֹצִא vayotzi נוֹזְלִים nozlim מִסָּלַע misala וַיּוֹרֶד vayored כַּנְּהָרוֹת kanharot מָיִם mayim
17
But they went on sinning,defying the Most High in the parched land.
וַיּוֹסִיפוּ vayosifu עוֹד od לַחֲטֹא lachato לוֹ lo לַמְרוֹת lamrot עֶלְיוֹן elyon בַּצִּיָּה batziah
18
To test God was in their mindwhen they demanded food for themselves.
וַיְנַסּוּ vaynasu אֵל El בִּלְבָבָם bilvavam לִשְׁאל lishl אֹכֶל okhel לְנַפְשָׁם lenafsham
19
They spoke against God, saying,“Can God spread a feast in the wilderness?
וַיְדַבְּרוּ vaydabru בֵּאלֹהִים belohim אָמְרוּ amru הֲיוּכַל hayukhal אֵל El לַעֲרֹךְ laarokh שֻׁלְחָן shulchan בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar
20
True, [God] struck the rock and waters flowed,streams gushed forth;but can [God] provide breadand supply meat for this people?”
הֵן hen הִכָּה hikah צוּר tzur וַיָּזוּבוּ vayazuvu מַיִם mayim וּנְחָלִים unchalim יִשְׁטֹפוּ yishtofu הֲגַם hagam לֶחֶם lechem יוּכַל yukhal תֵּת tet אִם im יָכִין yakhin שְׁאֵר sheer לְעַמּוֹ leamo
21
GOD heard and then raged;fire broke out against Jacob,anger flared up at Israel,
לָכֵן lakhen שָׁמַע shama יְהֹוָה Adonai וַיִּתְעַבָּר vayitabar וְאֵשׁ veesh נִשְּׂקָה niskah בְיַעֲקֹב veyaakov וְגַם vegam אַף af עָלָה alah בְיִשְׂרָאֵל veyisrael
22
because they did not put their trust in God,did not rely on divine deliverance.
כִּי ki לֹא lo הֶאֱמִינוּ heeminu בֵּאלֹהִים belohim וְלֹא velo בָטְחוּ vatchu בִּישׁוּעָתוֹ bishuato
23
So [God] commanded the skies above,opened the doors of heaven
וַיְצַו vaytzav שְׁחָקִים shechakim מִמָּעַל mimaal וְדַלְתֵי vedaltey שָׁמַיִם shamayim פָּתָח patach
24
and rained manna upon them for food,giving them heavenly grain.
וַיַּמְטֵר vayamter עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem מָן man לֶאֱכֹל leekhol וּדְגַן udgan שָׁמַיִם shamayim נָתַן natan לָמוֹ lamo
25
Each person ate a hero’s meal;they were sent provision in plenty.
לֶחֶם lechem אַבִּירִים abirim אָכַל akhal אִישׁ ish צֵידָה tzeydah שָׁלַח shalach לָהֶם lahem לָשֹׂבַע lasova
26
[God] set the east wind moving in heaven,and drove the south wind mightily.
יַסַּע yasa קָדִים kadim בַּשָּׁמָיִם bashamayim וַיְנַהֵג vaynaheg בְּעֻזּוֹ beuzo תֵימָן teyman
27
[God] rained meat on them like dust,winged birds like the sands of the sea,
וַיַּמְטֵר vayamter עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem כֶּעָפָר keafar שְׁאֵר sheer וּכְחוֹל ukhchol יַמִּים yamim עוֹף of כָּנָף kanaf
28
making them come down inside God’s camp,around the divine dwelling-place.
וַיַּפֵּל vayapel בְּקֶרֶב bekerev מַחֲנֵהוּ machanehu סָבִיב saviv לְמִשְׁכְּנֹתָיו lemishknotayv
29
They ate till they were sated;they were given what they craved.
וַיֹּאכְלוּ vayokhlu וַיִּשְׂבְּעוּ vayisbu מְאֹד meod וְתַאֲוָתָם vetaavatam יָבִא yavi לָהֶם lahem
30
They had not yet wearied of what they craved,the food was still in their mouths
לֹא lo זָרוּ zaru מִתַּאֲוָתָם mitaavatam עוֹד od אכְלָם khlam בְּפִיהֶם befihem
31
when God’s anger flared up at them.[God] slew their sturdiest,struck down the youth of Israel.
וְאַף veaf אֱלֹהִים Elohim עָלָה alah בָהֶם vahem וַיַּהֲרֹג vayaharog בְּמִשְׁמַנֵּיהֶם bemishmaneyhem וּבַחוּרֵי uvachurey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael הִכְרִיעַ hikhria
32
Nonetheless, they went on sinningand had no faith in God’s wonders.
בְּכל bekhl זֹאת zot חָטְאוּ chatu עוֹד od וְלֹא velo הֶאֱמִינוּ heeminu בְּנִפְלְאוֹתָיו beniflotayv
33
Their days were made to end in futility,their years in sudden death.
וַיְכַל vaykhal בַּהֶבֶל bahevel יְמֵיהֶם yemeyhem וּשְׁנוֹתָם ushnotam בַּבֶּהָלָה babehalah
34
When stricken, they returned,and sought God once again.
אִם im הֲרָגָם haragam וּדְרָשׁוּהוּ udrashuhu וְשָׁבוּ veshavu וְשִׁחֲרוּ veshicharu אֵל El
35
They remembered that God was their rock,God Most High, their Redeemer.
וַיִּזְכְּרוּ vayizkru כִּי ki אֱלֹהִים Elohim צוּרָם tzuram וְאֵל veel עֶלְיוֹן elyon גֹּאֲלָם goalam
36
Yet they deceived [God] with their speech,and lied with their words.
וַיְפַתּוּהוּ vayfatuhu בְּפִיהֶם befihem וּבִלְשׁוֹנָם uvilshonam יְכַזְּבוּ yekhazvu לוֹ lo
37
Their hearts were inconstant;they were untrue to the covenant.
וְלִבָּם velibam לֹא lo נָכוֹן nakhon עִמּוֹ imo וְלֹא velo נֶאֶמְנוּ neemnu בִּבְרִיתוֹ bivrito
38
But [God], being merciful, forgave iniquityand would not destroy—restraining wrath time and againand not giving full vent to such fury—
וְהוּא vehu רַחוּם rachum יְכַפֵּר yekhaper עָוֺן avon וְלֹא velo יַשְׁחִית yashchit וְהִרְבָּה vehirbah לְהָשִׁיב lehashiv אַפּוֹ apo וְלֹא velo יָעִיר yair כּל kl חֲמָתוֹ chamato
39
remembering that they were but flesh,a passing breath that does not return.
וַיִּזְכֹּר vayizkor כִּי ki בָשָׂר vasar הֵמָּה hemah רוּחַ ruach הוֹלֵךְ holekh וְלֹא velo יָשׁוּב yashuv
40
How often did they act defiantly in the wilderness,then cause grief in the wasteland!
כַּמָּה kamah יַמְרוּהוּ yamruhu בַמִּדְבָּר vamidbar יַעֲצִיבוּהוּ yaatzivuhu בִּישִׁימוֹן bishimon
41
Again and again they tested God,vexed the Holy One of Israel.
וַיָּשׁוּבוּ vayashuvu וַיְנַסּוּ vaynasu אֵל El וּקְדוֹשׁ ukdosh יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael הִתְווּ hitvu
42
They did not remember God’s strength,or the day they were redeemed from the foe;
לֹא lo זָכְרוּ zakhru אֶת et יָדוֹ yado יוֹם yom אֲשֶׁר asher פָּדָם padam מִנִּי mini צָר tzar
43
how [God] displayed signs in Egypt,and wonders in the plain of Zoan.
אֲשֶׁר asher שָׂם sam בְּמִצְרַיִם bemitzrayim אֹתוֹתָיו ototayv וּמוֹפְתָיו umoftayv בִּשְׂדֵה bisdeh צֹעַן tzoan
44
[God first] turned their rivers into blood—making their waters undrinkable;
וַיַּהֲפֹךְ vayahafokh לְדָם ledam יְאֹרֵיהֶם yeoreyhem וְנֹזְלֵיהֶם venozleyhem בַּל bal יִשְׁתָּיוּן yishtayun
45
then inflicted upon them swarms of insects to devour them,frogs to destroy them;
יְשַׁלַּח yeshalach בָּהֶם bahem עָרֹב arov וַיֹּאכְלֵם vayokhlem וּצְפַרְדֵּעַ utzfardea וַתַּשְׁחִיתֵם vatashchitem
46
then gave their crops over to grubs,their produce to locusts;
וַיִּתֵּן vayiten לֶחָסִיל lechasil יְבוּלָם yevulam וִיגִיעָם vigiam לָאַרְבֶּה laarbeh
47
then killed their vines with hail,their sycamores with frost;
יַהֲרֹג yaharog בַּבָּרָד babarad גַּפְנָם gafnam וְשִׁקְמוֹתָם veshikmotam בַּחֲנָמַל bachanamal
48
then gave their beasts over to hail,their cattle to lightning bolts;
וַיַּסְגֵּר vayasger לַבָּרָד labarad בְּעִירָם beiram וּמִקְנֵיהֶם umikneyhem לָרְשָׁפִים larshafim
49
and inflicted a burning anger upon them—wrath, indignation, trouble,a band of deadly messengers.
יְשַׁלַּח yeshalach בָּם bam חֲרוֹן charon אַפּוֹ apo עֶבְרָה evrah וָזַעַם vazaam וְצָרָה vetzarah מִשְׁלַחַת mishlachat מַלְאֲכֵי malakhey רָעִים raim
50
[God] cleared a path for that anger,and did not stop short of slaying them,but gave them over to pestilence.
יְפַלֵּס yefales נָתִיב nativ לְאַפּוֹ leapo לֹא lo חָשַׂךְ chasakh מִמָּוֶת mimavet נַפְשָׁם nafsham וְחַיָּתָם vechayatam לַדֶּבֶר ladever הִסְגִּיר hisgir
51
[God] struck every [male] first-born in Egypt,the first fruits of their vigor in the tents of Ham.
וַיַּךְ vayakh כּל kl בְּכוֹר bekhor בְּמִצְרָיִם bemitzrayim רֵאשִׁית reshit אוֹנִים onim בְּאהֳלֵי beholey חָם cham
52
God’s own people were set moving like sheep,driven like a flock in the wilderness.
וַיַּסַּע vayasa כַּצֹּאן katzon עַמּוֹ amo וַיְנַהֲגֵם vaynahagem כַּעֵדֶר kaeder בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar
53
[God] led them in safety; they were unafraid;as for their enemies, the sea covered them.
וַיַּנְחֵם vayanchem לָבֶטַח lavetach וְלֹא velo פָחָדוּ fachadu וְאֶת veet אוֹיְבֵיהֶם oyveyhem כִּסָּה kisah הַיָּם hayam
54
[God] brought them to the holy realm, the mountain God’s right hand had acquired.
וַיְבִיאֵם vayviem אֶל El גְּבוּל gevul קדְשׁוֹ kdsho הַר har זֶה zeh קָנְתָה kantah יְמִינוֹ yemino
55
[God] expelled nations before them,settled the tribes of Israel in their tents,allotting them their portion by the line.
וַיְגָרֶשׁ vaygaresh מִפְּנֵיהֶם mipneyhem גּוֹיִם goyim וַיַּפִּילֵם vayapilem בְּחֶבֶל bechevel נַחֲלָה nachalah וַיַּשְׁכֵּן vayashken בְּאהֳלֵיהֶם beholeyhem שִׁבְטֵי shivtey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
56
Yet they defiantly tested God Most High,and did not observe divine decrees.
וַיְנַסּוּ vaynasu וַיַּמְרוּ vayamru אֶת et אֱלֹהִים Elohim עֶלְיוֹן elyon וְעֵדוֹתָיו veedotayv לֹא lo שָׁמָרוּ shamaru
57
They fell away, disloyal like their ancestors;they played false like a treacherous bow.
וַיִּסֹּגוּ vayisogu וַיִּבְגְּדוּ vayivgdu כַּאֲבוֹתָם kaavotam נֶהְפְּכוּ nehpkhu כְּקֶשֶׁת kekeshet רְמִיָּה remiah
58
They provoked anger with their high places;they kindled wrath with their idols.
וַיַּכְעִיסוּהוּ vayakhisuhu בְּבָמוֹתָם bevamotam וּבִפְסִילֵיהֶם uvifsileyhem יַקְנִיאוּהוּ yakniuhu
59
God heard it and was enraged—utterly rejecting Israel.
שָׁמַע shama אֱלֹהִים Elohim וַיִּתְעַבָּר vayitabar וַיִּמְאַס vayimas מְאֹד meod בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל beyisrael
60
[God] forsook the tabernacle of Shiloh,the tent that had been set among mortals.
וַיִּטֹּשׁ vayitosh מִשְׁכַּן mishkan שִׁלוֹ shilo אֹהֶל ohel שִׁכֵּן shiken בָּאָדָם baadam
61
God’s might was allowed to go into captivity,that glory into the hands of the foe.
וַיִּתֵּן vayiten לַשְּׁבִי lashvi עֻזּוֹ uzo וְתִפְאַרְתּוֹ vetifarto בְיַד veyad צָר tzar
62
This people was given over to the sword;God’s very own the object of rage.
וַיַּסְגֵּר vayasger לַחֶרֶב lacherev עַמּוֹ amo וּבְנַחֲלָתוֹ uvnachalato הִתְעַבָּר hitabar
63
Fire consumed their young men,and their maidens remained unwed.
בַּחוּרָיו bachurayv אָכְלָה akhlah אֵשׁ esh וּבְתוּלֹתָיו uvtulotayv לֹא lo הוּלָּלוּ hulalu
64
Their priests fell by the sword,and their widows could not weep.
כֹּהֲנָיו kohanayv בַּחֶרֶב bacherev נָפָלוּ nafalu וְאַלְמְנֹתָיו vealmnotayv לֹא lo תִבְכֶּינָה tivkeynah
65
The Sovereign awoke as from sleep—like a warrior shaking off wine—
וַיִּקַץ vayikatz כְּיָשֵׁןאֲדֹנָי keyashenadonay כְּגִבּוֹר kegibor מִתְרוֹנֵן mitronen מִיָּיִן miayin
66
and beat back all foes,dealing them lasting disgrace.
וַיַּךְ vayakh צָרָיו tzarayv אָחוֹר achor חֶרְפַּת cherpat עוֹלָם olam נָתַן natan לָמוֹ lamo
67
[God] rejected the clan of Josephand did not choose the tribe of Ephraim.
וַיִּמְאַס vayimas בְּאֹהֶל beohel יוֹסֵף yosef וּבְשֵׁבֶט uvshevet אֶפְרַיִם efrayim לֹא lo בָחָר vachar
68
[God] did choose the tribe of Judah—Mount Zion, which was beloved—
וַיִּבְחַר vayivchar אֶת et שֵׁבֶט shevet יְהוּדָה yehudah אֶת et הַר har צִיּוֹן tzion אֲשֶׁר asher אָהֵב ahev
69
building the Sanctuary like the heavens,like the earth that [God] established forever.
וַיִּבֶן vayiven כְּמוֹ kemo רָמִים ramim מִקְדָּשׁוֹ mikdasho כְּאֶרֶץ keeretz יְסָדָהּ yesadah לְעוֹלָם leolam
70
David, God’s servant, was chosen,and taken from the sheepfolds.
וַיִּבְחַר vayivchar בְּדָוִד bedavid עַבְדּוֹ avdo וַיִּקָּחֵהוּ vayikachehu מִמִּכְלְאֹת mimikhlot צֹאן tzon
71
He was brought from minding the nursing ewesto tend the people of Jacob, Israel, God’s very own.
מֵאַחַר meachar עָלוֹת alot הֱבִיאוֹ hevio לִרְעוֹת lirot בְּיַעֲקֹב beyaakov עַמּוֹ amo וּבְיִשְׂרָאֵל uvyisrael נַחֲלָתוֹ nachalato
72
He tended them with blameless heart;with skillful hands he led them.
וַיִּרְעֵם vayirem כְּתֹם ketom לְבָבוֹ levavo וּבִתְבוּנוֹת uvitvunot כַּפָּיו kapayv יַנְחֵם yanchem

Psalm 79

1
A psalm of Asaph.O God, heathens have entered Your domain,defiled Your holy temple,and turned Jerusalem into ruins.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf אֱלֹהִים Elohim בָּאוּ bau גוֹיִם goyim בְּנַחֲלָתֶךָ benachalatekha טִמְּאוּ timu אֶת et הֵיכַל heykhal קדְשֶׁךָ kdshekha שָׂמוּ samu אֶת et יְרוּשָׁלַ͏ִם yerushalaim לְעִיִּים leiim
2
They have left Your servants’ corpsesas food for the fowl of heaven,and the flesh of Your faithful for the wild beasts.
נָתְנוּ natnu אֶת et נִבְלַת nivlat עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha מַאֲכָל maakhal לְעוֹף leof הַשָּׁמָיִם hashamayim בְּשַׂר besar חֲסִידֶיךָ chasideykha לְחַיְתוֹ lechayto אָרֶץ aretz
3
Their blood was shed like water around Jerusalem,with none to bury them.
שָׁפְכוּ shafkhu דָמָם damam כַּמַּיִם kamayim סְבִיבוֹת sevivot יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim וְאֵין veeyn קוֹבֵר kover
4
We have become the butt of our neighbors,the scorn and derision of those around us.
הָיִינוּ hayinu חֶרְפָּה cherpah לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ lishkheneynu לַעַג laag וָקֶלֶס vakeles לִסְבִיבוֹתֵינוּ lisvivoteynu
5
How long, O ETERNAL One, will You be angry forever,will Your indignation blaze like fire?
עַד ad מָה mah יְהֹוָה Adonai תֶּאֱנַף teenaf לָנֶצַח lanetzach תִּבְעַר tivar כְּמוֹ kemo אֵשׁ esh קִנְאָתֶךָ kinatekha
6
Pour out Your fury on the nations that do not know You,upon the kingdoms that do not invoke Your name,
שְׁפֹךְ shefokh חֲמָתְךָ chamatkha אֶל El הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo יְדָעוּךָ yedaukha וְעַל veal מַמְלָכוֹת mamlakhot אֲשֶׁר asher בְּשִׁמְךָ beshimkha לֹא lo קָרָאוּ karau
7
for they have devoured Jacoband desolated his home.
כִּי ki אָכַל akhal אֶת et יַעֲקֹב yaakov וְאֶת veet נָוֵהוּ navehu הֵשַׁמּוּ heshamu
8
Do not hold our former iniquities against us;let Your compassion come swiftly toward us,for we have sunk very low.
אַל El תִּזְכּר tizkr לָנוּ lanu עֲוֺנֹת avonot רִאשֹׁנִים rishonim מַהֵר maher יְקַדְּמוּנוּ yekadmunu רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha כִּי ki דַלּוֹנוּ dalonu מְאֹד meod
9
Help us, O God, our deliverer,for the sake of the glory of Your name.Save us and forgive our sin,for the sake of Your name.
עזְרֵנוּ zrenu אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׁעֵנוּ yishenu עַל al דְּבַר devar כְּבוֹד kevod שְׁמֶךָ shemekha וְהַצִּילֵנוּ vehatzilenu וְכַפֵּר vekhaper עַל al חַטֹּאתֵינוּ chatoteynu לְמַעַן lemaan שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
10
Let the nations not say, “Where is their God?”Before our eyes let it be known among the nationsthat You avenge the spilled blood of Your servants.
לָמָּה lamah יֹאמְרוּ yomru הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim אַיֵּה ayeh אֱלֹהֵיהֶם eloheyhem יִוָּדַע yiuada (בגיים) vgyym [בַּגּוֹיִם] bagoyim לְעֵינֵינוּ leeyneynu נִקְמַת nikmat דַּם dam עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha הַשָּׁפוּךְ hashafukh
11
Let the groans of the prisoners reach You;reprieve those condemned to death,as befits Your great strength.
תָּבוֹא tavo לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha אֶנְקַת enkat אָסִיר asir כְּגֹדֶל kegodel זְרוֹעֲךָ zeroakha הוֹתֵר hoter בְּנֵי beney תְמוּתָה temutah
12
Pay back our neighbors sevenfoldfor the abuse they have flung at You, O Sovereign.
וְהָשֵׁב vehashev לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ lishkheneynu שִׁבְעָתַיִם shivatayim אֶל El חֵיקָם cheykam חֶרְפָּתָם cherpatam אֲשֶׁר asher חֵרְפוּךָ cherfukha אֲדֹנָי Adonai
13
Then we, Your people,the flock You shepherd,shall glorify You forever;for all time we shall tell Your praises.
וַאֲנַחְנוּ vaanachnu עַמְּךָ amkha וְצֹאן vetzon מַרְעִיתֶךָ maritekha נוֹדֶה nodeh לְּךָ lekha לְעוֹלָם leolam לְדוֹר ledor וָדֹר vador נְסַפֵּר nesaper תְּהִלָּתֶךָ tehilatekha

Psalm 80

1
For the leader; on shoshannim, eduth. Of Asaph. A psalm.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach אֶל El שֹׁשַׁנִּים shoshanim עֵדוּת edut לְאָסָף leasaf מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
Give ear, O shepherd of Israelwho leads Joseph like a flock!Appear, You who are enthroned on the cherubim,
רֹעֵה roeh יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael הַאֲזִינָה haazinah נֹהֵג noheg כַּצֹּאן katzon יוֹסֵף yosef יֹשֵׁב yoshev הַכְּרוּבִים hakruvim הוֹפִיעָה hofiah
3
at the head of Ephraim, Benjamin, and Manasseh!Rouse Your might and come to our help!
לִפְנֵי lifney אֶפְרַיִם efrayim וּבִנְיָמִן uvinyamin וּמְנַשֶּׁה umnasheh עוֹרְרָה orerah אֶת et גְּבוּרָתֶךָ gevuratekha וּלְכָה ulkhah לִישֻׁעָתָה lishuatah לָּנוּ lanu
4
Restore us, O God;show Your favor that we may be delivered.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim הֲשִׁיבֵנוּ hashivenu וְהָאֵר vehaer פָּנֶיךָ paneykha וְנִוָּשֵׁעָה veniuasheah
5
O ETERNAL One, God of hosts,how long will You be wrathfultoward the prayers of Your people?
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהִים Elohim צְבָאוֹת tzevaot עַד ad מָתַי matay עָשַׁנְתָּ ashanta בִּתְפִלַּת bitfilat עַמֶּךָ amekha
6
You have fed them tears as their daily bread,made them drink great measures of tears.
הֶאֱכַלְתָּם heekhaltam לֶחֶם lechem דִּמְעָה dimah וַתַּשְׁקֵמוֹ vatashkemo בִּדְמָעוֹת bidmaot שָׁלִישׁ shalish
7
You set us at strife with our neighbors;our enemies mock us at will.
תְּשִׂימֵנוּ tesimenu מָדוֹן madon לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ lishkheneynu וְאֹיְבֵינוּ veoyveynu יִלְעֲגוּ yilagu לָמוֹ lamo
8
O God of hosts, restore us;show Your favor that we may be delivered.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim צְבָאוֹת tzevaot הֲשִׁיבֵנוּ hashivenu וְהָאֵר vehaer פָּנֶיךָ paneykha וְנִוָּשֵׁעָה veniuasheah
9
You plucked up a vine from Egypt;You expelled nations and planted it.
גֶּפֶן gefen מִמִּצְרַיִם mimitzrayim תַּסִּיעַ tasia תְּגָרֵשׁ tegaresh גּוֹיִם goyim וַתִּטָּעֶהָ vatitaeha
10
You cleared a place for it;it took deep root and filled the land.
פִּנִּיתָ pinita לְפָנֶיהָ lefaneyha וַתַּשְׁרֵשׁ vatashresh שׁרָשֶׁיהָ shrasheyha וַתְּמַלֵּא vatmale אָרֶץ aretz
11
The mountains were covered by its shade,mighty cedars by its boughs.
כּסּוּ ksu הָרִים harim צִלָּהּ tzilah וַעֲנָפֶיהָ vaanafeyha אַרְזֵי arzey אֵל El
12
Its branches reached the sea,its shoots, the river.
תְּשַׁלַּח teshalach קְצִירֶהָ ketzireha עַד ad יָם yam וְאֶל veel נָהָר nahar יוֹנְקוֹתֶיהָ yonkoteyha
13
Why did You breach its wallso that every passerby plucks its fruit,
לָמָּה lamah פָּרַצְתָּ paratzta גְדֵרֶיהָ gedereyha וְאָרוּהָ vearuha כּל kl עֹבְרֵי ovrey דָרֶךְ darekh
14
wild boars gnaw at it,and creatures of the field feed on it?
יְכַרְסְמֶנָּה yekharsmenah חֲזִיר chazir מִיָּעַר miaar וְזִיז veziz שָׂדַי saday יִרְעֶנָּה yirenah
15
O God of hosts, turn again,look down from heaven and see;take note of that vine,
אֱלֹהִים Elohim צְבָאוֹת tzevaot שׁוּב shuv נָא na הַבֵּט habet מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim וּרְאֵה ureh וּפְקֹד ufkod גֶּפֶן gefen זֹאת zot
16
the stock planted by Your right hand,the stem you have taken as Your own.
וְכַנָּה vekhanah אֲשֶׁר asher נָטְעָה natah יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha וְעַל veal בֵּן ben אִמַּצְתָּה imatztah לָּךְ lakh
17
For it is burned by fire and cut down,perishing before Your angry blast.
שְׂרֻפָה serufah בָאֵשׁ vaesh כְּסוּחָה kesuchah מִגַּעֲרַת migaarat פָּנֶיךָ paneykha יֹאבֵדוּ yovedu
18
Grant Your help to the one at Your right hand,the mortal You have taken as Your own.
תְּהִי tehi יָדְךָ yadkha עַל al אִישׁ ish יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha עַל al בֶּן ben אָדָם adam אִמַּצְתָּ imatzta לָּךְ lakh
19
We will not turn away from You;preserve our life that we may invoke Your name.
וְלֹא velo נָסוֹג nasog מִמֶּךָּ mimeka תְּחַיֵּנוּ techayenu וּבְשִׁמְךָ uvshimkha נִקְרָא nikra
20
O ETERNAL One, God of hosts, restore us;show Your favor that we may be delivered.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהִים Elohim צְבָאוֹת tzevaot הֲשִׁיבֵנוּ hashivenu הָאֵר haer פָּנֶיךָ paneykha וְנִוָּשֵׁעָה veniuasheah

Psalm 81

1
For the leader; on the gittith. Of Asaph.
לַמְנַצֵּחַעַל lamnatzechaal הַגִּתִּית hagitit לְאָסָף leasaf
2
Sing joyously to God, our strength;raise a shout for the God of Jacob.
הַרְנִינוּ harninu לֵאלֹהִים lelohim עוּזֵּנוּ uzenu הָרִיעוּ hariu לֵאלֹהֵי lelohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov
3
Take up the song,sound the hand-drum,the melodious lyre and harp.
שְׂאוּ seu זִמְרָה zimrah וּתְנוּ utnu תֹף tof כִּנּוֹר kinor נָעִים naim עִם im נָבֶל navel
4
Blow the horn on the new moon,on the full moon for our feast day.
תִּקְעוּ tiku בַחֹדֶשׁ vachodesh שׁוֹפָר shofar בַּכֵּסֶה bakeseh לְיוֹם leyom חַגֵּנוּ chagenu
5
For it is a law for Israel,a ruling of the God of Jacob—
כִּי ki חֹק chok לְיִשְׂרָאֵל leyisrael הוּא hu מִשְׁפָּט mishpat לֵאלֹהֵי lelohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov
6
imposed as a decree upon Josephwhen he went forth from the land of Egypt;I heard a language that I knew not.
עֵדוּת edut בִּיהוֹסֵף bihosef שָׂמוֹ samo בְּצֵאתוֹ betzeto עַל al אֶרֶץ eretz מִצְרָיִם mitzrayim שְׂפַת sefat לֹא lo יָדַעְתִּי yadati אֶשְׁמָע eshma
7
“I relieved his shoulder of the burden,his hands were freed from the basket.
הֲסִירוֹתִי hasiroti מִסֵּבֶל misevel שִׁכְמוֹ shikhmo כַּפָּיו kapayv מִדּוּד midud תַּעֲבֹרְנָה taavornah
8
In distress you called and I rescued you;I answered you from the secret place of thunder I tested you at the Waters of Meribah. Selah.
בַּצָּרָה batzarah קָרָאתָ karata וָאֲחַלְּצֶךָּ vaachaltzeka אֶעֶנְךָ eenkha בְּסֵתֶר beseter רַעַם raam אֶבְחנְךָ evchnkha עַל al מֵי mey מְרִיבָה merivah סֶלָה selah
9
Hear, My people, and I will admonish you;Israel, if you would but listen to Me!
שְׁמַע shema עַמִּי ami וְאָעִידָה veaidah בָּךְ bakh יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael אִם im תִּשְׁמַע tishma לִי li
10
You shall have no foreign god,you shall not bow to an alien god.
לֹא lo יִהְיֶה yihyeh בְךָ vekha אֵל El זָר zar וְלֹא velo תִשְׁתַּחֲוֶה tishtachaveh לְאֵל leel נֵכָר nekhar
11
I the ETERNAL am your Godwho brought you out of the land of Egypt;open your mouth wide and I will fill it.
אָנֹכִי anokhi יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֶיךָ eloheykha הַמַּעַלְךָ hamaalkha מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz מִצְרָיִם mitzrayim הַרְחֶב harchev פִּיךָ pikha וַאֲמַלְאֵהוּ vaamalehu
12
But My people would not listen to Me,Israel would not obey Me.
וְלֹא velo שָׁמַע shama עַמִּי ami לְקוֹלִי lekoli וְיִשְׂרָאֵל veyisrael לֹא lo אָבָה avah לִי li
13
So I let them go after their willful heartthat they might follow their own devices.
וָאֲשַׁלְּחֵהוּ vaashalchehu בִּשְׁרִירוּת bishrirut לִבָּם libam יֵלְכוּ yelkhu בְּמוֹעֲצוֹתֵיהֶם bemoatzoteyhem
14
If only My people would listen to Me,if Israel would follow My paths,
לוּ lu עַמִּי ami שֹׁמֵעַ shomea לִי li יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael בִּדְרָכַי bidrakhay יְהַלֵּכוּ yehalekhu
15
then would I subdue their enemies at once,strike their foes again and again.”
כִּמְעַט kimat אוֹיְבֵיהֶם oyveyhem אַכְנִיעַ akhnia וְעַל veal צָרֵיהֶם tzareyhem אָשִׁיב ashiv יָדִי yadi
16
Those who hate GOD shall cower;their doom shall be eternal.
מְשַׂנְאֵי mesaney יְהֹוָה Adonai יְכַחֲשׁוּ yekhachashu לוֹ lo וִיהִי vihi עִתָּם itam לְעוֹלָם leolam
17
[God] fed Israel the finest wheat;“I sated you with honey from the rock.”
וַיַּאֲכִילֵהוּ vayaakhilehu מֵחֵלֶב mechelev חִטָּה chitah וּמִצּוּר umitzur דְּבַשׁ devash אַשְׂבִּיעֶךָ asbiekha

Psalm 82

1
A psalm of Asaph.God stands in the divine assembly,pronouncing judgment among the divine beings.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf אֱלֹהִים Elohim נִצָּב nitzav בַּעֲדַת baadat אֵל El בְּקֶרֶב bekerev אֱלֹהִים Elohim יִשְׁפֹּט yishpot
2
How long will you judge perversely,showing favor to the wicked? Selah.
עַד ad מָתַי matay תִּשְׁפְּטוּ tishptu עָוֶל avel וּפְנֵי ufney רְשָׁעִים reshaim תִּשְׂאוּ tisu סֶלָה selah
3
Judge the wretched and the orphan,vindicate the lowly and the poor,
שִׁפְטוּ shiftu דַל dal וְיָתוֹם veyatom עָנִי ani וָרָשׁ varash הַצְדִּיקוּ hatzdiku
4
rescue the wretched and the needy;save them from the hand of the wicked.
פַּלְּטוּ paltu דַל dal וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon מִיַּד miad רְשָׁעִים reshaim הַצִּילוּ hatzilu
5
They neither know nor understand,they go about in darkness;all the foundations of the earth totter.
לֹא lo יָדְעוּ yadu וְלֹא velo יָבִינוּ yavinu בַּחֲשֵׁכָה bachashekhah יִתְהַלָּכוּ yithalakhu יִמּוֹטוּ yimotu כּל kl מוֹסְדֵי mosdey אָרֶץ aretz
6
I had taken you for divine beings,attendants of the Most High, all of you;
אֲנִי ani אָמַרְתִּי amarti אֱלֹהִים Elohim אַתֶּם atem וּבְנֵי uvney עֶלְיוֹן elyon כֻּלְּכֶם kulkhem
7
but you shall die as mortals do,fall like any prince.
אָכֵן akhen כְּאָדָם keadam תְּמוּתוּן temutun וּכְאַחַד ukhachad הַשָּׂרִים hasarim תִּפֹּלוּ tipolu
8
Arise, O God, judge the earth,for all the nations are Your possession.
קוּמָה kumah אֱלֹהִים Elohim שׁפְטָה shftah הָאָרֶץ haaretz כִּי ki אַתָּה atah תִנְחַל tinchal בְּכל bekhl הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim

Psalm 83

1
A song, a psalm of Asaph.
שִׁיר shir מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְאָסָף leasaf
2
O God, do not be silent;do not hold aloof;do not be quiet, O God!
אֱלֹהִים Elohim אַל El דֳּמִי domi לָךְ lakh אַל El תֶּחֱרַשׁ techerash וְאַל veal תִּשְׁקֹט tishkot אֵל El
3
For Your enemies rage,Your foes assert themselves.
כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh אוֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha יֶהֱמָיוּן yehemayun וּמְשַׂנְאֶיךָ umsaneykha נָשְׂאוּ nasu רֹאשׁ rosh
4
They plot craftily against Your people,take counsel against Your treasured ones.
עַל al עַמְּךָ amkha יַעֲרִימוּ yaarimu סוֹד sod וְיִתְיָעֲצוּ veyityaatzu עַל al צְפוּנֶיךָ tzefuneykha
5
They say, “Let us wipe them out as a nation;Israel’s name will be mentioned no more.”
אָמְרוּ amru לְכוּ lekhu וְנַכְחִידֵם venakhchidem מִגּוֹי migoy וְלֹא velo יִזָּכֵר yizakher שֵׁם shem יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael עוֹד od
6
Unanimous in their counselthey have made an alliance against You—
כִּי ki נוֹעֲצוּ noatzu לֵב lev יַחְדָּו yachdav עָלֶיךָ aleykha בְּרִית berit יִכְרֹתוּ yikhrotu
7
the clans of Edom and the Ishmaelites,Moab and the Hagrites,
אהֳלֵי holey אֱדוֹם edom וְיִשְׁמְעֵאלִים veyishmelim מוֹאָב moav וְהַגְרִים vehagrim
8
Gebal, Ammon, and Amalek,Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;
גְּבָל geval וְעַמּוֹן veamon וַעֲמָלֵק vaamalek פְּלֶשֶׁת peleshet עִם im יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey צוֹר tzor
9
Assyria too joins forces with them;they give support to the descendants of Lot. Selah.
גַּם gam אַשּׁוּר ashur נִלְוָה nilvah עִמָּם imam הָיוּ hayu זְרוֹעַ zeroa לִבְנֵי livney לוֹט lot סֶלָה selah
10
Deal with them as You did with Midian,with Sisera, with Jabin,at the brook Kishon—
עֲשֵׂה aseh לָהֶם lahem כְּמִדְיָן kemidyan כְּסִיסְרָא kesisra כְיָבִין kheyavin בְּנַחַל benachal קִישׁוֹן kishon
11
who were destroyed at En-dor,who became dung for the field.
נִשְׁמְדוּ nishmdu בְעֵין veeyn דֹּאר dor הָיוּ hayu דֹמֶן domen לָאֲדָמָה laadamah
12
Treat their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb,all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna,
שִׁיתֵמוֹ shitemo נְדִיבֵימוֹ nediveymo כְּעֹרֵב keorev וְכִזְאֵב vekhizev וּכְזֶבַח ukhzevach וּכְצַלְמֻנָּע ukhtzalmuna כּל kl נְסִיכֵימוֹ nesikheymo
13
who said, “Let us take the meadows of God as our possession.”
אֲשֶׁר asher אָמְרוּ amru נִירְשָׁה nirshah לָּנוּ lanu אֵת et נְאוֹת neot אֱלֹהִים Elohim
14
O my God, make them like thistledown,like stubble driven by the wind.
אֱלֹהַי elohay שִׁיתֵמוֹ shitemo כַגַּלְגַּל khagalgal כְּקַשׁ kekash לִפְנֵי lifney רוּחַ ruach
15
As a fire burns a forest,as flames scorch the hills,
כְּאֵשׁ keesh תִּבְעַר tivar יָעַר yaar וּכְלֶהָבָה ukhlehavah תְּלַהֵט telahet הָרִים harim
16
pursue them with Your tempest,terrify them with Your storm.
כֵּן ken תִּרְדְּפֵם tirdfem בְּסַעֲרֶךָ besaarekha וּבְסוּפָתְךָ uvsufatkha תְבַהֲלֵם tevahalem
17
Cover their faces with shameso that they seek Your name, O ETERNAL One.
מַלֵּא male פְנֵיהֶם feneyhem קָלוֹן kalon וִיבַקְשׁוּ vivakshu שִׁמְךָ shimkha יְהֹוָה Adonai
18
May they be frustrated and terrified,disgraced and doomed forever.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיִבָּהֲלוּ veyibahalu עֲדֵי adey עַד ad וְיַחְפְּרוּ veyachpru וְיֹאבֵדוּ veyovedu
19
May they knowthat Your name, Yours alone, is GOD,supreme over all the earth.
וְיֵדְעוּ veyedu כִּי ki אַתָּה atah שִׁמְךָ shimkha יְהֹוָה Adonai לְבַדֶּךָ levadekha עֶלְיוֹן elyon עַל al כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz

Psalm 84

1
For the leader; on the gittith. Of the Korahites. A psalm.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al הַגִּתִּית hagitit לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
How lovely is Your dwelling-place,O GOD of Hosts.
מַה mah יְּדִידוֹת yedidot מִשְׁכְּנוֹתֶיךָ mishknoteykha יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot
3
I long, I yearn for the courts of the ETERNAL One;my body and soul shout for joy to the living God.
נִכְסְפָה nikhsfah וְגַם vegam כָּלְתָה kaltah נַפְשִׁי nafshi לְחַצְרוֹת lechatzrot יְהֹוָה Adonai לִבִּי libi וּבְשָׂרִי uvsari יְרַנְּנוּ yeranenu אֶל El אֵל El חָי chay
4
Even the sparrow has found a home,and the swallow a nest for herselfin which to set her young,near Your altar, O GOD of Hosts,my monarch and my God.
גַּם gam צִפּוֹר tzipor מָצְאָה matzah בַיִת vayit וּדְרוֹר udror קֵן ken לָהּ lah אֲשֶׁר asher שָׁתָה shatah אֶפְרֹחֶיהָ efrocheyha אֶת et מִזְבְּחוֹתֶיךָ mizbchoteykha יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot מַלְכִּי malki וֵאלֹהָי velohay
5
Happy are those who dwell in Your house;they forever praise You. Selah.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey יוֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey בֵיתֶךָ veytekha עוֹד od יְהַלְלוּךָ yehalelukha סֶּלָה selah
6
Happy are those who find refuge in You,whose mind is on the [pilgrim] highways.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey אָדָם adam עוֹז oz לוֹ lo בָךְ vakh מְסִלּוֹת mesilot בִּלְבָבָם bilvavam
7
They pass through the Valley of Baca,regarding it as a place of springs,as if the early rain had covered it with blessing.
עֹבְרֵי ovrey בְּעֵמֶק beemek הַבָּכָא habakha מַעְיָן mayan יְשִׁיתוּהוּ yeshituhu גַּם gam בְּרָכוֹת berakhot יַעְטֶה yateh מוֹרֶה moreh
8
They go from rampart to rampart, appearing before God in Zion.
יֵלְכוּ yelkhu מֵחַיִל mechayil אֶל El חָיִל chayil יֵרָאֶה yeraeh אֶל El אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּצִיּוֹן betzion
9
O ETERNAL God of hosts,hear my prayer;give ear, O God of Jacob. Selah.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהִים Elohim צְבָאוֹת tzevaot שִׁמְעָה shimah תְפִלָּתִי tefilati הַאֲזִינָה haazinah אֱלֹהֵי elohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov סֶלָה selah
10
O God, behold our shield,look upon the face of Your anointed.
מָגִנֵּנוּ maginenu רְאֵה reeh אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְהַבֵּט vehabet פְּנֵי peney מְשִׁיחֶךָ meshichekha
11
Better one day in Your courts than a thousand [anywhere else];I would rather stand at the threshold of God’s housethan dwell in the tents of the wicked.
כִּי ki טוֹב tov יוֹם yom בַּחֲצֵרֶיךָ bachatzereykha מֵאָלֶף mealef בָּחַרְתִּי bacharti הִסְתּוֹפֵף histofef בְּבֵית beveyt אֱלֹהַי elohay מִדּוּר midur בְּאהֳלֵי beholey רֶשַׁע resha
12
For the ETERNAL God is sun and shield; GOD bestows grace and glory,and does not withhold bounty from those who live without blame.
כִּי ki שֶׁמֶשׁ shemesh וּמָגֵן umagen יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהִים Elohim חֵן chen וְכָבוֹד vekhavod יִתֵּן yiten יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo יִמְנַע yimna טוֹב tov לַהֹלְכִים laholkhim בְּתָמִים betamim
13
O GOD of Hosts,happy is the one who trusts in You.
יְהֹוָה Adonai צְבָאוֹת tzevaot אַשְׁרֵי ashrey אָדָם adam בֹּטֵחַ boteach בָּךְ bakh

Psalm 85

1
For the leader. Of the Korahites. A psalm.
לַמְנַצֵּחַלִבְנֵי lamnatzechalivney קֹרַח korach מִזְמוֹר mizmor
2
O ETERNAL One, You will favor Your land,restore Jacob’s fortune;
רָצִיתָ ratzita יְהֹוָה Adonai אַרְצֶךָ artzekha שַׁבְתָּ shavta (שבות) shvvt [שְׁבִית] shevit יַעֲקֹב yaakov
3
You will forgive Your people’s iniquity,pardon all their sins; selah
נָשָׂאתָ nasata עֲוֺן avon עַמֶּךָ amekha כִּסִּיתָ kisita כל khl חַטָּאתָם chatatam סֶלָה selah
4
You will withdraw all Your anger,turn away from Your rage.
אָסַפְתָּ asafta כל khl עֶבְרָתֶךָ evratekha הֱשִׁיבוֹתָ heshivota מֵחֲרוֹן mecharon אַפֶּךָ apekha
5
Turn again, O God, our helper,revoke Your displeasure with us.
שׁוּבֵנוּ shuvenu אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׁעֵנוּ yishenu וְהָפֵר vehafer כַּעַסְךָ kaaskha עִמָּנוּ imanu
6
Will You be angry with us forever,prolong Your wrath for all generations?
הַלְעוֹלָם halolam תֶּאֱנַף teenaf בָּנוּ banu תִּמְשֹׁךְ timshokh אַפְּךָ apkha לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador
7
Surely You will revive us again,so that Your people may rejoice in You.
הֲלֹא halo אַתָּה atah תָּשׁוּב tashuv תְּחַיֵּנוּ techayenu וְעַמְּךָ veamkha יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu בָךְ vakh
8
Show us, O ETERNAL One, Your faithfulness;grant us Your deliverance.
הַרְאֵנוּ harenu יְהֹוָה Adonai חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha וְיֶשְׁעֲךָ veyeshakha תִּתֶּן titen לָנוּ lanu
9
Let me hear what God, the ETERNAL, will speak,as a promise of well-being to the faithful ones—this people;may they not turn to folly.
אֶשְׁמְעָה eshmah מַה mah יְדַבֵּר yedaber הָאֵליְהֹוָה haelyhovah כִּי ki יְדַבֵּר yedaber שָׁלוֹם shalom אֶל El עַמּוֹ amo וְאֶל veel חֲסִידָיו chasidayv וְאַל veal יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu לְכִסְלָה lekhislah
10
Help is very near those who show reverence,to make God’s glory dwell in our land.
אַךְ akh קָרוֹב karov לִירֵאָיו lireayv יִשְׁעוֹ yisho לִשְׁכֹּן lishkon כָּבוֹד kavod בְּאַרְצֵנוּ beartzenu
11
Faithfulness and truth meet;justice and well-being kiss.
חֶסֶד chesed וֶאֱמֶת veemet נִפְגָּשׁוּ nifgashu צֶדֶק tzedek וְשָׁלוֹם veshalom נָשָׁקוּ nashaku
12
Truth springs up from the earth;justice looks down from heaven.
אֱמֶת emet מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz תִּצְמָח titzmach וְצֶדֶק vetzedek מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim נִשְׁקָף nishkaf
13
GOD also bestows bounty;our land yields its produce.
גַּם gam יְהֹוָה Adonai יִתֵּן yiten הַטּוֹב hatov וְאַרְצֵנוּ veartzenu תִּתֵּן titen יְבוּלָהּ yevulah
14
Justice walks in frontas [God] sets out on the way.
צֶדֶק tzedek לְפָנָיו lefanayv יְהַלֵּךְ yehalekh וְיָשֵׂם veyasem לְדֶרֶךְ lederekh פְּעָמָיו peamayv

Psalm 86

1
A prayer of David.Incline Your ear, O ETERNAL One,answer me,for I am poor and needy.
תְּפִלָּה tefilah לְדָוִד ledavid הַטֵּה hateh יְהֹוָה Adonai אזְנְךָ znkha עֲנֵנִי aneni כִּי ki עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon אָנִי ani
2
Preserve my life, for I am steadfast;O You, my God,deliver Your servant who trusts in You.
שׁמְרָה shmrah נַפְשִׁי nafshi כִּי ki חָסִיד chasid אָנִי ani הוֹשַׁע hosha עַבְדְּךָ avdkha אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהַי elohay הַבּוֹטֵחַ haboteach אֵלֶיךָ eleykha
3
Have mercy on me, O my Sovereign,for I call to You all day long;
חנֵּנִי chneni אֲדֹנָי Adonai כִּי ki אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֶקְרָא ekra כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom
4
bring joy to Your servant’s life,for on You, my Sovereign, I set my hope.
שַׂמֵּחַ sameach נֶפֶשׁ nefesh עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha כִּי ki אֵלֶיךָ eleykha אֲדֹנָי Adonai נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶשָּׂא esa
5
For You, my Sovereign, are good and forgiving,abounding in steadfast love to all who call on You.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah אֲדֹנָי Adonai טוֹב tov וְסַלָּח vesalach וְרַב verav חֶסֶד chesed לְכל lekhl קֹרְאֶיךָ koreykha
6
Give ear, O ETERNAL One, to my prayer;heed my plea for mercy.
הַאֲזִינָה haazinah יְהֹוָה Adonai תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati וְהַקְשִׁיבָה vehakshivah בְּקוֹל bekol תַּחֲנוּנוֹתָי tachanunotay
7
In my time of trouble I call You,for You will answer me.
בְּיוֹם beyom צָרָתִי tzarati אֶקְרָאֶךָּ ekraeka כִּי ki תַעֲנֵנִי taaneni
8
There is none like You among the gods, O my Sovereign,and there are no deeds like Yours.
אֵין eyn כָּמוֹךָ kamokha בָאֱלֹהִיםאֲדֹנָי vaelohimadonay וְאֵין veeyn כְּמַעֲשֶׂיךָ kemaaseykha
9
All the nations You have madewill come to bow down before You, O my Sovereign,and they will pay honor to Your name.
כּל kl גּוֹיִם goyim אֲשֶׁר asher עָשִׂיתָ asita יָבוֹאוּ yavou וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ veyishtachavu לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha אֲדֹנָי Adonai וִיכַבְּדוּ vikhabdu לִשְׁמֶךָ lishmekha
10
For You are great and perform wonders;You alone are God.
כִּי ki גָדוֹל gadol אַתָּה atah וְעֹשֵׂה veoseh נִפְלָאוֹת niflaot אַתָּה atah אֱלֹהִים Elohim לְבַדֶּךָ levadekha
11
Teach me Your way, O ETERNAL One;I will walk in Your truth;let my heart be undivided in reverence for Your name.
הוֹרֵנִי horeni יְהֹוָה Adonai דַּרְכֶּךָ darkekha אֲהַלֵּךְ ahalekh בַּאֲמִתֶּךָ baamitekha יַחֵד yached לְבָבִי levavi לְיִרְאָה leyirah שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
12
I will praise You, O my Sovereign, my God, with all my heartand pay honor to Your name forever.
אוֹדְךָ odkha אֲדֹנָי Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay בְּכל bekhl לְבָבִי levavi וַאֲכַבְּדָה vaakhabdah שִׁמְךָ shimkha לְעוֹלָם leolam
13
For Your steadfast love toward me is great;You have saved me from the depths of Sheol.
כִּי ki חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha גָּדוֹל gadol עָלָי alay וְהִצַּלְתָּ vehitzalta נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִשְּׁאוֹל mishol תַּחְתִּיָּה tachtiah
14
O God, arrogant people have risen against me;a ruthless band seeks my life;they are not mindful of You.
אֱלֹהִים Elohim זֵדִים zedim קָמוּ kamu עָלַי alay וַעֲדַת vaadat עָרִיצִים aritzim בִּקְשׁוּ bikshu נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְלֹא velo שָׂמוּךָ samukha לְנֶגְדָּם lenegdam
15
But You, O my Sovereign, are a Godcompassionate and merciful,slow to anger, abounding in steadfast love and faithfulness.
וְאַתָּה veatah אֲדֹנָי Adonai אֵל El רַחוּם rachum וְחַנּוּן vechanun אֶרֶךְ erekh אַפַּיִם apayim וְרַב verav חֶסֶד chesed וֶאֱמֶת veemet
16
Turn to me and have mercy on me;grant Your strength to Your servantand deliver the son of Your maidservant.
פְּנֵה peneh אֵלַי elay וְחנֵּנִי vechneni תְּנָה tenah עֻזְּךָ uzkha לְעַבְדֶּךָ leavdekha וְהוֹשִׁיעָה vehoshiah לְבֶן leven אֲמָתֶךָ amatekha
17
Show me a sign of Your favor,that my enemies may see and be frustratedbecause You, O ETERNAL One, have given me aid and comfort.
עֲשֵׂה aseh עִמִּי imi אוֹת ot לְטוֹבָה letovah וְיִרְאוּ veyiru שֹׂנְאַי sonay וְיֵבֹשׁוּ veyevoshu כִּי ki אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai עֲזַרְתַּנִי azartani וְנִחַמְתָּנִי venichamtani

Psalm 87

1
Of the Korahites. A psalm. A song.The temple’s foundation on the holy mountains—
לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach מִזְמוֹר mizmor שִׁיר shir יְסוּדָתוֹ yesudato בְּהַרְרֵי beharerey קֹדֶשׁ kodesh
2
the gates of Zion—GOD lovesmore than all the dwellings of Jacob.
אֹהֵב ohev יְהֹוָה Adonai שַׁעֲרֵי shaarey צִיּוֹן tzion מִכֹּל mikol מִשְׁכְּנוֹת mishknot יַעֲקֹב yaakov
3
Glorious things are spoken of you,O city of God. Selah.
נִכְבָּדוֹת nikhbadot מְדֻבָּר medubar בָּךְ bakh עִיר ir הָאֱלֹהִים haelohim סֶלָה selah
4
I mention Rahab and Babylon among those who acknowledge Me;Philistia, and Tyre, and Cush—each was born there.
אַזְכִּיר azkir רַהַב rahav וּבָבֶל uvavel לְיֹדְעָי leyoday הִנֵּה hineh פְלֶשֶׁת feleshet וְצֹר vetzor עִם im כּוּשׁ kush זֶה zeh יֻלַּד yulad שָׁם sham
5
Indeed, it shall be said of Zion,“They were all born there.”It is the Most High who will preserve it.
וּלְצִיּוֹן ultzion יֵאָמַר yeamar אִישׁ ish וְאִישׁ veish יֻלַּד yulad בָּהּ bah וְהוּא vehu יְכוֹנְנֶהָ yekhoneneha עֶלְיוֹן elyon
6
GOD will inscribe in the register of peoplesthat each was born there. Selah.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יִסְפֹּר yispor בִּכְתוֹב bikhtov עַמִּים amim זֶה zeh יֻלַּד yulad שָׁם sham סֶלָה selah
7
Singers and dancers alike [will say]:“All my roots are in You.”
וְשָׁרִים vesharim כְּחֹלְלִים kecholelim כּל kl מַעְיָנַי mayanay בָּךְ bakh

Psalm 88

1
A song. A psalm of the Korahites. For the leader; maḥalath leannoth. Meaning of Heb. uncertain. A maskil of Heman the Ezrahite.
שִׁיר shir מִזְמוֹר mizmor לִבְנֵי livney קֹרַח korach לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach עַל al מָחֲלַת machalat לְעַנּוֹת leanot מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְהֵימָן leheyman הָאֶזְרָחִי haezrachi
2
O ETERNAL One, God of my deliverance,when I cry out in the night before You,
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵי elohey יְשׁוּעָתִי yeshuati יוֹם yom צָעַקְתִּי tzaakti בַלַּיְלָה valaylah נֶגְדֶּךָ negdekha
3
let my prayer reach You;incline Your ear to my cry.
תָּבוֹא tavo לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati הַטֵּה hateh אזְנְךָ znkha לְרִנָּתִי lerinati
4
For I am sated with misfortune;I am at the brink of Sheol.
כִּי ki שָׂבְעָה savah בְרָעוֹת veraot נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְחַיַּי vechayay לִשְׁאוֹל lishol הִגִּיעוּ higiu
5
I am numbered with those who go down to the Pit;I am like someone helpless
נֶחְשַׁבְתִּי nechshavti עִם im יוֹרְדֵי yordey בוֹר vor הָיִיתִי hayiti כְּגֶבֶר kegever אֵין eyn אֱיָל eyal
6
abandoned among the dead,like bodies lying in the graveof whom You are mindful no more,and who are cut off from Your care.
בַּמֵּתִים bametim חפְשִׁי chfshi כְּמוֹ kemo חֲלָלִים chalalim שֹׁכְבֵי shokhvey קֶבֶר kever אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo זְכַרְתָּם zekhartam עוֹד od וְהֵמָּה vehemah מִיָּדְךָ miadkha נִגְזָרוּ nigzaru
7
You have put me at the bottom of the Pit,in the darkest places, in the depths.
שַׁתַּנִי shatani בְּבוֹר bevor תַּחְתִּיּוֹת tachtiot בְּמַחֲשַׁכִּים bemachashakim בִּמְצֹלוֹת bimtzolot
8
Your fury lies heavy upon me;You afflict me with all Your breakers. Selah.
עָלַי alay סָמְכָה samkhah חֲמָתֶךָ chamatekha וְכל vekhl מִשְׁבָּרֶיךָ mishbareykha עִנִּיתָ inita סֶּלָה selah
9
You make my companions shun me;You make me abhorrent to them;I am shut in and do not go out.
הִרְחַקְתָּ hirchakta מְיֻדָּעַי meyudaay מִמֶּנִּי mimeni שַׁתַּנִי shatani תוֹעֵבוֹת toevot לָמוֹ lamo כָּלֻא kalu וְלֹא velo אֵצֵא etze
10
My eyes pine away from affliction;I call to You, O ETERNAL One, each day;I stretch out my hands to You.
עֵינִי eyni דָאֲבָה daavah מִנִּי mini עֹנִי oni קְרָאתִיךָ keratikha יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּכל bekhl יוֹם yom שִׁטַּחְתִּי shitachti אֵלֶיךָ eleykha כַפָּי khapay
11
Do You work wonders for the dead?Do the shades rise to praise You? Selah.
הֲלַמֵּתִים halametim תַּעֲשֶׂה taaseh פֶּלֶא pele אִם im רְפָאִים refaim יָקוּמוּ yakumu יוֹדוּךָ yodukha סֶּלָה selah
12
Is Your faithful care recounted in the grave,Your constancy in the place of perdition?
הַיְסֻפַּר haysupar בַּקֶּבֶר bakever חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha אֱמוּנָתְךָ emunatkha בָּאֲבַדּוֹן baavadon
13
Are Your wonders made known in the netherworld, Your beneficent deeds in the land of oblivion?
הֲיִוָּדַע hayiuada בַּחֹשֶׁךְ bachoshekh פִּלְאֶךָ pilekha וְצִדְקָתְךָ vetzidkatkha בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz נְשִׁיָּה neshiah
14
As for me, I cry out to You, O ETERNAL One;each morning my prayer greets You.
וַאֲנִי vaani אֵלֶיךָ eleykha יְהֹוָה Adonai שִׁוַּעְתִּי shiuati וּבַבֹּקֶר uvaboker תְּפִלָּתִי tefilati תְקַדְּמֶךָּ tekadmeka
15
Why, O ETERNAL One, do You reject me,do You hide Your face from me?
לָמָה lamah יְהֹוָה Adonai תִּזְנַח tiznach נַפְשִׁי nafshi תַּסְתִּיר tastir פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
16
From my youth I have been afflictedand near death;I suffer Your terrors wherever I turn.
עָנִי ani אֲנִי ani וְגֹוֵעַ vegovea מִנֹּעַר minoar נָשָׂאתִי nasati אֵמֶיךָ emeykha אָפוּנָה afunah
17
Your fury overwhelms me;Your terrors destroy me.
עָלַי alay עָבְרוּ avru חֲרוֹנֶיךָ charoneykha בִּעוּתֶיךָ biuteykha צִמְּתוּתֻנִי tzimtutuni
18
They swirl about me like water all day long;they encircle me on every side.
סַבּוּנִי sabuni כַמַּיִם khamayim כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom הִקִּיפוּ hikifu עָלַי alay יָחַד yachad
19
You have put friend and neighbor far from meand my companions out of my sight.
הִרְחַקְתָּ hirchakta מִמֶּנִּי mimeni אֹהֵב ohev וָרֵעַ varea מְיֻדָּעַי meyudaay מַחְשָׁךְ machshakh

Psalm 89

1
A maskil of Ethan the Ezrahite.
מַשְׂכִּיל maskil לְאֵיתָן leeytan הָאֶזְרָחִי haezrachi
2
I will sing of GOD’s steadfast love forever;to all generations I will proclaim Your faithfulness with my mouth.
חַסְדֵי chasdey יְהֹוָה Adonai עוֹלָם olam אָשִׁירָה ashirah לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador אוֹדִיעַ odia אֱמוּנָתְךָ emunatkha בְּפִי befi
3
I declare, “Your steadfast love is confirmed forever;there in the heavens You establish Your faithfulness.”
כִּי ki אָמַרְתִּי amarti עוֹלָם olam חֶסֶד chesed יִבָּנֶה yibaneh שָׁמַיִם shamayim תָּכִן takhin אֱמוּנָתְךָ emunatkha בָהֶם vahem
4
“I have made a covenant with My chosen one;I have sworn to My servant David:
כָּרַתִּי karati בְרִית verit לִבְחִירִי livchiri נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי nishbati לְדָוִד ledavid עַבְדִּי avdi
5
I will establish your offspring forever,I will confirm your throne for all generations.” Selah.
עַד ad עוֹלָם olam אָכִין akhin זַרְעֶךָ zarekha וּבָנִיתִי uvaniti לְדֹר ledor וָדוֹר vador כִּסְאֲךָ kisakha סֶלָה selah
6
Your wonders, O ETERNAL One, are praised by the heavens,Your faithfulness, too, in the assembly of holy beings.
וְיוֹדוּ veyodu שָׁמַיִם shamayim פִּלְאֲךָ pilakha יְהֹוָה Adonai אַף af אֱמוּנָתְךָ emunatkha בִּקְהַל bikhal קְדֹשִׁים kedoshim
7
For who in the skies can equal GOD,can compare with GOD among the divine beings,
כִּי ki מִי mi בַשַּׁחַק vashachak יַעֲרֹךְ yaarokh לַיהֹוָה layhovah יִדְמֶה yidmeh לַיהֹוָה layhovah בִּבְנֵי bivney אֵלִים elim
8
a God greatly dreaded in the council of holy beings,held in awe by those all around?
אֵל El נַעֲרָץ naaratz בְּסוֹד besod קְדֹשִׁים kedoshim רַבָּה rabah וְנוֹרָא venora עַל al כּל kl סְבִיבָיו sevivayv
9
O ETERNAL One, God of hosts,who is mighty like You, O Yah? Your faithfulness surrounds You;
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵי elohey צְבָאוֹת tzevaot מִי mi כָמוֹךָ khamokha חֲסִיןיָהּ chasinyah וֶאֱמוּנָתְךָ veemunatkha סְבִיבוֹתֶיךָ sevivoteykha
10
You rule the swelling of the sea;when its waves surge, You still them.
אַתָּה atah מוֹשֵׁל moshel בְּגֵאוּת begeut הַיָּם hayam בְּשׂוֹא beso גַלָּיו galayv אַתָּה atah תְשַׁבְּחֵם teshabchem
11
You crushed Rahab; he was like a corpse;with Your powerful arm You scattered Your enemies.
אַתָּה atah דִכִּאתָ dikita כֶחָלָל khechalal רָהַב rahav בִּזְרוֹעַ bizroa עֻזְּךָ uzkha פִּזַּרְתָּ pizarta אוֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha
12
The heaven is Yours,the earth too;the world and all it holds—You established them.
לְךָ lekha שָׁמַיִם shamayim אַף af לְךָ lekha אָרֶץ aretz תֵּבֵל tevel וּמְלֹאָהּ umloah אַתָּה atah יְסַדְתָּם yesadtam
13
North and south—You created them;Tabor and Hermon sing forth Your name.
צָפוֹן tzafon וְיָמִין veyamin אַתָּה atah בְרָאתָם veratam תָּבוֹר tavor וְחֶרְמוֹן vechermon בְּשִׁמְךָ beshimkha יְרַנֵּנוּ yeranenu
14
Yours is an arm endowed with might;Your hand is strong;Your right hand, exalted.
לְךָ lekha זְרוֹעַ zeroa עִם im גְּבוּרָה gevurah תָּעֹז taoz יָדְךָ yadkha תָּרוּם tarum יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
15
Righteousness and justice are the base of Your throne;steadfast love and faithfulness stand before You.
צֶדֶק tzedek וּמִשְׁפָּט umishpat מְכוֹן mekhon כִּסְאֶךָ kisekha חֶסֶד chesed וֶאֱמֶת veemet יְקַדְּמוּ yekadmu פָנֶיךָ faneykha
16
Happy is the people who know the joyful shout;O ETERNAL One, they walk in the light of Your presence.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הָעָם haam יֹדְעֵי yodey תְרוּעָה teruah יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּאוֹר beor פָּנֶיךָ paneykha יְהַלֵּכוּן yehalekhun
17
They rejoice in Your name all day long;they are exalted through Your righteousness.
בְּשִׁמְךָ beshimkha יְגִילוּן yegilun כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom וּבְצִדְקָתְךָ uvtzidkatkha יָרוּמוּ yarumu
18
For You are their strength in which they glory;our horn is exalted through Your favor.
כִּי ki תִפְאֶרֶת tiferet עֻזָּמוֹ uzamo אָתָּה atah וּבִרְצוֹנְךָ uvirtzonkha (תרים) trym [תָּרוּם] tarum קַרְנֵינוּ karneynu
19
Truly our shield is of GOD,our monarch, of the Holy One of Israel.
כִּי ki לַיהֹוָה layhovah מָגִנֵּנוּ maginenu וְלִקְדוֹשׁ velikdosh יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מַלְכֵּנוּ malkenu
20
Then You spoke to Your faithful ones in a visionand said, “I have conferred power upon a warrior;I have exalted one chosen out of the people.
אָז az דִּבַּרְתָּ dibarta בְחָזוֹן vechazon לַחֲסִידֶיךָ lachasideykha וַתֹּאמֶר vatomer שִׁוִּיתִי shiuiti עֵזֶר ezer עַל al גִּבּוֹר gibor הֲרִימוֹתִי harimoti בָחוּר vachur מֵעָם meam
21
I have found David, My servant;anointed him with My sacred oil.
מָצָאתִי matzati דָּוִד david עַבְדִּי avdi בְּשֶׁמֶן beshemen קדְשִׁי kdshi מְשַׁחְתִּיו meshachtiv
22
My hand shall be constantly with him,and My arm shall strengthen him.
אֲשֶׁר asher יָדִי yadi תִּכּוֹן tikon עִמּוֹ imo אַף af זְרוֹעִי zeroi תְאַמְּצֶנּוּ teamtzenu
23
No enemy shall oppress him, no one vile afflict him.
לֹא lo יַשִּׁיא yashi אוֹיֵב oyev בּוֹ bo וּבֶן uven עַוְלָה avlah לֹא lo יְעַנֶּנּוּ yeanenu
24
I will crush his adversaries before him;I will strike down those who hate him.
וְכַתּוֹתִי vekhatoti מִפָּנָיו mipanayv צָרָיו tzarayv וּמְשַׂנְאָיו umsanayv אֶגּוֹף egof
25
My faithfulness and steadfast love shall be with him;his horn shall be exalted through My name.
וֶאֱמוּנָתִי veemunati וְחַסְדִּי vechasdi עִמּוֹ imo וּבִשְׁמִי uvishmi תָּרוּם tarum קַרְנוֹ karno
26
I will set his hand upon the sea,his right hand upon the rivers.
וְשַׂמְתִּי vesamti בַיָּם vayam יָדוֹ yado וּבַנְּהָרוֹת uvanharot יְמִינוֹ yemino
27
He shall say to Me,‘You are my father, my God, the rock of my deliverance.’
הוּא hu יִקְרָאֵנִי yikraeni אָבִי avi אָתָּה atah אֵלִי eli וְצוּר vetzur יְשׁוּעָתִי yeshuati
28
I will appoint him first-born,highest of the kings of the earth.
אַף af אָנִי ani בְּכוֹר bekhor אֶתְּנֵהוּ etnehu עֶלְיוֹן elyon לְמַלְכֵי lemalkhey אָרֶץ aretz
29
I will maintain My steadfast love for him always;My covenant with him shall endure.
לְעוֹלָם leolam (אשמור) shmvr [אֶשְׁמר eshmr ]לוֹ lo חַסְדִּי chasdi וּבְרִיתִי uvriti נֶאֱמֶנֶת neemenet לוֹ lo
30
I will establish his line forever,his throne, as long as the heavens last.
וְשַׂמְתִּי vesamti לָעַד laad זַרְעוֹ zaro וְכִסְאוֹ vekhiso כִּימֵי kimey שָׁמָיִם shamayim
31
If his sons forsake My Teachingand do not live by My rules;
אִם im יַעַזְבוּ yaazvu בָנָיו vanayv תּוֹרָתִי torati וּבְמִשְׁפָּטַי uvmishpatay לֹא lo יֵלֵכוּן yelekhun
32
if they violate My laws,and do not observe My commands,
אִם im חֻקֹּתַי chukotay יְחַלֵּלוּ yechalelu וּמִצְוֺתַי umitzvotay לֹא lo יִשְׁמֹרוּ yishmoru
33
I will punish their transgression with the rod,their iniquity with plagues.
וּפָקַדְתִּי ufakadti בְשֵׁבֶט veshevet פִּשְׁעָם pisham וּבִנְגָעִים uvingaim עֲוֺנָם avonam
34
But I will not take away My steadfast love from him;I will not betray My faithfulness.
וְחַסְדִּי vechasdi לֹא lo אָפִיר afir מֵעִמּוֹ meimo וְלֹא velo אֲשַׁקֵּר ashaker בֶּאֱמוּנָתִי beemunati
35
I will not violate My covenant,or change what I have uttered.
לֹא lo אֲחַלֵּל achalel בְּרִיתִי beriti וּמוֹצָא umotza שְׂפָתַי sefatay לֹא lo אֲשַׁנֶּה ashaneh
36
I have sworn by My holiness, once and for all;I will not be false to David.
אַחַת achat נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי nishbati בְקדְשִׁי vekdshi אִם im לְדָוִד ledavid אֲכַזֵּב akhazev
37
His line shall continue forever,his throne, as the sun before Me,
זַרְעוֹ zaro לְעוֹלָם leolam יִהְיֶה yihyeh וְכִסְאוֹ vekhiso כַשֶּׁמֶשׁ khashemesh נֶגְדִּי negdi
38
as the moon, established forever,an enduring witness in the sky.” Selah.
כְּיָרֵחַ keyareach יִכּוֹן yikon עוֹלָם olam וְעֵד veed בַּשַּׁחַק bashachak נֶאֱמָן neeman סֶלָה selah
39
Yet You have rejected, spurned,and become enraged at Your anointed.
וְאַתָּה veatah זָנַחְתָּ zanachta וַתִּמְאָס vatimas הִתְעַבַּרְתָּ hitabarta עִם im מְשִׁיחֶךָ meshichekha
40
You have repudiated the covenant with Your servant;You have dragged his dignity in the dust.
נֵאַרְתָּה neartah בְּרִית berit עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha חִלַּלְתָּ chilalta לָאָרֶץ laaretz נִזְרוֹ nizro
41
You have breached all his defenses,shattered his strongholds.
פָּרַצְתָּ paratzta כל khl גְּדֵרֹתָיו gederotayv שַׂמְתָּ samta מִבְצָרָיו mivtzarayv מְחִתָּה mechitah
42
All who pass by plunder him;he has become the butt of his neighbors.
שַׁסֻּהוּ shasuhu כּל kl עֹבְרֵי ovrey דָרֶךְ darekh הָיָה hayah חֶרְפָּה cherpah לִשְׁכֵנָיו lishkhenayv
43
You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries,and made all his enemies rejoice.
הֲרִימוֹתָ harimota יְמִין yemin צָרָיו tzarayv הִשְׂמַחְתָּ hismachta כּל kl אוֹיְבָיו oyvayv
44
You have turned back the blade of his sword,and have not sustained him in battle.
אַף af תָּשִׁיב tashiv צוּר tzur חַרְבּוֹ charbo וְלֹא velo הֲקֵימֹתוֹ hakeymoto בַּמִּלְחָמָה bamilchamah
45
You have brought his splendor to an endand have hurled his throne to the ground.
הִשְׁבַּתָּ hishbata מִטְּהָרוֹ mitharo וְכִסְאוֹ vekhiso לָאָרֶץ laaretz מִגַּרְתָּה migartah
46
You have cut short the days of his youth;You have covered him with shame. Selah.
הִקְצַרְתָּ hiktzarta יְמֵי yemey עֲלוּמָיו alumayv הֶעֱטִיתָ heetita עָלָיו alayv בּוּשָׁה bushah סֶלָה selah
47
How long, O ETERNAL One; will You forever hide Your face,will Your fury blaze like fire?
עַד ad מָה mah יְהֹוָה Adonai תִּסָּתֵר tisater לָנֶצַח lanetzach תִּבְעַר tivar כְּמוֹ kemo אֵשׁ esh חֲמָתֶךָ chamatekha
48
O remember how short my life is; why should You have created every person in vain?
זְכר zekhr אֲנִי ani מֶה meh חָלֶד chaled עַל al מַה mah שָּׁוְא shav בָּרָאתָ barata כל khl בְּנֵי beney אָדָם adam
49
Who can live and not see death,can escape the clutches of Sheol? Selah.
מִי mi גֶבֶר gever יִחְיֶה yichyeh וְלֹא velo יִרְאֶה yireh מָּוֶת mavet יְמַלֵּט yemalet נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho מִיַּד miad שְׁאוֹל sheol סֶלָה selah
50
O my Sovereign, where is Your steadfast love of oldthat You swore to David in Your faithfulness?
אַיֵּה ayeh חֲסָדֶיךָ chasadeykha הָרִאשֹׁנִיםאֲדֹנָי harishonimadonay נִשְׁבַּעְתָּ nishbata לְדָוִד ledavid בֶּאֱמוּנָתֶךָ beemunatekha
51
Remember, O my Sovereign, the abuse flung at Your servantsthat I have borne in my bosom [from] many peoples,
זְכֹר zekhor אֲדֹנָי Adonai חֶרְפַּת cherpat עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha שְׂאֵתִי seeti בְחֵיקִי vecheyki כּל kl רַבִּים rabim עַמִּים amim
52
how Your enemies, O ETERNAL One, have flung abuse,abuse at Your anointed at every step.
אֲשֶׁר asher חֵרְפוּ cherfu אוֹיְבֶיךָיְהֹוָה oyveykhayhovah אֲשֶׁר asher חֵרְפוּ cherfu עִקְּבוֹת ikvot מְשִׁיחֶךָ meshichekha
53
Blessed is GOD forever;Amen and Amen.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעוֹלָם leolam אָמֵןוְאָמֵן amenvamen

Psalm 90

1
A prayer of Moses, the agent of God.O my Sovereign, You have been our refuge in every generation.
תְּפִלָּה tefilah לְמֹשֶׁה lemosheh אִישׁ ish הָאֱלֹהִים haelohim אֲדֹנָי Adonai מָעוֹן maon אַתָּה atah הָיִיתָ hayita לָּנוּ lanu בְּדֹר bedor וָדֹר vador
2
Before the mountains came into being,before You brought forth the earth and the world,from eternity to eternity You are God.
בְּטֶרֶם beterem הָרִים harim יֻלָּדוּ yuladu וַתְּחוֹלֵל vatcholel אֶרֶץ eretz וְתֵבֵל vetevel וּמֵעוֹלָם umeolam עַד ad עוֹלָם olam אַתָּה atah אֵל El
3
You return humans to dust; You decreed, “Return, you mortals!”
תָּשֵׁב tashev אֱנוֹשׁ enosh עַד ad דַּכָּא daka וַתֹּאמֶר vatomer שׁוּבוּ shuvu בְנֵי veney אָדָם adam
4
For in Your sight a thousand yearsare like yesterday that has passed,like a watch of the night.
כִּי ki אֶלֶף elef שָׁנִים shanim בְּעֵינֶיךָ beeyneykha כְּיוֹם keyom אֶתְמוֹל etmol כִּי ki יַעֲבֹר yaavor וְאַשְׁמוּרָה veashmurah בַלָּיְלָה valaylah
5
You engulf mortals in sleep; at daybreak they are like grass that renews itself;
זְרַמְתָּם zeramtam שֵׁנָה shenah יִהְיוּ yihyu בַּבֹּקֶר baboker כֶּחָצִיר kechatzir יַחֲלֹף yachalof
6
at daybreak it flourishes anew;by dusk it withers and dries up.
בַּבֹּקֶר baboker יָצִיץ yatzitz וְחָלָף vechalaf לָעֶרֶב laerev יְמוֹלֵל yemolel וְיָבֵשׁ veyavesh
7
So we are consumed by Your anger,terror-struck by Your fury.
כִּי ki כָלִינוּ khalinu בְאַפֶּךָ veapekha וּבַחֲמָתְךָ uvachamatkha נִבְהָלְנוּ nivhalnu
8
You have set our iniquities before You,our hidden sins in the light of Your face.
שַׁתָּ shata עֲוֺנֹתֵינוּ avonoteynu לְנֶגְדֶּךָ lenegdekha עֲלֻמֵנוּ alumenu לִמְאוֹר limor פָּנֶיךָ paneykha
9
All our days pass away in Your wrath;we spend our years like a sigh.
כִּי ki כל khl יָמֵינוּ yameynu פָּנוּ panu בְעֶבְרָתֶךָ veevratekha כִּלִּינוּ kilinu שָׁנֵינוּ shaneynu כְמוֹ khemo הֶגֶה hegeh
10
The span of our life is seventy years,or, given the strength, eighty years;but the best of them are trouble and sorrow.They pass by speedily, and we are in darkness.
יְמֵי yemey שְׁנוֹתֵינוּ shenoteynu בָהֶם vahem שִׁבְעִים shivim שָׁנָה shanah וְאִם veim בִּגְבוּרֹת bigvurot שְׁמוֹנִים shemonim שָׁנָה shanah וְרהְבָּם verhbam עָמָל amal וָאָוֶן vaaven כִּי ki גָז gaz חִישׁ chish וַנָּעֻפָה vanaufah
11
Who can know Your furious anger?Your wrath matches the fear of You.
מִי mi יוֹדֵעַ yodea עֹז oz אַפֶּךָ apekha וּכְיִרְאָתְךָ ukhyiratkha עֶבְרָתֶךָ evratekha
12
Teach us to count our days rightly,that we may obtain a wise heart.
לִמְנוֹת limnot יָמֵינוּ yameynu כֵּן ken הוֹדַע hoda וְנָבִא venavi לְבַב levav חכְמָה chkhmah
13
Turn, O ETERNAL One!How long?Show mercy to Your servants.
שׁוּבָה shuvah יְהֹוָה Adonai עַד ad מָתָי matay וְהִנָּחֵם vehinachem עַל al עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha
14
Satisfy us at daybreak with Your steadfast lovethat we may sing for joy all our days.
שַׂבְּעֵנוּ sabenu בַבֹּקֶר vaboker חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha וּנְרַנְּנָה unranenah וְנִשְׂמְחָה venismchah בְּכל bekhl יָמֵינוּ yameynu
15
Give us joy for as long as You have afflicted us,for the years we have suffered misfortune.
שַׂמְּחֵנוּ samchenu כִּימוֹת kimot עִנִּיתָנוּ initanu שְׁנוֹת shenot רָאִינוּ rainu רָעָה raah
16
Let Your deeds be seen by Your servants,Your glory by their children.
יֵרָאֶה yeraeh אֶל El עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha פעֳלֶךָ folekha וַהֲדָרְךָ vahadarkha עַל al בְּנֵיהֶם beneyhem
17
May the favor of my Sovereign, our God, be upon us;let the work of our hands prosper,O prosper the work of our hands!
וִיהִי vihi נֹעַם noam אֲדֹנָי Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu עָלֵינוּ aleynu וּמַעֲשֵׂה umaaseh יָדֵינוּ yadeynu כּוֹנְנָה konenah עָלֵינוּ aleynu וּמַעֲשֵׂה umaaseh יָדֵינוּ yadeynu כּוֹנְנֵהוּ konenehu

Psalm 91

1
O you who dwell in the shelter of the Most Highand abide in the protection of Shaddai—
יֹשֵׁב yoshev בְּסֵתֶר beseter עֶלְיוֹן elyon בְּצֵל betzel שַׁדַּי shaday יִתְלוֹנָן yitlonan
2
I say of GOD, my refuge and stronghold,my God in whom I trust,
אֹמַר omar לַיהֹוָה layhovah מַחְסִי machsi וּמְצוּדָתִי umtzudati אֱלֹהַי elohay אֶבְטַח evtach בּוֹ bo
3
that you will be saved from the fowler’s trap,from the destructive plague.
כִּי ki הוּא hu יַצִּילְךָ yatzilkha מִפַּח mipach יָקוּשׁ yakush מִדֶּבֶר midever הַוּוֹת hauot
4
With pinions you will be covered;you will find refuge under God’s wings—whose fidelity is an encircling shield.
בְּאֶבְרָתוֹ beevrato יָסֶךְ yasekh לָךְ lakh וְתַחַת vetachat כְּנָפָיו kenafayv תֶּחְסֶה techseh צִנָּה tzinah וְסֹחֵרָה vesocherah אֲמִתּוֹ amito
5
You need not fear the terror by night,or the arrow that flies by day,
לֹא lo תִירָא tira מִפַּחַד mipachad לָיְלָה laylah מֵחֵץ mechetz יָעוּף yauf יוֹמָם yomam
6
the plague that stalks in the darkness,or the scourge that ravages at noon.
מִדֶּבֶר midever בָּאֹפֶל baofel יַהֲלֹךְ yahalokh מִקֶּטֶב miketev יָשׁוּד yashud צהֳרָיִם tzhorayim
7
A thousand may fall at your left side,ten thousand at your right,but it shall not reach you.
יִפֹּל yipol מִצִּדְּךָ mitzidkha אֶלֶף elef וּרְבָבָה urvavah מִימִינֶךָ miminekha אֵלֶיךָ eleykha לֹא lo יִגָּשׁ yigash
8
You will see it with your eyes,you will witness the punishment of the wicked.
רַק rak בְּעֵינֶיךָ beeyneykha תַבִּיט tabit וְשִׁלֻּמַת veshilumat רְשָׁעִים reshaim תִּרְאֶה tireh
9
Because you took GOD—my refuge,the Most High—as your haven,
