כִּי ki אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai מַחְסִי machsi עֶלְיוֹן elyon שַׂמְתָּ samta מְעוֹנֶךָ meonekha
10
no harm will befall you,no disease touch your tent.
לֹא lo תְאֻנֶּה teuneh אֵלֶיךָ eleykha רָעָה raah וְנֶגַע venega לֹא lo יִקְרַב yikrav בְּאהֳלֶךָ beholekha
11
For God’s angels will be orderedto guard you wherever you go.
כִּי ki מַלְאָכָיו malakhayv יְצַוֶּה yetzaueh לָּךְ lakh לִשְׁמרְךָ lishmrkha בְּכל bekhl דְּרָכֶיךָ derakheykha
12
They will carry you in their handslest you hurt your foot on a stone.
עַל al כַּפַּיִם kapayim יִשָּׂאוּנְךָ yisaunkha פֶּן pen תִּגֹּף tigof בָּאֶבֶן baeven רַגְלֶךָ raglekha
13
You will tread on cubs and vipers;you will trample lions and asps.
עַל al שַׁחַל shachal וָפֶתֶן vafeten תִּדְרֹךְ tidrokh תִּרְמֹס tirmos כְּפִיר kefir וְתַנִּין vetanin
14
“Because such people are devoted to Me, I will deliver them;I will keep them safe, for they know My name.
כִּי ki בִי vi חָשַׁק chashak וַאֲפַלְּטֵהוּ vaafaltehu אֲשַׂגְּבֵהוּ asagvehu כִּי ki יָדַע yada שְׁמִי shemi
15
When they call on Me, I will answer them;I will be with them in distress;I will rescue them and make them honored;
יִקְרָאֵנִי yikraeni וְאֶעֱנֵהוּ veeenehu עִמּוֹ imo אָנֹכִי anokhi בְצָרָה vetzarah אֲחַלְּצֵהוּ achaltzehu וַאֲכַבְּדֵהוּ vaakhabdehu
16
I will let them live to a ripe old age,and show them My salvation.”
אֹרֶךְ orekh יָמִים yamim אַשְׂבִּיעֵהוּ asbiehu וְאַרְאֵהוּ vearehu בִּישׁוּעָתִי bishuati

Psalm 92

1
A psalm. A song; for the sabbath day.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor שִׁיר shir לְיוֹם leyom הַשַּׁבָּת hashabat
2
It is good to praise GOD,to sing hymns to Your name, O Most High,
טוֹב tov לְהֹדוֹת lehodot לַיהֹוָה layhovah וּלְזַמֵּר ulzamer לְשִׁמְךָ leshimkha עֶלְיוֹן elyon
3
To proclaim Your steadfast love at daybreak,Your faithfulness each night
לְהַגִּיד lehagid בַּבֹּקֶר baboker חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha וֶאֱמוּנָתְךָ veemunatkha בַּלֵּילוֹת baleylot
4
With a ten-stringed harp,with voice and lyre together.
עֲלֵי aley עָשׂוֹר asor וַעֲלֵי vaaley נָבֶל navel עֲלֵי aley הִגָּיוֹן higayon בְּכִנּוֹר bekhinor
5
You have gladdened me by Your deeds, O ETERNAL One;I shout for joy at Your handiwork.
כִּי ki שִׂמַּחְתַּנִי simachtani יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּפעֳלֶךָ befolekha בְּמַעֲשֵׂי bemaasey יָדֶיךָ yadeykha אֲרַנֵּן aranen
6
How great are Your works, O ETERNAL One,how very subtle Your designs!
מַה mah גָּדְלוּ gadlu מַעֲשֶׂיךָ maaseykha יְהֹוָה Adonai מְאֹד meod עָמְקוּ amku מַחְשְׁבֹתֶיךָ machshvoteykha
7
A brute cannot know,a fool cannot understand this:
אִישׁ ish בַּעַר baar לֹא lo יֵדָע yeda וּכְסִיל ukhsil לֹא lo יָבִין yavin אֶת et זֹאת zot
8
though the wicked sprout like grass,though all evildoers blossom,it is only that they may be destroyed forever.
בִּפְרֹחַ bifroach רְשָׁעִים reshaim כְּמוֹ kemo עֵשֶׂב esev וַיָּצִיצוּ vayatzitzu כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven לְהִשָּׁמְדָם lehishamdam עֲדֵי adey עַד ad
9
But You are exalted, O ETERNAL One, for all time.
וְאַתָּה veatah מָרוֹם marom לְעֹלָם leolam יְהֹוָה Adonai
10
Surely, Your enemies, O ETERNAL One,surely, Your enemies perish;all evildoers are scattered.
כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh אֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki הִנֵּה hineh אֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha יֹאבֵדוּ yovedu יִתְפָּרְדוּ yitpardu כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven
11
You raise my horn high like that of a wild ox;I am soaked in freshening oil.
וַתָּרֶם vatarem כִּרְאֵים kireym קַרְנִי karni בַּלֹּתִי baloti בְּשֶׁמֶן beshemen רַעֲנָן raanan
12
I shall see the defeat of my watchful foes,hear of the downfall of the wicked who beset me.
וַתַּבֵּט vatabet עֵינִי eyni בְּשׁוּרָי beshuray בַּקָּמִים bakamim עָלַי alay מְרֵעִים mereim תִּשְׁמַעְנָה tishmanah אזְנָי znay
13
The righteous bloom like a date-palm;they thrive like a cedar in Lebanon;
צַדִּיק tzadik כַּתָּמָר katamar יִפְרָח yifrach כְּאֶרֶז keerez בַּלְּבָנוֹן balvanon יִשְׂגֶּה yisgeh
14
planted in the house of GOD,they flourish in the courts of our God.
שְׁתוּלִים shetulim בְּבֵית beveyt יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּחַצְרוֹת bechatzrot אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu יַפְרִיחוּ yafrichu
15
In old age they still produce fruit;they are full of sap and freshness—
עוֹד od יְנוּבוּן yenuvun בְּשֵׂיבָה beseyvah דְּשֵׁנִים deshenim וְרַעֲנַנִּים veraananim יִהְיוּ yihyu
16
attesting that GOD is upright,my rock, in whom there is no wrong.
לְהַגִּיד lehagid כִּי ki יָשָׁר yashar יְהֹוָה Adonai צוּרִי tzuri וְלֹא velo [עַוְלָתָה] avlatah (עלתה) lth בּוֹ bo

Psalm 93

1
GOD is sovereign,and robed in grandeur; GOD is robed,and girded with strength.The world stands firm;it cannot be shaken.
יְהֹוָה Adonai מָלָךְ malakh גֵּאוּת geut לָבֵשׁ lavesh לָבֵשׁ lavesh יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹז oz הִתְאַזָּר hitazar אַף af תִּכּוֹן tikon תֵּבֵל tevel בַּל bal תִּמּוֹט timot
2
Your throne stands firm from of old;from eternity You have existed.
נָכוֹן nakhon כִּסְאֲךָ kisakha מֵאָז meaz מֵעוֹלָם meolam אָתָּה atah
3
The ocean sounds, O ETERNAL One,the ocean sounds its thunder,the ocean sounds its pounding.
נָשְׂאוּ nasu נְהָרוֹת neharot יְהֹוָה Adonai נָשְׂאוּ nasu נְהָרוֹת neharot קוֹלָם kolam יִשְׂאוּ yisu נְהָרוֹת neharot דּכְיָם dkhyam
4
Above the thunder of the mighty waters,more majestic than the breakers of the seais GOD, majestic on high.
מִקֹּלוֹת mikolot מַיִם mayim רַבִּים rabim אַדִּירִים adirim מִשְׁבְּרֵי mishbrey יָם yam אַדִּיר adir בַּמָּרוֹם bamarom יְהֹוָה Adonai
5
Your decrees are indeed enduring;holiness befits Your house,O ETERNAL One, for all times.
עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha נֶאֶמְנוּ neemnu מְאֹד meod לְבֵיתְךָ leveytkha נַאֲוָה naavah קֹדֶשׁ kodesh יְהֹוָה Adonai לְאֹרֶךְ leorekh יָמִים yamim

Psalm 94

1
God of retribution, ETERNAL One,God of retribution, appear!
אֵל El נְקָמוֹת nekamot יְהֹוָה Adonai אֵל El נְקָמוֹת nekamot הוֹפִיעַ hofia
2
Rise up, judge of the earth,give the arrogant their deserts!
הִנָּשֵׂא hinase שֹׁפֵט shofet הָאָרֶץ haaretz הָשֵׁב hashev גְּמוּל gemul עַל al גֵּאִים geim
3
How long shall the wicked, O ETERNAL One,how long shall the wicked exult,
עַד ad מָתַי matay רְשָׁעִיםיְהֹוָה reshaimyhovah עַד ad מָתַי matay רְשָׁעִים reshaim יַעֲלֹזוּ yaalozu
4
shall they utter insolent speech,shall all evildoers vaunt themselves?
יַבִּיעוּ yabiu יְדַבְּרוּ yedabru עָתָק atak יִתְאַמְּרוּ yitamru כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven
5
They crush Your people, O ETERNAL One,they afflict Your very own;
עַמְּךָ amkha יְהֹוָה Adonai יְדַכְּאוּ yedaku וְנַחֲלָתְךָ venachalatkha יְעַנּוּ yeanu
6
they kill the widow and the stranger;they murder the fatherless,
אַלְמָנָה almanah וְגֵר veger יַהֲרֹגוּ yaharogu וִיתוֹמִים vitomim יְרַצֵּחוּ yeratzechu
7
thinking, “Yah does not see it,the God of Jacob does not pay heed.”
וַיֹּאמְרוּ vayomru לֹא lo יִרְאֶה yireh יָּהּ Yah וְלֹא velo יָבִין yavin אֱלֹהֵי elohey יַעֲקֹב yaakov
8
Take heed, you most brutish people;fools, when will you get wisdom?
בִּינוּ binu בֹּעֲרִים boarim בָּעָם baam וּכְסִילִים ukhsilim מָתַי matay תַּשְׂכִּילוּ taskilu
9
Shall the One who implants the ear not hear,the One who forms the eye not see?
הֲנֹטַע hanota אֹזֶן ozen הֲלֹא halo יִשְׁמָע yishma אִם im יֹצֵר yotzer עַיִן ayin הֲלֹא halo יַבִּיט yabit
10
Shall the One who disciplines nations not punish,the One who instructs humankind in knowledge?
הֲיֹסֵר hayoser גּוֹיִם goyim הֲלֹא halo יוֹכִיחַ yokhiach הַמְלַמֵּד hamlamed אָדָם adam דָּעַת daat
11
GOD knows human designs to be futile.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יֹדֵעַ yodea מַחְשְׁבוֹת machshvot אָדָם adam כִּי ki הֵמָּה hemah הָבֶל havel
12
Happy are those whom You discipline, O Yah,whom You instruct in Your teaching,
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הַגֶּבֶר hagever אֲשֶׁר asher תְּיַסְּרֶנּוּ teyasrenu יָּהּ Yah וּמִתּוֹרָתְךָ umitoratkha תְלַמְּדֶנּוּ telamdenu
13
whom You give tranquility in times of misfortune,until a pit be dug for the wicked.
לְהַשְׁקִיט lehashkit לוֹ lo מִימֵי mimey רָע ra עַד ad יִכָּרֶה yikareh לָרָשָׁע larasha שָׁחַת shachat
14
For GOD will not forsake this people;God’s very own will not be abandoned.
כִּי ki לֹא lo יִטֹּשׁ yitosh יְהֹוָה Adonai עַמּוֹ amo וְנַחֲלָתוֹ venachalato לֹא lo יַעֲזֹב yaazov
15
Judgment shall again accord with justiceand all the upright shall rally to it.
כִּי ki עַד ad צֶדֶק tzedek יָשׁוּב yashuv מִשְׁפָּט mishpat וְאַחֲרָיו veacharayv כּל kl יִשְׁרֵי yishrey לֵב lev
16
Who will take my part against evildoers?Who will stand up for me against wrongdoers?
מִי mi יָקוּם yakum לִי li עִם im מְרֵעִים mereim מִי mi יִתְיַצֵּב yityatzev לִי li עִם im פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven
17
Were not GOD my help,I should soon dwell in silence.
לוּלֵי luley יְהֹוָה Adonai עֶזְרָתָה ezratah לִּי li כִּמְעַט kimat שָׁכְנָה shakhnah דוּמָה dumah נַפְשִׁי nafshi
18
When I think my foot has given way,Your faithfulness, O ETERNAL One, supports me.
אִם im אָמַרְתִּי amarti מָטָה matah רַגְלִי ragli חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha יְהֹוָה Adonai יִסְעָדֵנִי yisadeni
19
When I am filled with cares,Your assurance soothes my soul.
בְּרֹב berov שַׂרְעַפַּי sarapay בְּקִרְבִּי bekirbi תַּנְחוּמֶיךָ tanchumeykha יְשַׁעַשְׁעוּ yeshaashu נַפְשִׁי nafshi
20
Shall the seat of injustice be Your partner,that frames mischief by statute?
הַיְחבְרְךָ haychvrkha כִּסֵּא kise הַוּוֹת hauot יֹצֵר yotzer עָמָל amal עֲלֵי aley חֹק chok
21
They band together to do away with the righteous;they condemn the innocent to death.
יָגוֹדּוּ yagodu עַל al נֶפֶשׁ nefesh צַדִּיק tzadik וְדָם vedam נָקִי naki יַרְשִׁיעוּ yarshiu
22
But GOD is my haven;my God is my sheltering rock.
וַיְהִי vayhi יְהֹוָה Adonai לִי li לְמִשְׂגָּב lemisgav וֵאלֹהַי velohay לְצוּר letzur מַחְסִי machsi
23
Their evil will be made to recoil upon them,through their own wickedness they will be annihilated; the ETERNAL our God will annihilate them.
וַיָּשֶׁב vayashev עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem אֶת et אוֹנָם onam וּבְרָעָתָם uvraatam יַצְמִיתֵם yatzmitem יַצְמִיתֵם yatzmitem יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu

Psalm 95

1
Come, let us sing joyously to GOD,raise a shout for our rock and deliverer;
לְכוּ lekhu נְרַנְּנָה neranenah לַיהֹוָה layhovah נָרִיעָה nariah לְצוּר letzur יִשְׁעֵנוּ yishenu
2
let us come into the divine presence with praise;let us shout out in song!
נְקַדְּמָה nekadmah פָנָיו fanayv בְּתוֹדָה betodah בִּזְמִרוֹת bizmirot נָרִיעַ naria לוֹ lo
3
For the ETERNAL is a great God,the great ruler of all divine beings.
כִּי ki אֵל El גָּדוֹל gadol יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמֶלֶךְ umelekh גָּדוֹל gadol עַל al כּל kl אֱלֹהִים Elohim
4
In God’s hand are the depths of the earth;the peaks of the mountains are God’s.
אֲשֶׁר asher בְּיָדוֹ beyado מֶחְקְרֵי mechkrey אָרֶץ aretz וְתוֹעֲפֹת vetoafot הָרִים harim לוֹ lo
5
The sea is God’s—the One who made it;and the land, fashioned by God’s hands.
אֲשֶׁר asher לוֹ lo הַיָּם hayam וְהוּא vehu עָשָׂהוּ asahu וְיַבֶּשֶׁת veyabeshet יָדָיו yadayv יָצָרוּ yatzaru
6
Come, let us bow down and kneel,bend the knee before the ETERNAL our maker,
בֹּאוּ bou נִשְׁתַּחֲוֶה nishtachaveh וְנִכְרָעָה venikhraah נִבְרְכָה nivrkhah לִפְנֵי lifney יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹשֵׂנוּ osenu
7
for this One is our God,and we are the people being cared for—the tended flock.O, if you would but heed God’s charge this day:
כִּי ki הוּא hu אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu וַאֲנַחְנוּ vaanachnu עַם am מַרְעִיתוֹ marito וְצֹאן vetzon יָדוֹ yado הַיּוֹם hayom אִם im בְּקֹלוֹ bekolo תִשְׁמָעוּ tishmau
8
Do not be stubborn as at Meribah,as on the day of Massah, in the wilderness,
אַל El תַּקְשׁוּ takshu לְבַבְכֶם levavkhem כִּמְרִיבָה kimrivah כְּיוֹם keyom מַסָּה masah בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar
9
when your ancestors put Me to the test,tried Me, though they had seen My deeds.
אֲשֶׁר asher נִסּוּנִי nisuni אֲבוֹתֵיכֶם avoteykhem בְּחָנוּנִי bechanuni גַּם gam רָאוּ rau פעֳלִי foli
10
Forty years I was provoked by that generation;I thought, “They are a senseless people;they would not know My ways.”
אַרְבָּעִים arbaim שָׁנָה shanah אָקוּט akut בְּדוֹר bedor וָאֹמַר vaomar עַם am תֹּעֵי toey לֵבָב levav הֵם hem וְהֵם vehem לֹא lo יָדְעוּ yadu דְרָכָי derakhay
11
Concerning them I swore in anger,“They shall never come to My resting-place!”
אֲשֶׁר asher נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי nishbati בְאַפִּי veapi אִם im יְבֹאוּן yevoun אֶל El מְנוּחָתִי menuchati

Psalm 96

1
Sing to GOD a new song,sing to GOD, all the earth.
שִׁירוּ shiru לַיהֹוָה layhovah שִׁיר shir חָדָשׁ chadash שִׁירוּ shiru לַיהֹוָה layhovah כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
2
Sing to GOD, bless this name,proclaim God’s victory day after day.
שִׁירוּ shiru לַיהֹוָה layhovah בָּרְכוּ barkhu שְׁמוֹ shemo בַּשְּׂרוּ basru מִיּוֹם miom לְיוֹם leyom יְשׁוּעָתוֹ yeshuato
3
Tell of this glory among the nations,God’s wondrous deeds, among all peoples.
סַפְּרוּ sapru בַגּוֹיִם vagoyim כְּבוֹדוֹ kevodo בְּכל bekhl הָעַמִּים haamim נִפְלְאוֹתָיו niflotayv
4
For GOD is great and much acclaimed,and is held in awe by all divine beings.
כִּי ki גָדוֹל gadol יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמְהֻלָּל umhulal מְאֹד meod נוֹרָא nora הוּא hu עַל al כּל kl אֱלֹהִים Elohim
5
All the gods of the peoples are mere idols,but the ETERNAL made the heavens.
כִּי ki כּל kl אֱלֹהֵי elohey הָעַמִּים haamim אֱלִילִים elilim וַיהֹוָה vayhovah שָׁמַיִם shamayim עָשָׂה asah
6
Glory and majesty are present;strength and splendor are in the holy temple.
הוֹד hod וְהָדָר vehadar לְפָנָיו lefanayv עֹז oz וְתִפְאֶרֶת vetiferet בְּמִקְדָּשׁוֹ bemikdasho
7
Ascribe to GOD, O families of the peoples,ascribe to GOD glory and strength.
הָבוּ havu לַיהֹוָה layhovah מִשְׁפְּחוֹת mishpchot עַמִּים amim הָבוּ havu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כָּבוֹד kavod וָעֹז vaoz
8
Ascribe to GOD the glory of this name,bring tribute and enter the temple’s courts.
הָבוּ havu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כְּבוֹד kevod שְׁמוֹ shemo שְׂאוּ seu מִנְחָה minchah וּבֹאוּ uvou לְחַצְרוֹתָיו lechatzrotayv
9
Bow down to GOD, majestic in holiness;tremble in the divine presence, all the earth!
הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ hishtachavu לַיהֹוָה layhovah בְּהַדְרַת behadrat קֹדֶשׁ kodesh חִילוּ chilu מִפָּנָיו mipanayv כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
10
Declare among the nations, “GOD is sovereign!”The world stands firm; it cannot be shaken;the peoples will be judged with equity.
אִמְרוּ imru בַגּוֹיִם vagoyim יְהֹוָה Adonai מָלָךְ malakh אַף af תִּכּוֹן tikon תֵּבֵל tevel בַּל bal תִּמּוֹט timot יָדִין yadin עַמִּים amim בְּמֵישָׁרִים bemeysharim
11
Let the heavens rejoice and the earth exult;let the sea and all within it thunder,
יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim וְתָגֵל vetagel הָאָרֶץ haaretz יִרְעַם yiram הַיָּם hayam וּמְלֹאוֹ umloo
12
the fields and everything in them exult;then shall all the trees of the forest shout for joy
יַעֲלֹז yaaloz שָׂדַי saday וְכל vekhl אֲשֶׁר asher בּוֹ bo אָז az יְרַנְּנוּ yeranenu כּל kl עֲצֵי atzey יָעַר yaar
13
at the presence of GOD, who is coming,coming to rule the earth—to rule the world justly,and its peoples in faithfulness.
לִפְנֵי lifney יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki בָא va כִּי ki בָא va לִשְׁפֹּט lishpot הָאָרֶץ haaretz יִשְׁפֹּט yishpot תֵּבֵל tevel בְּצֶדֶק betzedek וְעַמִּים veamim בֶּאֱמוּנָתוֹ beemunato

Psalm 97

1
GOD is sovereign!Let the earth exult,the many islands rejoice!
יְהֹוָה Adonai מָלָךְ malakh תָּגֵל tagel הָאָרֶץ haaretz יִשְׂמְחוּ yismchu אִיִּים iim רַבִּים rabim
2
Surrounded by dense clouds—righteousness and justice are the base of the heavenly throne.
עָנָן anan וַעֲרָפֶל vaarafel סְבִיבָיו sevivayv צֶדֶק tzedek וּמִשְׁפָּט umishpat מְכוֹן mekhon כִּסְאוֹ kiso
3
Fire is the vanguard,burning up foes on every side.
אֵשׁ esh לְפָנָיו lefanayv תֵּלֵךְ telekh וּתְלַהֵט utlahet סָבִיב saviv צָרָיו tzarayv
4
God’s lightnings light up the world;the earth is convulsed at the sight;
הֵאִירוּ heiru בְרָקָיו verakayv תֵּבֵל tevel רָאֲתָה raatah וַתָּחֵל vatachel הָאָרֶץ haaretz
5
mountains melt like wax at GOD’s presence,at the presence of the Sovereign of all the earth.
הָרִים harim כַּדּוֹנַג kadonag נָמַסּוּ namasu מִלִּפְנֵי milifney יְהֹוָה Adonai מִלִּפְנֵי milifney אֲדוֹן adon כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
6
The heavens proclaim God’s righteousnessand all peoples see God’s glory.
הִגִּידוּ higidu הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim צִדְקוֹ tzidko וְרָאוּ verau כל khl הָעַמִּים haamim כְּבוֹדוֹ kevodo
7
All who worship images,who vaunt their idols,are dismayed;all divine beings bow down in homage.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu כּל kl עֹבְדֵי ovdey פֶסֶל fesel הַמִּתְהַלְלִים hamithalelim בָּאֱלִילִים baelilim הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ hishtachavu לוֹ lo כּל kl אֱלֹהִים Elohim
8
Zion, hearing it, rejoices,the towns of Judah exult,because of Your judgments, O ETERNAL One.
שָׁמְעָה shamah וַתִּשְׂמַח vatismach צִיּוֹן tzion וַתָּגֵלְנָה vatagelnah בְּנוֹת benot יְהוּדָה yehudah לְמַעַן lemaan מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha יְהֹוָה Adonai
9
For You, ETERNAL One, are supreme over all the earth;You are exalted high above all divine beings.
כִּי ki אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai עֶלְיוֹן elyon עַל al כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz מְאֹד meod נַעֲלֵיתָ naaleyta עַל al כּל kl אֱלֹהִים Elohim
10
O you who love GOD, hate evil!For the lives of the loyal are guarded;they are saved from the hand of the wicked.
אֹהֲבֵי ohavey יְהֹוָה Adonai שִׂנְאוּ sinu רָע ra שֹׁמֵר shomer נַפְשׁוֹת nafshot חֲסִידָיו chasidayv מִיַּד miad רְשָׁעִים reshaim יַצִּילֵם yatzilem
11
Light is sown for the righteous,radiance for the upright.
אוֹר or זָרֻעַ zarua לַצַּדִּיק latzadik וּלְיִשְׁרֵי ulyishrey לֵב lev שִׂמְחָה simchah
12
O you righteous, rejoice in GOD and acclaim God’s holy name!
שִׂמְחוּ simchu צַדִּיקִים tzadikim בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah וְהוֹדוּ vehodu לְזֵכֶר lezekher קדְשׁוֹ kdsho

Psalm 98

1
A psalm.Sing to GOD a new song,who has worked wonders—who with right hand, and holy arm,has won victory.
מִזְמוֹר mizmor שִׁירוּ shiru לַיהֹוָה layhovah שִׁיר shir חָדָשׁ chadash כִּי ki נִפְלָאוֹת niflaot עָשָׂה asah הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah לּוֹ lo יְמִינוֹ yemino וּזְרוֹעַ uzroa קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
2
GOD has manifested victory,and displayed triumph in the sight of the nations—
הוֹדִיעַ hodia יְהֹוָה Adonai יְשׁוּעָתוֹ yeshuato לְעֵינֵי leeyney הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim גִּלָּה gilah צִדְקָתוֹ tzidkato
3
mindful of God’s steadfast love and faithfulness toward the house of Israel.All the ends of the earth beheld the victory of our God.
זָכַר zakhar חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וֶאֱמוּנָתוֹ veemunato לְבֵית leveyt יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael רָאוּ rau כל khl אַפְסֵי afsey אָרֶץ aretz אֵת et יְשׁוּעַת yeshuat אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu
4
Raise a shout to GOD, all the earth,break into joyous songs of praise!
הָרִיעוּ hariu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz פִּצְחוּ pitzchu וְרַנְּנוּ veranenu וְזַמֵּרוּ vezameru
5
Sing praise to GOD with the lyre,with the lyre and melodious song.
זַמְּרוּ zamru לַיהֹוָה layhovah בְּכִנּוֹר bekhinor בְּכִנּוֹר bekhinor וְקוֹל vekol זִמְרָה zimrah
6
With trumpets and the blast of the hornraise a shout before GOD, the King.
בַּחֲצֹצְרוֹת bachatzotzrot וְקוֹל vekol שׁוֹפָר shofar הָרִיעוּ hariu לִפְנֵי lifney הַמֶּלֶךְ hamelekh יְהֹוָה Adonai
7
Let the sea and all within it thunder,the world and its inhabitants;
יִרְעַם yiram הַיָּם hayam וּמְלֹאוֹ umloo תֵּבֵל tevel וְיֹשְׁבֵי veyoshvey בָהּ vah
8
let the rivers clap their hands,the mountains sing joyously together
נְהָרוֹת neharot יִמְחֲאוּ yimchau כָף khaf יַחַד yachad הָרִים harim יְרַנֵּנוּ yeranenu
9
at the presence of GOD—who is coming to rule the earth:[God] will rule the world justly,and its peoples with equity.
לִפְנֵי lifney יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki בָא va לִשְׁפֹּט lishpot הָאָרֶץ haaretz יִשְׁפֹּט yishpot תֵּבֵל tevel בְּצֶדֶק betzedek וְעַמִּים veamim בְּמֵישָׁרִים bemeysharim

Psalm 99

1
GOD, enthroned on cherubim, is sovereign,peoples tremble, the earth quakes.
יְהֹוָה Adonai מָלָךְ malakh יִרְגְּזוּ yirgzu עַמִּים amim יֹשֵׁב yoshev כְּרוּבִים keruvim תָּנוּט tanut הָאָרֶץ haaretz
2
GOD is great in Zion,and exalted above all peoples.
יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּצִיּוֹן betzion גָּדוֹל gadol וְרָם veram הוּא hu עַל al כּל kl הָעַמִּים haamim
3
They praise Your name as great and awesome;[God] is holy!
יוֹדוּ yodu שִׁמְךָ shimkha גָּדוֹל gadol וְנוֹרָא venora קָדוֹשׁ kadosh הוּא hu
4
Mighty ruler who loves justice,it was You who established equity,You who worked righteous judgment in Jacob.
וְעֹז veoz מֶלֶךְ melekh מִשְׁפָּט mishpat אָהֵב ahev אַתָּה atah כּוֹנַנְתָּ konanta מֵישָׁרִים meysharim מִשְׁפָּט mishpat וּצְדָקָה utzdakah בְּיַעֲקֹב beyaakov אַתָּה atah עָשִׂיתָ asita
5
Exalt the ETERNAL our Godand bow down to the divine footstool;[God] is holy!
רוֹמְמוּ romemu יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu וְהִשְׁתַּחֲווּ vehishtachavu לַהֲדֹם lahadom רַגְלָיו raglayv קָדוֹשׁ kadosh הוּא hu
6
Moses and Aaron among God’s priests,Samuel, among those who call on the divine name—when they called to GOD,they were answered.
מֹשֶׁה mosheh וְאַהֲרֹן veaharon בְּכֹהֲנָיו bekhohanayv וּשְׁמוּאֵל ushmuel בְּקֹרְאֵי bekorey שְׁמוֹ shemo קֹרִאים koriym אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai וְהוּא vehu יַעֲנֵם yaanem
7
[God] spoke to them in a pillar of cloud;they obeyed those decrees,the law given to them.
בְּעַמּוּד beamud עָנָן anan יְדַבֵּר yedaber אֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem שָׁמְרוּ shamru עֵדֹתָיו edotayv וְחֹק vechok נָתַן natan לָמוֹ lamo
8
Our ETERNAL God, You answered them;You were a forgiving God for them,but You exacted retribution for their misdeeds.
יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu אַתָּה atah עֲנִיתָם anitam אֵל El נֹשֵׂא nose הָיִיתָ hayita לָהֶם lahem וְנֹקֵם venokem עַל al עֲלִילוֹתָם alilotam
9
Exalt the ETERNAL our God,and bow toward God’s holy hill,for the ETERNAL our God is holy.
רוֹמְמוּ romemu יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu וְהִשְׁתַּחֲווּ vehishtachavu לְהַר lehar קדְשׁוֹ kdsho כִּי ki קָדוֹשׁ kadosh יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu

Psalm 100

1
A psalm for praise. Raise a shout for GOD, all the earth;
מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְתוֹדָה letodah הָרִיעוּ hariu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz
2
worship GOD in gladness;come into the divine presence with shouts of joy.
עִבְדוּ ivdu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּשִׂמְחָה besimchah בֹּאוּ bou לְפָנָיו lefanayv בִּרְנָנָה birnanah
3
Acknowledge that the ETERNAL is God,who made us and to whom we belong,; kethib and some ancient versions “not we ourselves.” a covenanted people, the flock whom [God] tends.
דְּעוּ deu כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai הוּא hu אֱלֹהִים Elohim הוּא hu עָשָׂנוּ asanu (ולא) vl [וְלוֹ] velo אֲנַחְנוּ anachnu עַמּוֹ amo וְצֹאן vetzon מַרְעִיתוֹ marito
4
Enter the temple’s gates with praise,its courts with acclamation.Give praise!Bless the divine name!
בֹּאוּ bou שְׁעָרָיו shearayv בְּתוֹדָה betodah חֲצֵרֹתָיו chatzerotayv בִּתְהִלָּה bithilah הוֹדוּ hodu לוֹ lo בָּרְכוּ barkhu שְׁמוֹ shemo
5
For GOD—whose steadfast love is eternal,and whose faithfulness is for all generations—is good.
כִּי ki טוֹב tov יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וְעַד vead דֹּר dor וָדֹר vador אֱמוּנָתוֹ emunato

Psalm 101

1
Of David. A psalm.I will sing of faithfulness and justice;I will chant a hymn to You, O ETERNAL One.
לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor חֶסֶד chesed וּמִשְׁפָּט umishpat אָשִׁירָה ashirah לְךָ lekha יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲזַמֵּרָה azamerah
2
I will study the way of the blameless;when shall I attain it?I will live without blame within my house.
אַשְׂכִּילָה askilah בְּדֶרֶךְ bederekh תָּמִים tamim מָתַי matay תָּבוֹא tavo אֵלָי elay אֶתְהַלֵּךְ ethalekh בְּתם betm לְבָבִי levavi בְּקֶרֶב bekerev בֵּיתִי beyti
3
I will not set before my eyes anything base;I hate crooked dealing;I will have none of it.
לֹא lo אָשִׁית ashit לְנֶגֶד leneged עֵינַי eynay דְּבַר devar בְּלִיָּעַל beliaal עֲשֹׂה asoh סֵטִים setim שָׂנֵאתִי saneti לֹא lo יִדְבַּק yidbak בִּי bi
4
Perverse thoughts will be far from me;I will know nothing of evil.
לֵבָב levav עִקֵּשׁ ikesh יָסוּר yasur מִמֶּנִּי mimeni רָע ra לֹא lo אֵדָע eda
5
One who slanders a friend in secret I will destroy;I cannot endure anyone haughty and proud.
(מלושני) mlvshny [מְלשְׁנִי] melshni בַסֵּתֶר vaseter רֵעֵהוּ reehu אוֹתוֹ oto אַצְמִית atzmit גְּבַהּ gevah עֵינַיִם eynayim וּרְחַב urchav לֵבָב levav אֹתוֹ oto לֹא lo אוּכָל ukhal
6
My eyes are on the trustworthy ones of the land,to have them at my side.One who follows the way of the blamelessshall be in my service.
עֵינַי eynay בְּנֶאֶמְנֵי beneemney אֶרֶץ eretz לָשֶׁבֶת lashevet עִמָּדִי imadi הֹלֵךְ holekh בְּדֶרֶךְ bederekh תָּמִים tamim הוּא hu יְשָׁרְתֵנִי yesharteni
7
One who deals deceitfullyshall not live in my house;one who speaks untruthshall not stand before my eyes.
לֹא lo יֵשֵׁב yeshev בְּקֶרֶב bekerev בֵּיתִי beyti עֹשֵׂה oseh רְמִיָּה remiah דֹּבֵר dover שְׁקָרִים shekarim לֹא lo יִכּוֹן yikon לְנֶגֶד leneged עֵינָי eynay
8
Each morning I will destroyall the wicked of the land,to rid GOD’s cityof all evildoers.
לַבְּקָרִים labkarim אַצְמִית atzmit כּל kl רִשְׁעֵי rishey אָרֶץ aretz לְהַכְרִית lehakhrit מֵעִיר meir יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl פֹּעֲלֵי poaley אָוֶן aven

Psalm 102

1
A prayer of one who is lowly and faint, pouring forth a plea before GOD.
תְּפִלָּה tefilah לְעָנִי leani כִי khi יַעֲטֹף yaatof וְלִפְנֵי velifney יְהֹוָה Adonai יִשְׁפֹּךְ yishpokh שִׂיחוֹ sicho
2
O ETERNAL One, hear my prayer;let my cry come before You.
יְהֹוָה Adonai שִׁמְעָה shimah תְפִלָּתִי tefilati וְשַׁוְעָתִי veshavati אֵלֶיךָ eleykha תָבוֹא tavo
3
Do not hide Your face from mein my time of trouble;turn Your ear to me;when I cry, answer me speedily.
אַל El תַּסְתֵּר taster פָּנֶיךָ paneykha מִמֶּנִּי mimeni בְּיוֹם beyom צַר tzar לִי li הַטֵּה hateh אֵלַי elay אזְנֶךָ znekha בְּיוֹם beyom אֶקְרָא ekra מַהֵר maher עֲנֵנִי aneni
4
For my days have vanished like smokeand my bones are charred like a hearth.
כִּי ki כָלוּ khalu בְעָשָׁן veashan יָמָי yamay וְעַצְמוֹתַי veatzmotay כְּמוֹקֵד kemoked נִחָרוּ nicharu
5
My body is stricken and withered like grass;too wasted to eat my food;
הוּכָּה hukah כָעֵשֶׂב khaesev וַיִּבַשׁ vayivash לִבִּי libi כִּי ki שָׁכַחְתִּי shakhachti מֵאֲכֹל meakhol לַחְמִי lachmi
6
on account of my vehement groaningmy bones show through my skin.
מִקּוֹל mikol אַנְחָתִי anchati דָּבְקָה davkah עַצְמִי atzmi לִבְשָׂרִי livsari
7
I am like a great owl in the wilderness,an owl among the ruins.
דָּמִיתִי damiti לִקְאַת likat מִדְבָּר midbar הָיִיתִי hayiti כְּכוֹס kekhos חֳרָבוֹת choravot
8
I lie awake; I am likea lone bird upon a roof.
שָׁקַדְתִּי shakadti וָאֶהְיֶה vaehyeh כְּצִפּוֹר ketzipor בּוֹדֵד boded עַל al גָּג gag
9
All day long my enemies revile me;my deriders use my name to curse.
כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom חֵרְפוּנִי cherfuni אוֹיְבָי oyvay מְהוֹלָלַי meholalay בִּי bi נִשְׁבָּעוּ nishbau
10
For I have eaten ashes like breadand mixed my drink with tears,
כִּי ki אֵפֶר efer כַּלֶּחֶם kalechem אָכָלְתִּי akhalti וְשִׁקֻּוַי veshikuvay בִּבְכִי bivkhi מָסָכְתִּי masakhti
11
because of Your wrath and Your fury;for You have cast me far away.
מִפְּנֵי mipney זַעַמְךָ zaamkha וְקִצְפֶּךָ vekitzpekha כִּי ki נְשָׂאתַנִי nesatani וַתַּשְׁלִיכֵנִי vatashlikheni
12
My days are like a lengthening shadow;I wither like grass.
יָמַי yamay כְּצֵל ketzel נָטוּי natuy וַאֲנִי vaani כָּעֵשֶׂב kaesev אִיבָשׁ ivash
13
But You, O ETERNAL One, are enthroned forever;Your fame endures throughout the ages.
וְאַתָּה veatah יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעוֹלָם leolam תֵּשֵׁב teshev וְזִכְרְךָ vezikhrkha לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador
14
You will surely arise and take pity on Zion,for it is time to be gracious to her;the appointed time has come.
אַתָּה atah תָקוּם takum תְּרַחֵם terachem צִיּוֹן tzion כִּי ki עֵת et לְחֶנְנָהּ lechenenah כִּי ki בָא va מוֹעֵד moed
15
Your servants take delight in its stones,and cherish its dust.
כִּי ki רָצוּ ratzu עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha אֶת et אֲבָנֶיהָ avaneyha וְאֶת veet עֲפָרָהּ afarah יְחֹנֵנוּ yechonenu
16
The nations will fear the name of GOD,all the kings of the earth, Your glory.
וְיִירְאוּ veyiru גוֹיִם goyim אֶת et שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai וְכל vekhl מַלְכֵי malkhey הָאָרֶץ haaretz אֶת et כְּבוֹדֶךָ kevodekha
17
For GOD has built Zion,appearing in divine glory—
כִּי ki בָנָה vanah יְהֹוָה Adonai צִיּוֹן tzion נִרְאָה nirah בִּכְבוֹדוֹ bikhvodo
18
turning to the prayer of the destitute and not spurning their prayer.
פָּנָה panah אֶל El תְּפִלַּת tefilat הָעַרְעָר haarar וְלֹא velo בָזָה vazah אֶת et תְּפִלָּתָם tefilatam
19
May this be written down for a coming generation,that people yet to be created may praise Yah.
תִּכָּתֶב tikatev זֹאת zot לְדוֹר ledor אַחֲרוֹן acharon וְעַם veam נִבְרָא nivra יְהַלֶּל yehalel יָהּ Yah
20
Looking down from the holy heights, GOD beholds the earth from heaven
כִּי ki הִשְׁקִיף hishkif מִמְּרוֹם mimrom קדְשׁוֹ kdsho יְהֹוָה Adonai מִשָּׁמַיִם mishamayim אֶל El אֶרֶץ eretz הִבִּיט hibit
21
to hear the groans of the prisoner,to release those condemned to death;
לִשְׁמֹעַ lishmoa אֶנְקַת enkat אָסִיר asir לְפַתֵּחַ lefateach בְּנֵי beney תְמוּתָה temutah
22
that GOD’s fame may be recounted in Zion,with praises offered in Jerusalem,
לְסַפֵּר lesaper בְּצִיּוֹן betzion שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai וּתְהִלָּתוֹ uthilato בִּירוּשָׁלָ͏ִם birushalaim
23
when the nations gather together,the kingdoms, to serve GOD.
בְּהִקָּבֵץ behikavetz עַמִּים amim יַחְדָּו yachdav וּמַמְלָכוֹת umamlakhot לַעֲבֹד laavod אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai
24
My strength was drained in mid-course,my days shortened.
עִנָּה inah בַדֶּרֶךְ vaderekh (כחו) khchv [כֹּחִי] kochi קִצַּר kitzar יָמָי yamay
25
I say, “O my God, do not take me awayin the midst of my days,You whose years go on for generations on end.
אֹמַר omar אֵלִי eli אַל El תַּעֲלֵנִי taaleni בַּחֲצִי bachatzi יָמָי yamay בְּדוֹר bedor דּוֹרִים dorim שְׁנוֹתֶיךָ shenoteykha
26
Of old You established the earth;the heavens are the work of Your hands.
לְפָנִים lefanim הָאָרֶץ haaretz יָסַדְתָּ yasadta וּמַעֲשֵׂה umaaseh יָדֶיךָ yadeykha שָׁמָיִם shamayim
27
They shall perish, but You shall endure;they shall all wear out like a garment;You change them like clothing and they pass away.
הֵמָּה hemah יֹאבֵדוּ yovedu וְאַתָּה veatah תַעֲמֹד taamod וְכֻלָּם vekhulam כַּבֶּגֶד kabeged יִבְלוּ yivlu כַּלְּבוּשׁ kalvush תַּחֲלִיפֵם tachalifem וְיַחֲלֹפוּ veyachalofu
28
But You are the same, and Your years never end.
וְאַתָּה veatah הוּא hu וּשְׁנוֹתֶיךָ ushnoteykha לֹא lo יִתָּמּוּ yitamu
29
May the children of Your servants dwell securelyand their offspring endure in Your presence.”
בְּנֵי beney עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha יִשְׁכּוֹנוּ yishkonu וְזַרְעָם vezaram לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha יִכּוֹן yikon

Psalm 103

1
Of David.Bless GOD, O my soul,all my being, that holy name.
לְדָוִד ledavid בָּרְכִי barkhi נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai וְכל vekhl קְרָבַי keravay אֶת et שֵׁם shem קדְשׁוֹ kdsho
2
Bless the ETERNAL One, O my soul,and do not forget all God’s bounties.
בָּרְכִי barkhi נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai וְאַל veal תִּשְׁכְּחִי tishkchi כּל kl גְּמוּלָיו gemulayv
3
All your sins are forgiven,all your diseases healed.
הַסֹּלֵחַ hasoleach לְכל lekhl עֲוֺנֵכִי avonekhi הָרֹפֵא harofe לְכל lekhl תַּחֲלוּאָיְכִי tachaluaykhi
4
Your life is redeemed from the Pit,you are surrounded with steadfast love and mercy.
הַגּוֹאֵל hagoel מִשַּׁחַת mishachat חַיָּיְכִי chayaykhi הַמְעַטְּרֵכִי hamatrekhi חֶסֶד chesed וְרַחֲמִים verachamim
5
You are satisfied with good things in the prime of life, so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.
הַמַּשְׂבִּיעַ hamasbia בַּטּוֹב batov עֶדְיֵךְ edyekh תִּתְחַדֵּשׁ titchadesh כַּנֶּשֶׁר kanesher נְעוּרָיְכִי neuraykhi
6
GOD executes righteous actsand judgments for all who are wronged—
עֹשֵׂה oseh צְדָקוֹת tzedakot יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמִשְׁפָּטִים umishpatim לְכל lekhl עֲשׁוּקִים ashukim
7
making known to Moses the divine ways,and to the children of Israel, holy deeds.
יוֹדִיעַ yodia דְּרָכָיו derakhayv לְמֹשֶׁה lemosheh לִבְנֵי livney יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael עֲלִילוֹתָיו alilotayv
8
GOD is compassionate and gracious,slow to anger, abounding in steadfast love.
רַחוּם rachum וְחַנּוּן vechanun יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶרֶךְ erekh אַפַּיִם apayim וְרַב verav חָסֶד chased
9
[God] will not contend forever,or nurse anger for all time.
לֹא lo לָנֶצַח lanetzach יָרִיב yariv וְלֹא velo לְעוֹלָם leolam יִטּוֹר yitor
10
[God] has not dealt with us according to our sins,nor requited us according to our iniquities.
לֹא lo כַחֲטָאֵינוּ khachataeynu עָשָׂה asah לָנוּ lanu וְלֹא velo כַעֲוֺנֹתֵינוּ khaavonoteynu גָּמַל gamal עָלֵינוּ aleynu
11
For as the heavens are high above the earth,so great is divine steadfast love toward those who show reverence.
כִּי ki כִגְבֹהַּ khigvoha שָׁמַיִם shamayim עַל al הָאָרֶץ haaretz גָּבַר gavar חַסְדּוֹ chasdo עַל al יְרֵאָיו yereayv
12
As east is far from west,so far have our sins been removed from us.
כִּרְחֹק kirchok מִזְרָח mizrach מִמַּעֲרָב mimaarav הִרְחִיק hirchik מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu אֶת et פְּשָׁעֵינוּ peshaeynu
13
As a father has compassion for his children,so GOD has compassion for those who show reverence.
כְּרַחֵם kerachem אָב av עַל al בָּנִים banim רִחַם richam יְהֹוָה Adonai עַל al יְרֵאָיו yereayv
14
For [God] knows how we are formed,and is mindful that we are dust.
כִּי ki הוּא hu יָדַע yada יִצְרֵנוּ yitzrenu זָכוּר zakhur כִּי ki עָפָר afar אֲנָחְנוּ anachnu
15
Mortals, their days are like those of grass;they bloom like a flower of the field;
אֱנוֹשׁ enosh כֶּחָצִיר kechatzir יָמָיו yamayv כְּצִיץ ketzitz הַשָּׂדֶה hasadeh כֵּן ken יָצִיץ yatzitz
16
a wind passes by and it is no more,its own place no longer knows it.
כִּי ki רוּחַ ruach עָבְרָה avrah בּוֹ bo וְאֵינֶנּוּ veeynenu וְלֹא velo יַכִּירֶנּוּ yakirenu עוֹד od מְקוֹמוֹ mekomo
17
But GOD’s steadfast love is for all eternitytoward those who show reverence,and God’s beneficence is for the children’s children
וְחֶסֶד vechesed יְהֹוָה Adonai מֵעוֹלָם meolam וְעַד vead עוֹלָם olam עַל al יְרֵאָיו yereayv וְצִדְקָתוֹ vetzidkato לִבְנֵי livney בָנִים vanim
18
of those who keep the covenantand remember to observe the divine precepts.
לְשֹׁמְרֵי leshomrey בְרִיתוֹ verito וּלְזֹכְרֵי ulzokhrey פִקֻּדָיו fikudayv לַעֲשׂוֹתָם laasotam
19
GOD has established the heavenly throne,with a sovereign rule over all.
יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּשָּׁמַיִם bashamayim הֵכִין hekhin כִּסְאוֹ kiso וּמַלְכוּתוֹ umalkhuto בַּכֹּל bakol מָשָׁלָה mashalah
20
Bless the ETERNAL One, O angels,mighty creatures who do God’s bidding,ever obedient to that bidding;
בָּרְכוּ barkhu יְהֹוָה Adonai מַלְאָכָיו malakhayv גִּבֹּרֵי giborey כֹחַ khoach עֹשֵׂי osey דְבָרוֹ devaro לִשְׁמֹעַ lishmoa בְּקוֹל bekol דְּבָרוֹ devaro
21
bless the ETERNAL One, all you hosts,you servants who do God’s will;
בָּרְכוּ barkhu יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl צְבָאָיו tzevaayv מְשָׁרְתָיו meshartayv עֹשֵׂי osey רְצוֹנוֹ retzono
22
bless the ETERNAL One, all God’s works,through the length and breadth of God’s realm;bless the ETERNAL One, O my soul.
בָּרְכוּ barkhu יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl מַעֲשָׂיו maasayv בְּכל bekhl מְקֹמוֹת mekomot מֶמְשַׁלְתּוֹ memshalto בָּרְכִי barkhi נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai

Psalm 104

1
Bless the ETERNAL One, O my soul;O ETERNAL One, my God, You are very great;You are clothed in glory and majesty,
בָּרְכִי barkhi נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהַי elohay גָּדַלְתָּ gadalta מְּאֹד meod הוֹד hod וְהָדָר vehadar לָבָשְׁתָּ lavashta
2
wrapped in a robe of light;You spread the heavens like a tent cloth.
עֹטֶה oteh אוֹר or כַּשַּׂלְמָה kasalmah נוֹטֶה noteh שָׁמַיִם shamayim כַּיְרִיעָה kayriah
3
You set the rafters of the heavenly lofts in the waters—making the clouds a chariot,moving on the wings of the wind.
הַמְקָרֶה hamkareh בַמַּיִם vamayim עֲלִיּוֹתָיו aliotayv הַשָּׂם hasam עָבִים avim רְכוּבוֹ rekhuvo הַמְהַלֵּךְ hamhalekh עַל al כַּנְפֵי kanfey רוּחַ ruach
4
You make messengers of the winds,servants of fiery flames.
עֹשֶׂה oseh מַלְאָכָיו malakhayv רוּחוֹת ruchot מְשָׁרְתָיו meshartayv אֵשׁ esh לֹהֵט lohet
5
You established the earth on its foundations,so that it shall never totter.
יָסַד yasad אֶרֶץ eretz עַל al מְכוֹנֶיהָ mekhoneyha בַּל bal תִּמּוֹט timot עוֹלָם olam וָעֶד vaed
6
You made the deep cover it as a garment;the waters stood above the mountains.
תְּהוֹם tehom כַּלְּבוּשׁ kalvush כִּסִּיתוֹ kisito עַל al הָרִים harim יַעַמְדוּ yaamdu מָיִם mayim
7
They fled at Your blast,rushed away at the sound of Your thunder—
מִן min גַּעֲרָתְךָ gaaratkha יְנוּסוּן yenusun מִן min קוֹל kol רַעַמְךָ raamkha יֵחָפֵזוּן yechafezun
8
mountains rising, valleys sinking—to the place You established for them.
יַעֲלוּ yaalu הָרִים harim יֵרְדוּ yerdu בְקָעוֹת vekaot אֶל El מְקוֹם mekom זֶה zeh יָסַדְתָּ yasadta לָהֶם lahem
9
You set bounds they must not passso that they never again cover the earth.
גְּבוּל gevul שַׂמְתָּ samta בַּל bal יַעֲבֹרוּן yaavorun בַּל bal יְשֻׁבוּן yeshuvun לְכַסּוֹת lekhasot הָאָרֶץ haaretz
10
You make springs gush forth in torrents;they make their way between the hills,
הַמְשַׁלֵּחַ hamshaleach מַעְיָנִים mayanim בַּנְּחָלִים banchalim בֵּין beyn הָרִים harim יְהַלֵּכוּן yehalekhun
11
giving drink to all the wild beasts;the wild asses slake their thirst.
יַשְׁקוּ yashku כּל kl חַיְתוֹ chayto שָׂדָי saday יִשְׁבְּרוּ yishbru פְרָאִים feraim צְמָאָם tzemaam
12
The birds of the sky dwell beside themand sing among the foliage.
עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem עוֹף of הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim יִשְׁכּוֹן yishkon מִבֵּין mibeyn עֳפָאיִם ofayim יִתְּנוּ yitnu קוֹל kol
13
You water the mountains from Your lofts;the earth is sated from the fruit of Your work.
מַשְׁקֶה mashkeh הָרִים harim מֵעֲלִיּוֹתָיו mealiotayv מִפְּרִי mipri מַעֲשֶׂיךָ maaseykha תִּשְׂבַּע tisba הָאָרֶץ haaretz
14
You make the grass grow for the cattle,and herbage for humans’ laborthat they may get food out of the earth—
מַצְמִיחַ matzmiach חָצִיר chatzir לַבְּהֵמָה labhemah וְעֵשֶׂב veesev לַעֲבֹדַת laavodat הָאָדָם haadam לְהוֹצִיא lehotzi לֶחֶם lechem מִן min הָאָרֶץ haaretz
15
wine that cheers human hearts,oil that makes the face shine, and bread that sustains human life.
וְיַיִן veyayin יְשַׂמַּח yesamach לְבַב levav אֱנוֹשׁ enosh לְהַצְהִיל lehatzhil פָּנִים panim מִשָּׁמֶן mishamen וְלֶחֶם velechem לְבַב levav אֱנוֹשׁ enosh יִסְעָד yisad
16
The trees of the ETERNAL drink their fill,the cedars of Lebanon, God’s own planting,
יִשְׂבְּעוּ yisbu עֲצֵי atzey יְהֹוָה Adonai אַרְזֵי arzey לְבָנוֹן levanon אֲשֶׁר asher נָטָע nata
17
where birds make their nests;the stork has her home in the junipers.
אֲשֶׁר asher שָׁם sham צִפֳּרִים tziporim יְקַנֵּנוּ yekanenu חֲסִידָה chasidah בְּרוֹשִׁים beroshim בֵּיתָהּ beytah
18
The high mountains are for wild goats;the crags are a refuge for rock-badgers.
הָרִים harim הַגְּבֹהִים hagvohim לַיְּעֵלִים layelim סְלָעִים selaim מַחְסֶה machseh לַשְׁפַנִּים lashfanim
19
[God] made the moon to mark the seasons;the sun knows when to set.
עָשָׂה asah יָרֵחַ yareach לְמוֹעֲדִים lemoadim שֶׁמֶשׁ shemesh יָדַע yada מְבוֹאוֹ mevoo
20
You bring on darkness and it is night,when all the beasts of the forests stir.
תָּשֶׁת tashet חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh וִיהִי vihi לָיְלָה laylah בּוֹ bo תִרְמֹשׂ tirmos כּל kl חַיְתוֹ chayto יָעַר yaar
21
The lions roar for prey,seeking their food from God.
הַכְּפִירִים hakfirim שֹׁאֲגִים shoagim לַטָּרֶף lataref וּלְבַקֵּשׁ ulvakesh מֵאֵל meel אכְלָם khlam
22
When the sun rises, they come homeand couch in their dens.
תִּזְרַח tizrach הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ hashemesh יֵאָסֵפוּן yeasefun וְאֶל veel מְעוֹנֹתָם meonotam יִרְבָּצוּן yirbatzun
23
People then go out to their work,to their labor until the evening.
יֵצֵא yetze אָדָם adam לְפעֳלוֹ lefolo וְלַעֲבֹדָתוֹ velaavodato עֲדֵי adey עָרֶב arev
24
How many are the things You have made, O ETERNAL One;You have made them all with wisdom;the earth is full of Your creations.
מָה mah רַבּוּ rabu מַעֲשֶׂיךָ maaseykha יְהֹוָה Adonai כֻּלָּם kulam בְּחכְמָה bechkhmah עָשִׂיתָ asita מָלְאָה malah הָאָרֶץ haaretz קִנְיָנֶךָ kinyanekha
25
There is the sea, vast and wide,with its creatures beyond number,living things, small and great.
זֶה zeh הַיָּם hayam גָּדוֹל gadol וּרְחַב urchav יָדָיִם yadayim שָׁם sham רֶמֶשׂ remes וְאֵין veeyn מִסְפָּר mispar חַיּוֹת chayot קְטַנּוֹת ketanot עִם im גְּדֹלוֹת gedolot
26
There go the ships,and Leviathan that You formed to sport with.
שָׁם sham אֳנִיּוֹת oniot יְהַלֵּכוּן yehalekhun לִוְיָתָן livyatan זֶה zeh יָצַרְתָּ yatzarta לְשַׂחֶק lesachek בּוֹ bo
27
All of them look to Youto give them their food when it is due.
כֻּלָּם kulam אֵלֶיךָ eleykha יְשַׂבֵּרוּן yesaberun לָתֵת latet אכְלָם khlam בְּעִתּוֹ beito
28
Give it to them, they gather it up;open Your hand, they are well satisfied;
תִּתֵּן titen לָהֶם lahem יִלְקֹטוּן yilkotun תִּפְתַּח tiftach יָדְךָ yadkha יִשְׂבְּעוּן yisbun טוֹב tov
29
hide Your face, they are terrified;take away their breath, they perishand turn again into dust;
תַּסְתִּיר tastir פָּנֶיךָ paneykha יִבָּהֵלוּן yibahelun תֹּסֵף tosef רוּחָם rucham יִגְוָעוּן yigvaun וְאֶל veel עֲפָרָם afaram יְשׁוּבוּן yeshuvun
30
send back Your breath, they are created,and You renew the face of the earth.
תְּשַׁלַּח teshalach רוּחֲךָ ruchakha יִבָּרֵאוּן yibareun וּתְחַדֵּשׁ utchadesh פְּנֵי peney אֲדָמָה adamah
31
May GOD’s glory endure forever;may GOD rejoice in these works!
יְהִי yehi כְבוֹד khevod יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעוֹלָם leolam יִשְׂמַח yismach יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּמַעֲשָׂיו bemaasayv
32
—The One who looks at the earth and it trembles,touches the mountains and they smoke.
הַמַּבִּיט hamabit לָאָרֶץ laaretz וַתִּרְעָד vatirad יִגַּע yiga בֶּהָרִים beharim וְיֶעֱשָׁנוּ veyeeshanu
33
I will sing to the ETERNAL as long as I live;all my life I will chant hymns to my God.
אָשִׁירָה ashirah לַיהֹוָה layhovah בְּחַיָּי bechayay אֲזַמְּרָה azamrah לֵאלֹהַי lelohay בְּעוֹדִי beodi
34
May my prayer be found pleasing;I will rejoice in GOD.
יֶעֱרַב yeerav עָלָיו alayv שִׂיחִי sichi אָנֹכִי anokhi אֶשְׂמַח esmach בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah
35
May sinners disappear from the earth,and the wicked be no more.Bless Yah, O my soul.Hallelujah.
יִתַּמּוּ yitamu חַטָּאִים chataim מִן min הָאָרֶץ haaretz וּרְשָׁעִים urshaim עוֹד od אֵינָם eynam בָּרְכִי barkhi נַפְשִׁי nafshi אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 105

1
Praise GOD;call on this name;proclaim God’s deeds among the peoples.
הוֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah קִרְאוּ kiru בִשְׁמוֹ vishmo הוֹדִיעוּ hodiu בָעַמִּים vaamim עֲלִילוֹתָיו alilotayv
2
Sing out praises;speak of all those wondrous acts.
שִׁירוּ shiru לוֹ lo זַמְּרוּ zamru לוֹ lo שִׂיחוּ sichu בְּכל bekhl נִפְלְאוֹתָיו niflotayv
3
Exult in this holy name;let all who seek GOD rejoice.
הִתְהַלְלוּ hithalelu בְּשֵׁם beshem קדְשׁוֹ kdsho יִשְׂמַח yismach לֵב lev מְבַקְשֵׁי mevakshey יְהֹוָה Adonai
4
Turn to GOD, to divine might; seek God’s presence constantly.
דִּרְשׁוּ dirshu יְהֹוָה Adonai וְעֻזּוֹ veuzo בַּקְּשׁוּ bakshu פָנָיו fanayv תָּמִיד tamid
5
Remember the wonders that have been done,the portents, and judgments pronounced,
זִכְרוּ zikhru נִפְלְאוֹתָיו niflotayv אֲשֶׁר asher עָשָׂה asah מֹפְתָיו moftayv וּמִשְׁפְּטֵי umishptey פִיו fiv
6
O offspring of Abraham, God’s servant,O descendants of Jacob, the chosen ones.
זֶרַע zera אַבְרָהָם avraham עַבְדּוֹ avdo בְּנֵי beney יַעֲקֹב yaakov בְּחִירָיו bechirayv
7
The ETERNAL is our God,whose judgments are throughout the earth.
הוּא hu יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu בְּכל bekhl הָאָרֶץ haaretz מִשְׁפָּטָיו mishpatayv
8
[God] is ever mindful of the covenant,the promise given for a thousand generations,
זָכַר zakhar לְעוֹלָם leolam בְּרִיתוֹ berito דָּבָר davar צִוָּה tziuah לְאֶלֶף leelef דּוֹר dor
9
that was made with Abraham,sworn to Isaac,
אֲשֶׁר asher כָּרַת karat אֶת et אַבְרָהָם avraham וּשְׁבוּעָתוֹ ushvuato לְיִשְׂחָק leyischak
10
and confirmed in a decree for Jacob,for Israel, as an eternal covenant,
וַיַּעֲמִידֶהָ vayaamideha לְיַעֲקֹב leyaakov לְחֹק lechok לְיִשְׂרָאֵל leyisrael בְּרִית berit עוֹלָם olam
11
saying, “To you I will give the land of Canaanas your allotted heritage.”
לֵאמֹר lemor לְךָ lekha אֶתֵּן eten אֶת et אֶרֶץ eretz כְּנָעַן kenaan חֶבֶל chevel נַחֲלַתְכֶם nachalatkhem
12
They were then few in number,a mere handful, sojourning there,
בִּהְיוֹתָם bihyotam מְתֵי metey מִסְפָּר mispar כִּמְעַט kimat וְגָרִים vegarim בָּהּ bah
13
wandering from nation to nation,from one kingdom to another.
וַיִּתְהַלְּכוּ vayithalkhu מִגּוֹי migoy אֶל El גּוֹי goy מִמַּמְלָכָה mimamlakhah אֶל El עַם am אַחֵר acher
14
None were allowed to oppress them;kings were reproved on their account,
לֹא lo הִנִּיחַ hiniach אָדָם adam לְעשְׁקָם leshkam וַיּוֹכַח vayokhach עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem מְלָכִים melakhim
15
“Do not touch My anointed ones;do not harm My prophets.”
אַל El תִּגְּעוּ tigu בִמְשִׁיחָי vimshichay וְלִנְבִיאַי velinviay אַל El תָּרֵעוּ tareu
16
A famine was called down on the land,destroying every staff of bread.
וַיִּקְרָא vayikra רָעָב raav עַל al הָאָרֶץ haaretz כּל kl מַטֵּה mateh לֶחֶם lechem שָׁבָר shavar
17
[God] sent ahead of them an agent—Joseph, sold into slavery.
שָׁלַח shalach לִפְנֵיהֶם lifneyhem אִישׁ ish לְעֶבֶד leeved נִמְכַּר nimkar יוֹסֵף yosef
18
His feet were subjected to fetters;an iron collar was put on his neck.
עִנּוּ inu בַכֶּבֶל vakevel (רגליו) rglyv [רַגְלוֹ] raglo בַּרְזֶל barzel בָּאָה baah נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho
19
Until his prediction came true GOD’s decree purged him.
עַד ad עֵת et בֹּא bo דְבָרוֹ devaro אִמְרַת imrat יְהֹוָה Adonai צְרָפָתְהוּ tzerafathu
20
The king sent to have him freed;the ruler of nations released him.
שָׁלַח shalach מֶלֶךְ melekh וַיַּתִּירֵהוּ vayatirehu מֹשֵׁל moshel עַמִּים amim וַיְפַתְּחֵהוּ vayfatchehu
21
He made him the lord of his household,empowered him over all his possessions,
שָׂמוֹ samo אָדוֹן adon לְבֵיתוֹ leveyto וּמֹשֵׁל umoshel בְּכל bekhl קִנְיָנוֹ kinyano
22
to discipline his princes at will,to teach his elders wisdom.
לֶאְסֹר lesor שָׂרָיו sarayv בְּנַפְשׁוֹ benafsho וּזְקֵנָיו uzkenayv יְחַכֵּם yechakem
23
Then Israel came to Egypt;Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
וַיָּבֹא vayavo יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מִצְרָיִם mitzrayim וְיַעֲקֹב veyaakov גָּר gar בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz חָם cham
24
[God] made that people very fruitful,more numerous than their foes,
וַיֶּפֶר vayefer אֶת et עַמּוֹ amo מְאֹד meod וַיַּעֲצִמֵהוּ vayaatzimehu מִצָּרָיו mitzarayv
25
then changed the heart [of the Egyptians] to hate this people,to plot against God’s servants.
הָפַךְ hafakh לִבָּם libam לִשְׂנֹא lisno עַמּוֹ amo לְהִתְנַכֵּל lehitnakel בַּעֲבָדָיו baavadayv
26
Moses—God’s servant—was sent,and Aaron, who had been chosen.
שָׁלַח shalach מֹשֶׁה mosheh עַבְדּוֹ avdo אַהֲרֹן aharon אֲשֶׁר asher בָּחַר bachar בּוֹ bo
27
They performed God’s signs among them,and wonders, against the land of Ham.
שָׂמוּ samu בָם vam דִּבְרֵי divrey אֹתוֹתָיו ototayv וּמֹפְתִים umoftim בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz חָם cham
28
[God] sent darkness; it was very dark;did they not defy God’s word?
שָׁלַח shalach חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh וַיַּחְשִׁךְ vayachshikh וְלֹא velo מָרוּ maru אֶת et [דְּבָרוֹ] devaro (דבריו) dvryv
29
Their waters were turned into bloodand their fish were killed.
הָפַךְ hafakh אֶת et מֵימֵיהֶם meymeyhem לְדָם ledam וַיָּמֶת vayamet אֶת et דְּגָתָם degatam
30
Their land teemed with frogs,even the rooms of their king.
שָׁרַץ sharatz אַרְצָם artzam צְפַרְדְּעִים tzefardim בְּחַדְרֵי bechadrey מַלְכֵיהֶם malkheyhem
31
Swarms of insects came at God’s command,lice, throughout their country.
אָמַר amar וַיָּבֹא vayavo עָרֹב arov כִּנִּים kinim בְּכל bekhl גְּבוּלָם gevulam
32
They were given hail for rain,and flaming fire in their land.
נָתַן natan גִּשְׁמֵיהֶם gishmeyhem בָּרָד barad אֵשׁ esh לֶהָבוֹת lehavot בְּאַרְצָם beartzam
33
Their vines and fig trees were struck,the trees of their country broken down.
וַיַּךְ vayakh גַּפְנָם gafnam וּתְאֵנָתָם utenatam וַיְשַׁבֵּר vayshaber עֵץ etz גְּבוּלָם gevulam
34
Locusts came at God’s command,grasshoppers without number.
אָמַר amar וַיָּבֹא vayavo אַרְבֶּה arbeh וְיֶלֶק veyelek וְאֵין veeyn מִסְפָּר mispar
35
They devoured every green thing in the land;they consumed the produce of the soil.
וַיֹּאכַל vayokhal כּל kl עֵשֶׂב esev בְּאַרְצָם beartzam וַיֹּאכַל vayokhal פְּרִי peri אַדְמָתָם admatam
36
[God] struck down every [male] first-born in the land,the first fruit of their vigor.
וַיַּךְ vayakh כּל kl בְּכוֹר bekhor בְּאַרְצָם beartzam רֵאשִׁית reshit לְכל lekhl אוֹנָם onam
37
Israel was led out with silver and gold;none among their tribes faltered.
וַיּוֹצִיאֵם vayotziem בְּכֶסֶף bekhesef וְזָהָב vezahav וְאֵין veeyn בִּשְׁבָטָיו bishvatayv כּוֹשֵׁל koshel
38
Egypt rejoiced when they left,for dread of Israel had fallen upon them.
שָׂמַח samach מִצְרַיִם mitzrayim בְּצֵאתָם betzetam כִּי ki נָפַל nafal פַּחְדָּם pachdam עֲלֵיהֶם aleyhem
39
[God] spread a cloud for a cover,and fire to light up the night.
פָּרַשׂ paras עָנָן anan לְמָסָךְ lemasakh וְאֵשׁ veesh לְהָאִיר lehair לָיְלָה laylah
40
They asked, and were brought quail,and were satisfied with food from heaven.
שָׁאַל shaal וַיָּבֵא vayave שְׂלָו selav וְלֶחֶם velechem שָׁמַיִם shamayim יַשְׂבִּיעֵם yasbiem
41
[God] opened a rock so that water gushed forth;it flowed as a stream in the parched land.
פָּתַח patach צוּר tzur וַיָּזוּבוּ vayazuvu מָיִם mayim הָלְכוּ halkhu בַּצִּיּוֹת batziot נָהָר nahar
42
Mindful of the sacred promiseto Abraham—God’s servant,
כִּי ki זָכַר zakhar אֶת et דְּבַר devar קדְשׁוֹ kdsho אֶת et אַבְרָהָם avraham עַבְדּוֹ avdo
43
The people were led out in gladness,God’s chosen ones with joyous song.
וַיּוֹצִא vayotzi עַמּוֹ amo בְשָׂשׂוֹן vesason בְּרִנָּה berinah אֶת et בְּחִירָיו bechirayv
44
They were given the lands of nations;they inherited the wealth of peoples,
וַיִּתֵּן vayiten לָהֶם lahem אַרְצוֹת artzot גּוֹיִם goyim וַעֲמַל vaamal לְאֻמִּים leumim יִירָשׁוּ yirashu
45
that they might keep God’s lawsand observe God’s teachings.Hallelujah.
בַּעֲבוּר baavur יִשְׁמְרוּ yishmru חֻקָּיו chukayv וְתוֹרֹתָיו vetorotayv יִנְצֹרוּ yintzoru הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 106

1
Hallelujah.Praise GOD, who is good—whose steadfast love is eternal.
הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah הוֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כִּי ki טוֹב tov כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
2
Who can tell GOD’s mighty acts,proclaim all due praises?
מִי mi יְמַלֵּל yemalel גְּבוּרוֹת gevurot יְהֹוָה Adonai יַשְׁמִיעַ yashmia כּל kl תְּהִלָּתוֹ tehilato
3
Happy are those who act justly,who do right at all times.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey שֹׁמְרֵי shomrey מִשְׁפָּט mishpat עֹשֵׂה oseh צְדָקָה tzedakah בְכל vekhl עֵת et
4
Be mindful of me, O ETERNAL One, when You favor Your people;take note of me when You deliver them,
זכְרֵנִי zkhreni יְהֹוָה Adonai בִּרְצוֹן birtzon עַמֶּךָ amekha פּקְדֵנִי pkdeni בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ bishuatekha
5
that I may enjoy the prosperity of Your chosen ones,share the joy of Your nation,glory in Your very own people.
לִרְאוֹת lirot בְּטוֹבַת betovat בְּחִירֶיךָ bechireykha לִשְׂמֹחַ lismoach בְּשִׂמְחַת besimchat גּוֹיֶךָ goyekha לְהִתְהַלֵּל lehithalel עִם im נַחֲלָתֶךָ nachalatekha
6
We have sinned like our ancestors;we have gone astray, done evil.
חָטָאנוּ chatanu עִם im אֲבוֹתֵינוּ avoteynu הֶעֱוִינוּ heevinu הִרְשָׁעְנוּ hirshanu
7
Our ancestors in Egypt did not perceive Your wonders;they did not remember Your abundant love,but rebelled at the sea, at the Sea of Reeds.
אֲבוֹתֵינוּ avoteynu בְמִצְרַיִם vemitzrayim לֹא lo הִשְׂכִּילוּ hiskilu נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ nifloteykha לֹא lo זָכְרוּ zakhru אֶת et רֹב rov חֲסָדֶיךָ chasadeykha וַיַּמְרוּ vayamru עַל al יָם yam בְּיַם beyam סוּף suf
8
Yet they were saved, as befits God’s name,to make known God’s might.
וַיּוֹשִׁיעֵם vayoshiem לְמַעַן lemaan שְׁמוֹ shemo לְהוֹדִיעַ lehodia אֶת et גְּבוּרָתוֹ gevurato
9
A blast was sent against the Sea of Reeds;it became dry;they were led through the deep as through a wilderness.
וַיִּגְעַר vayigar בְּיַם beyam סוּף suf וַיֶּחֱרָב vayecherav וַיּוֹלִיכֵם vayolikhem בַּתְּהֹמוֹת bathomot כַּמִּדְבָּר kamidbar
10
They were delivered from the foe,redeemed from the enemy.
וַיּוֹשִׁיעֵם vayoshiem מִיַּד miad שׂוֹנֵא sone וַיִּגְאָלֵם vayigalem מִיַּד miad אוֹיֵב oyev
11
Water covered their adversaries;not one of them was left.
וַיְכַסּוּ vaykhasu מַיִם mayim צָרֵיהֶם tzareyhem אֶחָד echad מֵהֶם mehem לֹא lo נוֹתָר notar
12
Then they believed God’s promise,and sang God’s praises.
וַיַּאֲמִינוּ vayaaminu בִדְבָרָיו vidvarayv יָשִׁירוּ yashiru תְּהִלָּתוֹ tehilato
13
But they soon forgot those deeds;they would not wait to learn the divine plan.
מִהֲרוּ miharu שָׁכְחוּ shakhchu מַעֲשָׂיו maasayv לֹא lo חִכּוּ chiku לַעֲצָתוֹ laatzato
14
They were seized with craving in the wilderness,and put God to the test in the wasteland.
וַיִּתְאַוּוּ vayitauu תַאֲוָה taavah בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar וַיְנַסּוּ vaynasu אֵל El בִּישִׁימוֹן bishimon
15
They were given what they asked for,then made to waste away.
וַיִּתֵּן vayiten לָהֶם lahem שֶׁאֱלָתָם sheelatam וַיְשַׁלַּח vayshalach רָזוֹן razon בְּנַפְשָׁם benafsham
16
There was envy of Moses in the camp,and of Aaron, GOD’s holy one.
וַיְקַנְאוּ vaykanu לְמֹשֶׁה lemosheh בַּמַּחֲנֶה bamachaneh לְאַהֲרֹן leaharon קְדוֹשׁ kedosh יְהֹוָה Adonai
17
The earth opened up and swallowed Dathan,closed over the party of Abiram.
תִּפְתַּח tiftach אֶרֶץ eretz וַתִּבְלַע vativla דָּתָן datan וַתְּכַס vatkhas עַל al עֲדַת adat אֲבִירָם aviram
18
A fire blazed among their party,a flame that consumed the wicked.
וַתִּבְעַר vativar אֵשׁ esh בַּעֲדָתָם baadatam לֶהָבָה lehavah תְּלַהֵט telahet רְשָׁעִים reshaim
19
They made a calf at Horeband bowed down to a molten image.
יַעֲשׂוּ yaasu עֵגֶל egel בְּחֹרֵב bechorev וַיִּשְׁתַּחֲווּ vayishtachavu לְמַסֵּכָה lemasekhah
20
They exchanged their gloryfor the image of a bull that feeds on grass.
וַיָּמִירוּ vayamiru אֶת et כְּבוֹדָם kevodam בְּתַבְנִית betavnit שׁוֹר shor אֹכֵל okhel עֵשֶׂב esev
21
They forgot God who saved them,who performed great deeds in Egypt,
שָׁכְחוּ shakhchu אֵל El מוֹשִׁיעָם moshiam עֹשֶׂה oseh גְדֹלוֹת gedolot בְּמִצְרָיִם bemitzrayim
22
wondrous deeds in the land of Ham,awesome deeds at the Sea of Reeds.
נִפְלָאוֹת niflaot בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz חָם cham נוֹרָאוֹת noraot עַל al יַם yam סוּף suf
23
They would have been destroyedhad not Moses, God’s chosen one,stood in the breachto avert God’s destructive wrath.
וַיֹּאמֶר vayomer לְהַשְׁמִידָם lehashmidam לוּלֵי luley מֹשֶׁה mosheh בְחִירוֹ vechiro עָמַד amad בַּפֶּרֶץ baperetz לְפָנָיו lefanayv לְהָשִׁיב lehashiv חֲמָתוֹ chamato מֵהַשְׁחִית mehashchit
24
They rejected the desirable land,and put no faith in the divine promise.
וַיִּמְאֲסוּ vayimasu בְּאֶרֶץ beeretz חֶמְדָּה chemdah לֹא lo הֶאֱמִינוּ heeminu לִדְבָרוֹ lidvaro
25
They grumbled in their tentsand disobeyed GOD.
וַיֵּרָגְנוּ vayeragnu בְאהֳלֵיהֶם veholeyhem לֹא lo שָׁמְעוּ shamu בְּקוֹל bekol יְהֹוָה Adonai
26
So a divine hand was raised in oathto make them fall in the wilderness,
וַיִּשָּׂא vayisa יָדוֹ yado לָהֶם lahem לְהַפִּיל lehapil אוֹתָם otam בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar
27
to disperse their offspring among the nationsand scatter them through the lands.
וּלְהַפִּיל ulhapil זַרְעָם zaram בַּגּוֹיִם bagoyim וּלְזָרוֹתָם ulzarotam בָּאֲרָצוֹת baaratzot
28
They attached themselves to Baal Peor,ate sacrifices offered to the dead.
וַיִּצָּמְדוּ vayitzamdu לְבַעַל levaal פְּעוֹר peor וַיֹּאכְלוּ vayokhlu זִבְחֵי zivchey מֵתִים metim
29
They provoked anger by their deeds,and a plague broke out among them.
וַיַּכְעִיסוּ vayakhisu בְּמַעַלְלֵיהֶם bemaaleleyhem וַתִּפְרץ vatifrtz בָּם bam מַגֵּפָה magefah
30
Phinehas stepped forth and intervened,and the plague ceased.
וַיַּעֲמֹד vayaamod פִּינְחָס pinchas וַיְפַלֵּל vayfalel וַתֵּעָצַר vateatzar הַמַּגֵּפָה hamagefah
31
It was reckoned to his meritfor all generations, to eternity.
וַתֵּחָשֶׁב vatechashev לוֹ lo לִצְדָקָה litzdakah לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador עַד ad עוֹלָם olam
32
They provoked wrath at the waters of Meribahand Moses suffered on their account,
וַיַּקְצִיפוּ vayaktzifu עַל al מֵי mey מְרִיבָה merivah וַיֵּרַע vayera לְמֹשֶׁה lemosheh בַּעֲבוּרָם baavuram
33
because they rebelled against [God]and he spoke rashly.
כִּי ki הִמְרוּ himru אֶת et רוּחוֹ rucho וַיְבַטֵּא vayvate בִּשְׂפָתָיו bisfatayv
34
They did not destroy the nationsas GOD had commanded them,
לֹא lo הִשְׁמִידוּ hishmidu אֶת et הָעַמִּים haamim אֲשֶׁר asher אָמַר amar יְהֹוָה Adonai לָהֶם lahem
35
but mingled with the nationsand learned their ways.
וַיִּתְעָרְבוּ vayitarvu בַגּוֹיִם vagoyim וַיִּלְמְדוּ vayilmdu מַעֲשֵׂיהֶם maaseyhem
36
They worshiped their idols,which became a snare for them.
וַיַּעַבְדוּ vayaavdu אֶת et עֲצַבֵּיהֶם atzabeyhem וַיִּהְיוּ vayihyu לָהֶם lahem לְמוֹקֵשׁ lemokesh
37
Their own sons and daughtersthey sacrificed to demons.
וַיִּזְבְּחוּ vayizbchu אֶת et בְּנֵיהֶם beneyhem וְאֶת veet בְּנוֹתֵיהֶם benoteyhem לַשֵּׁדִים lashedim
38
They shed innocent blood,the blood of their sons and daughters,whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan;so the land was polluted with bloodguilt.
וַיִּשְׁפְּכוּ vayishpkhu דָם dam נָקִי naki דַּם dam בְּנֵיהֶם beneyhem וּבְנוֹתֵיהֶם uvnoteyhem אֲשֶׁר asher זִבְּחוּ zibchu לַעֲצַבֵּי laatzabey כְנָעַן khenaan וַתֶּחֱנַף vatechenaf הָאָרֶץ haaretz בַּדָּמִים badamim
39
Thus they became defiled by their acts,debauched through their deeds.
וַיִּטְמְאוּ vayitmu בְמַעֲשֵׂיהֶם vemaaseyhem וַיִּזְנוּ vayiznu בְּמַעַלְלֵיהֶם bemaaleleyhem
40
GOD was angry with this peopleand abhorred them as an inheritance.
וַיִּחַר vayichar אַף af יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּעַמּוֹ beamo וַיְתָעֵב vaytaev אֶת et נַחֲלָתוֹ nachalato
41
They were handed over to the nations;their foes ruled them.
וַיִּתְּנֵם vayitnem בְּיַד beyad גּוֹיִם goyim וַיִּמְשְׁלוּ vayimshlu בָהֶם vahem שֹׂנְאֵיהֶם soneyhem
42
Their enemies oppressed themand they were subject to their power.
וַיִּלְחָצוּם vayilchatzum אוֹיְבֵיהֶם oyveyhem וַיִּכָּנְעוּ vayikanu תַּחַת tachat יָדָם yadam
43
They were saved time and again,but they were deliberately rebellious,and so they were brought low by their iniquity.
פְּעָמִים peamim רַבּוֹת rabot יַצִּילֵם yatzilem וְהֵמָּה vehemah יַמְרוּ yamru בַעֲצָתָם vaatzatam וַיָּמֹכּוּ vayamoku בַּעֲוֺנָם baavonam
44
Upon seeing that they were in distress,and hearing their cry,
וַיַּרְא vayar בַּצַּר batzar לָהֶם lahem בְּשׁמְעוֹ beshmo אֶת et רִנָּתָם rinatam
45
[God] was mindful of the covenantand in great faithfulness relented.
וַיִּזְכֹּר vayizkor לָהֶם lahem בְּרִיתוֹ berito וַיִּנָּחֵם vayinachem כְּרֹב kerov חֲסָדָו chasadav
46
Their captors were made to be kindly disposed toward them.
וַיִּתֵּן vayiten אוֹתָם otam לְרַחֲמִים lerachamim לִפְנֵי lifney כּל kl שׁוֹבֵיהֶם shoveyhem
47
Deliver us, our ETERNAL God,and gather us from among the nations,to acclaim Your holy name,to glory in Your praise.
הוֹשִׁיעֵנוּ hoshienu יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu וְקַבְּצֵנוּ vekabtzenu מִן min הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim לְהֹדוֹת lehodot לְשֵׁם leshem קדְשֶׁךָ kdshekha לְהִשְׁתַּבֵּחַ lehishtabeach בִּתְהִלָּתֶךָ bithilatekha
48
Blessed is the ETERNAL, God of Israel,From eternity to eternity.Let all the people say, “Amen.”Hallelujah.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵי elohey יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מִן min הָעוֹלָם haolam וְעַד vead הָעוֹלָם haolam וְאָמַר veamar כּל kl הָעָם haam אָמֵן amen הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 107

1
“Praise GOD, who is good—whose steadfast love is eternal!”
הֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כִּי ki טוֹב tov כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
2
Thus let GOD’s redeemed say,those redeemed from adversity,
יֹאמְרוּ yomru גְּאוּלֵי geuley יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲשֶׁר asher גְּאָלָם gealam מִיַּד miad צָר tzar
3
who have been gathered in from the lands,from east and west,from the north and from the sea.
וּמֵאֲרָצוֹת umearatzot קִבְּצָם kibtzam מִמִּזְרָח mimizrach וּמִמַּעֲרָב umimaarav מִצָּפוֹן mitzafon וּמִיָּם umiam
4
Some lost their way in the wilderness,in the wasteland;they found no settled place.
תָּעוּ tau בַמִּדְבָּר vamidbar בִּישִׁימוֹן bishimon דָּרֶךְ darekh עִיר ir מוֹשָׁב moshav לֹא lo מָצָאוּ matzau
5
Hungry and thirsty,their spirit failed.
רְעֵבִים reevim גַּם gam צְמֵאִים tzemeim נַפְשָׁם nafsham בָּהֶם bahem תִּתְעַטָּף titataf
6
In their adversity they cried to GOD,and they were rescued from their troubles.
וַיִּצְעֲקוּ vayitzaku אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּצַּר batzar לָהֶם lahem מִמְּצוּקוֹתֵיהֶם mimtzukoteyhem יַצִּילֵם yatzilem
7
They were shown a direct wayto reach a settled place.
וַיַּדְרִיכֵם vayadrikhem בְּדֶרֶךְ bederekh יְשָׁרָה yesharah לָלֶכֶת lalekhet אֶל El עִיר ir מוֹשָׁב moshav
8
Let them give praise for GOD’s steadfast loveand wondrous deeds for humankind—
יוֹדוּ yodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו veniflotayv לִבְנֵי livney אָדָם adam
9
for satisfying the thirsty,and filling the hungry with all good things.
כִּי ki הִשְׂבִּיעַ hisbia נֶפֶשׁ nefesh שֹׁקֵקָה shokekah וְנֶפֶשׁ venefesh רְעֵבָה reevah מִלֵּא mile טוֹב tov
10
Some lived in deepest darkness,bound in cruel irons,
יֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh וְצַלְמָוֶת vetzalmavet אֲסִירֵי asirey עֳנִי oni וּבַרְזֶל uvarzel
11
because they defied the word of God,spurned the counsel of the Most High.
כִּי ki הִמְרוּ himru אִמְרֵי imrey אֵל El וַעֲצַת vaatzat עֶלְיוֹן elyon נָאָצוּ naatzu
12
Their hearts were humbled through suffering;they stumbled with no one to help.
וַיַּכְנַע vayakhna בֶּעָמָל beamal לִבָּם libam כָּשְׁלוּ kashlu וְאֵין veeyn עֹזֵר ozer
13
In their adversity they cried to GOD,and were rescued from their troubles.
וַיִּזְעֲקוּ vayizaku אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּצַּר batzar לָהֶם lahem מִמְּצֻקוֹתֵיהֶם mimtzukoteyhem יוֹשִׁיעֵם yoshiem
14
They were brought out of deepest darkness,their bonds broken asunder.
יוֹצִיאֵם yotziem מֵחֹשֶׁךְ mechoshekh וְצַלְמָוֶת vetzalmavet וּמוֹסְרוֹתֵיהֶם umosroteyhem יְנַתֵּק yenatek
15
Let them give praise for GOD’s steadfast loveand wondrous deeds for humankind—
יוֹדוּ yodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו veniflotayv לִבְנֵי livney אָדָם adam
16
shattering gates of bronze,breaking their iron bars.
כִּי ki שִׁבַּר shibar דַּלְתוֹת daltot נְחֹשֶׁת nechoshet וּבְרִיחֵי uvrichey בַרְזֶל varzel גִּדֵּעַ gidea
17
There were fools who suffered for their sinful way,and for their iniquities.
אֱוִלִים evilim מִדֶּרֶךְ miderekh פִּשְׁעָם pisham וּמֵעֲוֺנֹתֵיהֶם umeavonoteyhem יִתְעַנּוּ yitanu
18
All food was loathsome to them;they reached the gates of death.
כּל kl אֹכֶל okhel תְּתַעֵב tetaev נַפְשָׁם nafsham וַיַּגִּיעוּ vayagiu עַד ad שַׁעֲרֵי shaarey מָוֶת mavet
19
In their adversity they cried to GOD and they were saved from their troubles.
וַיִּזְעֲקוּ vayizaku אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּצַּר batzar לָהֶם lahem מִמְּצֻקוֹתֵיהֶם mimtzukoteyhem יוֹשִׁיעֵם yoshiem
20
[God] gave an order and healed them—delivering them from the pits.
יִשְׁלַח yishlach דְּבָרוֹ devaro וְיִרְפָּאֵם veyirpaem וִימַלֵּט vimalet מִשְּׁחִיתוֹתָם mishchitotam
21
Let them give praise for GOD’s steadfast loveand wondrous deeds for humankind.
יוֹדוּ yodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו veniflotayv לִבְנֵי livney אָדָם adam
22
Let them offer thanksgiving sacrifices,and tell those deeds in joyful song.
וְיִזְבְּחוּ veyizbchu זִבְחֵי zivchey תוֹדָה todah וִיסַפְּרוּ visapru מַעֲשָׂיו maasayv בְּרִנָּה berinah
23
Others go down to the sea in ships,ply their trade in the mighty waters;
׆ יוֹרְדֵי yordey הַיָּם hayam בּאֳנִיּוֹת boniot עֹשֵׂי osey מְלָאכָה melakhah בְּמַיִם bemayim רַבִּים rabim
24
they have seen GOD’s worksand such wonders in the deep.
׆ הֵמָּה hemah רָאוּ rau מַעֲשֵׂי maasey יְהֹוָה Adonai וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו veniflotayv בִּמְצוּלָה bimtzulah
25
God’s word raised a storm windthat made the waves surge.
׆ וַיֹּאמֶר vayomer וַיַּעֲמֵד vayaamed רוּחַ ruach סְעָרָה searah וַתְּרוֹמֵם vatromem גַּלָּיו galayv
26
Mounting up to the heaven,plunging down to the depths,disgorging in their misery,
׆ יַעֲלוּ yaalu שָׁמַיִם shamayim יֵרְדוּ yerdu תְהוֹמוֹת tehomot נַפְשָׁם nafsham בְּרָעָה beraah תִתְמוֹגָג titmogag
27
they reeled and staggered like a drunk,all their skill to no avail.
׆ יָחוֹגּוּ yachogu וְיָנוּעוּ veyanuu כַּשִּׁכּוֹר kashikor וְכל vekhl חכְמָתָם chkhmatam תִּתְבַּלָּע titbala
28
In their adversity they cried to GOD,and were saved from their troubles.
׆ וַיִּצְעֲקוּ vayitzaku אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּצַּר batzar לָהֶם lahem וּמִמְּצוּקֹתֵיהֶם umimtzukoteyhem יוֹצִיאֵם yotziem
29
The storm was reduced to a whisper;the waves were stilled.
יָקֵם yakem סְעָרָה searah לִדְמָמָה lidmamah וַיֶּחֱשׁוּ vayecheshu גַּלֵּיהֶם galeyhem
30
They rejoiced when all was quiet,and were brought to the port they desired.
וַיִּשְׂמְחוּ vayismchu כִי khi יִשְׁתֹּקוּ yishtoku וַיַּנְחֵם vayanchem אֶל El מְחוֹז mechoz חֶפְצָם cheftzam
31
Let them give praise for GOD’s steadfast love,and wondrous deeds for humankind.
יוֹדוּ yodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו veniflotayv לִבְנֵי livney אָדָם adam
32
Let them exalt in the congregation of the people,acclaim in the assembly of the elders.
וִירוֹמְמוּהוּ viromemuhu בִּקְהַל bikhal עָם am וּבְמוֹשַׁב uvmoshav זְקֵנִים zekenim יְהַלְלוּהוּ yehaleluhu
33
The rivers are turned into a wilderness,springs of water into thirsty land,
יָשֵׂם yasem נְהָרוֹת neharot לְמִדְבָּר lemidbar וּמֹצָאֵי umotzaey מַיִם mayim לְצִמָּאוֹן letzimaon
34
fruitful land into a salt marsh,because of the wickedness of its inhabitants.
אֶרֶץ eretz פְּרִי peri לִמְלֵחָה limlechah מֵרָעַת meraat יוֹשְׁבֵי yoshvey בָהּ vah
35
The wilderness is turned into pools,parched land into springs of water.
יָשֵׂם yasem מִדְבָּר midbar לַאֲגַם laagam מַיִם mayim וְאֶרֶץ veeretz צִיָּה tziah לְמֹצָאֵי lemotzaey מָיִם mayim
36
There the hungry are settled;they build a place to settle in.
וַיּוֹשֶׁב vayoshev שָׁם sham רְעֵבִים reevim וַיְכוֹנְנוּ vaykhonenu עִיר ir מוֹשָׁב moshav
37
They sow fields and plant vineyardsthat yield a fruitful harvest.
וַיִּזְרְעוּ vayizru שָׂדוֹת sadot וַיִּטְּעוּ vayitu כְרָמִים kheramim וַיַּעֲשׂוּ vayaasu פְּרִי peri תְבוּאָה tevuah
38
They are blessed and they increase greatly—their cattle do not decrease,
וַיְבָרְכֵם vayvarkhem וַיִּרְבּוּ vayirbu מְאֹד meod וּבְהֶמְתָּם uvhemtam לֹא lo יַמְעִיט yamit
39
after they had been few and crushedby oppression, misery, and sorrow.
וַיִּמְעֲטוּ vayimatu וַיָּשֹׁחוּ vayashochu מֵעֹצֶר meotzer רָעָה raah וְיָגוֹן veyagon
40
[God] pours contempt on noblesand makes them lose their way in trackless deserts;
׆ שֹׁפֵךְ shofekh בּוּז buz עַל al נְדִיבִים nedivim וַיַּתְעֵם vayatem בְּתֹהוּ betohu לֹא lo דָרֶךְ darekh
41
but the needy are secured from suffering,their families increased like flocks.
וַיְשַׂגֵּב vaysagev אֶבְיוֹן evyon מֵעוֹנִי meoni וַיָּשֶׂם vayasem כַּצֹּאן katzon מִשְׁפָּחוֹת mishpachot
42
The upright see it and rejoice;the mouth of all wrongdoers is stopped.
יִרְאוּ yiru יְשָׁרִים yesharim וְיִשְׂמָחוּ veyismachu וְכל vekhl עַוְלָה avlah קָפְצָה kaftzah פִּיהָ piha
43
One who is wise will take note of these thingsand consider GOD’s steadfast love.
מִי mi חָכָם chakham וְיִשְׁמר veyishmr אֵלֶּה eleh וְיִתְבּוֹנְנוּ veyitbonenu חַסְדֵי chasdey יְהֹוָה Adonai

Psalm 108

1
A song. A psalm of David.
שִׁיר shir מִזְמוֹר mizmor לְדָוִד ledavid
2
My heart is firm, O God;I will sing and chant a hymn with all my soul.
נָכוֹן nakhon לִבִּי libi אֱלֹהִים Elohim אָשִׁירָה ashirah וַאֲזַמְּרָה vaazamrah אַף af כְּבוֹדִי kevodi
3
Awake, O harp and lyre!I will wake the dawn.
עוּרָה urah הַנֵּבֶל hanevel וְכִנּוֹר vekhinor אָעִירָה airah שָּׁחַר shachar
4
I will praise You among the peoples, O ETERNAL One,sing a hymn to You among the nations;
אוֹדְךָ odkha בָעַמִּיםיְהֹוָה vaamimyhovah וַאֲזַמֶּרְךָ vaazamerkha בַּלְאֻמִּים balumim
5
for Your faithfulness is higher than the heavens;Your steadfastness reaches to the sky.
כִּי ki גָדוֹל gadol מֵעַל meal שָׁמַיִם shamayim חַסְדֶּךָ chasdekha וְעַד vead שְׁחָקִים shechakim אֲמִתֶּךָ amitekha
6
Exalt Yourself over the heavens, O God;let Your glory be over all the earth!
רוּמָה rumah עַל al שָׁמַיִם shamayim אֱלֹהִים Elohim וְעַל veal כּל kl הָאָרֶץ haaretz כְּבוֹדֶךָ kevodekha
7
That those whom You love may be rescued,deliver with Your right hand and answer me.
לְמַעַן lemaan יֵחָלְצוּן yechaltzun יְדִידֶיךָ yedideykha הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah יְמִינְךָ yeminkha וַעֲנֵנִי vaaneni
8
God promised in the sanctuary that I would exultingly divide up Shechem,and measure the Valley of Sukkoth;
אֱלֹהִים Elohim דִּבֶּר diber בְּקדְשׁוֹ bekdsho אֶעְלֹזָה elozah אֲחַלְּקָה achalkah שְׁכֶם shekhem וְעֵמֶק veemek סֻכּוֹת sukot אֲמַדֵּד amaded
9
Gilead and Manasseh would be mine,Ephraim my chief stronghold,Judah my scepter;
לִי li גִלְעָד gilad לִי li מְנַשֶּׁה menasheh וְאֶפְרַיִם veefrayim מָעוֹז maoz רֹאשִׁי roshi יְהוּדָה yehudah מְחֹקְקִי mechokeki
10
Moab would be my washbasin;on Edom I would cast my shoe;I would raise a shout over Philistia.
מוֹאָב moav סִיר sir רַחְצִי rachtzi עַל al אֱדוֹם edom אַשְׁלִיךְ ashlikh נַעֲלִי naali עֲלֵי aley פְלֶשֶׁת feleshet אֶתְרוֹעָע etroa
11
Would that I were brought to the bastion!Would that I were led to Edom!
מִי mi יֹבִלֵנִי yovileni עִיר ir מִבְצָר mivtzar מִי mi נָחַנִי nachani עַד ad אֱדוֹם edom
12
But You have rejected us, O God;God, You do not march with our armies.
הֲלֹא halo אֱלֹהִים Elohim זְנַחְתָּנוּ zenachtanu וְלֹא velo תֵצֵא tetze אֱלֹהִים Elohim בְּצִבְאֹתֵינוּ betzivoteynu
13
Grant us Your aid against the foe,for human help is worthless.
הָבָה havah לָּנוּ lanu עֶזְרָת ezrat מִצָּר mitzar וְשָׁוְא veshav תְּשׁוּעַת teshuat אָדָם adam
14
We shall triumph with God,who will trample our foes.
בֵּאלֹהִים belohim נַעֲשֶׂה naaseh חָיִל chayil וְהוּא vehu יָבוּס yavus צָרֵינוּ tzareynu

Psalm 109

1
For the leader. Of David. A psalm.O God of my praise,do not keep aloof,
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor אֱלֹהֵי elohey תְהִלָּתִי tehilati אַל El תֶּחֱרַשׁ techerash
2
for the wicked and the deceitfulopen their mouth against me;they speak to me with lying tongue.
כִּי ki פִי fi רָשָׁע rasha וּפִי ufi מִרְמָה mirmah עָלַי alay פָּתָחוּ patachu דִּבְּרוּ dibru אִתִּי iti לְשׁוֹן leshon שָׁקֶר shaker
3
They encircle me with words of hate;they attack me without cause.
וְדִבְרֵי vedivrey שִׂנְאָה sinah סְבָבוּנִי sevavuni וַיִּלָּחֲמוּנִי vayilachamuni חִנָּם chinam
4
They answer my love with accusationand I must stand judgment
תַּחַת tachat אַהֲבָתִי ahavati יִשְׂטְנוּנִי yistnuni וַאֲנִי vaani תְפִלָּה tefilah
5
They repay me with evil for good,with hatred for my love.
וַיָּשִׂימוּ vayasimu עָלַי alay רָעָה raah תַּחַת tachat טוֹבָה tovah וְשִׂנְאָה vesinah תַּחַת tachat אַהֲבָתִי ahavati
6
Appoint someone wicked over him;may an accuser stand at his right side;
הַפְקֵד hafked עָלָיו alayv רָשָׁע rasha וְשָׂטָן vesatan יַעֲמֹד yaamod עַל al יְמִינוֹ yemino
7
may he be tried and convicted;may he be judged and found guilty.
בְּהִשָּׁפְטוֹ behishafto יֵצֵא yetze רָשָׁע rasha וּתְפִלָּתוֹ utfilato תִּהְיֶה tihyeh לַחֲטָאָה lachataah
8
May his days be few;may another take over his position.
יִהְיוּ yihyu יָמָיו yamayv מְעַטִּים meatim פְּקֻדָּתוֹ pekudato יִקַּח yikach אַחֵר acher
9
May his children be orphans,his wife a widow.
יִהְיוּ yihyu בָנָיו vanayv יְתוֹמִים yetomim וְאִשְׁתּוֹ veishto אַלְמָנָה almanah
10
May his children wander from their hovels,begging in search of [bread].
וְנוֹעַ venoa יָנוּעוּ yanuu בָנָיו vanayv וְשִׁאֵלוּ veshielu וְדָרְשׁוּ vedarshu מֵחרְבוֹתֵיהֶם mechrvoteyhem
11
May his creditor seize all his possessions;may strangers plunder his wealth.
יְנַקֵּשׁ yenakesh נוֹשֶׁה nosheh לְכל lekhl אֲשֶׁר asher לוֹ lo וְיָבֹזּוּ veyavozu זָרִים zarim יְגִיעוֹ yegio
12
May no one show him mercy;may none pity his orphans;
אַל El יְהִי yehi לוֹ lo מֹשֵׁךְ moshekh חָסֶד chased וְאַל veal יְהִי yehi חוֹנֵן chonen לִיתוֹמָיו litomayv
13
may his posterity be cut off;may their names be blotted out in the next generation.
יְהִי yehi אַחֲרִיתוֹ acharito לְהַכְרִית lehakhrit בְּדוֹר bedor אַחֵר acher יִמַּח yimach שְׁמָם shemam
14
May God be ever mindful of his father’s iniquity,and may the sin of his mother not be blotted out.
יִזָּכֵר yizakher עֲוֺן avon אֲבֹתָיו avotayv אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai וְחַטַּאת vechatat אִמּוֹ imo אַל El תִּמָּח timach
15
May GOD be aware of them alwaysand cause their names to be cut off from the earth,
יִהְיוּ yihyu נֶגֶד neged יְהֹוָה Adonai תָּמִיד tamid וְיַכְרֵת veyakhret מֵאֶרֶץ meeretz זִכְרָם zikhram
16
because he was not minded to act kindly,and hounded to death the poor and needy man, one crushed in spirit.
יַעַן yaan אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo זָכַר zakhar עֲשׂוֹת asot חָסֶד chased וַיִּרְדֹּף vayirdof אִישׁ ish עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon וְנִכְאֵה venikheh לֵבָב levav לְמוֹתֵת lemotet
17
He loved to curse—may a curse come upon him!He would not bless—may blessing be far from him!
וַיֶּאֱהַב vayeehav קְלָלָה kelalah וַתְּבוֹאֵהוּ vatvoehu וְלֹא velo חָפֵץ chafetz בִּבְרָכָה bivrakhah וַתִּרְחַק vatirchak מִמֶּנּוּ mimenu
18
May he be clothed in a curse like a garment,may it enter his body like water,his bones like oil.
וַיִּלְבַּשׁ vayilbash קְלָלָה kelalah כְּמַדּוֹ kemado וַתָּבֹא vatavo כַמַּיִם khamayim בְּקִרְבּוֹ bekirbo וְכַשֶּׁמֶן vekhashemen בְּעַצְמוֹתָיו beatzmotayv
19
Let it be like the cloak he wraps around him,like the belt he always wears.
תְּהִי tehi לוֹ lo כְּבֶגֶד keveged יַעְטֶה yateh וּלְמֵזַח ulmezach תָּמִיד tamid יַחְגְּרֶהָ yachgreha
20
May GOD thus repay my accusers,all those who speak evil against me.
זֹאת zot פְּעֻלַּת peulat שֹׂטְנַי sotnay מֵאֵת meet יְהֹוָה Adonai וְהַדֹּבְרִים vehadovrim רָע ra עַל al נַפְשִׁי nafshi
21
Now You, O GOD, my Sovereign,act in my behalf as befits Your name.Good and faithful as You are, save me.
וְאַתָּה veatah יֱהֹוִה Adonai אֲדֹנָי Adonai עֲשֵׂה aseh אִתִּי iti לְמַעַן lemaan שְׁמֶךָ shemekha כִּי ki טוֹב tov חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni
22
For I am poor and needy,and my heart is pierced within me.
כִּי ki עָנִי ani וְאֶבְיוֹן veevyon אָנֹכִי anokhi וְלִבִּי velibi חָלַל chalal בְּקִרְבִּי bekirbi
23
I fade away like a lengthening shadow;I am shaken off like locusts.
כְּצֵל ketzel כִּנְטוֹתוֹ kintoto נֶהֱלָכְתִּי nehelakhti נִנְעַרְתִּי ninarti כָּאַרְבֶּה kaarbeh
24
My knees give way from fasting;my flesh is lean, has lost its fat.
בִּרְכַּי birkay כָּשְׁלוּ kashlu מִצּוֹם mitzom וּבְשָׂרִי uvsari כָּחַשׁ kachash מִשָּׁמֶן mishamen
25
I am the object of their scorn;when they see me, they shake their head.
וַאֲנִי vaani הָיִיתִי hayiti חֶרְפָּה cherpah לָהֶם lahem יִרְאוּנִי yiruni יְנִיעוּן yeniun רֹאשָׁם rosham
26
Help me, O my ETERNAL God;save me in accord with Your faithfulness—
עזְרֵנִי zreni יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהָי elohay הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni כְחַסְדֶּךָ khechasdekha
27
that all may know that it is Your hand,that You, O ETERNAL One, have done it.
וְיֵדְעוּ veyedu כִּי ki יָדְךָ yadkha זֹּאת zot אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai עֲשִׂיתָהּ asitah
28
Let them curse, but You bless;let them rise up, but come to grief,while Your servant rejoices.
יְקַלְלוּ yekalelu הֵמָּה hemah וְאַתָּה veatah תְבָרֵךְ tevarekh קָמוּ kamu וַיֵּבֹשׁוּ vayevoshu וְעַבְדְּךָ veavdkha יִשְׂמָח yismach
29
My accusers shall be clothed in shame,wrapped in their disgrace as in a robe.
יִלְבְּשׁוּ yilbshu שׂוֹטְנַי sotnay כְּלִמָּה kelimah וְיַעֲטוּ veyaatu כַמְעִיל khamil בּשְׁתָּם bshtam
30
My mouth shall sing much praise to GOD;I will acclaim in the midst of a throng,
אוֹדֶה odeh יְהֹוָה Adonai מְאֹד meod בְּפִי befi וּבְתוֹךְ uvtokh רַבִּים rabim אֲהַלְלֶנּוּ ahalelenu
31
because [God] stands at the right hand of the needy,to save them from those who would condemn them.
כִּי ki יַעֲמֹד yaamod לִימִין limin אֶבְיוֹן evyon לְהוֹשִׁיעַ lehoshia מִשֹּׁפְטֵי mishoftey נַפְשׁוֹ nafsho

Psalm 110

1
Of David. A psalm. GOD said to my lord, “Sit at My right handwhile I make your enemies your footstool.”
לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor נְאֻם neum יְהֹוָה Adonai לַאדֹנִי ladoni שֵׁב shev לִימִינִי limini עַד ad אָשִׁית ashit אֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha הֲדֹם hadom לְרַגְלֶיךָ leragleykha
2
GOD will stretch forth from Zion your mighty scepter;hold sway over your enemies!
מַטֵּה mateh עֻזְּךָ uzkha יִשְׁלַח yishlach יְהֹוָה Adonai מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion רְדֵה redeh בְּקֶרֶב bekerev אֹיְבֶיךָ oyveykha
3
Your people come forward willingly on your day of battle.In majestic holiness, from the womb,from the dawn, yours was the dew of youth.
עַמְּךָ amkha נְדָבֹת nedavot בְּיוֹם beyom חֵילֶךָ cheylekha בְּהַדְרֵי behadrey קֹדֶשׁ kodesh מֵרֶחֶם merechem מִשְׁחָר mishchar לְךָ lekha טַל tal יַלְדֻתֶיךָ yalduteykha
4
GOD has sworn and will not relent,“You are a priest forever, a rightful king by My decree.”
נִשְׁבַּע nishba יְהֹוָה Adonai וְלֹא velo יִנָּחֵם yinachem אַתָּה atah כֹהֵן khohen לְעוֹלָם leolam עַל al דִּבְרָתִי divrati מַלְכִּי malki צֶדֶק tzedek
5
My Sovereign is at your right hand—crushing kings in the day of divine anger.
אֲדֹנָי Adonai עַל al יְמִינְךָ yeminkha מָחַץ machatz בְּיוֹם beyom אַפּוֹ apo מְלָכִים melakhim
6
[God] works judgment upon the nations,heaping up bodies,crushing heads far and wide.
יָדִין yadin בַּגּוֹיִם bagoyim מָלֵא male גְוִיּוֹת geviot מָחַץ machatz רֹאשׁ rosh עַל al אֶרֶץ eretz רַבָּה rabah
7
My lord drinks from the stream on his way;therefore he holds his head high.
מִנַּחַל minachal בַּדֶּרֶךְ baderekh יִשְׁתֶּה yishteh עַל al כֵּן ken יָרִים yarim רֹאשׁ rosh

Psalm 111

1
Hallelujah.אI praise GOD with all my heartבin the assembled congregation of the upright.
הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah אוֹדֶה odeh יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּכל bekhl לֵבָב levav בְּסוֹד besod יְשָׁרִים yesharim וְעֵדָה veedah
2
גGOD’s works are great,דwithin reach of all who desire them.
גְּדֹלִים gedolim מַעֲשֵׂי maasey יְהֹוָה Adonai דְּרוּשִׁים derushim לְכל lekhl חֶפְצֵיהֶם cheftzeyhem
3
הSplendid and glorious are God’s deeds;וGod’s beneficence is everlasting;
הוֹד hod וְהָדָר vehadar פּעֳלוֹ polo וְצִדְקָתוֹ vetzidkato עֹמֶדֶת omedet לָעַד laad
4
זrenowned are God’s wonders.חGOD is gracious and compassionate—
זֵכֶר zekher עָשָׂה asah לְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו leniflotayv חַנּוּן chanun וְרַחוּם verachum יְהֹוָה Adonai
5
טgiving food to those who show reverence,יand ever mindful of the covenant—
טֶרֶף teref נָתַן natan לִירֵאָיו lireayv יִזְכֹּר yizkor לְעוֹלָם leolam בְּרִיתוֹ berito
6
כrevealing powerful works to this people,לand giving them the heritage of nations.
כֹּחַ koach מַעֲשָׂיו maasayv הִגִּיד higid לְעַמּוֹ leamo לָתֵת latet לָהֶם lahem נַחֲלַת nachalat גּוֹיִם goyim
7
מTruth and justice are God’s handiwork—נwhose precepts are enduring,
מַעֲשֵׂי maasey יָדָיו yadayv אֱמֶת emet וּמִשְׁפָּט umishpat נֶאֱמָנִים neemanim כּל kl פִּקּוּדָיו pikudayv
8
סwell-founded for all eternity,עעwrought of truth and equity.
סְמוּכִים semukhim לָעַד laad לְעוֹלָם leolam עֲשׂוּיִם asuyim בֶּאֱמֶת beemet וְיָשָׁר veyashar
9
פRedeeming this people,צ[God] ordained the covenant for all time;קholy and awesome is God’s name.
פְּדוּת pedut שָׁלַח shalach לְעַמּוֹ leamo צִוָּה tziuah לְעוֹלָם leolam בְּרִיתוֹ berito קָדוֹשׁ kadosh וְנוֹרָא venora שְׁמוֹ shemo
10
רThe beginning of wisdom is reverence toward GOD;שall who practice it gain sound understanding.תPraise of [God] is everlasting.
רֵאשִׁית reshit חכְמָה chkhmah יִרְאַת yirat יְהֹוָה Adonai שֵׂכֶל sekhel טוֹב tov לְכל lekhl עֹשֵׂיהֶם oseyhem תְּהִלָּתוֹ tehilato עֹמֶדֶת omedet לָעַד laad

Psalm 112

1
Hallelujah. א Happy are those who fear GOD,who are ardently devoted to God’s commandments.
הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah אַשְׁרֵי ashrey אִישׁ ish יָרֵא yare אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּמִצְוֺתָיו bemitzvotayv חָפֵץ chafetz מְאֹד meod
2
ג Their descendants will be mighty in the land,ד a blessed generation of the upright.
גִּבּוֹר gibor בָּאָרֶץ baaretz יִהְיֶה yihyeh זַרְעוֹ zaro דּוֹר dor יְשָׁרִים yesharim יְבֹרָךְ yevorakh
3
ה Wealth and riches are in their house,ו and their beneficence lasts forever.
הוֹן hon וָעֹשֶׁר vaosher בְּבֵיתוֹ beveyto וְצִדְקָתוֹ vetzidkato עֹמֶדֶת omedet לָעַד laad
4
ז A light shines for the upright in the darkness; gracious, compassionate, and beneficent.
זָרַח zarach בַּחֹשֶׁךְ bachoshekh אוֹר or לַיְשָׁרִים laysharim חַנּוּן chanun וְרַחוּם verachum וְצַדִּיק vetzadik
5
ח ט All goes well with those who lend generously,יwho conduct affairs with equity.
טוֹב tov אִישׁ ish חוֹנֵן chonen וּמַלְוֶה umalveh יְכַלְכֵּל yekhalkel דְּבָרָיו devarayv בְּמִשְׁפָּט bemishpat
6
כ They shall never be shaken;לthe beneficent will be remembered forever.
כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam לֹא lo יִמּוֹט yimot לְזֵכֶר lezekher עוֹלָם olam יִהְיֶה yihyeh צַדִּיק tzadik
7
מ They are not afraid of evil tidings;נtheir heart is firm, they trust in GOD.
מִשְּׁמוּעָה mishmuah רָעָה raah לֹא lo יִירָא yira נָכוֹן nakhon לִבּוֹ libo בָּטֻחַ batuach בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah
8
ס Their heart is resolute, they are unafraid;עin the end they will see the fall of their foes.
סָמוּךְ samukh לִבּוֹ libo לֹא lo יִירָא yira עַד ad אֲשֶׁר asher יִרְאֶה yireh בְצָרָיו vetzarayv
9
פ They give freely to the poor;צtheir beneficence lasts forever; קtheir horn is exalted in honor.
פִּזַּר pizar נָתַן natan לָאֶבְיוֹנִים laevyonim צִדְקָתוֹ tzidkato עֹמֶדֶת omedet לָעַד laad קַרְנוֹ karno תָּרוּם tarum בְּכָבוֹד bekhavod
10
