ר The wicked shall see it and be vexed;שthey shall gnash their teeth; their courage shall fail.תThe desire of the wicked shall come to nothing.
רָשָׁע rasha יִרְאֶה yireh וְכָעָס vekhaas שִׁנָּיו shinayv יַחֲרֹק yacharok וְנָמָס venamas תַּאֲוַת taavat רְשָׁעִים reshaim תֹּאבֵד toved

Psalm 113

1
ש ת Hallelujah.O servants of GOD, give praise;praise the name of GOD.
הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah הַלְלוּ halelu עַבְדֵי avdey יְהֹוָה Adonai הַלְלוּ halelu אֶת et שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai
2
Let GOD’s name be blessednow and forever.
יְהִי yehi שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai מְבֹרָךְ mevorakh מֵעַתָּה meatah וְעַד vead עוֹלָם olam
3
From east to west GOD’s name is praised.
מִמִּזְרַח mimizrach שֶׁמֶשׁ shemesh עַד ad מְבוֹאוֹ mevoo מְהֻלָּל mehulal שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai
4
GOD is exalted above all nations;God’s glory is above the heavens.
רָם ram עַל al כּל kl גּוֹיִםיְהֹוָה goyimyhovah עַל al הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim כְּבוֹדוֹ kevodo
5
Who is like the ETERNAL our God—the One who, enthroned on high,
מִי mi כַּיהֹוָה kayhovah אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu הַמַּגְבִּיהִי hamagbihi לָשָׁבֶת lashavet
6
sees what is below,in heaven and on earth?
הַמַּשְׁפִּילִי hamashpili לִרְאוֹת lirot בַּשָּׁמַיִם bashamayim וּבָאָרֶץ uvaaretz
7
[God] raises the poor from the dust,lifts up the needy from the refuse heap
מְקִימִי mekimi מֵעָפָר meafar דָּל dal מֵאַשְׁפֹּת meashpot יָרִים yarim אֶבְיוֹן evyon
8
to set them with the nobles,with the nobles of God’s people,
לְהוֹשִׁיבִי lehoshivi עִם im נְדִיבִים nedivim עִם im נְדִיבֵי nedivey עַמּוֹ amo
9
and sets the childless woman among her householdas a happy mother of children.Hallelujah.
מוֹשִׁיבִי moshivi עֲקֶרֶת akeret הַבַּיִת habayit אֵם em הַבָּנִים habanim שְׂמֵחָה semechah הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 114

1
When Israel went forth from Egypt,the house of Jacob from a people of strange speech,
בְּצֵאת betzet יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מִמִּצְרָיִם mimitzrayim בֵּית beyt יַעֲקֹב yaakov מֵעַם meam לֹעֵז loez
2
Judah became God’s holy one, Israel, God’s dominion.
הָיְתָה haytah יְהוּדָה yehudah לְקדְשׁוֹ lekdsho יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מַמְשְׁלוֹתָיו mamshlotayv
3
The sea saw them and fled,Jordan ran backward,
הַיָּם hayam רָאָה raah וַיָּנֹס vayanos הַיַּרְדֵּן hayarden יִסֹּב yisov לְאָחוֹר leachor
4
mountains skipped like rams,hills like sheep.
הֶהָרִים heharim רָקְדוּ rakdu כְאֵילִים kheeylim גְּבָעוֹת gevaot כִּבְנֵי kivney צֹאן tzon
5
What alarmed you, O sea, that you fled,Jordan, that you ran backward,
מַה mah לְּךָ lekha הַיָּם hayam כִּי ki תָנוּס tanus הַיַּרְדֵּן hayarden תִּסֹּב tisov לְאָחוֹר leachor
6
mountains, that you skipped like rams,hills, like sheep?
הֶהָרִים heharim תִּרְקְדוּ tirkdu כְאֵילִים kheeylim גְּבָעוֹת gevaot כִּבְנֵי kivney צֹאן tzon
7
Tremble, O earth, at the presence of the Sovereign,at the presence of the God of Jacob,
מִלִּפְנֵי milifney אָדוֹן adon חוּלִי chuli אָרֶץ aretz מִלִּפְנֵי milifney אֱלוֹהַּ eloha יַעֲקֹב yaakov
8
who turned the rock into a pool of water,the flinty rock into a fountain.
הַהֹפְכִי hahofkhi הַצּוּר hatzur אֲגַם agam מָיִם mayim חַלָּמִישׁ chalamish לְמַעְיְנוֹ lemayno מָיִם mayim

Psalm 115

1
Not to us, O ETERNAL One, not to usbut to Your name bring gloryfor the sake of Your love and Your faithfulness.
לֹא lo לָנוּ lanu יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo לָנוּ lanu כִּי ki לְשִׁמְךָ leshimkha תֵּן ten כָּבוֹד kavod עַל al חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha עַל al אֲמִתֶּךָ amitekha
2
Let the nations not say,“Where, now, is their God?”
לָמָּה lamah יֹאמְרוּ yomru הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim אַיֵּה ayeh נָא na אֱלֹהֵיהֶם eloheyhem
3
when our God is in heavenand whatever [God] wants is accomplished.
וֵאלֹהֵינוּ veloheynu בַשָּׁמָיִם vashamayim כֹּל kol אֲשֶׁר asher חָפֵץ chafetz עָשָׂה asah
4
Their idols are silver and gold,the work of human hands.
עֲצַבֵּיהֶם atzabeyhem כֶּסֶף kesef וְזָהָב vezahav מַעֲשֵׂה maaseh יְדֵי yedey אָדָם adam
5
They have mouths, but cannot speak,eyes, but cannot see;
פֶּה peh לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יְדַבֵּרוּ yedaberu עֵינַיִם eynayim לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יִרְאוּ yiru
6
they have ears, but cannot hear,noses, but cannot smell;
אזְנַיִם znayim לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יִשְׁמָעוּ yishmau אַף af לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יְרִיחוּן yerichun
7
they have hands, but cannot touch,feet, but cannot walk;they can make no sound in their throats.
יְדֵיהֶם yedeyhem וְלֹא velo יְמִישׁוּן yemishun רַגְלֵיהֶם ragleyhem וְלֹא velo יְהַלֵּכוּ yehalekhu לֹא lo יֶהְגּוּ yehgu בִּגְרוֹנָם bigronam
8
Those who fashion them,all who trust in them,shall become like them.
כְּמוֹהֶם kemohem יִהְיוּ yihyu עֹשֵׂיהֶם oseyhem כֹּל kol אֲשֶׁר asher בֹּטֵחַ boteach בָּהֶם bahem
9
O Israel, trust in GOD—who is your help and shield.
יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael בְּטַח betach בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah עֶזְרָם ezram וּמָגִנָּם umaginam הוּא hu
10
O house of Aaron, trust in GOD—who is your help and shield.
בֵּית beyt אַהֲרֹן aharon בִּטְחוּ bitchu בַיהֹוָה vayhovah עֶזְרָם ezram וּמָגִנָּם umaginam הוּא hu
11
O you who fear GOD, trust in GOD—who is your help and shield.
יִרְאֵי yirey יְהֹוָה Adonai בִּטְחוּ bitchu בַיהֹוָה vayhovah עֶזְרָם ezram וּמָגִנָּם umaginam הוּא hu
12
GOD, mindful of us, will bless us— blessing the house of Israel,blessing the house of Aaron,
יְהֹוָה Adonai זְכָרָנוּ zekharanu יְבָרֵךְ yevarekh יְבָרֵךְ yevarekh אֶת et בֵּית beyt יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael יְבָרֵךְ yevarekh אֶת et בֵּית beyt אַהֲרֹן aharon
13
and blessing those who revere GOD,small and great alike.
יְבָרֵךְ yevarekh יִרְאֵי yirey יְהֹוָה Adonai הַקְּטַנִּים haktanim עִם im הַגְּדֹלִים hagdolim
14
May GOD increase your numbers,yours and your children’s also.
יֹסֵף yosef יְהֹוָה Adonai עֲלֵיכֶם aleykhem עֲלֵיכֶם aleykhem וְעַל veal בְּנֵיכֶם beneykhem
15
May you be blessed by GOD,Maker of heaven and earth.
בְּרוּכִים berukhim אַתֶּם atem לַיהֹוָה layhovah עֹשֵׂה oseh שָׁמַיִם shamayim וָאָרֶץ vaaretz
16
The heavens belong to GOD,but the earth was given over to humankind.
הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim שָׁמַיִם shamayim לַיהֹוָה layhovah וְהָאָרֶץ vehaaretz נָתַן natan לִבְנֵי livney אָדָם adam
17
The dead cannot praise Yah, nor any who go down into silence.
לֹא lo הַמֵּתִים hametim יְהַלְלוּ yehalelu יָהּ Yah וְלֹא velo כּל kl יֹרְדֵי yordey דוּמָה dumah
18
But we will bless Yahnow and forever.Hallelujah.
וַאֲנַחְנוּ vaanachnu נְבָרֵךְ nevarekh יָהּ Yah מֵעַתָּה meatah וְעַד vead עוֹלָם olam הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 116

1
I love the ETERNAL One for hearing my voice, my pleas;
אָהַבְתִּי ahavti כִּי ki יִשְׁמַעיְהֹוָה yishmayhovah אֶת et קוֹלִי koli תַּחֲנוּנָי tachanunay
2
for turning an ear to mewhenever I call.
כִּי ki הִטָּה hitah אזְנוֹ zno לִי li וּבְיָמַי uvyamay אֶקְרָא ekra
3
The bonds of death encompassed me;the torments of Sheol overtook me.I came upon trouble and sorrow
אֲפָפוּנִי afafuni חֶבְלֵי chevley מָוֶת mavet וּמְצָרֵי umtzarey שְׁאוֹל sheol מְצָאוּנִי metzauni צָרָה tzarah וְיָגוֹן veyagon אֶמְצָא emtza
4
and I invoked GOD’s name,“O ETERNAL One, save my life!”
וּבְשֵׁם uvshem יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶקְרָא ekra אָנָּה anah יְהֹוָה Adonai מַלְּטָה maltah נַפְשִׁי nafshi
5
GOD is gracious and beneficent;our God is compassionate.
חַנּוּן chanun יְהֹוָה Adonai וְצַדִּיק vetzadik וֵאלֹהֵינוּ veloheynu מְרַחֵם merachem
6
GOD protects the simple;I was saved, after having been brought low.
שֹׁמֵר shomer פְּתָאיִם petayim יְהֹוָה Adonai דַּלֹּתִי daloti וְלִי veli יְהוֹשִׁיעַ yehoshia
7
Be at rest, once again, O my soul,for GOD has been good to you.
שׁוּבִי shuvi נַפְשִׁי nafshi לִמְנוּחָיְכִי limnuchaykhi כִּי ki יְהֹוָה Adonai גָּמַל gamal עָלָיְכִי alaykhi
8
You have delivered me from death,my eyes from tears,my feet from stumbling.
כִּי ki חִלַּצְתָּ chilatzta נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִמָּוֶת mimavet אֶת et עֵינִי eyni מִן min דִּמְעָה dimah אֶת et רַגְלִי ragli מִדֶּחִי midechi
9
I shall walk before GOD in the lands of the living.
אֶתְהַלֵּךְ ethalekh לִפְנֵי lifney יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּאַרְצוֹת beartzot הַחַיִּים hachayim
10
I trust [in GOD];out of great suffering I spoke
הֶאֱמַנְתִּי heemanti כִּי ki אֲדַבֵּר adaber אֲנִי ani עָנִיתִי aniti מְאֹד meod
11
and said rashly,“All people are false.”
אֲנִי ani אָמַרְתִּי amarti בְחפְזִי vechfzi כּל kl הָאָדָם haadam כֹּזֵב kozev
12
How can I repay GOD for all the bounties given to me?
מָה mah אָשִׁיב ashiv לַיהֹוָה layhovah כּל kl תַּגְמוּלוֹהִי tagmulohi עָלָי alay
13
I raise the cup of deliveranceand invoke GOD’s name.
כּוֹס kos יְשׁוּעוֹת yeshuot אֶשָּׂא esa וּבְשֵׁם uvshem יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶקְרָא ekra
14
I will pay my vows to GOD in the presence of all those assembled.
נְדָרַי nedaray לַיהֹוָה layhovah אֲשַׁלֵּם ashalem נֶגְדָה negdah נָּא na לְכל lekhl עַמּוֹ amo
15
The death of God’s faithful onesis grievous in GOD’s sight.
יָקָר yakar בְּעֵינֵי beeyney יְהֹוָה Adonai הַמָּוְתָה hamavtah לַחֲסִידָיו lachasidayv
16
O ETERNAL One,I am Your servant,Your servant, the child of Your maidservant;You have undone the cords that bound me.
אָנָּה anah יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki אֲנִי ani עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha אֲנִי ani עַבְדְּךָ avdkha בֶּן ben אֲמָתֶךָ amatekha פִּתַּחְתָּ pitachta לְמוֹסֵרָי lemoseray
17
I will sacrifice a thank offering to Youand invoke GOD’s name.
לְךָ lekha אֶזְבַּח ezbach זֶבַח zevach תּוֹדָה todah וּבְשֵׁם uvshem יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶקְרָא ekra
18
I will pay my vows to GOD in the presence of all those assembled,
נְדָרַי nedaray לַיהֹוָה layhovah אֲשַׁלֵּם ashalem נֶגְדָה negdah נָּא na לְכל lekhl עַמּוֹ amo
19
in the courts of GOD’s house,in the midst of Jerusalem.Hallelujah.
בְּחַצְרוֹת bechatzrot בֵּית beyt יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּתוֹכֵכִי betokhekhi יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 117

1
Praise GOD, all you nations;extol [God], all you peoples,
הַלְלוּ halelu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl גּוֹיִם goyim שַׁבְּחוּהוּ shabchuhu כּל kl הָאֻמִּים haumim
2
for great is this steadfast love toward us; GOD’s faithfulness endures forever.Hallelujah.
כִּי ki גָבַר gavar עָלֵינוּ aleynu חַסְדּוֹ chasdo וֶאֱמֶת veemet יְהֹוָה Adonai לְעוֹלָם leolam הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 118

1
Praise GOD, who is good—whose steadfast love is eternal.
הוֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כִּי ki טוֹב tov כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
2
Let Israel declare,“God’s steadfast love is eternal.”
יֹאמַר yomar נָא na יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
3
Let the house of Aaron declare,“God’s steadfast love is eternal.”
יֹאמְרוּ yomru נָא na בֵית veyt אַהֲרֹן aharon כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
4
Let those who fear GOD declare,“God’s steadfast love is eternal.”
יֹאמְרוּ yomru נָא na יִרְאֵי yirey יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
5
In distress I called on Yah; Yah answered me and brought me relief.
מִן min הַמֵּצַר hametzar קָרָאתִי karati יָּהּ Yah עָנָנִי anani בַמֶּרְחָב vamerchav יָהּ Yah
6
GOD is on my side,I have no fear;what can mortals do to me?
יְהֹוָה Adonai לִי li לֹא lo אִירָא ira מַה mah יַּעֲשֶׂה yaaseh לִי li אָדָם adam
7
With GOD on my side as my helper,I will see the downfall of my foes.
יְהֹוָה Adonai לִי li בְּעֹזְרָי beozray וַאֲנִי vaani אֶרְאֶה ereh בְשֹׂנְאָי vesonay
8
It is better to take refuge in GOD than to trust in mortals;
טוֹב tov לַחֲסוֹת lachasot בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah מִבְּטֹחַ mibtoach בָּאָדָם baadam
9
it is better to take refuge in GOD than to trust in the great.
טוֹב tov לַחֲסוֹת lachasot בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah מִבְּטֹחַ mibtoach בִּנְדִיבִים bindivim
10
All nations have beset me;by GOD’s name I will surely cut them down. in this and the following two verses uncertain.
כּל kl גּוֹיִם goyim סְבָבוּנִי sevavuni בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki אֲמִילַם amilam
11
They beset me, they surround me;by GOD’s name I will surely cut them down.
סַבּוּנִי sabuni גַם gam סְבָבוּנִי sevavuni בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki אֲמִילַם amilam
12
They have beset me like bees;they shall be extinguished like burning thorns;by GOD’s name I will surely cut them down.
סַבּוּנִי sabuni כִדְבוֹרִים khidvorim דֹּעֲכוּ doakhu כְּאֵשׁ keesh קוֹצִים kotzim בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki אֲמִילַם amilam
13
You pressed me hard,I nearly fell;but GOD helped me.
דַּחֹה dachoh דְחִיתַנִי dechitani לִנְפֹּל linpol וַיהֹוָה vayhovah עֲזָרָנִי azarani
14
Yah is my strength and might,and has become my deliverance.
עזִּי zi וְזִמְרָת vezimrat יָהּ Yah וַיְהִי vayhi לִי li לִישׁוּעָה lishuah
15
The tents of the victorious resound with joyous shouts of deliverance,“GOD’s right hand is triumphant!
קוֹל kol רִנָּה rinah וִישׁוּעָה vishuah בְּאהֳלֵי beholey צַדִּיקִים tzadikim יְמִין yemin יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹשָׂה osah חָיִל chayil
16
GOD’s right hand is exalted! GOD’s right hand is triumphant!”
יְמִין yemin יְהֹוָה Adonai רוֹמֵמָה romemah יְמִין yemin יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹשָׂה osah חָיִל chayil
17
I shall not die but liveand proclaim the works of Yah.
לֹא lo אָמוּת amut כִּי ki אֶחְיֶה echyeh וַאֲסַפֵּר vaasaper מַעֲשֵׂי maasey יָהּ Yah
18
Yah punished me severely,but did not hand me over to death.
יַסֹּר yasor יִסְּרַנִּי yisrani יָּהּ Yah וְלַמָּוֶת velamavet לֹא lo נְתָנָנִי netanani
19
Open the gates of victory for methat I may enter them and praise Yah.
פִּתְחוּ pitchu לִי li שַׁעֲרֵי shaarey צֶדֶק tzedek אָבֹא avo בָם vam אוֹדֶה odeh יָהּ Yah
20
This is the gateway to GOD—the victorious shall enter through it.
זֶה zeh הַשַּׁעַר hashaar לַיהֹוָה layhovah צַדִּיקִים tzadikim יָבֹאוּ yavou בוֹ vo
21
I praise You, for You have answered me,and have become my deliverance.
אוֹדְךָ odkha כִּי ki עֲנִיתָנִי anitani וַתְּהִי vathi לִי li לִישׁוּעָה lishuah
22
The stone that the builders rejectedhas become the chief cornerstone.
אֶבֶן even מָאֲסוּ maasu הַבּוֹנִים habonim הָיְתָה haytah לְרֹאשׁ lerosh פִּנָּה pinah
23
This is GOD’s doing;it is marvelous in our sight.
מֵאֵת meet יְהֹוָה Adonai הָיְתָה haytah זֹּאת zot הִיא hi נִפְלָאת niflat בְּעֵינֵינוּ beeyneynu
24
This is the day that GOD has made—let us exult and rejoice on it.
זֶה zeh הַיּוֹם hayom עָשָׂה asah יְהֹוָה Adonai נָגִילָה nagilah וְנִשְׂמְחָה venismchah בוֹ vo
25
O ETERNAL One, deliver us!O ETERNAL One, let us prosper!
אָנָּא ana יְהֹוָה Adonai הוֹשִׁיעָה hoshiah נָּא na אָנָּא ana יְהֹוָה Adonai הַצְלִיחָה hatzlichah נָּא na
26
May everyone who enters be blessed in the name of GOD;we bless you from the House of GOD.
בָּרוּךְ barukh הַבָּא haba בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai בֵּרַכְנוּכֶם berakhnukhem מִבֵּית mibeyt יְהֹוָה Adonai
27
The ETERNAL is God,who has given us light;bind the festal offering to the horns of the altar with cords.
אֵל El יְהֹוָה Adonai וַיָּאֶר vayaer לָנוּ lanu אִסְרוּ isru חַג chag בַּעֲבֹתִים baavotim עַד ad קַרְנוֹת karnot הַמִּזְבֵּחַ hamizbeach
28
You are my God and I will praise You;You are my God and I will extol You.
אֵלִי eli אַתָּה atah וְאוֹדֶךָּ veodeka אֱלֹהַי elohay אֲרוֹמְמֶךָּ aromemeka
29
Praise GOD, who is good—whose steadfast love is eternal.
הוֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כִּי ki טוֹב tov כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo

Psalm 119

1
א Happy are those whose way is blameless,who follow GOD’s teaching.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey תְמִימֵי temimey דָרֶךְ darekh הַהֹלְכִים haholkhim בְּתוֹרַת betorat יְהֹוָה Adonai
2
Happy are those who observe God’s decrees,who turn to the divine wholeheartedly.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey נֹצְרֵי notzrey עֵדֹתָיו edotayv בְּכל bekhl לֵב lev יִדְרְשׁוּהוּ yidrshuhu
3
They have done no wrong,but have followed God’s ways.
אַף af לֹא lo פָעֲלוּ faalu עַוְלָה avlah בִּדְרָכָיו bidrakhayv הָלָכוּ halakhu
4
You have commanded that Your preceptsbe kept diligently.
אַתָּה atah צִוִּיתָה tziuitah פִקֻּדֶיךָ fikudeykha לִשְׁמֹר lishmor מְאֹד meod
5
Would that my ways were firmin keeping Your laws;
אַחֲלַי achalay יִכֹּנוּ yikonu דְרָכָי derakhay לִשְׁמֹר lishmor חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
6
then I would not be ashamedwhen I regard all Your commandments.
אָז az לֹא lo אֵבוֹשׁ evosh בְּהַבִּיטִי behabiti אֶל El כּל kl מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha
7
I will praise You with a sincere heartas I learn Your just rules.
אוֹדְךָ odkha בְּיֹשֶׁר beyosher לֵבָב levav בְּלמְדִי belmdi מִשְׁפְּטֵי mishptey צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha
8
I will keep Your laws;do not utterly forsake me.
אֶת et חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha אֶשְׁמֹר eshmor אַל El תַּעַזְבֵנִי taazveni עַד ad מְאֹד meod
9
ב How can youths keep their way pure?—by holding to Your word.
בַּמֶּה bameh יְזַכֶּה yezakeh נַּעַר naar אֶת et ארְחוֹ rcho לִשְׁמֹר lishmor כִּדְבָרֶךָ kidvarekha
10
I have turned to You with all my heart;do not let me stray from Your commandments.
בְּכל bekhl לִבִּי libi דְרַשְׁתִּיךָ derashtikha אַל El תַּשְׁגֵּנִי tashgeni מִמִּצְוֺתֶיךָ mimitzvoteykha
11
In my heart I treasure Your promise;therefore I do not sin against You.
בְּלִבִּי belibi צָפַנְתִּי tzafanti אִמְרָתֶךָ imratekha לְמַעַן lemaan לֹא lo אֶחֱטָא echeta לָךְ lakh
12
Blessed are You, O ETERNAL One;train me in Your laws.
בָּרוּךְ barukh אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
13
With my lips I rehearseall the rules You proclaimed.
בִּשְׂפָתַי bisfatay סִפַּרְתִּי siparti כֹּל kol מִשְׁפְּטֵי mishptey פִיךָ fikha
14
I rejoice over the way of Your decreesas over all riches.
בְּדֶרֶךְ bederekh עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ edvoteykha שַּׂשְׂתִּי sasti כְּעַל keal כּל kl הוֹן hon
15
I study Your precepts;I regard Your ways;
בְּפִקּוּדֶיךָ befikudeykha אָשִׂיחָה asichah וְאַבִּיטָה veabitah אֹרְחֹתֶיךָ orchoteykha
16
I take delight in Your laws;I will not neglect Your word.
בְּחֻקֹּתֶיךָ bechukoteykha אֶשְׁתַּעֲשָׁע eshtaasha לֹא lo אֶשְׁכַּח eshkach דְּבָרֶךָ devarekha
17
ג Deal kindly with Your servant,that I may live to keep Your word.
גְּמֹל gemol עַל al עַבְדְּךָ avdkha אֶחְיֶה echyeh וְאֶשְׁמְרָה veeshmrah דְבָרֶךָ devarekha
18
Open my eyes, that I may perceivethe wonders of Your teaching.
גַּל gal עֵינַי eynay וְאַבִּיטָה veabitah נִפְלָאוֹת niflaot מִתּוֹרָתֶךָ mitoratekha
19
I am only a sojourner in the land;do not hide Your commandments from me.
גֵּר ger אָנֹכִי anokhi בָאָרֶץ vaaretz אַל El תַּסְתֵּר taster מִמֶּנִּי mimeni מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha
20
My soul is consumed with longingfor Your rules at all times.
גָּרְסָה garsah נַפְשִׁי nafshi לְתַאֲבָה letaavah אֶל El מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha בְכל vekhl עֵת et
21
You blast the accursed insolent oneswho stray from Your commandments.
גָּעַרְתָּ gaarta זֵדִים zedim אֲרוּרִים arurim הַשֹּׁגִים hashogim מִמִּצְוֺתֶיךָ mimitzvoteykha
22
Take away from me taunt and abuse,because I observe Your decrees.
גַּל gal מֵעָלַי mealay חֶרְפָּה cherpah וָבוּז vavuz כִּי ki עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha נָצָרְתִּי natzarti
23
Though princes meet and speak against me,Your servant studies Your laws.
גַּם gam יָשְׁבוּ yashvu שָׂרִים sarim בִּי bi נִדְבָּרוּ nidbaru עַבְדְּךָ avdkha יָשִׂיחַ yasiach בְּחֻקֶּיךָ bechukeykha
24
For Your decrees are my delight,my intimate companions.
גַּם gam עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי shaashuay אַנְשֵׁי anshey עֲצָתִי atzati
25
ד My soul clings to the dust;revive me in accordance with Your word.
דָּבְקָה davkah לֶעָפָר leafar נַפְשִׁי nafshi חַיֵּנִי chayeni כִּדְבָרֶךָ kidvarekha
26
I have declared my way, and You have answered me;train me in Your laws.
דְּרָכַי derakhay סִפַּרְתִּי siparti וַתַּעֲנֵנִי vataaneni לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
27
Make me understand the way of Your precepts,that I may study Your wondrous acts.
דֶּרֶךְ derekh פִּקּוּדֶיךָ pikudeykha הֲבִינֵנִי havineni וְאָשִׂיחָה veasichah בְּנִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ benifloteykha
28
I am racked with grief;sustain me in accordance with Your word.
דָּלְפָה dalfah נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִתּוּגָה mitugah קַיְּמֵנִי kaymeni כִּדְבָרֶךָ kidvarekha
29
Remove all false ways from me;favor me with Your teaching.
דֶּרֶךְ derekh שֶׁקֶר sheker הָסֵר haser מִמֶּנִּי mimeni וְתוֹרָתְךָ vetoratkha חנֵּנִי chneni
30
I have chosen the way of faithfulness;I have set Your rules before me.
דֶּרֶךְ derekh אֱמוּנָה emunah בָחָרְתִּי vacharti מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha שִׁוִּיתִי shiuiti
31
I cling to Your decrees;O ETERNAL One, do not put me to shame.
דָּבַקְתִּי davakti בְעֵדְוֺתֶיךָ veedvoteykha יְהֹוָה Adonai אַל El תְּבִישֵׁנִי tevisheni
32
I eagerly pursue Your commandments,for You broaden my understanding.
דֶּרֶךְ derekh מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha אָרוּץ arutz כִּי ki תַרְחִיב tarchiv לִבִּי libi
33
ה Teach me, O ETERNAL One, the way of Your laws;I will observe them to the utmost.
הוֹרֵנִי horeni יְהֹוָה Adonai דֶּרֶךְ derekh חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha וְאֶצְּרֶנָּה veetzrenah עֵקֶב ekev
34
Give me understanding, that I may observe Your teachingand keep it wholeheartedly.
הֲבִינֵנִי havineni וְאֶצְּרָה veetzrah תוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha וְאֶשְׁמְרֶנָּה veeshmrenah בְכל vekhl לֵב lev
35
Lead me in the path of Your commandments,for that is my concern.
הַדְרִיכֵנִי hadrikheni בִּנְתִיב bintiv מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha כִּי ki בוֹ vo חָפָצְתִּי chafatzti
36
Turn my heart to Your decreesand not to love of gain.
הַט hat לִבִּי libi אֶל El עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ edvoteykha וְאַל veal אֶל El בָּצַע batza
37
Avert my eyes from seeing falsehood;by Your ways preserve me.
הַעֲבֵר haaver עֵינַי eynay מֵרְאוֹת merot שָׁוְא shav בִּדְרָכֶךָ bidrakhekha חַיֵּנִי chayeni
38
Fulfill Your promise to Your servant,which is for those who worship You.
הָקֵם hakem לְעַבְדְּךָ leavdkha אִמְרָתֶךָ imratekha אֲשֶׁר asher לְיִרְאָתֶךָ leyiratekha
39
Remove the taunt that I dread,for Your rules are good.
הַעֲבֵר haaver חֶרְפָּתִי cherpati אֲשֶׁר asher יָגֹרְתִּי yagorti כִּי ki מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha טוֹבִים tovim
40
See, I have longed for Your precepts;by Your righteousness preserve me.
הִנֵּה hineh תָּאַבְתִּי taavti לְפִקֻּדֶיךָ lefikudeykha בְּצִדְקָתְךָ betzidkatkha חַיֵּנִי chayeni
41
ו May Your steadfast love reach me, O ETERNAL One,Your deliverance, as You have promised.
וִיבֹאֻנִי vivouni חֲסָדֶךָ chasadekha יְהֹוָה Adonai תְּשׁוּעָתְךָ teshuatkha כְּאִמְרָתֶךָ keimratekha
42
I shall have an answer for those who taunt me,for I have put my trust in Your word.
וְאֶעֱנֶה veeeneh חֹרְפִי chorfi דָבָר davar כִּי ki בָטַחְתִּי vatachti בִּדְבָרֶךָ bidvarekha
43
Do not utterly take the truth away from my mouth,for I have put my hope in Your rules.
וְאַל veal תַּצֵּל tatzel מִפִּי mipi דְבַר devar אֱמֶת emet עַד ad מְאֹד meod כִּי ki לְמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ lemishpatekha יִחָלְתִּי yichalti
44
I will always obey Your teaching,forever and ever.
וְאֶשְׁמְרָה veeshmrah תוֹרָתְךָ toratkha תָמִיד tamid לְעוֹלָם leolam וָעֶד vaed
45
I will walk about at ease,for I have turned to Your precepts.
וְאֶתְהַלְּכָה veethalkhah בָרְחָבָה varchavah כִּי ki פִקֻּדֶיךָ fikudeykha דָרָשְׁתִּי darashti
46
I will speak of Your decrees,and not be ashamed in the presence of kings.
וַאֲדַבְּרָה vaadabrah בְעֵדֹתֶיךָ veedoteykha נֶגֶד neged מְלָכִים melakhim וְלֹא velo אֵבוֹשׁ evosh
47
I will delight in Your commandments,which I love.
וְאֶשְׁתַּעֲשַׁע veeshtaasha בְּמִצְוֺתֶיךָ bemitzvoteykha אֲשֶׁר asher אָהָבְתִּי ahavti
48
I reach out for Your commandments, which I love;I study Your laws.
וְאֶשָּׂא veesa כַפַּי khapay אֶל El מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha אֲשֶׁר asher אָהָבְתִּי ahavti וְאָשִׂיחָה veasichah בְחֻקֶּיךָ vechukeykha
49
ז Remember Your word to Your servantthrough which You have given me hope.
זְכֹר zekhor דָּבָר davar לְעַבְדֶּךָ leavdekha עַל al אֲשֶׁר asher יִחַלְתָּנִי yichaltani
50
This is my comfort in my affliction,that Your promise has preserved me.
זֹאת zot נֶחָמָתִי nechamati בְענְיִי venyi כִּי ki אִמְרָתְךָ imratkha חִיָּתְנִי chiatni
51
Though the arrogant have cruelly mocked me,I have not swerved from Your teaching.
זֵדִים zedim הֱלִיצֻנִי helitzuni עַד ad מְאֹד meod מִתּוֹרָתְךָ mitoratkha לֹא lo נָטִיתִי natiti
52
I remember Your rules of old, O ETERNAL One,and find comfort in them.
זָכַרְתִּי zakharti מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha מֵעוֹלָםיְהֹוָה meolamyhovah וָאֶתְנֶחָם vaetnecham
53
I am seized with ragebecause of the wicked who forsake Your teaching.
זַלְעָפָה zalafah אֲחָזַתְנִי achazatni מֵרְשָׁעִים mershaim עֹזְבֵי ozvey תּוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha
54
Your laws are a source of strength to me wherever I may dwell.
זְמִרוֹת zemirot הָיוּ hayu לִי li חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha בְּבֵית beveyt מְגוּרָי meguray
55
I remember Your name at night, O ETERNAL One,and obey Your teaching.
זָכַרְתִּי zakharti בַלַּיְלָה valaylah שִׁמְךָ shimkha יְהֹוָה Adonai וָאֶשְׁמְרָה vaeshmrah תּוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha
56
This has been my lot,for I have observed Your precepts.
זֹאת zot הָיְתָה haytah לִּי li כִּי ki פִקֻּדֶיךָ fikudeykha נָצָרְתִּי natzarti
57
ח GOD is my portion;I have resolved to keep Your words.
חֶלְקִי chelki יְהֹוָה Adonai אָמַרְתִּי amarti לִשְׁמֹר lishmor דְּבָרֶיךָ devareykha
58
I have implored You with all my heart;have mercy on me, in accordance with Your promise.
חִלִּיתִי chiliti פָנֶיךָ faneykha בְכל vekhl לֵב lev חנֵּנִי chneni כְּאִמְרָתֶךָ keimratekha
59
I have considered my ways,and have turned back to Your decrees.
חִשַּׁבְתִּי chishavti דְרָכָי derakhay וָאָשִׁיבָה vaashivah רַגְלַי raglay אֶל El עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha
60
I have hurried and not delayedto keep Your commandments.
חַשְׁתִּי chashti וְלֹא velo הִתְמַהְמָהְתִּי hitmahmahti לִשְׁמֹר lishmor מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha
61
Though the bonds of the wicked are coiled round me,I have not neglected Your teaching.
חֶבְלֵי chevley רְשָׁעִים reshaim עִוְּדֻנִי iuduni תּוֹרָתְךָ toratkha לֹא lo שָׁכָחְתִּי shakhachti
62
I arise at midnight to praise Youfor Your just rules.
חֲצוֹת chatzot לַיְלָה laylah אָקוּם akum לְהוֹדוֹת lehodot לָךְ lakh עַל al מִשְׁפְּטֵי mishptey צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha
63
I am a companion to all who fear You,to those who keep Your precepts.
חָבֵר chaver אָנִי ani לְכל lekhl אֲשֶׁר asher יְרֵאוּךָ yereukha וּלְשֹׁמְרֵי ulshomrey פִּקּוּדֶיךָ pikudeykha
64
Your steadfast love, O ETERNAL One, fills the earth;teach me Your laws.
חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha יְהֹוָה Adonai מָלְאָה malah הָאָרֶץ haaretz חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni
65
ט You have treated Your servant well,according to Your word, O ETERNAL One.
טוֹב tov עָשִׂיתָ asita עִם im עַבְדְּךָ avdkha יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּדְבָרֶךָ kidvarekha
66
Teach me good sense and knowledge,for I have put my trust in Your commandments.
טוּב tuv טַעַם taam וָדַעַת vadaat לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni כִּי ki בְמִצְוֺתֶיךָ vemitzvoteykha הֶאֱמָנְתִּי heemanti
67
Before I was humbled I went astray,but now I keep Your word.
טֶרֶם terem אֶעֱנֶה eeneh אֲנִי ani שֹׁגֵג shogeg וְעַתָּה veatah אִמְרָתְךָ imratkha שָׁמָרְתִּי shamarti
68
You are good and beneficent;teach me Your laws.
טוֹב tov אַתָּה atah וּמֵטִיב umetiv לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
69
Though the arrogant have accused me falsely,I observe Your precepts wholeheartedly.
טָפְלוּ taflu עָלַי alay שֶׁקֶר sheker זֵדִים zedim אֲנִי ani בְּכל bekhl לֵב lev אֶצֹּר etzor פִּקּוּדֶיךָ pikudeykha
70
Their minds are thick like fat;as for me, Your teaching is my delight.
טָפַשׁ tafash כַּחֵלֶב kachelev לִבָּם libam אֲנִי ani תּוֹרָתְךָ toratkha שִׁעֲשָׁעְתִּי shiashati
71
It was good for me that I was humbled,so that I might learn Your laws.
טוֹב tov לִי li כִי khi עֻנֵּיתִי uneyti לְמַעַן lemaan אֶלְמַד elmad חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
72
I prefer the teaching You proclaimedto thousands of gold and silver pieces.
טוֹב tov לִי li תוֹרַת torat פִּיךָ pikha מֵאַלְפֵי mealfey זָהָב zahav וָכָסֶף vakhasef
73
י Your hands made me and fashioned me;give me understanding that I may learn Your commandments.
יָדֶיךָ yadeykha עָשׂוּנִי asuni וַיְכוֹנְנוּנִי vaykhonenuni הֲבִינֵנִי havineni וְאֶלְמְדָה veelmdah מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha
74
Those who fear You will see me and rejoice,for I have put my hope in Your word.
יְרֵאֶיךָ yereeykha יִרְאוּנִי yiruni וְיִשְׂמָחוּ veyismachu כִּי ki לִדְבָרְךָ lidvarkha יִחָלְתִּי yichalti
75
I know, O ETERNAL One, that Your rulings are just;rightly have You humbled me.
יָדַעְתִּי yadati יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki צֶדֶק tzedek מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha וֶאֱמוּנָה veemunah עִנִּיתָנִי initani
76
May Your steadfast love comfort mein accordance with Your promise to Your servant.
יְהִי yehi נָא na חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha לְנַחֲמֵנִי lenachameni כְּאִמְרָתְךָ keimratkha לְעַבְדֶּךָ leavdekha
77
May Your mercy reach me, that I might live,for Your teaching is my delight.
יְבֹאוּנִי yevouni רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha וְאֶחְיֶה veechyeh כִּי ki תוֹרָתְךָ toratkha שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי shaashuay
78
Let the insolent be dismayed, for they have wronged me without cause;I will study Your precepts.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu זֵדִים zedim כִּי ki שֶׁקֶר sheker עִוְּתוּנִי iutuni אֲנִי ani אָשִׂיחַ asiach בְּפִקּוּדֶיךָ befikudeykha
79
May those who fear You,those who know Your decrees,turn again to me.
יָשׁוּבוּ yashuvu לִי li יְרֵאֶיךָ yereeykha (וידעו) vydv [וְיֹדְעֵי] veyodey עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha
80
May I wholeheartedly follow Your lawsso that I do not come to grief.
יְהִי yehi לִבִּי libi תָמִים tamim בְּחֻקֶּיךָ bechukeykha לְמַעַן lemaan לֹא lo אֵבוֹשׁ evosh
81
כ I long for Your deliverance;I hope for Your word.
כָּלְתָה kaltah לִתְשׁוּעָתְךָ litshuatkha נַפְשִׁי nafshi לִדְבָרְךָ lidvarkha יִחָלְתִּי yichalti
82
My eyes pine away for Your promise;I say, “When will You comfort me?”
כָּלוּ kalu עֵינַי eynay לְאִמְרָתֶךָ leimratekha לֵאמֹר lemor מָתַי matay תְּנַחֲמֵנִי tenachameni
83
Though I have become like a water-skin dried in smoke,I have not neglected Your laws.
כִּי ki הָיִיתִי hayiti כְּנֹאד kenod בְּקִיטוֹר bekitor חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha לֹא lo שָׁכָחְתִּי shakhachti
84
How long has Your servant to live?when will You bring my persecutors to judgment?
כַּמָּה kamah יְמֵי yemey עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha מָתַי matay תַּעֲשֶׂה taaseh בְרֹדְפַי verodfay מִשְׁפָּט mishpat
85
The insolent have dug pits for me,flouting Your teaching.
כָּרוּ karu לִי li זֵדִים zedim שִׁיחוֹת shichot אֲשֶׁר asher לֹא lo כְתוֹרָתֶךָ khetoratekha
86
All Your commandments are enduring;I am persecuted without cause; help me!
כּל kl מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha אֱמוּנָה emunah שֶׁקֶר sheker רְדָפוּנִי redafuni עזְרֵנִי zreni
87
Though they almost wiped me off the earth,I did not abandon Your precepts.
כִּמְעַט kimat כִּלּוּנִי kiluni בָאָרֶץ vaaretz וַאֲנִי vaani לֹא lo עָזַבְתִּי azavti פִקֻּדֶיךָ fikudeykha
88
As befits Your steadfast love, preserve me,so that I may keep the decree You proclaimed.
כְּחַסְדְּךָ kechasdkha חַיֵּנִי chayeni וְאֶשְׁמְרָה veeshmrah עֵדוּת edut פִּיךָ pikha
89
ל GOD exists forever;Your word stands firm in heaven.
לְעוֹלָם leolam יְהֹוָה Adonai דְּבָרְךָ devarkha נִצָּב nitzav בַּשָּׁמָיִם bashamayim
90
Your faithfulness is for all generations;You have established the earth, and it stands.
לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador אֱמוּנָתֶךָ emunatekha כּוֹנַנְתָּ konanta אֶרֶץ eretz וַתַּעֲמֹד vataamod
91
They stand this day to [carry out] Your rulings,for all are Your servants.
לְמִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ lemishpateykha עָמְדוּ amdu הַיּוֹם hayom כִּי ki הַכֹּל hakol עֲבָדֶיךָ avadeykha
92
Were not Your teaching my delightI would have perished in my affliction.
לוּלֵי luley תוֹרָתְךָ toratkha שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי shaashuay אָז az אָבַדְתִּי avadti בְענְיִי venyi
93
I will never neglect Your precepts,for You have preserved my life through them.
לְעוֹלָם leolam לֹא lo אֶשְׁכַּח eshkach פִּקּוּדֶיךָ pikudeykha כִּי ki בָם vam חִיִּיתָנִי chiitani
94
I am Yours; save me!For I have turned to Your precepts.
לְךָ lekha אֲנִי ani הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni כִּי ki פִקּוּדֶיךָ fikudeykha דָרָשְׁתִּי darashti
95
The wicked hope to destroy me,but I ponder Your decrees.
לִי li קִוּוּ kiuu רְשָׁעִים reshaim לְאַבְּדֵנִי leabdeni עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha אֶתְבּוֹנָן etbonan
96
I have seen that all things have their limit,but Your commandment is broad beyond measure.
לְכל lekhl תִּכְלָה tikhlah רָאִיתִי raiti קֵץ ketz רְחָבָה rechavah מִצְוָתְךָ mitzvatkha מְאֹד meod
97
מ O how I love Your teaching!It is my study all day long.
מָה mah אָהַבְתִּי ahavti תוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha כּל kl הַיּוֹם hayom הִיא hi שִׂיחָתִי sichati
98
Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies;they always stand by me.
מֵאֹיְבַי meoyvay תְּחַכְּמֵנִי techakmeni מִצְוֺתֶךָ mitzvotekha כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam הִיא hi לִי li
99
I have gained more insight than all my teachers,for Your decrees are my study.
מִכּל mikl מְלַמְּדַי melamday הִשְׂכַּלְתִּי hiskalti כִּי ki עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ edvoteykha שִׂיחָה sichah לִי li
100
I have gained more understanding than my elders,for I observe Your precepts.
מִזְּקֵנִים mizkenim אֶתְבּוֹנָן etbonan כִּי ki פִקּוּדֶיךָ fikudeykha נָצָרְתִּי natzarti
101
I have avoided every evil wayso that I may keep Your word.
מִכּל mikl אֹרַח orach רָע ra כָּלִאתִי kaliti רַגְלָי raglay לְמַעַן lemaan אֶשְׁמֹר eshmor דְּבָרֶךָ devarekha
102
I have not departed from Your rules,for You have instructed me.
מִמִּשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mimishpateykha לֹא lo סָרְתִּי sarti כִּי ki אַתָּה atah הוֹרֵתָנִי horetani
103
How pleasing is Your word to my palate,sweeter than honey.
מַה mah נִּמְלְצוּ nimltzu לְחִכִּי lechiki אִמְרָתֶךָ imratekha מִדְּבַשׁ midvash לְפִי lefi
104
I ponder Your precepts;therefore I hate every false way.
מִפִּקּוּדֶיךָ mipikudeykha אֶתְבּוֹנָן etbonan עַל al כֵּן ken שָׂנֵאתִי saneti כּל kl אֹרַח orach שָׁקֶר shaker
105
נ Your word is a lamp to my feet,a light for my path.
נֵר ner לְרַגְלִי leragli דְבָרֶךָ devarekha וְאוֹר veor לִנְתִיבָתִי lintivati
106
I have firmly swornto keep Your just rules.
נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי nishbati וָאֲקַיֵּמָה vaakayemah לִשְׁמֹר lishmor מִשְׁפְּטֵי mishptey צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha
107
I am very much afflicted;O ETERNAL One, preserve me in accordance with Your word.
נַעֲנֵיתִי naaneyti עַד ad מְאֹד meod יְהֹוָה Adonai חַיֵּנִי chayeni כִדְבָרֶךָ khidvarekha
108
Accept, O ETERNAL One, my freewill offerings;teach me Your rules.
נִדְבוֹת nidvot פִּי pi רְצֵה retzeh נָא na יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ umishpateykha לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni
109
Though my life is always in danger,I do not neglect Your teaching.
נַפְשִׁי nafshi בְכַפִּי vekhapi תָמִיד tamid וְתוֹרָתְךָ vetoratkha לֹא lo שָׁכָחְתִּי shakhachti
110
Though the wicked have set a trap for me,I have not strayed from Your precepts.
נָתְנוּ natnu רְשָׁעִים reshaim פַּח pach לִי li וּמִפִּקּוּדֶיךָ umipikudeykha לֹא lo תָעִיתִי taiti
111
Your decrees are my eternal heritage;they are my heart’s delight.
נָחַלְתִּי nachalti עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ edvoteykha לְעוֹלָם leolam כִּי ki שְׂשׂוֹן seson לִבִּי libi הֵמָּה hemah
112
I am resolved to follow Your lawsto the utmost forever.
נָטִיתִי natiti לִבִּי libi לַעֲשׂוֹת laasot חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha לְעוֹלָם leolam עֵקֶב ekev
113
ס I hate the double-minded,but I love Your teaching.
סֵעֲפִים seafim שָׂנֵאתִי saneti וְתוֹרָתְךָ vetoratkha אָהָבְתִּי ahavti
114
You are my protection and my shield;I hope for Your word.
סִתְרִי sitri וּמָגִנִּי umagini אָתָּה atah לִדְבָרְךָ lidvarkha יִחָלְתִּי yichalti
115
Keep away from me, you evildoers,that I may observe the commandments of my God.
סוּרוּ suru מִמֶּנִּי mimeni מְרֵעִים mereim וְאֶצְּרָה veetzrah מִצְוֺת mitzvot אֱלֹהָי elohay
116
Support me as You promised, so that I may live;do not thwart my expectation.
סמְכֵנִי smkheni כְאִמְרָתְךָ kheimratkha וְאֶחְיֶה veechyeh וְאַל veal תְּבִישֵׁנִי tevisheni מִשִּׂבְרִי misivri
117
Sustain me that I may be saved,and I will always muse upon Your laws.
סְעָדֵנִי seadeni וְאִוָּשֵׁעָה veiuasheah וְאֶשְׁעָה veeshah בְחֻקֶּיךָ vechukeykha תָמִיד tamid
118
You reject all who stray from Your laws,for they are false and deceitful.
סָלִיתָ salita כּל kl שׁוֹגִים shogim מֵחֻקֶּיךָ mechukeykha כִּי ki שֶׁקֶר sheker תַּרְמִיתָם tarmitam
119
You do away with the wicked as if they were dross;rightly do I love Your decrees.
סִגִים sigim הִשְׁבַּתָּ hishbata כל khl רִשְׁעֵי rishey אָרֶץ aretz לָכֵן lakhen אָהַבְתִּי ahavti עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha
120
My flesh creeps from fear of You;I am in awe of Your rulings.
סָמַר samar מִפַּחְדְּךָ mipachdkha בְשָׂרִי vesari וּמִמִּשְׁפָּטֶיךָ umimishpateykha יָרֵאתִי yareti
121
ע I have done what is just and right;do not abandon me to those who would wrong me.
עָשִׂיתִי asiti מִשְׁפָּט mishpat וָצֶדֶק vatzedek בַּל bal תַּנִּיחֵנִי tanicheni לְעֹשְׁקָי leoshkay
122
Guarantee Your servant’s well-being;do not let the arrogant wrong me.
עֲרֹב arov עַבְדְּךָ avdkha לְטוֹב letov אַל El יַעַשְׁקֻנִי yaashkuni זֵדִים zedim
123
My eyes pine away for Your deliverance,for Your promise of victory.
עֵינַי eynay כָּלוּ kalu לִישׁוּעָתֶךָ lishuatekha וּלְאִמְרַת ulimrat צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha
124
Deal with Your servant as befits Your steadfast love;teach me Your laws.
עֲשֵׂה aseh עִם im עַבְדְּךָ avdkha כְחַסְדֶּךָ khechasdekha וְחֻקֶּיךָ vechukeykha לַמְּדֵנִי lamdeni
125
I am Your servant;give me understanding,that I might know Your decrees.
עַבְדְּךָ avdkha אָנִי ani הֲבִינֵנִי havineni וְאֵדְעָה veedah עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha
126
It is a time to act for GOD,for they have violated Your teaching.
עֵת et לַעֲשׂוֹת laasot לַיהֹוָה layhovah הֵפֵרוּ heferu תּוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha
127
Rightly do I love Your commandmentsmore than gold, even fine gold.
עַל al כֵּן ken אָהַבְתִּי ahavti מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha מִזָּהָב mizahav וּמִפָּז umipaz
128
Truly by all [Your] precepts I walk straight; I hate every false way.
עַל al כֵּן ken כּל kl פִּקּוּדֵי pikudey כֹל khol יִשָּׁרְתִּי yisharti כּל kl אֹרַח orach שֶׁקֶר sheker שָׂנֵאתִי saneti
129
פ Your decrees are wondrous;rightly do I observe them.
פְּלָאוֹת pelaot עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ edvoteykha עַל al כֵּן ken נְצָרָתַם netzaratam נַפְשִׁי nafshi
130
The words You inscribed give light,and grant understanding to the simple.
פֵּתַח petach דְּבָרֶיךָ devareykha יָאִיר yair מֵבִין mevin פְּתָיִים petayim
131
I open my mouth wide, I pant,longing for Your commandments.
פִּי pi פָעַרְתִּי faarti וָאֶשְׁאָפָה vaeshafah כִּי ki לְמִצְוֺתֶיךָ lemitzvoteykha יָאָבְתִּי yaavti
132
Turn to me and be gracious to me,as is Your rule with those who love Your name.
פְּנֵה peneh אֵלַי elay וְחנֵּנִי vechneni כְּמִשְׁפָּט kemishpat לְאֹהֲבֵי leohavey שְׁמֶךָ shemekha
133
Make my feet firm through Your promise;do not let iniquity dominate me.
פְּעָמַי peamay הָכֵן hakhen בְּאִמְרָתֶךָ beimratekha וְאַל veal תַּשְׁלֶט tashlet בִּי bi כל khl אָוֶן aven
134
Redeem me from being wronged by others,that I may keep Your precepts.
פְּדֵנִי pedeni מֵעֹשֶׁק meoshek אָדָם adam וְאֶשְׁמְרָה veeshmrah פִּקּוּדֶיךָ pikudeykha
135
Show favor to Your servant,and teach me Your laws.
פָּנֶיךָ paneykha הָאֵר haer בְּעַבְדֶּךָ beavdekha וְלַמְּדֵנִי velamdeni אֶת et חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
136
My eyes shed streams of waterbecause others do not obey Your teaching.
פַּלְגֵי palgey מַיִם mayim יָרְדוּ yardu עֵינָי eynay עַל al לֹא lo שָׁמְרוּ shamru תוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha
137
צ You are righteous, O ETERNAL One;Your rulings are just.
צַדִּיק tzadik אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai וְיָשָׁר veyashar מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ mishpateykha
138
You have ordained righteous decrees;they are firmly enduring.
צִוִּיתָ tziuita צֶדֶק tzedek עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha וֶאֱמוּנָה veemunah מְאֹד meod
139
I am consumed with rageover my foes’ neglect of Your words.
צִמְּתַתְנִי tzimtatni קִנְאָתִי kinati כִּי ki שָׁכְחוּ shakhchu דְבָרֶיךָ devareykha צָרָי tzaray
140
Your word is exceedingly pure,and Your servant loves it.
צְרוּפָה tzerufah אִמְרָתְךָ imratkha מְאֹד meod וְעַבְדְּךָ veavdkha אֲהֵבָהּ ahevah
141
Though I am belittled and despised,I have not neglected Your precepts.
צָעִיר tzair אָנֹכִי anokhi וְנִבְזֶה venivzeh פִּקֻּדֶיךָ pikudeykha לֹא lo שָׁכָחְתִּי shakhachti
142
Your righteousness is eternal;Your teaching is true.
צִדְקָתְךָ tzidkatkha צֶדֶק tzedek לְעוֹלָם leolam וְתוֹרָתְךָ vetoratkha אֱמֶת emet
143
Though anguish and distress come upon me,Your commandments are my delight.
צַר tzar וּמָצוֹק umatzok מְצָאוּנִי metzauni מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי shaashuay
144
Your righteous decrees are eternal;give me understanding, that I might live.
צֶדֶק tzedek עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ edvoteykha לְעוֹלָם leolam הֲבִינֵנִי havineni וְאֶחְיֶה veechyeh
145
ק I call with all my heart;answer me, O ETERNAL One,that I may observe Your laws.
קָרָאתִי karati בְכל vekhl לֵב lev עֲנֵנִי aneni יְהֹוָה Adonai חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha אֶצֹּרָה etzorah
146
I call upon You; save me,that I may keep Your decrees.
קְרָאתִיךָ keratikha הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי hoshieni וְאֶשְׁמְרָה veeshmrah עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha
147
I rise before dawn and cry for help;I hope for Your word.
קִדַּמְתִּי kidamti בַנֶּשֶׁף vaneshef וָאֲשַׁוֵּעָה vaashaueah (לדבריך) ldvrykh [לִדְבָרְךָ] lidvarkha יִחָלְתִּי yichalti
148
My eyes greet each watch of the night,as I meditate on Your promise.
קִדְּמוּ kidmu עֵינַי eynay אַשְׁמֻרוֹת ashmurot לָשִׂיחַ lasiach בְּאִמְרָתֶךָ beimratekha
149
Hear my voice as befits Your steadfast love;O ETERNAL One, preserve me, as is Your rule.
קוֹלִי koli שִׁמְעָה shimah כְחַסְדֶּךָ khechasdekha יְהֹוָה Adonai כְּמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ kemishpatekha חַיֵּנִי chayeni
150
Those who pursue intrigue draw near;they are far from Your teaching.
קָרְבוּ karvu רֹדְפֵי rodfey זִמָּה zimah מִתּוֹרָתְךָ mitoratkha רָחָקוּ rachaku
151
You, O ETERNAL One, are near,and all Your commandments are true.
קָרוֹב karov אַתָּה atah יְהֹוָה Adonai וְכל vekhl מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha אֱמֶת emet
152
I know from Your decrees of oldthat You have established them forever.
קֶדֶם kedem יָדַעְתִּי yadati מֵעֵדֹתֶיךָ meedoteykha כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam יְסַדְתָּם yesadtam
153
ר See my affliction and rescue me,for I have not neglected Your teaching.
רְאֵה reeh ענְיִי nyi וְחַלְּצֵנִי vechaltzeni כִּי ki תוֹרָתְךָ toratkha לֹא lo שָׁכָחְתִּי shakhachti
154
Champion my cause and redeem me;preserve me according to Your promise.
רִיבָה rivah רִיבִי rivi וּגְאָלֵנִי ugaleni לְאִמְרָתְךָ leimratkha חַיֵּנִי chayeni
155
Deliverance is far from the wicked,for they have not turned to Your laws.
רָחוֹק rachok מֵרְשָׁעִים mershaim יְשׁוּעָה yeshuah כִּי ki חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha לֹא lo דָרָשׁוּ darashu
156
Your mercies are great, O ETERNAL One;as is Your rule, preserve me.
רַחֲמֶיךָ rachameykha רַבִּיםיְהֹוָה rabimyhovah כְּמִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ kemishpateykha חַיֵּנִי chayeni
157
Many are my persecutors and foes;I have not swerved from Your decrees.
רַבִּים rabim רֹדְפַי rodfay וְצָרָי vetzaray מֵעֵדְוֺתֶיךָ meedvoteykha לֹא lo נָטִיתִי natiti
158
I have seen traitors and loathed them,because they did not keep Your word in mind.
רָאִיתִי raiti בֹגְדִים vogdim וָאֶתְקוֹטָטָה vaetkotatah אֲשֶׁר asher אִמְרָתְךָ imratkha לֹא lo שָׁמָרוּ shamaru
159
See that I have loved Your precepts;O ETERNAL One, preserve me, as befits Your steadfast love.
רְאֵה reeh כִּי ki פִקּוּדֶיךָ fikudeykha אָהָבְתִּי ahavti יְהֹוָה Adonai כְּחַסְדְּךָ kechasdkha חַיֵּנִי chayeni
160
Truth is the essence of Your word;Your just rules are eternal.
רֹאשׁ rosh דְּבָרְךָ devarkha אֱמֶת emet וּלְעוֹלָם ulolam כּל kl מִשְׁפַּט mishpat צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha
161
ש Princes have persecuted me without reason;my heart thrills at Your word.
שָׂרִים sarim רְדָפוּנִי redafuni חִנָּם chinam (ומדבריך) vmdvrykh [וּמִדְּבָרְךָ] umidvarkha פָּחַד pachad לִבִּי libi
162
I rejoice over Your promiseas one who obtains great spoil.
שָׂשׂ sas אָנֹכִי anokhi עַל al אִמְרָתֶךָ imratekha כְּמוֹצֵא kemotze שָׁלָל shalal רָב rav
163
I hate and abhor falsehood;I love Your teaching.
שֶׁקֶר sheker שָׂנֵאתִי saneti וַאֲתַעֵבָה vaataevah תּוֹרָתְךָ toratkha אָהָבְתִּי ahavti
164
I praise You seven times each dayfor Your just rules.
שֶׁבַע sheva בַּיּוֹם bayom הִלַּלְתִּיךָ hilaltikha עַל al מִשְׁפְּטֵי mishptey צִדְקֶךָ tzidkekha
165
Those who love Your teaching enjoy well-being;they encounter no adversity.
שָׁלוֹם shalom רָב rav לְאֹהֲבֵי leohavey תוֹרָתֶךָ toratekha וְאֵין veeyn לָמוֹ lamo מִכְשׁוֹל mikhshol
166
I hope for Your deliverance, O ETERNAL One;I observe Your commandments.
שִׂבַּרְתִּי sibarti לִישׁוּעָתְךָ lishuatkha יְהֹוָה Adonai וּמִצְוֺתֶיךָ umitzvoteykha עָשִׂיתִי asiti
167
I obey Your decreesand love them greatly.
שָׁמְרָה shamrah נַפְשִׁי nafshi עֵדֹתֶיךָ edoteykha וָאֹהֲבֵם vaohavem מְאֹד meod
168
I obey Your precepts and decrees;all my ways are before You.
שָׁמַרְתִּי shamarti פִקּוּדֶיךָ fikudeykha וְעֵדֹתֶיךָ veedoteykha כִּי ki כל khl דְּרָכַי derakhay נֶגְדֶּךָ negdekha
169
ת May my plea reach You, O ETERNAL One;grant me understanding according to Your word.
תִּקְרַב tikrav רִנָּתִי rinati לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּדְבָרְךָ kidvarkha הֲבִינֵנִי havineni
170
May my petition come before You;save me in accordance with Your promise.
תָּבוֹא tavo תְחִנָּתִי techinati לְפָנֶיךָ lefaneykha כְּאִמְרָתְךָ keimratkha הַצִּילֵנִי hatzileni
171
My lips shall pour forth praise,for You teach me Your laws.
תַּבַּעְנָה tabanah שְׂפָתַי sefatay תְּהִלָּה tehilah כִּי ki תְלַמְּדֵנִי telamdeni חֻקֶּיךָ chukeykha
172
My tongue shall declare Your promise,for all Your commandments are just.
תַּעַן taan לְשׁוֹנִי leshoni אִמְרָתֶךָ imratekha כִּי ki כל khl מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha צֶּדֶק tzedek
173
Lend Your hand to help me,for I have chosen Your precepts.
תְּהִי tehi יָדְךָ yadkha לְעזְרֵנִי lezreni כִּי ki פִקּוּדֶיךָ fikudeykha בָחָרְתִּי vacharti
174
I have longed for Your deliverance, O ETERNAL One;Your teaching is my delight.
תָּאַבְתִּי taavti לִישׁוּעָתְךָ lishuatkha יְהֹוָה Adonai וְתוֹרָתְךָ vetoratkha שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי shaashuay
175
Let me live, that I may praise You;may Your rules be my help;
תְּחִי techi נַפְשִׁי nafshi וּתְהַלְלֶךָּ uthaleleka וּמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ umishpatekha יַעְזְרֻנִי yazruni
176
I have strayed like a lost sheep;search for Your servant,for I have not neglected Your commandments.
תָּעִיתִי taiti כְּשֶׂה keseh אֹבֵד oved בַּקֵּשׁ bakesh עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha כִּי ki מִצְוֺתֶיךָ mitzvoteykha לֹא lo שָׁכָחְתִּי shakhachti

Psalm 120

1
A song of ascents. In my distress I called to GOD—who answered me.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּצָּרָתָה batzaratah לִּי li קָרָאתִי karati וַיַּעֲנֵנִי vayaaneni
2
O ETERNAL One, save me from treacherous lips,from a deceitful tongue!
יְהֹוָה Adonai הַצִּילָה hatzilah נַפְשִׁי nafshi מִשְּׂפַת misfat שֶׁקֶר sheker מִלָּשׁוֹן milashon רְמִיָּה remiah
3
What can you profit,what can you gain,O deceitful tongue?
מַה mah יִּתֵּן yiten לְךָ lekha וּמַה umah יֹּסִיף yosif לָךְ lakh לָשׁוֹן lashon רְמִיָּה remiah
4
A warrior’s sharp arrows,with hot coals of broom-wood.
חִצֵּי chitzey גִבּוֹר gibor שְׁנוּנִים shenunim עִם im גַּחֲלֵי gachaley רְתָמִים retamim
5
Woe is me, that I live with Meshech,that I dwell among the clans of Kedar.
אוֹיָה oyah לִי li כִּי ki גַרְתִּי garti מֶשֶׁךְ meshekh שָׁכַנְתִּי shakhanti עִם im אהֳלֵי holey קֵדָר kedar
6
Too long have I dwelt with those who hate peace.
רַבַּת rabat שָׁכְנָה shakhnah לָּהּ lah נַפְשִׁי nafshi עִם im שׂוֹנֵא sone שָׁלוֹם shalom
7
I am all peace;but when I speak,they are for war.
אֲנִי ani שָׁלוֹם shalom וְכִי vekhi אֲדַבֵּר adaber הֵמָּה hemah לַמִּלְחָמָה lamilchamah

Psalm 121

1
A song for ascents.I turn my eyes to the mountains;from where will my help come?
שִׁיר shir לַמַּעֲלוֹת lamaalot אֶשָּׂא esa עֵינַי eynay אֶל El הֶהָרִים heharim מֵאַיִן meayin יָבֹא yavo עֶזְרִי ezri
2
My help comes from GOD,maker of heaven and earth.
עֶזְרִי ezri מֵעִם meim יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹשֵׂה oseh שָׁמַיִם shamayim וָאָרֶץ vaaretz
3
[God] will not let your foot give way;your guardian will not slumber.
אַל El יִתֵּן yiten לַמּוֹט lamot רַגְלֶךָ raglekha אַל El יָנוּם yanum שֹׁמְרֶךָ shomrekha
4
See, the guardian of Israelneither slumbers nor sleeps!
הִנֵּה hineh לֹא lo יָנוּם yanum וְלֹא velo יִישָׁן yishan שׁוֹמֵר shomer יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
5
GOD is your guardian, GOD is your protectionat your right hand.
יְהֹוָה Adonai שֹׁמְרֶךָ shomrekha יְהֹוָה Adonai צִלְּךָ tzilkha עַל al יַד yad יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
6
By day the sun will not strike you,nor the moon by night.
יוֹמָם yomam הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ hashemesh לֹא lo יַכֶּכָּה yakekah וְיָרֵחַ veyareach בַּלָּיְלָה balaylah
7
GOD will guard you from all harm,and will guard your life.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יִשְׁמרְךָ yishmrkha מִכּל mikl רָע ra יִשְׁמֹר yishmor אֶת et נַפְשֶׁךָ nafshekha
8
GOD will guard your going and comingnow and forever.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יִשְׁמר yishmr צֵאתְךָ tzetkha וּבוֹאֶךָ uvoekha מֵעַתָּה meatah וְעַד vead עוֹלָם olam

Psalm 122

1
A song of ascents. Of David.I rejoiced when they said to me,“We are going to the House of GOD.”
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot לְדָוִד ledavid שָׂמַחְתִּי samachti בְּאֹמְרִים beomrim לִי li בֵּית beyt יְהֹוָה Adonai נֵלֵךְ nelekh
2
Our feet stood inside your gates, O Jerusalem,
עֹמְדוֹת omdot הָיוּ hayu רַגְלֵינוּ ragleynu בִּשְׁעָרַיִךְ bisharayikh יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim
3
Jerusalem built up, a city knit together,
יְרוּשָׁלַ͏ִם yerushalaim הַבְּנוּיָה habnuyah כְּעִיר keir שֶׁחֻבְּרָה shechubrah לָּהּ lah יַחְדָּו yachdav
4
to which tribes would make pilgrimage,the tribes of Yah, as was enjoined upon Israel—to praise GOD’s name.
שֶׁשָּׁם shesham עָלוּ alu שְׁבָטִים shevatim שִׁבְטֵי shivtey יָהּ Yah עֵדוּת edut לְיִשְׂרָאֵל leyisrael לְהֹדוֹת lehodot לְשֵׁם leshem יְהֹוָה Adonai
5
There the thrones of judgment stood,thrones of the house of David.
כִּי ki שָׁמָּה shamah יָשְׁבוּ yashvu כִסְאוֹת khisot לְמִשְׁפָּט lemishpat כִּסְאוֹת kisot לְבֵית leveyt דָּוִד david
6
Pray for the well-being of Jerusalem;“May those who love you be at peace.
שַׁאֲלוּ shaalu שְׁלוֹם shelom יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim יִשְׁלָיוּ yishlayu אֹהֲבָיִךְ ohavayikh
7
May there be well-being within your ramparts,peace in your citadels.”
יְהִי yehi שָׁלוֹם shalom בְּחֵילֵךְ becheylekh שַׁלְוָה shalvah בְּאַרְמְנוֹתָיִךְ bearmnotayikh
8
For the sake of my kin and friends,I pray for your well-being;
לְמַעַן lemaan אַחַי achay וְרֵעָי vereay אֲדַבְּרָה adabrah נָּא na שָׁלוֹם shalom בָּךְ bakh
9
for the sake of the house of the ETERNAL our God,I seek your good.
לְמַעַן lemaan בֵּית beyt יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu אֲבַקְשָׁה avakshah טוֹב tov לָךְ lakh

Psalm 123

1
A song of ascents.To You, enthroned in heaven,I turn my eyes.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot אֵלֶיךָ eleykha נָשָׂאתִי nasati אֶת et עֵינַי eynay הַיֹּשְׁבִי hayoshvi בַּשָּׁמָיִם bashamayim
2
As the eyes of servants follow their master’s hand,as the eyes of a maid follow the hand of her mistress,so our eyes are toward the ETERNAL our God,awaiting divine favor.
הִנֵּה hineh כְעֵינֵי kheeyney עֲבָדִים avadim אֶל El יַד yad אֲדוֹנֵיהֶם adoneyhem כְּעֵינֵי keeyney שִׁפְחָה shifchah אֶל El יַד yad גְּבִרְתָּהּ gevirtah כֵּן ken עֵינֵינוּ eyneynu אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu עַד ad שֶׁיְּחנֵּנוּ sheychnenu
3
Show us favor, O ETERNAL One,show us favor!We have had more than enough of contempt.
חנֵּנוּ chnenu יְהֹוָה Adonai חנֵּנוּ chnenu כִּי ki רַב rav שָׂבַעְנוּ savanu בוּז vuz
4
Long enough have we enduredthe scorn of the complacent,the contempt of the haughty.
רַבַּת rabat שָׂבְעָה savah לָּהּ lah נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu הַלַּעַג halaag הַשַּׁאֲנַנִּים hashaananim הַבּוּז habuz (לגאיונים) lgyvnym [לִגְאֵי ligey יוֹנִים] yonim

Psalm 124

1
A song of ascents. Of David.Were it not for GOD, who was on our side,let Israel now declare,
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot לְדָוִד ledavid לוּלֵי luley יְהֹוָה Adonai שֶׁהָיָה shehayah לָנוּ lanu יֹאמַר yomar נָא na יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
2
were it not for GOD, who was on our sidewhen others assailed us,
לוּלֵי luley יְהֹוָה Adonai שֶׁהָיָה shehayah לָנוּ lanu בְּקוּם bekum עָלֵינוּ aleynu אָדָם adam
3
they would have swallowed us alivein their burning rage against us;
אֲזַי azay חַיִּים chayim בְּלָעוּנוּ belaunu בַּחֲרוֹת bacharot אַפָּם apam בָּנוּ banu
4
the waters would have carried us off,the torrent would have swept over us;
אֲזַי azay הַמַּיִם hamayim שְׁטָפוּנוּ shetafunu נַחְלָה nachlah עָבַר avar עַל al נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu
5
over us would have sweptthe seething waters.
אֲזַי azay עָבַר avar עַל al נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu הַמַּיִם hamayim הַזֵּידוֹנִים hazeydonim
6
Blessed is GOD, who did not let usbe ripped apart by their teeth.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai שֶׁלֹּא shelo נְתָנָנוּ netananu טֶרֶף teref לְשִׁנֵּיהֶם leshineyhem
7
We are like a bird escaped from the fowler’s trap;the trap broke and we escaped.
נַפְשֵׁנוּ nafshenu כְּצִפּוֹר ketzipor נִמְלְטָה nimltah מִפַּח mipach יוֹקְשִׁים yokshim הַפַּח hapach נִשְׁבָּר nishbar וַאֲנַחְנוּ vaanachnu נִמְלָטְנוּ nimlatnu
8
Our help is the name of GOD,maker of heaven and earth.
עֶזְרֵנוּ ezrenu בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai עֹשֵׂה oseh שָׁמַיִם shamayim וָאָרֶץ vaaretz

Psalm 125

1
A song of ascents.Those who trust in GOD are like Mount Zionthat cannot be moved,enduring forever.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot הַבֹּטְחִים habotchim בַּיהֹוָה bayhovah כְּהַר kehar צִיּוֹן tzion לֹא lo יִמּוֹט yimot לְעוֹלָם leolam יֵשֵׁב yeshev
2
Jerusalem, hills enfold it,and GOD enfolds this peoplenow and forever.
יְרוּשָׁלַ͏ִם yerushalaim הָרִים harim סָבִיב saviv לָהּ lah וַיהֹוָה vayhovah סָבִיב saviv לְעַמּוֹ leamo מֵעַתָּה meatah וְעַד vead עוֹלָם olam
3
The scepter of the wicked shall never restupon the land allotted to the righteous,that the righteous not set their hand to wrongdoing.
כִּי ki לֹא lo יָנוּחַ yanuach שֵׁבֶט shevet הָרֶשַׁע haresha עַל al גּוֹרַל goral הַצַּדִּיקִים hatzadikim לְמַעַן lemaan לֹא lo יִשְׁלְחוּ yishlchu הַצַּדִּיקִים hatzadikim בְּעַוְלָתָה beavlatah יְדֵיהֶם yedeyhem
4
Do good, O ETERNAL One, to the good,to the upright in heart.
הֵיטִיבָה heytivah יְהֹוָה Adonai לַטּוֹבִים latovim וְלִישָׁרִים velisharim בְּלִבּוֹתָם belibotam
5
But those who in their crookedness act corruptly, let GOD make them go the way of evildoers.May it be well with Israel!
וְהַמַּטִּים vehamatim עֲקַלְקַלּוֹתָם akalkalotam יוֹלִיכֵם yolikhem יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶת et פֹּעֲלֵי poaley הָאָוֶן haaven שָׁלוֹם shalom עַל al יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael

Psalm 126

1
A song of ascents.When GOD restores the fortunes of Zion—we see it as in a dream—
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot בְּשׁוּב beshuv יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶת et שִׁיבַת shivat צִיּוֹן tzion הָיִינוּ hayinu כְּחֹלְמִים kecholmim
2
our mouths shall be filled with laughter,our tongues, with songs of joy.Then shall they say among the nations,“GOD has done great things for them!”
אָז az יִמָּלֵא yimale שְׂחוֹק sechok פִּינוּ pinu וּלְשׁוֹנֵנוּ ulshonenu רִנָּה rinah אָז az יֹאמְרוּ yomru בַגּוֹיִם vagoyim הִגְדִּיל higdil יְהֹוָה Adonai לַעֲשׂוֹת laasot עִם im אֵלֶּה eleh
3
GOD will do great things for usand we shall rejoice.
הִגְדִּיל higdil יְהֹוָה Adonai לַעֲשׂוֹת laasot עִמָּנוּ imanu הָיִינוּ hayinu שְׂמֵחִים semechim
4
Restore our fortunes, O ETERNAL One,like watercourses in the Negeb.
שׁוּבָה shuvah יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶת et [שְׁבִיתֵנוּ] shevitenu (שבותנו) shvvtnv כַּאֲפִיקִים kaafikim בַּנֶּגֶב banegev
5
They who sow in tearsshall reap with songs of joy.
הַזֹּרְעִים hazorim בְּדִמְעָה bedimah בְּרִנָּה berinah יִקְצֹרוּ yiktzoru
6
One who goes along weeping,carrying the seed-bag,shall come back with songs of joy,carrying the sheaves.
הָלוֹךְ halokh יֵלֵךְ yelekh וּבָכֹה uvakhoh נֹשֵׂא nose מֶשֶׁךְ meshekh הַזָּרַע hazara בֹּא bo יָבֹא yavo בְרִנָּה verinah נֹשֵׂא nose אֲלֻמֹּתָיו alumotayv

Psalm 127

1
A song of ascents. Of Solomon.Unless GOD builds the house,its builders labor in vain on it;unless GOD watches over the city,the guard keeps vigil in vain.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot לִשְׁלֹמֹה lishlomoh אִם im יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo יִבְנֶה yivneh בַיִת vayit שָׁוְא shav עָמְלוּ amlu בוֹנָיו vonayv בּוֹ bo אִם im יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo יִשְׁמר yishmr עִיר ir שָׁוְא shav שָׁקַד shakad שׁוֹמֵר shomer
2
In vain do you rise earlyand stay up late,you who toil for the bread you eat;God’s loved ones are provided for while they sleep.
שָׁוְא shav לָכֶם lakhem מַשְׁכִּימֵי mashkimey קוּם kum מְאַחֲרֵי meacharey שֶׁבֶת shevet אֹכְלֵי okhley לֶחֶם lechem הָעֲצָבִים haatzavim כֵּן ken יִתֵּן yiten לִידִידוֹ lidido שֵׁנָא shena
3
Sons are the provision of GOD;the fruit of the womb, divine reward.
הִנֵּה hineh נַחֲלַת nachalat יְהֹוָה Adonai בָּנִים banim שָׂכָר sakhar פְּרִי peri הַבָּטֶן habaten
4
Like arrows in the hand of a warriorare sons born to a man in his youth.
כְּחִצִּים kechitzim בְּיַד beyad גִּבּוֹר gibor כֵּן ken בְּנֵי beney הַנְּעוּרִים hanurim
5
Happy is the man who fills his quiver with them;they shall not be put to shamewhen they contend with the enemy in the gate.
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey הַגֶּבֶר hagever אֲשֶׁר asher מִלֵּא mile אֶת et אַשְׁפָּתוֹ ashpato מֵהֶם mehem לֹא lo יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu כִּי ki יְדַבְּרוּ yedabru אֶת et אוֹיְבִים oyvim בַּשָּׁעַר bashaar

Psalm 128

1
A song of ascents.Happy is any man who fears GOD,who follows godly ways.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot אַשְׁרֵי ashrey כּל kl יְרֵא yere יְהֹוָה Adonai הַהֹלֵךְ haholekh בִּדְרָכָיו bidrakhayv
2
You shall enjoy the fruit of your labors;you shall be happy and you shall prosper.
יְגִיעַ yegia כַּפֶּיךָ kapeykha כִּי ki תֹאכֵל tokhel אַשְׁרֶיךָ ashreykha וְטוֹב vetov לָךְ lakh
3
Your wife shall be like a fruitful vine within your house;your children, like olive saplings around your table.
אֶשְׁתְּךָ eshtkha כְּגֶפֶן kegefen פֹּרִיָּה poriah בְּיַרְכְּתֵי beyarktey בֵיתֶךָ veytekha בָּנֶיךָ baneykha כִּשְׁתִלֵי kishtiley זֵיתִים zeytim סָבִיב saviv לְשֻׁלְחָנֶךָ leshulchanekha
4
So shall all who fear GOD be blessed.
הִנֵּה hineh כִי khi כֵן khen יְבֹרַךְ yevorakh גָּבֶר gaver יְרֵא yere יְהֹוָה Adonai
5
May GOD bless you from Zion;may you share the prosperity of Jerusalemall the days of your life,
יְבָרֶכְךָ yevarekhkha יְהֹוָה Adonai מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion וּרְאֵה ureh בְּטוּב betuv יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim כֹּל kol יְמֵי yemey חַיֶּיךָ chayeykha
6
and live to see your children’s children.May all be well with Israel!
וּרְאֵה ureh בָנִים vanim לְבָנֶיךָ levaneykha שָׁלוֹם shalom עַל al יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael

Psalm 129

1
A song of ascents.Since my youth they have often assailed me,let Israel now declare,
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot רַבַּת rabat צְרָרוּנִי tzeraruni מִנְּעוּרַי minuray יֹאמַר yomar נָא na יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael
2
since my youth they have often assailed me,but they have never overcome me.
רַבַּת rabat צְרָרוּנִי tzeraruni מִנְּעוּרָי minuray גַּם gam לֹא lo יָכְלוּ yakhlu לִי li
3
Plowers plowed across my back;they made long furrows.
עַל al גַּבִּי gabi חָרְשׁוּ charshu חֹרְשִׁים chorshim הֶאֱרִיכוּ heerikhu (למענותם) lmnvtm [לְמַעֲנִיתָם] lemaanitam
4
GOD, the righteous one,has snapped the cords of the wicked.
יְהֹוָה Adonai צַדִּיק tzadik קִצֵּץ kitzetz עֲבוֹת avot רְשָׁעִים reshaim
5
Let all who hate Zionfall back in disgrace.
יֵבֹשׁוּ yevoshu וְיִסֹּגוּ veyisogu אָחוֹר achor כֹּל kol שֹׂנְאֵי soney צִיּוֹן tzion
6
Let them be like grass on roofsthat fades before it can be pulled up,
יִהְיוּ yihyu כַּחֲצִיר kachatzir גַּגּוֹת gagot שֶׁקַּדְמַת shekadmat שָׁלַף shalaf יָבֵשׁ yavesh
7
that affords no handful for the reaper,no armful for the gatherer of sheaves,
שֶׁלֹּא shelo מִלֵּא mile כַפּוֹ khapo קוֹצֵר kotzer וְחִצְנוֹ vechitzno מְעַמֵּר meamer
8
no exchange with passersby:“GOD’s blessing be upon you.”“We bless you by GOD’s name.”
וְלֹא velo אָמְרוּ amru הָעֹבְרִים haovrim בִּרְכַּת birkat יְהֹוָה Adonai אֲלֵיכֶם aleykhem בֵּרַכְנוּ berakhnu אֶתְכֶם etkhem בְּשֵׁם beshem יְהֹוָה Adonai

Psalm 130

1
A song of ascents.Out of the depths I call You, O ETERNAL One.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot מִמַּעֲמַקִּים mimaamakim קְרָאתִיךָ keratikha יְהֹוָה Adonai
2
O my Sovereign, listen to my cry;let Your ears be attentiveto my plea for mercy.
אֲדֹנָי Adonai שִׁמְעָה shimah בְקוֹלִי vekoli תִּהְיֶינָה tihyeynah אזְנֶיךָ zneykha קַשֻּׁבוֹת kashuvot לְקוֹל lekol תַּחֲנוּנָי tachanunay
3
If You keep account of sins, O Yah, my Sovereign, who will survive?
אִם im עֲוֺנוֹת avonot תִּשְׁמר tishmr יָהּ Yah אֲדֹנָי Adonai מִי mi יַעֲמֹד yaamod
4
Yours is the power to forgiveso that You may be held in awe.
כִּי ki עִמְּךָ imkha הַסְּלִיחָה haslichah לְמַעַן lemaan תִּוָּרֵא tiuare
5
I look to GOD;my whole being is looking;I await God’s word.
קִוִּיתִי kiuiti יְהֹוָה Adonai קִוְּתָה kiutah נַפְשִׁי nafshi וְלִדְבָרוֹ velidvaro הוֹחָלְתִּי hochalti
6
I am more eager for my Sovereignthan guards for the morning,guards for the morning.
נַפְשִׁי nafshi לַאדֹנָי ladonay מִשֹּׁמְרִים mishomrim לַבֹּקֶר laboker שֹׁמְרִים shomrim לַבֹּקֶר laboker
7
O Israel, wait for GOD;for with GOD is steadfast loveand great power to redeem.
יַחֵל yachel יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki עִם im יְהֹוָה Adonai הַחֶסֶד hachesed וְהַרְבֵּה veharbeh עִמּוֹ imo פְדוּת fedut
8
It is this One who will redeem Israel from all their iniquities.
וְהוּא vehu יִפְדֶּה yifdeh אֶת et יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מִכֹּל mikol עֲוֺנֹתָיו avonotayv

Psalm 131

1
A song of ascents. Of David.O ETERNAL One, my heart is not proudnor my look haughty;I do not aspire to great thingsor to what is beyond me;
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot לְדָוִד ledavid יְהֹוָה Adonai לֹא lo גָבַהּ gavah לִבִּי libi וְלֹא velo רָמוּ ramu עֵינַי eynay וְלֹא velo הִלַּכְתִּי hilakhti בִּגְדֹלוֹת bigdolot וּבְנִפְלָאוֹת uvniflaot מִמֶּנִּי mimeni
2
but I have taught myself to be contentedlike a weaned child with its mother;like a weaned child am I in my mind.
אִם im לֹא lo שִׁוִּיתִי shiuiti וְדוֹמַמְתִּי vedomamti נַפְשִׁי nafshi כְּגָמֻל kegamul עֲלֵי aley אִמּוֹ imo כַּגָּמֻל kagamul עָלַי alay נַפְשִׁי nafshi
3
O Israel, wait for GOD now and forever.
יַחֵל yachel יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael אֶל El יְהֹוָה Adonai מֵעַתָּה meatah וְעַד vead עוֹלָם olam

Psalm 132

1
A song of ascents.O ETERNAL One, remember in David’s favorhis extreme self-denial,
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot זְכוֹר zekhor יְהֹוָה Adonai לְדָוִד ledavid אֵת et כּל kl עֻנּוֹתוֹ unoto
2
how he swore to GOD,vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob,
אֲשֶׁר asher נִשְׁבַּע nishba לַיהֹוָה layhovah נָדַר nadar לַאֲבִיר laavir יַעֲקֹב yaakov
3
“I will not enter my house,nor will I mount my bed,
אִם im אָבֹא avo בְּאֹהֶל beohel בֵּיתִי beyti אִם im אֶעֱלֶה eeleh עַל al עֶרֶשׂ eres יְצוּעָי yetzuay
4
I will not give sleep to my eyes,or slumber to my eyelids
אִם im אֶתֵּן eten שְׁנַת shenat לְעֵינָי leeynay לְעַפְעַפַּי leafapay תְּנוּמָה tenumah
5
until I find a place for GOD,an abode for the Mighty One of Jacob.”
עַד ad אֶמְצָא emtza מָקוֹם makom לַיהֹוָה layhovah מִשְׁכָּנוֹת mishkanot לַאֲבִיר laavir יַעֲקֹב yaakov
6
We heard it was in Ephrath;we came upon it in the region of Jaar.
הִנֵּה hineh שְׁמַעֲנוּהָ shemaanuha בְאֶפְרָתָה veefratah מְצָאנוּהָ metzanuha בִּשְׂדֵי bisdey יָעַר yaar
7
Let us enter God’s abode,bow at the divine footstool.
נָבוֹאָה navoah לְמִשְׁכְּנוֹתָיו lemishknotayv נִשְׁתַּחֲוֶה nishtachaveh לַהֲדֹם lahadom רַגְלָיו raglayv
8
Advance, O ETERNAL One, to Your resting-place,You and Your mighty Ark!
קוּמָה kumah יְהֹוָה Adonai לִמְנוּחָתֶךָ limnuchatekha אַתָּה atah וַאֲרוֹן vaaron עֻזֶּךָ uzekha
9
Your priests are clothed in triumph;Your loyal ones sing for joy.
כֹּהֲנֶיךָ kohaneykha יִלְבְּשׁוּ yilbshu צֶדֶק tzedek וַחֲסִידֶיךָ vachasideykha יְרַנֵּנוּ yeranenu
10
For the sake of Your servant Daviddo not reject Your anointed one.
בַּעֲבוּר baavur דָּוִד david עַבְדֶּךָ avdekha אַל El תָּשֵׁב tashev פְּנֵי peney מְשִׁיחֶךָ meshichekha
11
GOD swore to Davida firm oath that will not be renounced,“One of your own issue I will set upon your throne.
נִשְׁבַּע nishba יְהֹוָה Adonai לְדָוִד ledavid אֱמֶת emet לֹא lo יָשׁוּב yashuv מִמֶּנָּה mimenah מִפְּרִי mipri בִטְנְךָ vitnkha אָשִׁית ashit לְכִסֵּא lekhise לָךְ lakh
12
If your sons keep My covenantand My decrees that I teach them,then their sons also,to the end of time,shall sit upon your throne.”
אִם im יִשְׁמְרוּ yishmru בָנֶיךָ vaneykha בְּרִיתִי beriti וְעֵדֹתִי veedoti זוֹ zo אֲלַמְּדֵם alamdem גַּם gam בְּנֵיהֶם beneyhem עֲדֵי adey עַד ad יֵשְׁבוּ yeshvu לְכִסֵּא lekhise לָךְ lakh
13
For GOD has chosen Zion,desiring it for a seat.
כִּי ki בָחַר vachar יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּצִיּוֹן betzion אִוָּהּ iuah לְמוֹשָׁב lemoshav לוֹ lo
14
“This is my resting-place for all time;here I will dwell, for I desire it.
זֹאת zot מְנוּחָתִי menuchati עֲדֵי adey עַד ad פֹּה poh אֵשֵׁב eshev כִּי ki אִוִּתִיהָ iuitiha
15
I will amply bless its store of food,give its needy their fill of bread.
צֵידָהּ tzeydah בָּרֵךְ barekh אֲבָרֵךְ avarekh אֶבְיוֹנֶיהָ evyoneyha אַשְׂבִּיעַ asbia לָחֶם lachem
16
I will clothe its priests in victory,its loyal ones shall sing for joy.
וְכֹהֲנֶיהָ vekhohaneyha אַלְבִּישׁ albish יֶשַׁע yesha וַחֲסִידֶיהָ vachasideyha רַנֵּן ranen יְרַנֵּנוּ yeranenu
17
There I will make a horn sprout for David;I have prepared a lamp for My anointed one.
שָׁם sham אַצְמִיחַ atzmiach קֶרֶן keren לְדָוִד ledavid עָרַכְתִּי arakhti נֵר ner לִמְשִׁיחִי limshichi
18
I will clothe his enemies in disgrace,while on him his crown shall sparkle.”
אוֹיְבָיו oyvayv אַלְבִּישׁ albish בֹּשֶׁת boshet וְעָלָיו vealayv יָצִיץ yatzitz נִזְרוֹ nizro

Psalm 133

1
A song of ascents. Of David.How good and how pleasant it isthat kindred dwell together.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot לְדָוִד ledavid הִנֵּה hineh מַה mah טּוֹב tov וּמַה umah נָּעִים naim שֶׁבֶת shevet אַחִים achim גַּם gam יָחַד yachad
2
It is like fine oil on the headrunning down onto the beard,the beard of Aaron,that comes down over the collar of his robe;
כַּשֶּׁמֶן kashemen הַטּוֹב hatov עַל al הָרֹאשׁ harosh יֹרֵד yored עַל al הַזָּקָן hazakan זְקַן zekan אַהֲרֹן aharon שֶׁיֹּרֵד sheyored עַל al פִּי pi מִדּוֹתָיו midotayv
3
like the dew of Hermonthat falls upon the mountains of Zion.There GOD ordained blessing,everlasting life.
כְּטַל ketal חֶרְמוֹן chermon שֶׁיֹּרֵד sheyored עַל al הַרְרֵי harerey צִיּוֹן tzion כִּי ki שָׁם sham צִוָּה tziuah יְהֹוָה Adonai אֶת et הַבְּרָכָה habrakhah חַיִּים chayim עַד ad הָעוֹלָם haolam

Psalm 134

1
A song of ascents.Now bless GOD,all you servants of GOD who stand nightlyin GOD’s house.
שִׁיר shir הַמַּעֲלוֹת hamaalot הִנֵּה hineh בָּרְכוּ barkhu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl עַבְדֵי avdey יְהֹוָה Adonai הָעֹמְדִים haomdim בְּבֵית beveyt יְהֹוָה Adonai בַּלֵּילוֹת baleylot
2
Lift your hands toward the sanctuaryand bless GOD.
שְׂאוּ seu יְדֵכֶם yedekhem קֹדֶשׁ kodesh וּבָרְכוּ uvarkhu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai
3
May GOD,maker of heaven and earth,bless you from Zion.
יְבָרֶכְךָ yevarekhkha יְהֹוָה Adonai מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion עֹשֵׂה oseh שָׁמַיִם shamayim וָאָרֶץ vaaretz

Psalm 135

1
Hallelujah.Praise the name of GOD;give praise, you servants of GOD
הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah הַלְלוּ halelu אֶת et שֵׁם shem יְהֹוָה Adonai הַלְלוּ halelu עַבְדֵי avdey יְהֹוָה Adonai
2
who stand in the house of GOD,in the courts of the house of our God.
שֶׁעֹמְדִים sheomdim בְּבֵית beveyt יְהֹוָה Adonai בְּחַצְרוֹת bechatzrot בֵּית beyt אֱלֹהֵינוּ eloheynu
3
Praise Yah, for GOD is good;sing hymns to this name, for it is pleasant.
הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah כִּי ki טוֹב tov יְהֹוָה Adonai זַמְּרוּ zamru לִשְׁמוֹ lishmo כִּי ki נָעִים naim
4
For Yah has chosen to keep Jacob close,[treating] Israel as a treasured possession.
כִּי ki יַעֲקֹב yaakov בָּחַר bachar לוֹ lo יָהּ Yah יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael לִסְגֻלָּתוֹ lisgulato
5
For I know that GOD is great,that our Sovereign is greater than all gods.
כִּי ki אֲנִי ani יָדַעְתִּי yadati כִּי ki גָדוֹל gadol יְהֹוָה Adonai וַאֲדֹנֵינוּ vaadoneynu מִכּל mikl אֱלֹהִים Elohim
6
Whatever GOD desires is donein heaven and earth,in the seas and all the depths.
כֹּל kol אֲשֶׁר asher חָפֵץ chafetz יְהֹוָה Adonai עָשָׂה asah בַּשָּׁמַיִם bashamayim וּבָאָרֶץ uvaaretz בַּיַּמִּים bayamim וְכל vekhl תְּהֹמוֹת tehomot
7
This is who makes clouds rise from the end of the earth;who makes lightning for the rain;who releases the wind from divine vaults.
מַעֲלֶה maaleh נְשִׂאִים nesiim מִקְצֵה miktzeh הָאָרֶץ haaretz בְּרָקִים berakim לַמָּטָר lamatar עָשָׂה asah מוֹצֵא motze רוּחַ ruach מֵאוֹצְרוֹתָיו meotzrotayv
8
[God] struck down the first-born of Egypt,human and animal alike—
שֶׁהִכָּה shehikah בְּכוֹרֵי bekhorey מִצְרָיִם mitzrayim מֵאָדָם meadam עַד ad בְּהֵמָה behemah
9
sending signs and portents against Egypt,against Pharaoh and all his servants,
שָׁלַח shalach אוֹתֹת otot וּמֹפְתִים umoftim בְּתוֹכֵכִי betokhekhi מִצְרָיִם mitzrayim בְּפַרְעֹה befaroh וּבְכל uvkhl עֲבָדָיו avadayv
10
striking down many nationsand slaying numerous kings—
שֶׁהִכָּה shehikah גּוֹיִם goyim רַבִּים rabim וְהָרַג veharag מְלָכִים melakhim עֲצוּמִים atzumim
11
Sihon, king of the Amorites,Og, king of Bashan,and all the royalty of Canaan—
לְסִיחוֹן lesichon מֶלֶךְ melekh הָאֱמֹרִי haemori וּלְעוֹג ulog מֶלֶךְ melekh הַבָּשָׁן habashan וּלְכֹל ulkhol מַמְלְכוֹת mamlkhot כְּנָעַן kenaan
12
and giving their lands as a heritage,as a heritage to Israel—God’s people.
וְנָתַן venatan אַרְצָם artzam נַחֲלָה nachalah נַחֲלָה nachalah לְיִשְׂרָאֵל leyisrael עַמּוֹ amo
13
O ETERNAL One, Your name endures forever,Your fame, O ETERNAL One, through all generations;
יְהֹוָה Adonai שִׁמְךָ shimkha לְעוֹלָם leolam יְהֹוָה Adonai זִכְרְךָ zikhrkha לְדֹר ledor וָדֹר vador
14
for GOD will champion this people,and obtain satisfaction for their service.
כִּי ki יָדִין yadin יְהֹוָה Adonai עַמּוֹ amo וְעַל veal עֲבָדָיו avadayv יִתְנֶחָם yitnecham
15
The idols of the nations are silver and gold,the work of human hands.
עֲצַבֵּי atzabey הַגּוֹיִם hagoyim כֶּסֶף kesef וְזָהָב vezahav מַעֲשֵׂה maaseh יְדֵי yedey אָדָם adam
16
They have mouths, but cannot speak;they have eyes, but cannot see;
פֶּה peh לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יְדַבֵּרוּ yedaberu עֵינַיִם eynayim לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יִרְאוּ yiru
17
they have ears, but cannot hear,nor is there breath in their mouths.
אזְנַיִם znayim לָהֶם lahem וְלֹא velo יַאֲזִינוּ yaazinu אַף af אֵין eyn יֶשׁ yesh רוּחַ ruach בְּפִיהֶם befihem
18
Those who fashion them,all who trust in them,shall become like them.
כְּמוֹהֶם kemohem יִהְיוּ yihyu עֹשֵׂיהֶם oseyhem כֹּל kol אֲשֶׁר asher בֹּטֵחַ boteach בָּהֶם bahem
19
O house of Israel, bless GOD;O house of Aaron, bless GOD;
בֵּית beyt יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael בָּרְכוּ barkhu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai בֵּית beyt אַהֲרֹן aharon בָּרְכוּ barkhu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai
20
O house of Levi, bless GOD;you who fear GOD, bless GOD.
בֵּית beyt הַלֵּוִי halevi בָּרְכוּ barkhu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai יִרְאֵי yirey יְהֹוָה Adonai בָּרְכוּ barkhu אֶת et יְהֹוָה Adonai
21
Blessed is GOD from Zion,the One who dwells in Jerusalem.Hallelujah.
בָּרוּךְ barukh יְהֹוָה Adonai מִצִּיּוֹן mitzion שֹׁכֵן shokhen יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim הַלְלוּ halelu יָהּ Yah

Psalm 136

1
Praise GOD, who is good,—whose steadfast love is eternal.
הוֹדוּ hodu לַיהֹוָה layhovah כִּי ki טוֹב tov כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
2
Praise the God of gods,—whose steadfast love is eternal.
הוֹדוּ hodu לֵאלֹהֵי lelohey הָאֱלֹהִים haelohim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
3
Praise the Sovereign of sovereigns,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
הוֹדוּ hodu לַאֲדֹנֵי laadoney הָאֲדֹנִים haadonim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
4
Who alone works great marvels,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְעֹשֵׂה leoseh נִפְלָאוֹת niflaot גְּדֹלוֹת gedolot לְבַדּוֹ levado כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
5
Who made the heavens with wisdom,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְעֹשֵׂה leoseh הַשָּׁמַיִם hashamayim בִּתְבוּנָה bitvunah כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
6
Who spread the earth over the water,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְרֹקַע leroka הָאָרֶץ haaretz עַל al הַמָּיִם hamayim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
7
Who made the great lights,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְעֹשֵׂה leoseh אוֹרִים orim גְּדֹלִים gedolim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
8
the sun to dominate the day,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
אֶת et הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ hashemesh לְמֶמְשֶׁלֶת lememshelet בַּיּוֹם bayom כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
9
the moon and the stars to dominate the night,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
אֶת et הַיָּרֵחַ hayareach וְכוֹכָבִים vekhokhavim לְמֶמְשְׁלוֹת lememshlot בַּלָּיְלָה balaylah כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
10
Who struck Egypt through their first-born,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְמַכֵּה lemakeh מִצְרַיִם mitzrayim בִּבְכוֹרֵיהֶם bivkhoreyhem כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
11
and brought Israel out of their midst,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וַיּוֹצֵא vayotze יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael מִתּוֹכָם mitokham כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
12
with a strong hand and outstretched arm,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
בְּיָד beyad חֲזָקָה chazakah וּבִזְרוֹעַ uvizroa נְטוּיָה netuyah כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
13
Who split apart the Sea of Reeds,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְגֹזֵר legozer יַם yam סוּף suf לִגְזָרִים ligzarim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
14
and made Israel pass through it,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וְהֶעֱבִיר veheevir יִשְׂרָאֵל yisrael בְּתוֹכוֹ betokho כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
15
Who hurled Pharaoh and his army into the Sea of Reeds,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וְנִעֵר venier פַּרְעֹה paroh וְחֵילוֹ vecheylo בְיַם veyam סוּף suf כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
16
Who led this people through the wilderness,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְמוֹלִיךְ lemolikh עַמּוֹ amo בַּמִּדְבָּר bamidbar כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
17
Who struck down great kings,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְמַכֵּה lemakeh מְלָכִים melakhim גְּדֹלִים gedolim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
18
and slew mighty kings,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וַיַּהֲרֹג vayaharog מְלָכִים melakhim אַדִּירִים adirim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
19
Sihon, king of the Amorites,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
לְסִיחוֹן lesichon מֶלֶךְ melekh הָאֱמֹרִי haemori כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
20
Og, king of Bashan,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וּלְעוֹג ulog מֶלֶךְ melekh הַבָּשָׁן habashan כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
21
and gave their land as a heritage,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וְנָתַן venatan אַרְצָם artzam לְנַחֲלָה lenachalah כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
22
a heritage to Israel—God’s servant,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
נַחֲלָה nachalah לְיִשְׂרָאֵל leyisrael עַבְדּוֹ avdo כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
23
Who took note of us in our degradation,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
שֶׁבְּשִׁפְלֵנוּ shebshiflenu זָכַר zakhar לָנוּ lanu כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
24
and rescued us from our enemies,—whose steadfast love is eternal;
וַיִּפְרְקֵנוּ vayifrkenu מִצָּרֵינוּ mitzareynu כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
25
Who gives food to all flesh,—whose steadfast love is eternal.
נֹתֵן noten לֶחֶם lechem לְכל lekhl בָּשָׂר basar כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo
26
Praise the God of heaven,—whose steadfast love is eternal.
הוֹדוּ hodu לְאֵל leel הַשָּׁמָיִם hashamayim כִּי ki לְעוֹלָם leolam חַסְדּוֹ chasdo

Psalm 137

1
By the rivers of Babylon,there we sat,sat and wept,as we thought of Zion.
עַל al נַהֲרוֹת naharot בָּבֶל bavel שָׁם sham יָשַׁבְנוּ yashavnu גַּם gam בָּכִינוּ bakhinu בְּזכְרֵנוּ bezkhrenu אֶת et צִיּוֹן tzion
2
There on the poplarswe hung up our lyres,
עַל al עֲרָבִים aravim בְּתוֹכָהּ betokhah תָּלִינוּ talinu כִּנֹּרוֹתֵינוּ kinoroteynu
3
for our captors asked us there for songs,our tormentors, for amusement:“Sing us one of the songs of Zion.”
כִּי ki שָׁם sham שְׁאֵלוּנוּ sheelunu שׁוֹבֵינוּ shoveynu דִּבְרֵי divrey שִׁיר shir וְתוֹלָלֵינוּ vetolaleynu שִׂמְחָה simchah שִׁירוּ shiru לָנוּ lanu מִשִּׁיר mishir צִיּוֹן tzion
4
How can we sing a song of GOD on alien soil?
אֵיךְ eykh נָשִׁיר nashir אֶת et שִׁיר shir יְהֹוָה Adonai עַל al אַדְמַת admat נֵכָר nekhar
5
If I forget you, O Jerusalem,let my right hand wither;
אִם im אֶשְׁכָּחֵךְ eshkachekh יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim תִּשְׁכַּח tishkach יְמִינִי yemini
6
let my tongue stick to my palateif I cease to think of you,if I do not keep Jerusalem in memoryeven at my happiest hour.
תִּדְבַּק tidbak לְשׁוֹנִי leshoni לְחִכִּי lechiki אִם im לֹא lo אֶזְכְּרֵכִי ezkrekhi אִם im לֹא lo אַעֲלֶה aaleh אֶת et יְרוּשָׁלַ͏ִם yerushalaim עַל al רֹאשׁ rosh שִׂמְחָתִי simchati
7
Remember, O ETERNAL One, against the Edomitesthe day of Jerusalem’s fall;how they cried, “Strip her, strip herto her very foundations!”
זְכֹר zekhor יְהֹוָה Adonai לִבְנֵי livney אֱדוֹם edom אֵת et יוֹם yom יְרוּשָׁלָ͏ִם yerushalaim הָאֹמְרִים haomrim עָרוּ aru עָרוּ aru עַד ad הַיְסוֹד haysod בָּהּ bah
8
Fair Babylon, you predator, a blessing on the one who repays you in kindwhat you have inflicted on us;
בַּת bat בָּבֶל bavel הַשְּׁדוּדָה hashdudah אַשְׁרֵי ashrey שֶׁיְשַׁלֶּם sheyshalem לָךְ lakh אֶת et גְּמוּלֵךְ gemulekh שֶׁגָּמַלְתְּ shegamalt לָנוּ lanu
9
a blessing on the one who seizes your babiesand dashes them against the rocks!
אַשְׁרֵי ashrey שֶׁיֹּאחֵז sheyochez וְנִפֵּץ venipetz אֶת et עֹלָלַיִךְ olalayikh אֶל El הַסָּלַע hasala

Psalm 138

1
Of David.I praise You with all my heart,sing a hymn to You before the divine beings;
לְדָוִד ledavid אוֹדְךָ odkha בְכל vekhl לִבִּי libi נֶגֶד neged אֱלֹהִים Elohim אֲזַמְּרֶךָּ azamreka
2
I bow toward Your holy templeand praise Your name for Your steadfast love and faithfulness,because You have exalted Your name, Your word, above all.
אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶה eshtachaveh אֶל El הֵיכַל heykhal קדְשְׁךָ kdshkha וְאוֹדֶה veodeh אֶת et שְׁמֶךָ shemekha עַל al חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha וְעַל veal אֲמִתֶּךָ amitekha כִּי ki הִגְדַּלְתָּ higdalta עַל al כּל kl שִׁמְךָ shimkha אִמְרָתֶךָ imratekha
3
When I called, You answered me,You inspired me with courage.
בְּיוֹם beyom קָרָאתִי karati וַתַּעֲנֵנִי vataaneni תַּרְהִבֵנִי tarhiveni בְנַפְשִׁי venafshi עֹז oz
4
All the kings of the earth shall praise You, O ETERNAL One,for they have heard the words You spoke.
יוֹדוּךָ yodukha יְהֹוָה Adonai כּל kl מַלְכֵי malkhey אָרֶץ aretz כִּי ki שָׁמְעוּ shamu אִמְרֵי imrey פִיךָ fikha
5
They shall sing of GOD’s ways,“Great is GOD’s majesty!”
וְיָשִׁירוּ veyashiru בְּדַרְכֵי bedarkhey יְהֹוָה Adonai כִּי ki גָדוֹל gadol כְּבוֹד kevod יְהֹוָה Adonai
6
From way up high GOD sees the lowly;aloft, yet perceiving from afar.
כִּי ki רָם ram יְהֹוָה Adonai וְשָׁפָל veshafal יִרְאֶה yireh וְגָבֹהַּ vegavoha מִמֶּרְחָק mimerchak יְיֵדָע yeyeda
7
Though I walk among enemies,You preserve me in the face of my foes;You extend Your hand;with Your right hand You deliver me.
אִם im אֵלֵךְ elekh בְּקֶרֶב bekerev צָרָה tzarah תְּחַיֵּנִי techayeni עַל al אַף af אֹיְבַי oyvay תִּשְׁלַח tishlach יָדֶךָ yadekha וְתוֹשִׁיעֵנִי vetoshieni יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
8
GOD will settle accounts for me.O ETERNAL One, Your steadfast love is eternal;do not forsake the work of Your hands.
יְהֹוָה Adonai יִגְמֹר yigmor בַּעֲדִי baadi יְהֹוָה Adonai חַסְדְּךָ chasdkha לְעוֹלָם leolam מַעֲשֵׂי maasey יָדֶיךָ yadeykha אַל El תֶּרֶף teref

Psalm 139

1
For the leader. Of David. A psalm.O ETERNAL One, You have examined me and know me.
לַמְנַצֵּחַ lamnatzeach לְדָוִד ledavid מִזְמוֹר mizmor יְהֹוָה Adonai חֲקַרְתַּנִי chakartani וַתֵּדָע vateda
2
When I sit down or stand up You know it;You discern my thoughts from afar.
אַתָּה atah יָדַעְתָּ yadata שִׁבְתִּי shivti וְקוּמִי vekumi בַּנְתָּה bantah לְרֵעִי lerei מֵרָחוֹק merachok
3
You observe my walking and reclining,and are familiar with all my ways.
ארְחִי rchi וְרִבְעִי verivi זֵרִיתָ zerita וְכל vekhl דְּרָכַי derakhay הִסְכַּנְתָּה hiskantah
4
There is not a word on my tonguebut that You, O ETERNAL One, know it well.
כִּי ki אֵין eyn מִלָּה milah בִּלְשׁוֹנִי bilshoni הֵן hen יְהֹוָה Adonai יָדַעְתָּ yadata כֻלָּהּ khulah
5
You hedge me before and behind;You lay Your hand upon me.
אָחוֹר achor וָקֶדֶם vakedem צַרְתָּנִי tzartani וַתָּשֶׁת vatashet עָלַי alay כַּפֶּכָה kapekhah
6
It is beyond my knowledge;it is a mystery; I cannot fathom it.
(פלאיה) flyh [פְּלִיאָה] peliah דַעַת daat מִמֶּנִּי mimeni נִשְׂגְּבָה nisgvah לֹא lo אוּכַל ukhal לָהּ lah
7
Where can I escape from Your spirit?Where can I flee from Your presence?
אָנָה anah אֵלֵךְ elekh מֵרוּחֶךָ meruchekha וְאָנָה veanah מִפָּנֶיךָ mipaneykha אֶבְרָח evrach
8
If I ascend to heaven, You are there;if I descend to Sheol, You are there too.
אִם im אֶסַּק esak שָׁמַיִם shamayim שָׁם sham אָתָּה atah וְאַצִּיעָה veatziah שְּׁאוֹל sheol הִנֶּךָּ hineka
9
If I take wing with the dawnto come to rest on the western horizon,
אֶשָּׂא esa כַנְפֵי khanfey שָׁחַר shachar אֶשְׁכְּנָה eshknah בְּאַחֲרִית beacharit יָם yam
10
even there Your hand will be guiding me,Your right hand will be holding me fast.
גַּם gam שָׁם sham יָדְךָ yadkha תַנְחֵנִי tancheni וְתֹאחֲזֵנִי vetochazeni יְמִינֶךָ yeminekha
11
If I say, “Surely darkness will conceal me,night will provide me with cover,”
וָאֹמַר vaomar אַךְ akh חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh יְשׁוּפֵנִי yeshufeni וְלַיְלָה velaylah אוֹר or בַּעֲדֵנִי baadeni
12
darkness is not dark for You;night is as light as day;darkness and light are the same.
גַּם gam חֹשֶׁךְ choshekh לֹא lo יַחְשִׁיךְ yachshikh מִמֶּךָּ mimeka וְלַיְלָה velaylah כַּיּוֹם kayom יָאִיר yair כַּחֲשֵׁיכָה kachasheykhah כָּאוֹרָה kaorah
13
It was You who created my conscience; You fashioned me in my mother’s womb.
